                    userSettings.emailTemplates.requester.subject = rqS.replace("FYI: ", "");
                    saveCurrentSettings(true);
                }
            }
        } catch (e) {
        }

        EliState.set("tp.showRedlinePreviews", !!userSettings.showRedlinePreviews);
    }

    function _syncSettingsCheckboxes() {
        var chkSpeech = document.getElementById("chkAiSpeechBubbles");
        if (chkSpeech) chkSpeech.checked = userSettings.enableSpeechBubbles !== false;
        var chkFeed = document.getElementById("chkMinimizeFeed");
        if (chkFeed) chkFeed.checked = userSettings.minimizeFeedOnStart;
        var chkSidebar = document.getElementById("chkAutoHideSidebar");
        if (chkSidebar) chkSidebar.checked = userSettings.autoHideSidebar;
        if (userSettings.autoHideSidebar) {
            var panel = document.querySelector(".v1-left");
            if (panel) panel.classList.add("collapsed");
        }
    }

    var EliState = (function () {
        var _state = {};
        var _listeners = [];
        return {
            get: function (key) {
                return _state[key];
            },
            set: function (key, value) {
                if (value === undefined) {
                    delete _state[key];
                } else {
                    _state[key] = value;
                }
                for (var i = 0; i < _listeners.length; i++) {
                    var l = _listeners[i];
                    if (l.key === key || l.key === "*") {
                        try {
                            l.fn(key, value);
                        } catch (e) {
                            if (typeof ELI_DEBUG !== "undefined" && ELI_DEBUG) console.error("EliState listener error:", e);
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            on: function (key, fn) {
                _listeners.push({ key: key, fn: fn });
            },
            off: function (key, fn) {
                _listeners = _listeners.filter(function (l) {
                    return !(l.key === key && l.fn === fn);
                });
            },
            reset: function (prefix) {
                var keys = Object.keys(_state);
                for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
                    if (keys[i].indexOf(prefix) === 0) delete _state[keys[i]];
                }
            },
            dump: function () {
                return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_state));
            },
        };
    })();

    function eliSectionLabel(text, opts) {
        var o = opts || {};
        var fs = o.fontSize || "9px";
        var fw = o.fontWeight || "800";
        var c = o.color || "#64748b";
        var ls = o.letterSpacing || "0.5px";
        var mb = o.marginBottom || "4px";
        var extra = o.style || "";
        return (
            '<div style="font-size:' +
            fs +
            "; font-weight:" +
            fw +
            "; color:" +
            c +
            "; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:" +
            ls +
            "; margin-bottom:" +
            mb +
            ";" +
            (extra ? " " + extra : "") +
            '">' +
            text +
            "</div>"
        );
    }

    function eliBadge(label, variant) {
        var palettes = {
            accepted: { bg: "#dcfce7", fg: "#166534", border: "#86efac" },
            rejected: { bg: "#fee2e2", fg: "#991b1b", border: "#fca5a5" },
            revised: { bg: "#ede9fe", fg: "#6d28d9", border: "#c4b5fd" },
            various: { bg: "#ede9fe", fg: "#5b21b6", border: "#c4b5fd" },
            info: { bg: "#dbeafe", fg: "#1e40af", border: "#93c5fd" },
            warning: { bg: "#fef3c7", fg: "#92400e", border: "#fcd34d" },
            danger: { bg: "#fee2e2", fg: "#991b1b", border: "#fca5a5" },
            success: { bg: "#dcfce7", fg: "#166534", border: "#86efac" },
            purple: { bg: "#ede7f6", fg: "#311b92", border: "#d1c4e9" },
            default: { bg: "#f1f5f9", fg: "#64748b", border: "#cbd5e1" },
        };
        var p = palettes[variant] || palettes["default"];
        return (
            '<span style="font-size:8.5px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:3px; text-transform:uppercase; display:inline-block; background:' +
            p.bg +
            "; color:" +
            p.fg +
            "; border:1px solid " +
            p.border +
            ';">' +
            label +
            "</span>"
        );
    }

    function eliCard(opts) {
        var o = opts || {};
        var accent = o.accentColor || "#1565c0";
        var bg = o.background || "#fff";
        var pad = o.padding || "12px";
        var bw = o.borderWidth || "4px";
        var mb = o.marginBottom || "10px";
        var cls = o.className || "";
        var extra = o.style || "";
        return (
            "<div" +
            (cls ? ' class="' + cls + '"' : "") +
            ' style="background:' +
            bg +
            "; border:1px solid #ddd; border-left:" +
            bw +
            " solid " +
            accent +
            "; padding:" +
            pad +
            "; margin-bottom:" +
            mb +
            ";" +
            (extra ? " " + extra : "") +
            '">' +
            (o.children || "") +
            "</div>"
        );
    }

    function eliButton(label, opts) {
        var o = opts || {};
        var cls = "btn-platinum-config";
        if (o.primary) cls += " primary";
        var idAttr = o.id ? ' id="' + o.id + '"' : "";
        var style = "";
        if (o.danger) style += "color:#c62828; border-color:#ef9a9a; ";
        if (o.style) style += o.style;
        var icon = o.icon ? o.icon + " " : "";
        var onclick = o.onclick ? ' onclick="' + o.onclick + '"' : "";
        return (
            "<button" +
            idAttr +
            ' class="' +
            cls +
            '"' +
            (style ? ' style="' + style + '"' : "") +
            onclick +
            ">" +
            icon +
            label +
            "</button>"
        );
    }

    var currentController = null;

    var loadingInterval = null;

    var chatHistory = [];

    var AGREEMENT_DATA = null;

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        const groupSelector = document.getElementById("selUserGroup");
        if (groupSelector) {
            groupSelector.value = userSettings.userGroup || "External Innovation";
            groupSelector.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
                userSettings.userGroup = e.target.value;
                saveCurrentSettings();
            });
        }
    });

    (function () {
        function initSettingsListeners() {
            var btnImport = document.getElementById("btnImportRequesters");
            var fileInput = document.getElementById("fileImportRequesters");
            if (btnImport && fileInput) {
                btnImport.onclick = function (e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    fileInput.click();
                };
                fileInput.onchange = function (e) {
                    if (!e.target.files || e.target.files.length === 0) return;
                    var file = e.target.files[0];
                    var reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function (event) {
                        try {
                            var content = event.target.result;
                            var json = JSON.parse(content);
                            if (Array.isArray(json)) {
                                var validItems = json.filter((item) => item && typeof item === "object" && item.email && item.name);
                                var invalidCount = json.length - validItems.length;
                                loadFeatureData(STORE_REQUESTERS).then(function (existing) {
                                    var combined = (existing || []).concat(validItems);
                                    saveFeatureData(STORE_REQUESTERS, combined).then(() => {
                                        if (validItems.length > 0) showToast("✅ " + validItems.length + " Requesters Imported");
                                        if (invalidCount > 0) showToast("⚠️ Skipped " + invalidCount + " invalid items");
                                    });
                                });
                            } else {
                                showToast("⚠️ Invalid Data: Expected Array");
                            }
                        } catch (err) {
                            showToast("⚠️ Bad JSON File. Please check format.");
                        }
                        fileInput.value = "";
                    };
                    reader.readAsText(file);
                };
            }
            var btnReqMgr = document.getElementById("btnManageRequesters");
            if (btnReqMgr) {
                btnReqMgr.onclick = function () {
                    var sm = document.getElementById("settingsMenu");
                    if (sm) {
                        sm.classList.add("hidden");
                        sm.style.display = "none";
                    }
                    showRequestersEditor();
                };
            }
        }
        if (document.readyState === "complete" || document.readyState === "interactive") {
            initSettingsListeners();
        } else {
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", initSettingsListeners);
        }
    })();

    function _esc(s) {
        return String(s == null ? "" : s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, function (c) {
            return { "&": "&amp;", "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", '"': "&quot;", "'": "&#39;" }[c];
        });
    }

    function showRequestersEditor() {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
        var current = [];
        var card = document.createElement("div");
        card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
        card.style.cssText = "padding:0; border-radius:0px; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-left:5px solid #1565c0; background:#fff;";
        var header = createConfigHeader("SYSTEM CONFIGURATION", "👥", "Requesters", { marginBottom: "12px" });
        header.style.padding = "8px 15px";
        card.appendChild(header);
        var body = document.createElement("div");
        body.style.padding = "10px 15px";
        card.appendChild(body);
        out.appendChild(card);
        function persist() { return saveFeatureData(STORE_REQUESTERS, current); }
        function renderList() {
            body.innerHTML = `
                <div style="font-size:10px; color:#888; margin-bottom:8px;">Manage requesters used by the Contract Emailer. Edits save automatically.</div>
                <div id="reqList" style="margin-bottom:12px;"></div>
                <div style="display:flex; gap:6px; margin-bottom:12px;">
                    <input type="text" id="txtNewReqName" class="tool-input" placeholder="Full name..." style="flex:1; font-size:11px;">
                    <input type="text" id="txtNewReqEmail" class="tool-input" placeholder="email@example.com" style="flex:1.3; font-size:11px;">
                    <button id="btnAddReq" class="btn-action" style="font-size:10px; padding:4px 10px; white-space:nowrap;">+ Add</button>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                    <button id="btnExportReq" class="btn-action" style="font-size:11px; padding:6px 16px; background:#1565c0; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:700;">📥 Export JSON</button>
                    <button id="btnCancelReq" class="btn-action" style="font-size:11px; padding:6px 16px; background:#eee; color:#333; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;">Close</button>
                </div>`;
            var list = body.querySelector("#reqList");
            if (!current.length) list.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:14px; text-align:center; font-size:11px; color:#999; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px dashed #ddd;">No requesters yet. Add one below.</div>';
            current.forEach((r, i) => {
                var row = document.createElement("div");
                row.style.cssText = "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:5px 8px; margin-bottom:2px; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px solid #e9ecef; border-radius:4px;";
                row.innerHTML = `<input class="rq-name" data-i="${i}" value="${_esc(r.name)}" placeholder="Name" style="flex:1; min-width:0; font-size:11px; padding:3px 6px; border:1px solid #d0d7de; background:#fff;"><input class="rq-email" data-i="${i}" value="${_esc(r.email)}" placeholder="Email" style="flex:1.3; min-width:0; font-size:11px; padding:3px 6px; border:1px solid #d0d7de; background:#fff;"><button class="rq-up" data-i="${i}" title="Move Up" style="background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:10px; padding:2px 4px; color:#1565c0;">▲</button><button class="rq-dn" data-i="${i}" title="Move Down" style="background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:10px; padding:2px 4px; color:#1565c0;">▼</button><button class="rq-rm" data-i="${i}" title="Remove" style="background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; padding:2px 4px; color:#c62828;">✕</button>`;
                list.appendChild(row);
            });
        }
        body.addEventListener("change", e => {
            if (!e.target.matches("input[data-i]")) return;
            var i = parseInt(e.target.getAttribute("data-i")), v = e.target.value.trim();
            if (e.target.classList.contains("rq-name")) current[i].name = v;
            if (e.target.classList.contains("rq-email")) {
                if (v && v.indexOf("@") === -1) showToast("⚠️ Email looks invalid");
                current[i].email = v;
            }
            persist();
        });
        body.addEventListener("click", e => {
            var btn = e.target.closest("button");
            if (!btn) return;
            var i = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-i"));
            if (btn.classList.contains("rq-up") && i > 0) [current[i], current[i - 1]] = [current[i - 1], current[i]];
            else if (btn.classList.contains("rq-dn") && i < current.length - 1) [current[i], current[i + 1]] = [current[i + 1], current[i]];
            else if (btn.classList.contains("rq-rm")) current.splice(i, 1);
            else if (btn.id === "btnAddReq") {
                var n = document.getElementById("txtNewReqName").value.trim(), em = document.getElementById("txtNewReqEmail").value.trim();
                if (!n || !em) return showToast("⚠️ Name and email required");
                if (em.indexOf("@") === -1) return showToast("⚠️ Invalid email");
                if (current.some(r => (r.email || "").toLowerCase() === em.toLowerCase())) return showToast("⚠️ Email already in list");
                current.push({ id: String(Date.now()), name: n, email: em });
            } else if (btn.id === "btnExportReq") {
                if (!current.length) return showToast("⚠️ Nothing to export");
                var url = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([JSON.stringify(current, null, 2)], { type: "application/json" }));
                var a = document.createElement("a");
                a.href = url; a.download = "requesters-" + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + ".json";
                document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);
                return showToast("✅ Exported " + current.length + " requesters");
            } else if (btn.id === "btnCancelReq") {
                out.innerHTML = "";
                out.classList.add("hidden");
                return;
            } else return;
            persist().then(renderList);
        });
        body.addEventListener("keydown", e => { if (e.key === "Enter" && e.target.id === "txtNewReqEmail") document.getElementById("btnAddReq").click(); });
        loadFeatureData(STORE_REQUESTERS).then(data => { current = Array.isArray(data) ? data : []; renderList(); });
    }

    const LOADING_MSGS = {
        default: [
            "📊 Initializing Comprehensive Scan...",
            "🛡️ Fighting legal plaque...",
            "🪥 Brushing up grammar & syntax...",
            "🔍 Identifying typos and deletions...",
            "🦷 Drilling into the fine print...",
            "🛡️ Applying Mandatory Colgate/Hill's Rules...",
            "✨ Whitening the redlines...",
            "✅ Minty fresh finish...",
        ],
    };

    function init() {
        document.documentElement.style.overflow = "hidden";
        document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (out) {
            out.style.height = "100vh";
            out.style.overflowY = "auto";
        }
        window.AGREEMENT_DATA = { status: "loading" };
        loadSavedSettings();
        _syncSettingsCheckboxes();
        _initStatsCacheFromIDB();
        loadConfigValue("agreementTypes")
            .then(function (val) {
                if (Array.isArray(val) && val.length) _cachedAgreementTypes = val;
            })
            .catch(function () { });
        if (userSettings.customAgreementTypes) {
            _cachedAgreementTypes = userSettings.customAgreementTypes;
            saveConfigValue("agreementTypes", userSettings.customAgreementTypes)
                .then(function () {
                    delete userSettings.customAgreementTypes;
                    saveCurrentSettings(!0);
                })
                .catch(function () { });
        }
        applyHeaderTheme();
        PROMPTS.initDocDB().then(() => {
            window.AGREEMENT_DATA = { status: "loading" };
            getDocumentGuid().then((docId) => {
                window.CURRENT_DOC_ID = docId;
                PROMPTS.loadDocFromDB(docId).then((record) => {
                    if (record && record.data) {
                        if (record.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".docx")) {
                            if (typeof mammoth !== "undefined") {
                                mammoth
                                    .convertToHtml({ arrayBuffer: record.data })
                                    .then(function (result) {
                                        var cleanText = result.value.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, " ");
                                        window.AGREEMENT_DATA = { name: record.name, text: cleanText };
                                        var btn = document.querySelector("#footerBtnViewFile span");
                                        if (btn) btn.innerText = "⚡";
                                    })
                                    .catch(function (e) {
                                    });
                            }
                        } else if (record.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".pdf")) {
                            var blob = new Blob([record.data]);
                            var reader = new FileReader();
                            reader.onloadend = function () {
                                var b64 = reader.result.split(",")[1];
                                window.AGREEMENT_DATA = { name: record.name, isBase64: !0, mime: "application/pdf", data: b64 };
                                var btn = document.querySelector("#footerBtnViewFile span");
                                if (btn) btn.innerText = "⚡";
                            };
                            reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
                        } else {
                            var dec = new TextDecoder("utf-8");
                            window.AGREEMENT_DATA = { name: record.name, text: dec.decode(record.data) };
                        }
                    } else {
                        window.AGREEMENT_DATA = null;
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        renderMainFooter();
        var btnSettings = document.getElementById("btnHeaderSettings");
        var settingsMenu = document.getElementById("settingsMenu");
        if (btnSettings && settingsMenu) {
            btnSettings.title = "Open Settings";
            function resetSettingsMenuState() {
                var editPanel = document.getElementById("modelEditPanel");
                if (editPanel) editPanel.classList.add("hidden");
                var btnEdit = document.getElementById("btnEditModels");
                if (btnEdit) btnEdit.innerHTML = "✏️ Edit";
                var gridView = document.getElementById("cc-grid-view");
                var detailView = document.getElementById("cc-detail-view");
                if (gridView) gridView.style.display = "flex";
                if (detailView) detailView.style.display = "none";
            }
            function closeSettingsMenu() {
                settingsMenu.classList.add("hidden");
                settingsMenu.style.display = "none";
                resetSettingsMenuState();
            }
            function openSettingsMenu() {
                settingsMenu.classList.remove("hidden");
                settingsMenu.style.display = "block";
            }
            btnSettings.onclick = function (e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                if (settingsMenu.classList.contains("hidden") || settingsMenu.style.display === "none") {
                    openSettingsMenu();
                } else {
                    closeSettingsMenu();
                }
            };
            var btnCloseX = document.getElementById("btnCloseSettingsMain");
            if (btnCloseX)
                btnCloseX.onclick = function () {
                    closeSettingsMenu();
                };
            document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
                if (!settingsMenu.contains(e.target) && !btnSettings.contains(e.target)) {
                    closeSettingsMenu();
                }
            });
            settingsMenu.onclick = function (e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
            };
        }
        var btnEmail = document.getElementById("btnEmailSettings");
        if (btnEmail)
            btnEmail.onclick = function () {
                settingsMenu.classList.add("hidden");
                showConfigModal("email");
            };
        var btnFileName = document.getElementById("btnFileNameSettings");
        if (btnFileName)
            btnFileName.onclick = function () {
                settingsMenu.classList.add("hidden");
                showConfigModal("filename");
            };
        var btnReset = document.getElementById("btnGlobalReset");
        if (btnReset)
            btnReset.onclick = function () {
                settingsMenu.classList.add("hidden");
                showResetConfirmationModal();
            };
        var selData = document.getElementById("selDefaultDataSource");
        if (selData) {
            selData.value = userSettings.defaultDataSource || "local";
            selData.onchange = function () {
                userSettings.defaultDataSource = this.value;
                saveCurrentSettings();
                var footer = document.getElementById("main-footer");
                if (footer) footer.remove();
                renderMainFooter();
            };
        }
        var txtDataId = document.getElementById("txtDataSourceId");
        if (txtDataId) {
            txtDataId.value = userSettings.dataSourceId || "Onit";
            txtDataId.onchange = function () {
                userSettings.dataSourceId = this.value;
                saveCurrentSettings();
                var footer = document.getElementById("main-footer");
                if (footer) footer.remove();
                renderMainFooter();
            };
        }
        document.body.classList.add("beta-ui-active");
        var defaultModelList = [
            "gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview",
            "gemini-3-flash-preview",
            "gemini-2.5-flash",
            "gemini-2.5-pro",
        ];
        if (!userSettings.modelList || !Array.isArray(userSettings.modelList) || userSettings.modelList.length === 0) {
            userSettings.modelList = defaultModelList.slice();
        }
        function populateModelDropdown() {
            var sel = document.getElementById("selAiModel");
            if (!sel) return;
            sel.innerHTML = "";
            userSettings.modelList.forEach(function (m) {
                var opt = document.createElement("option");
                opt.value = m;
                opt.textContent = m;
                sel.appendChild(opt);
            });
            if (userSettings.model && userSettings.modelList.indexOf(userSettings.model) !== -1) {
                sel.value = userSettings.model;
            } else if (userSettings.modelList.length > 0) {
                sel.value = userSettings.modelList[0];
                userSettings.model = userSettings.modelList[0];
            }
        }
        function renderModelEditList() {
            var container = document.getElementById("modelEditList");
            if (!container) return;
            container.innerHTML = "";
            userSettings.modelList.forEach(function (m, idx) {
                var row = document.createElement("div");
                row.style.cssText = "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin-bottom:4px;";
                var inp = document.createElement("input");
                inp.type = "text";
                inp.value = m;
                inp.style.cssText =
                    "flex:1; padding:3px 6px; font-size:11px; border:1px solid #ced4da; border-radius:3px; font-family:monospace;";
                inp.onchange = function () {
                    var newName = this.value.trim();
                    if (newName && userSettings.modelList.indexOf(newName) === -1) {
                        var wasSelected = userSettings.model === userSettings.modelList[idx];
                        userSettings.modelList[idx] = newName;
                        if (wasSelected) userSettings.model = newName;
                        saveCurrentSettings();
                        populateModelDropdown();
                        showToast("✅ Model renamed");
                    } else if (!newName) {
                        this.value = userSettings.modelList[idx];
                    }
                };
                var btnDel = document.createElement("button");
                btnDel.innerHTML = "✕";
                btnDel.title = "Remove model";
                btnDel.style.cssText =
                    "padding:2px 6px; font-size:11px; border:1px solid #ef5350; border-radius:3px; background:white; color:#ef5350; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold;";
                btnDel.onclick = function () {
                    if (userSettings.modelList.length <= 1) {
                        showToast("⚠️ Must have at least one model");
                        return;
                    }
                    var removed = userSettings.modelList.splice(idx, 1)[0];
                    if (userSettings.model === removed) {
                        userSettings.model = userSettings.modelList[0];
                    }
                    saveCurrentSettings();
                    populateModelDropdown();
                    renderModelEditList();
                    showToast("🗑️ Model removed");
                };
                row.appendChild(inp);
                row.appendChild(btnDel);
                container.appendChild(row);
            });
        }
        populateModelDropdown();
        var modelSelect = document.getElementById("selAiModel");
        if (modelSelect) {
            modelSelect.onchange = function (e) {
                userSettings.model = e.target.value;
                saveCurrentSettings();
                showToast("🤖 Model: " + e.target.value);
            };
        }
        var btnEditModels = document.getElementById("btnEditModels");
        if (btnEditModels) {
            btnEditModels.onclick = function () {
                var panel = document.getElementById("modelEditPanel");
                if (panel) {
                    var isHidden = panel.classList.contains("hidden");
                    if (isHidden) {
                        panel.classList.remove("hidden");
                        renderModelEditList();
                        btnEditModels.innerHTML = "✏️ Done";
                    } else {
                        panel.classList.add("hidden");
                        btnEditModels.innerHTML = "✏️ Edit";
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        var btnAddModel = document.getElementById("btnAddModel");
        if (btnAddModel) {
            btnAddModel.onclick = function () {
                var inp = document.getElementById("txtNewModel");
                var val = inp ? inp.value.trim() : "";
                if (!val) return;
                if (userSettings.modelList.indexOf(val) !== -1) {
                    showToast("⚠️ Model already exists");
                    return;
                }
                userSettings.modelList.push(val);
                saveCurrentSettings();
                populateModelDropdown();
                renderModelEditList();
                if (inp) inp.value = "";
                showToast("✅ Model added: " + val);
            };
        }
        if (document.getElementById("txtApiKey")) {
            updateApiKeyStatusUI();
            var btnToggle = document.getElementById("btnToggleApiKeyVis");
            if (btnToggle) {
                btnToggle.onclick = function () {
                    var apiKeyInput = document.getElementById("txtApiKey");
                    if (apiKeyInput) {
                        if (apiKeyInput.type === "password") {
                            apiKeyInput.type = "text";
                            btnToggle.innerText = "🙈";
                        } else {
                            apiKeyInput.type = "password";
                            btnToggle.innerText = "👁️";
                        }
                    }
                };
            }
            var btnSaveKey = document.getElementById("btnSaveApiKey");
            if (btnSaveKey) {
                btnSaveKey.onclick = function () {
                    var apiKeyInput = document.getElementById("txtApiKey");
                    if (!apiKeyInput) return;
                    var newKey = apiKeyInput.value.trim();
                    if (!newKey) {
                        localStorage.removeItem("eli_gemini_api_key");
                        API_KEY = "";
                        updateApiKeyStatusUI();
                        showToast("🔑 API Key Removed");
                        return;
                    }
                    if (newKey.length < 10) {
                        var apiKeyStatus = document.getElementById("apiKeyStatus");
                        if (apiKeyStatus) apiKeyStatus.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#c62828;">⚠️ Key too short</span>';
                        return;
                    }
                    saveApiKey(newKey);
                    updateApiKeyStatusUI();
                    showToast("🔑 API Key Saved!");
                };
            }
        }
        var header = document.querySelector(".header");
        if (header) {
            header.style.cursor = "pointer";
            header.title = "Return to Home Screen";
            header.onclick = function (e) {
                if (e.target.closest("#btnHeaderSettings")) return;
                header.style.opacity = "0.8";
                setTimeout(function () {
                    header.style.opacity = "1";
                }, 150);
                if (document.body.classList.contains("beta-ui-active") && typeof showHome === "function") {
                    showHome();
                }
            };
        }
        if (window.ResizeObserver) {
            var resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(function (entries) {
                if (document.getElementById("pat-css-style")) return;
                for (var entry of entries) {
                    var width = entry.contentRect.width;
                    var isCompact = document.body.classList.contains("compact-mode");
                    if (width <= 550) {
                        if (!isCompact) {
                            document.body.classList.add("compact-mode");
                        }
                    }
                }
            });
            resizeObserver.observe(document.body);
        }
        if (!userSettings.installedStoreApps) {
            userSettings.installedStoreApps = [];
        }
        checkForOarsTrigger();
        var headerStoreBtn = document.getElementById("btnAppStoreHeader");
        if (headerStoreBtn) {
            headerStoreBtn.onclick = function (e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                var menu = document.getElementById("settingsMenu");
                if (menu) menu.classList.add("hidden");
                showAppStore();
            };
        }
        document.body.classList.add("beta-ui-active");
        var outputEl = document.getElementById("output");
        if (outputEl) outputEl.classList.remove("hidden");
        if (!userSettings.hasOnboarded) {
            showOnboardingSetup();
        } else {
            showHome();
        }
        if (typeof Word !== "undefined") {
            try {
                Word.run(function (context) {
                    var body = context.document.body;
                    var props = context.document.properties;
                    context.load(body, "text");
                    context.load(props, "title");
                    return context.sync().then(function () {
                        var text = (body.text || "").trim();
                        if (text.length > 20) {
                            var title = (props.title || "").trim();
                            var words = text.split(/\s+/).length;
                            var summary = title ? title + " (" + words.toLocaleString() + " words)" : words.toLocaleString() + " words";
                            if (!window._hasLoggedInitialDocLoadStatus) {
                                window._hasLoggedInitialDocLoadStatus = true;
                                window.addActivity({
                                    type: "doc-loaded",
                                    icon: "📄",
                                    label: "Loaded Doc",
                                    summary: summary,
                                    payload: null,
                                });
                            }
                        }
                    });
                }).catch(function () { });
            } catch (e) { }
        }
        if (window.adjustAppZoom) {
            window.adjustAppZoom("auto");
        }
        window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
            var hasOverlay = !!document.querySelector(".help-overlay") || !!document.querySelector(".catalog-modal");
            if (window.adjustAppZoom && !hasOverlay) {
                window.adjustAppZoom("auto");
            }
        });
    }

    function runInteractiveErrorCheck(onDoneCallback) {
        window._eliActionStartTime = Date.now();
        if (typeof recordEliStat === "function") recordEliStat("appOpenedError");
        var safeCallback = function () {
            if (typeof onDoneCallback === "function") onDoneCallback();
        };
        var p1 = validateApiAndGetText(!1, "error").then(function (text) {
            window.lastErrorScanText = text;
            var mode = userSettings.sensitivity || "Balanced";
            var instructions =
                "TASK 1: GRAMMAR, SPELLING & PUNCTUATION\nIdentify ALL grammatical errors, spelling mistakes, punctuation issues, and awkward phrasing.\nMISSING PUNCTUATION IS A TOP PRIORITY. Flag every instance of missing punctuation including: missing periods at the end of sentences or clauses, missing commas in addresses (city, state), lists, after introductory clauses, and around appositives, missing semicolons between independent clauses, and missing colons before lists.\nScan every sentence boundary. If a sentence or clause ends without a period, question mark, or other required terminal punctuation, flag it.\n";
            if (userSettings.checkBrokenRefs)
                instructions += "\nTASK 2: BROKEN CROSS-REFERENCES\nIdentify broken internal references.\n";
            else instructions += "\nExclusion Rule: Do NOT report broken cross-references.\n";
            if (mode === "Picky")
                instructions += "\nTASK 3: DEFINITION X-RAY\nScan for Capitalized words not defined in the text.\n";
            if (userSettings.dialect === "UK") instructions += "\nIMPORTANT: Enforce UK/British spelling. Flag US spellings.\n";
            else instructions += "\nIMPORTANT: Enforce US spelling. Flag UK spellings.\n";
            var thinkingBudgetMap = { Essential: 0, Balanced: 4096, Picky: 8192 };
            var thinkBudget = thinkingBudgetMap[mode] != null ? thinkingBudgetMap[mode] : 4096;
            return callGemini(API_KEY, PROMPTS.ERROR_CHECK(instructions, text), null, { thinkingBudget: thinkBudget }).then(
                function (jsonString) {
                    var rawData = tryParseGeminiJSON(jsonString);
                    return validateErrorData(rawData);
                },
            );
        });
        var shouldCheck = userSettings.checkFooterRef;
        var p2 = shouldCheck ? checkFooterConsistency() : Promise.resolve([]);
        Promise.all([p1, p2])
            .then(function (results) {
                var aiErrors = results[0] || [];
                var footerErrors = results[1] || [];
                var allErrors = footerErrors.concat(aiErrors);
                if (typeof checkQuirkyTrophy === "function" && window.lastErrorScanText) {
                    var wordCount = window.lastErrorScanText.split(/\s+/).length;
                    checkQuirkyTrophy("error_scan", { words: wordCount, errors: allErrors.length });
                }
                if (typeof recordEliStat !== "undefined") {
                    recordEliStat("errorsScanned");
                    recordEliStat("docsReviewed");
                }
                if (typeof recordEliStat !== "undefined" && allErrors.length > 0) {
                    recordEliStat("errorsFound", allErrors.length);
                }
                if (allErrors.length === 0) {
                    var _noErrScope = userSettings.checkFooterRef ? "Body or Footers" : "Body";
                    showPremiumEmptyState({
                        icon: "✅",
                        iconType: "success",
                        title: "No Errors Found",
                        desc: "Your document " + _noErrScope + " passed all checks. Nice work!",
                        retryLabel: "🔄 RE-SCAN",
                        retryAction: function () {
                            if (typeof runErrorCheck === "function") runErrorCheck();
                        },
                    });
                    var _ecDur = window._eliActionStartTime ? Date.now() - window._eliActionStartTime : 0;
                    var _ecWords = window.lastErrorScanText ? window.lastErrorScanText.split(/\s+/).length : 0;
                    window.addActivity({
                        type: "error-check",
                        icon: "🔍",
                        label: "Error Review",
                        summary: "✅ No errors found",
                        payload: null,
                        durationMs: _ecDur,
                        wordCount: _ecWords,
                    });
                    if (typeof onDoneCallback === "function") {
                        var btn = document.createElement("button");
                        btn.className = "btn-secondary";
                        btn.style.marginTop = "15px";
                        btn.innerHTML = window.eliWizardMode ? "💾 Next: Save and/or Send ➔" : "← DONE / BACK TO HUB";
                        btn.onclick = onDoneCallback;
                        document.getElementById("output").appendChild(btn);
                    }
                } else {
                    renderCards(allErrors, "error", onDoneCallback);
                    var _ecDur2 = window._eliActionStartTime ? Date.now() - window._eliActionStartTime : 0;
                    var _ecWords2 = window.lastErrorScanText ? window.lastErrorScanText.split(/\s+/).length : 0;
                    window.addActivity({
                        type: "error-check",
                        icon: "🔍",
                        label: "Error Review",
                        summary: allErrors.length + " detected",
                        payload: allErrors,
                        durationMs: _ecDur2,
                        wordCount: _ecWords2,
                    });
                    if (typeof onDoneCallback === "function") {
                        var btnBottom = document.createElement("button");
                        btnBottom.className = "btn-secondary";
                        btnBottom.style.cssText = "margin-top:20px; margin-bottom:20px;";
                        btnBottom.innerHTML = window.eliWizardMode ? "💾 Next: Save and/or Send ➔" : "← DONE / BACK TO HUB";
                        btnBottom.onclick = safeCallback;
                        document.getElementById("output").appendChild(btnBottom);
                    }
                }
            })
            .catch(function (e) {
                window._eliActionStartTime = 0;
                handleError(e);
            })
            .finally(function () {
                setLoading(!1);
            });
    }

    function runTemplateScan(forceProceed) {
        setLoading(!0, "template");
        Word.run(async function (context) {
            var fullText = "";
            var rangesToLoad = [];
            var body = context.document.body;
            body.load("text");
            rangesToLoad.push(body);
            var sections = context.document.sections;
            sections.load("items");
            await context.sync();
            sections.items.forEach(function (section) {
                ["Primary", "FirstPage", "EvenPages"].forEach(function (type) {
                    try {
                        rangesToLoad.push(section.getHeader(type));
                    } catch (e) { }
                    try {
                        rangesToLoad.push(section.getFooter(type));
                    } catch (e) { }
                });
            });
            rangesToLoad.forEach(function (r) {
                r.load("text");
            });
            await context.sync();
            rangesToLoad.forEach(function (r) {
                fullText += r.text + "\n";
            });
            return fullText;
        })
            .then(function (text) {
                if (!forceProceed && (text.includes("{{") || text.includes("}}"))) {
                    setLoading(!1);
                    showStep1Reminder();
                    return;
                }
                var bracketRegex = /(\$!|\$|!)?\[\[(.*?)\]\]/g;
                var curlyRegex = /{{([^}]+)}}(\*)?/g;
                var matches = new Set();
                var match;
                while ((match = bracketRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
                    if (match[0].length > 2) matches.add(match[0]);
                }
                while ((match = curlyRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
                    if (match[0].length > 4) matches.add(match[0]);
                }
                setLoading(!1);
                renderTemplateForm(Array.from(matches));
            })
            .catch(function (e) {
                setLoading(!1);
                showOutput("Error scanning document: " + e.message, !0);
            });
    }

    function renderTemplateForm(placeholders) {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
        var header = createConfigHeader(null, "⚡", "Auto-Fill Templates");
        out.appendChild(header);
        if (!placeholders || placeholders.length === 0) {
            out.innerHTML +=
                "<div class='text-block' style='background:#f5f5f5; border-color:#ddd; color:#555'><b>No placeholders detected.</b><br><br>1. Open an ELI template that has [[Brackets]].</div>";
            var btnRow = document.createElement("div");
            btnRow.style.cssText = "display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:14px;";
            var btnHub = document.createElement("button");
            btnHub.innerHTML = "BUILD DRAFT HUB";
            btnHub.style.cssText =
                "flex:1; padding:12px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; " +
                "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1565c0,#0d47a1); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #0d47a1; border-radius:0; " +
                "font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif; transition:all 0.15s; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(21,101,192,0.25);";
            btnHub.onmouseover = function () {
                this.style.background = "linear-gradient(135deg,#1976d2,#1565c0)";
                this.style.boxShadow = "0 4px 14px rgba(21,101,192,0.35)";
            };
            btnHub.onmouseout = function () {
                this.style.background = "linear-gradient(135deg,#1565c0,#0d47a1)";
                this.style.boxShadow = "0 2px 8px rgba(21,101,192,0.25)";
            };
            btnHub.onclick = showAutoFillHub;
            btnRow.appendChild(btnHub);
            var btnHome = document.createElement("button");
            btnHome.className = "btn-secondary";
            btnHome.style.flex = "1";
            btnHome.innerHTML = "← HOME";
            btnHome.onclick = showHome;
            btnRow.appendChild(btnHome);
            out.appendChild(btnRow);
            return;
        }
        var sourceData = window.AGREEMENT_DATA || AGREEMENT_DATA;
        var hasAgreement =
            (typeof AGREEMENT_DATA !== "undefined" && AGREEMENT_DATA && AGREEMENT_DATA.name) ||
            (window.AGREEMENT_DATA && window.AGREEMENT_DATA.name);
        if (hasAgreement) {
            var docName = window.AGREEMENT_DATA ? window.AGREEMENT_DATA.name : AGREEMENT_DATA.name;
            var loadedBox = document.createElement("div");
            loadedBox.style.cssText =
                "padding:10px 15px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-left:4px solid #1565c0; background:#f8fafc; margin-bottom:12px;";
            loadedBox.innerHTML = `
              <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                  <div>
                      <div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Loaded Source</div>
                      <div style="font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#1b263b; margin-top:2px;">📄 ${docName}</div>
                  </div>
                  <button id="btnFooterAutoFill" class="btn-platinum-config" style="width:auto; padding:6px 14px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700;">⚡ AUTO-FILL</button>
              </div>
              <div id="footerFillStatus" style="font-size:11px; color:#555; margin-top:8px; display:none;"></div>
          `;
            out.appendChild(loadedBox);
            var btnFill = loadedBox.querySelector("#btnFooterAutoFill");
            var statusDiv = loadedBox.querySelector("#footerFillStatus");
            btnFill.onclick = function () {
                btnFill.innerHTML = "⏳ Filling...";
                statusDiv.style.display = "block";
                statusDiv.innerHTML =
                    "<div class='spinner' style='width:12px;height:12px;border-width:2px;display:inline-block;'></div> Reading RAM data...";
                btnFill.disabled = !0;
                if (!sourceData || (!sourceData.text && !sourceData.isBase64)) {
                    statusDiv.innerHTML = "❌ Error: No readable text in memory.";
                    btnFill.disabled = !1;
                    btnFill.innerHTML = "⚡ Auto-Fill Fields";
                    return;
                }
                var textToAnalyze = sourceData.text || "";
                statusDiv.innerHTML =
                    "<div class='spinner' style='width:12px;height:12px;border-width:2px;display:inline-block;'></div> Analyzing data...";
                var cleanKeys = placeholders.map(function (ph) {
                    var clean = ph.replace(/[\[\]{}]/g, "").replace(/^(\$!|\$|!)/, "");
                    if (clean.includes("||")) return clean.split("||")[0].trim();
                    return clean;
                });
                var prompt = PROMPTS.TEMPLATE_MAP(cleanKeys, textToAnalyze.substring(0, 500000));
                callGemini(API_KEY, prompt)
                    .then(function (result) {
                        try {
                            var mapping = tryParseGeminiJSON(result);
                            var inputs = out.querySelectorAll(".template-input");
                            var count = 0;
                            inputs.forEach(function (inp) {
                                var val = mapping[inp.dataset.target] || mapping[inp.dataset.aiKey];
                                if (val) {
                                    if (typeof smartFillInput === "function") {
                                        smartFillInput(inp, val);
                                    } else {
                                        inp.value = val;
                                        inp.style.borderColor = "#2e7d32";
                                        inp.style.backgroundColor = "#fff";
                                    }
                                    count++;
                                } else {
                                    inp.style.borderColor = "#c62828";
                                    inp.style.backgroundColor = "#ffebee";
                                }
                            });
                            var missing = inputs.length - count;
                            statusDiv.innerHTML =
                                "✅ Filled " + count + " fields. <span style='color:#c62828'>Missing " + missing + " fields.</span>";
                            btnFill.disabled = !1;
                            btnFill.innerHTML = "⚡ Auto-Fill Fields";
                        } catch (err) {
                            statusDiv.innerHTML = "❌ Error parsing AI response.";
                            btnFill.disabled = !1;
                            btnFill.innerHTML = "⚡ Auto-Fill Fields";
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(function (err) {
                        statusDiv.innerHTML = "❌ API Error: " + err.message;
                        btnFill.disabled = !1;
                        btnFill.innerHTML = "⚡ Auto-Fill Fields";
                    });
            };
        } else {
            var uploadBox = document.createElement("div");
            uploadBox.className = "tool-box slide-in";
            uploadBox.style.padding = "0";
            uploadBox.style.border = "none";
            uploadBox.style.marginBottom = "20px";
            uploadBox.style.borderRadius = "0px";
            var dropZone = document.createElement("div");
            dropZone.className = "file-upload-zone";
            dropZone.style.cssText = `
              border: 2px dashed #90caf9; 
              background-color: #f0f7ff; 
              padding: 20px; 
              text-align: center; 
              cursor: pointer; 
              transition: all 0.2s ease;
              border-radius: 4px;
          `;
            dropZone.onmouseover = function () {
                this.style.backgroundColor = "#e3f2fd";
                this.style.borderColor = "#1565c0";
            };
            dropZone.onmouseout = function () {
                this.style.backgroundColor = "#f0f7ff";
                this.style.borderColor = "#90caf9";
            };
            dropZone.innerHTML = `
              <div style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #1565c0;">📂</div>
              <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #1565c0; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                  Import Data Source
              </div>
              <div style="font-size: 10px; color: #546e7a; line-height: 1.4;">
                  Click to upload a filled document or data file.<br>
                  <span style="opacity: 0.7;">(Supports .docx, .txt, .csv, .json)</span>
              </div>
          `;
            var fileInput = document.createElement("input");
            fileInput.type = "file";
            fileInput.style.display = "none";
            dropZone.onclick = function () {
                fileInput.click();
            };
            fileInput.onchange = function (e) {
                dropZone.innerHTML = `<div class="spinner" style="width:16px;height:16px;border-width:2px;display:inline-block;border-color:#1565c0 transparent #1565c0 transparent;"></div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#1565c0;margin-top:6px;">Reading File...</div>`;
                handleTemplateFileUpload(e, placeholders, out);
            };
            uploadBox.appendChild(dropZone);
            uploadBox.appendChild(fileInput);
            out.appendChild(uploadBox);
        }
        var formContainer = document.createElement("div");
        placeholders.forEach(function (ph) {
            var rawText = ph.replace(/[\[\]{}]/g, "").replace(/^(\$!|\$|!)/, "");
            var labelText = rawText;
            var aiKey = rawText;
            if (rawText.includes("||")) {
                var parts = rawText.split("||");
                if (parts.length > 1) {
                    aiKey = parts[0].trim();
                    labelText = parts[1].trim();
                }
            }
            var fieldWrapper = document.createElement("div");
            fieldWrapper.style.marginBottom = "2px";
            var label = document.createElement("label");
            label.className = "tool-label";
            label.style.marginBottom = "2px";
            label.style.display = "flex";
            label.style.justifyContent = "space-between";
            label.style.alignItems = "center";
            var textSpan = document.createElement("span");
            textSpan.innerText = labelText;
            label.appendChild(textSpan);
            var locBtn = document.createElement("span");
            locBtn.innerHTML = "Locate📍";
            locBtn.title = "Locate in Document";
            locBtn.style.cssText =
                "cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; opacity:0.6; transition:all 0.2s; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);";
            locBtn.onmouseover = function () {
                this.style.opacity = "1";
                this.style.background = "#e3f2fd";
                this.style.color = "#1565c0";
            };
            locBtn.onmouseout = function () {
                this.style.opacity = "0.6";
                this.style.background = "rgba(0,0,0,0.03)";
                this.style.color = "";
            };
            label.appendChild(locBtn);
            if (ph.startsWith("$![")) {
                var payBadge = document.createElement("span");
                payBadge.innerText = "Payment terms helper will open on completion.";
                payBadge.style.cssText =
                    "font-size:10px; color:#2e7d32; font-style:italic; margin-right:auto; margin-left:8px; display:block;";
                label.insertBefore(payBadge, locBtn);
            }
            label.appendChild(locBtn);
            fieldWrapper.appendChild(label);
            var input = document.createElement("textarea");
            locBtn.onclick = function () {
                locatePlaceholderOrValue(ph, input.value, locBtn);
            };
            input.className = "tool-input template-input auto-expand";
            input.dataset.target = ph;
            input.dataset.aiKey = aiKey;
            input.placeholder = "Enter " + labelText;
            input.rows = 1;
            input.style.cssText = "width:100%; resize:none; overflow:hidden; min-height:28px;";
            input.addEventListener("input", function () {
                this.style.height = "auto";
                this.style.height = this.scrollHeight + "px";
                if (this.dataset.fullTerms) {
                    delete this.dataset.fullTerms;
                    this.style.backgroundColor = "";
                    this.style.fontWeight = "";
                    this.title = "";
                }
            });
            fieldWrapper.appendChild(input);
            formContainer.appendChild(fieldWrapper);
        });
        var btnRow = document.createElement("div");
        btnRow.style.marginTop = "20px";
        var applyBtn = document.createElement("button");
        applyBtn.className = "btn-platinum-config primary";
        applyBtn.innerHTML = "FILL ALL FIELDS";
        applyBtn.style.cssText = "width:100%; padding:14px;";
        applyBtn.onclick = function () {
            applyTemplateValues(formContainer);
        };
        btnRow.appendChild(applyBtn);
        formContainer.appendChild(btnRow);
        out.appendChild(formContainer);
    }

    function handleTemplateFileUpload(event, placeholders, container) {
        var file = event.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;
        var btnZone = container.querySelector(".file-upload-zone");
        function runAiExtraction(contentText) {
            var msgs = LOADING_MSGS.template;
            var msgIdx = 0;
            btnZone.innerHTML = "<div class='spinner' style='width:16px;height:16px;border-width:2px;'></div> " + msgs[0];
            var tmplInterval = setInterval(function () {
                msgIdx = (msgIdx + 1) % msgs.length;
                if (msgIdx === 0) msgIdx = 1;
                btnZone.innerHTML =
                    "<div class='spinner' style='width:16px;height:16px;border-width:2px;'></div> " + msgs[msgIdx];
            }, 1500);
            var cleanKeys = placeholders.map(function (ph) {
                var clean = ph.replace(/[\[\]{}]/g, "").replace(/^(\$!|\$|!)/, "");
                if (clean.includes("||")) return clean.split("||")[0].trim();
                return clean;
            });
            var prompt = PROMPTS.TEMPLATE_MAP(cleanKeys, contentText.substring(0, 8000));
            callGemini(API_KEY, prompt)
                .then(function (result) {
                    clearInterval(tmplInterval);
                    try {
                        var mapping = tryParseGeminiJSON(result);
                        var inputs = container.querySelectorAll(".template-input");
                        var count = 0;
                        inputs.forEach(function (inp) {
                            var val = mapping[inp.dataset.target] || mapping[inp.dataset.aiKey];
                            if (val) {
                                inp.value = val;
                                inp.style.borderColor = "#2e7d32";
                                inp.style.backgroundColor = "#fff";
                                inp.style.height = "auto";
                                inp.style.height = inp.scrollHeight + "px";
                                count++;
                            } else {
                                inp.style.borderColor = "#c62828";
                                inp.style.backgroundColor = "#ffebee";
                            }
                        });
                        var missing = inputs.length - count;
                        btnZone.innerHTML = "✅ Filled " + count + " fields. Missing " + missing + " fields.";
                    } catch (err) {
                        btnZone.innerHTML = "❌ Error parsing AI response.";
                    }
                })
                .catch(function (err) {
                    clearInterval(tmplInterval);
                    btnZone.innerHTML = "❌ API Error: " + err.message;
                });
        }
        if (file.name.endsWith(".docx")) {
            if (typeof mammoth === "undefined") {
                showOutput("❌ Error: Mammoth.js library is missing.", !0);
                return;
            }
            btnZone.innerHTML =
                "<div class='spinner' style='width:16px;height:16px;border-width:2px;'></div> Unzipping DOCX...";
            var reader = new FileReader();
            reader.onload = function (e) {
                mammoth
                    .extractRawText({ arrayBuffer: e.target.result })
                    .then(function (result) {
                        runAiExtraction(result.value);
                    })
                    .catch(function (err) {
                        btnZone.innerHTML = "❌ Error reading DOCX file.";
                    });
            };
            reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
        } else {
            var reader = new FileReader();
            reader.onload = function (e) {
                runAiExtraction(e.target.result);
            };
            reader.readAsText(file);
        }
    }

    function applyTemplateValues(container) {
        var inputs = container.querySelectorAll(".template-input");
        var standardReplacements = [];
        var tagsToKill = [];
        var feeTrigger = null;
        var paymentCandidates = [];
        var missingFields = [];
        inputs.forEach(function (input) {
            var val = input.value;
            if (!val || val.trim() === "") {
                input.style.border = "2px solid #c62828";
                input.style.backgroundColor = "#ffebee";
                var label = input.dataset.target.replace(/[\[\]]/g, "") || "Unknown Field";
                missingFields.push("• " + label);
            } else {
                input.style.border = "1px solid #ced4da";
                input.style.backgroundColor = "#fff";
            }
            var targets = [];
            try {
                targets = JSON.parse(input.dataset.targets || "[]");
            } catch (e) { }
            if (targets.length === 0 && input.dataset.target) targets = [input.dataset.target];
            targets.forEach(function (t) {
                var cleanT = t.trim();
                if (cleanT.indexOf("$![") === 0) {
                    if (val && val.length < 50) {
                        standardReplacements.push({ target: t, val: val, isCurrency: !0 });
                        window.detectedFeeAmount = val;
                    }
                    tagsToKill.push(t);
                } else if (cleanT.indexOf("![") === 0) {
                    var candidateVal = input.value && input.value.trim() !== "" ? input.value : input.dataset.fullTerms || "";
                    paymentCandidates.push({ target: t, val: candidateVal, element: input });
                } else {
                    standardReplacements.push({ target: t, val: val, isCurrency: cleanT.indexOf("$[") === 0 });
                }
            });
        });
        if (paymentCandidates.length > 0) {
            paymentCandidates.sort(function (a, b) {
                var aManual = a.element.value && a.element.value.trim() !== "";
                var bManual = b.element.value && b.element.value.trim() !== "";
                if (aManual && !bManual) return -1;
                if (!aManual && bManual) return 1;
                return (b.val || "").length - (a.val || "").length;
            });
            if (!paymentCandidates[0].val && !paymentCandidates[0].element.value && !window.detectedFeeAmount) {
                feeTrigger = null;
            } else {
                feeTrigger = paymentCandidates[0];
            }
            if (feeTrigger) {
                for (var i = 0; i < paymentCandidates.length; i++) {
                    var cand = paymentCandidates[i];
                    if (cand === feeTrigger) {
                        tagsToKill.push(cand.target);
                        continue;
                    }
                    standardReplacements.push({ target: cand.target, val: cand.val, isCurrency: cand.target.indexOf("$![") === 0 });
                    tagsToKill.push(cand.target);
                }
            }
        }
        var runBatch = function (listToFill) {
            if (listToFill.length === 0) return Promise.resolve(0);
            listToFill.sort(function (a, b) {
                return b.target.length - a.target.length;
            });
            return Word.run(async function (context) {
                var sections = context.document.sections;
                sections.load("items");
                await context.sync();
                var count = 0;
                for (var i = 0; i < listToFill.length; i++) {
                    var item = listToFill[i];
                    if (!item.val) continue;
                    var finalVal = String(item.val);
                    if (item.isCurrency && !finalVal.trim().startsWith("$")) finalVal = "$" + finalVal;
                    var cleanVal = finalVal.replace(/\n/g, "\u000b");
                    var searchOpts = { matchCase: !1, ignoreSpace: !0, ignorePunctuation: !1 };
                    var bodyResults = context.document.body.search(item.target, searchOpts);
                    bodyResults.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    for (var k = 0; k < bodyResults.items.length; k++) {
                        var inserted = bodyResults.items[k].insertText(cleanVal, "Replace");
                        if (userSettings.highlightFill) {
                            inserted.font.highlightColor = "Yellow";
                        }
                        count++;
                    }
                    for (var s = 0; s < sections.items.length; s++) {
                        var section = sections.items[s];
                        var types = ["Primary", "FirstPage", "EvenPages"];
                        for (var t = 0; t < types.length; t++) {
                            try {
                                var ranges = [section.getHeader(types[t]), section.getFooter(types[t])];
                                for (var r = 0; r < ranges.length; r++) {
                                    var res = ranges[r].search(item.target, searchOpts);
                                    res.load("items");
                                    await context.sync();
                                    for (var h = 0; h < res.items.length; h++) {
                                        var inserted = res.items[h].insertText(cleanVal, "Replace");
                                        if (userSettings.highlightFill) {
                                            inserted.font.highlightColor = "Yellow";
                                        }
                                        count++;
                                    }
                                }
                            } catch (e) { }
                        }
                    }
                }
                return count;
            });
        };
        var cleanupSpecificTags = function (tagsList) {
            if (!tagsList || tagsList.length === 0) return Promise.resolve(0);
            var uniqueTags = tagsList.filter(function (v, i, a) {
                return a.indexOf(v) === i;
            });
            return Word.run(async function (context) {
                var deletedCount = 0;
                for (var i = 0; i < uniqueTags.length; i++) {
                    var tag = uniqueTags[i];
                    var results = context.document.body.search(tag, { matchCase: !1, matchWildcards: !1 });
                    results.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    for (var k = results.items.length - 1; k >= 0; k--) {
                        results.items[k].delete();
                        deletedCount++;
                    }
                }
                return deletedCount;
            }).catch(function (e) {
            });
        };
        var execute = function () {
            var btn = container.querySelector(".btn-action") || container.querySelector(".btn-platinum-config");
            if (btn) {
                btn.dataset.originalText = btn.innerText;
                btn.innerText = "Applying...";
                btn.disabled = !0;
            }
            runBatch(standardReplacements)
                .then(function (count) {
                    if (feeTrigger && ((feeTrigger.val && feeTrigger.val.trim() !== "") || window.detectedFeeAmount)) {
                        var scheduleContext = feeTrigger.element.dataset.fullTerms || feeTrigger.val;
                        var modalVal = window.detectedFeeAmount ? window.detectedFeeAmount : feeTrigger.val;
                        showPaymentScheduleModal(modalVal, scheduleContext, function (finalString) {
                            var paymentUpdate = [{ target: feeTrigger.target, val: finalString }];
                            runBatch(paymentUpdate).then(function (c2) {
                                cleanupSpecificTags(tagsToKill).then(function () {
                                    finishUp(count + c2, btn);
                                });
                            });
                        });
                    } else {
                        cleanupSpecificTags(tagsToKill).then(function () {
                            finishUp(count, btn);
                        });
                    }
                })
                .catch(function (e) {
                    if (btn) {
                        btn.innerText = "Error";
                        btn.disabled = !1;
                    }
                    showOutput("Error: " + e.message, !0);
                });
        };
        if (missingFields.length > 0) {
            var overlay = document.createElement("div");
            overlay.className = "eli-overlay";
            var dialog = document.createElement("div");
            dialog.className = "eli-dialog warning slide-in";
            dialog.innerHTML = `
                <div class="eli-dialog-icon">⚠️</div>
                <div class="eli-dialog-title">Missing Fields</div>
                <div class="eli-dialog-desc" style="max-height:150px; overflow-y:auto;">
                    The following fields are empty:<br><br>
                    <strong>${missingFields.join("<br>")}</strong>
                </div>
                <div class="eli-dialog-actions">
                    <button id="btnFixMissing" class="btn-action" style="flex:1; border-color:#999; color:#333;">I'll Fix Them</button>
                    <button id="btnSkipMissing" class="btn-platinum-config" style="flex:1; color:#d32f2f; font-size:13px; padding:10px;">Skip & Fill</button>
                </div>
            `;
            overlay.appendChild(dialog);
            document.body.appendChild(overlay);
            document.getElementById("btnFixMissing").onclick = function () {
                overlay.remove();
                var firstRed = container.querySelector("[style*='border: 2px solid rgb(198, 40, 40)']");
                if (firstRed) firstRed.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
            };
            document.getElementById("btnSkipMissing").onclick = function () {
                overlay.remove();
                execute();
            };
        } else {
            execute();
        }
        function finishUp(totalCount, btn) {
            if (typeof recordEliStat === "function") recordEliStat("draftsCreated");
            if (userSettings.highlightFill) {
                showVerificationModal(totalCount, btn);
            } else {
                if (btn) {
                    btn.innerText = "✅ Done (" + totalCount + ")";
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        btn.innerText = btn.dataset.originalText || "FILL ALL FIELDS";
                        btn.disabled = !1;
                    }, 2000);
                }
                showToast("✅ Filling Complete. Scanning...");
                if (typeof runPreSaveScan === "function") {
                    runPreSaveScan();
                } else {
                    showAutoFillHub();
                }
            }
        }
        function showVerificationModal(count, btn) {
            var overlay = document.createElement("div");
            overlay.className = "eli-overlay";
            var dialog = document.createElement("div");
            dialog.className = "eli-dialog warning slide-in";
            dialog.style.cssText = "width:300px; padding:0; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-left:5px solid #ffa000;";
            var hasFile = typeof AGREEMENT_DATA !== "undefined" && AGREEMENT_DATA;
            var viewBtnHtml = "";
            if (hasFile) {
                viewBtnHtml = `
                <button id="btnVerifyViewSource" class="btn-action" style="
                    width:100%; 
                    background: #fff; 
                    color: #1565c0; 
                    border: 1px solid #bbdefb; 
                    font-weight: 700; 
                    text-transform: uppercase; 
                    border-radius: 0px; 
                    padding: 10px; 
                    margin-bottom: 10px;
                    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;
                ">
                    <span>📄</span> View Source Data
                </button>
            `;
            }
            dialog.innerHTML = `
            <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffa000 0%, #ff6f00 100%); padding: 15px; border-bottom: 3px solid #ffca28;">
                <div class="eli-label-sm" style="color:#fff8e1;">VERIFICATION</div>
                <div style="font-weight:600; color:white; font-size:16px;">Review Changes</div>
            </div>
            <div style="padding:20px;">
                <div style="font-size:13px; color:#546e7a; margin-bottom:15px; line-height:1.5;">
                    <strong>${count} fields</strong> have been filled and highlighted in yellow. <br><br>
                    Please review the document against your source data. When satisfied, click below to finalize.
                </div>
                ${viewBtnHtml}
                <button id="btnLooksGood" class="btn-action" style="
                    width:100%; 
                    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #f7f9fa 0%, #dce3e8 100%);
                    color: #2e7d32; 
                    border: 1px solid #b0bec5;
                    font-weight: 800; 
                    text-transform: uppercase;
                    border-radius: 0px; 
                    padding: 12px;
                    box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 #ffffff, 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
                    transition: all 0.2s;
                ">
                    ✅ Looks Good (Remove Highlights)
                </button>
            </div>
        `;
            overlay.appendChild(dialog);
            document.body.appendChild(overlay);
            if (hasFile) {
                var btnView = document.getElementById("btnVerifyViewSource");
                btnView.onclick = function () {
                    if (window.openDocumentViewer) window.openDocumentViewer();
                };
            }
            var looksGoodBtn = document.getElementById("btnLooksGood");
            looksGoodBtn.onmouseover = function () {
                this.style.background = "#e8f5e9";
                this.style.borderColor = "#2e7d32";
                this.style.boxShadow = "0 2px 4px rgba(46, 125, 50, 0.15)";
                this.style.transform = "translateY(-1px)";
            };
            looksGoodBtn.onmouseout = function () {
                this.style.background = "linear-gradient(to bottom, #f7f9fa 0%, #dce3e8 100%)";
                this.style.borderColor = "#b0bec5";
                this.style.boxShadow = "inset 0 1px 0 #ffffff, 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)";
                this.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
            };
            looksGoodBtn.onclick = function () {
                overlay.remove();
                Word.run(async (context) => {
                    const body = context.document.body;
                    body.font.highlightColor = null;
                    var sections = context.document.sections;
                    sections.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    sections.items.forEach((sec) => {
                        ["Primary", "FirstPage", "EvenPages"].forEach((type) => {
                            try {
                                sec.getHeader(type).font.highlightColor = null;
                                sec.getFooter(type).font.highlightColor = null;
                            } catch (e) { }
                        });
                    });
                    await context.sync();
                })
                    .then(() => {
                        createSnapshot("Auto-Fill Verified [Original Version]", null, function () {
                            showToast("✅ Verified & Snapshot Taken");
                            if (btn) {
                                btn.innerText = "✅ Verified";
                                setTimeout(() => {
                                    btn.innerText = btn.dataset.originalText || "FILL ALL FIELDS";
                                    btn.disabled = !1;
                                }, 2000);
                            }
                            if (typeof runPreSaveScan === "function") {
                                runPreSaveScan();
                            } else {
                                showSaveAsManager("Auto-Fill Verified [ORIGINAL VERSION]");
                            }
                        });
                    })
                    .catch((e) => {
                        showToast("⚠️ Error removing highlights");
                    });
            };
        }
