                btnElement.style.backgroundColor = "#e8f5e9";
                btnElement.style.opacity = "1";
            } else {
                btnElement.innerHTML = "❌";
                btnElement.style.backgroundColor = "#fff3e0";
                var overlay = showEliDialog({
                    variant: "danger",
                    icon: "⚠️",
                    title: "Text Not Found",
                    body: "This text cannot be found due to a Gemini issue. <br><br><strong>Please find it manually.</strong>",
                    buttons: [
                        {
                            id: "btnOkLocateFail",
                            label: "OK",
                            style: "width:100%; font-weight:bold;",
                            onclick: function () {
                                overlay.remove();
                                btnElement.innerHTML = originalLabel;
                                btnElement.style.backgroundColor = "";
                            },
                        },
                    ],
                });
            }
            return context.sync();
        }).catch(function (e) {
            btnElement.innerHTML = "❌";
        });
    }

    async function findSmartMatch(context, textToFind) {
        var cleanText = textToFind.replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ").trim();
        if (cleanText.length < 1) return null;
        var searchOptions = { matchCase: !1, ignoreSpace: !0 };
        var exactSearchString = cleanText.substring(0, 250);
        var body = context.document.body;
        var bodyResults = body.search(exactSearchString, searchOptions);
        bodyResults.load("items");
        await context.sync();
        if (bodyResults.items.length > 0) return bodyResults.items[0];
        var smartQuoted = exactSearchString
            .replace(/"/g, function (m, off, s) {
                var prior = (s.substring(0, off).match(/"/g) || []).length;
                return prior % 2 === 0 ? "\u201C" : "\u201D";
            })
            .replace(/'/g, "\u2019");
        if (smartQuoted !== exactSearchString) {
            var sqResults = body.search(smartQuoted, searchOptions);
            sqResults.load("items");
            await context.sync();
            if (sqResults.items.length > 0) return sqResults.items[0];
        }
        var sections = context.document.sections;
        sections.load("items");
        await context.sync();
        for (var i = 0; i < sections.items.length; i++) {
            var section = sections.items[i];
            var types = ["Primary", "FirstPage", "EvenPages"];
            for (var t = 0; t < types.length; t++) {
                try {
                    var footer = section.getFooter(types[t]);
                    var fRes = footer.search(exactSearchString, searchOptions);
                    fRes.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    if (fRes.items.length > 0) return fRes.items[0];
                } catch (e) { }
                try {
                    var header = section.getHeader(types[t]);
                    var hRes = header.search(exactSearchString, searchOptions);
                    hRes.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    if (hRes.items.length > 0) return hRes.items[0];
                } catch (e) { }
            }
        }
        if (cleanText.length > 65) {
            var midIndex = Math.floor(cleanText.length / 2);
            var midSearch = cleanText.substring(midIndex - 15, midIndex + 15);
            var midResults = body.search(midSearch, searchOptions);
            midResults.load("items");
            await context.sync();
            if (midResults.items.length === 1) {
                return midResults.items[0];
            }
        }
        if (exactSearchString.length > 50) {
            var startAnchor = exactSearchString.substring(0, 20).trim();
            var endAnchor = exactSearchString.substring(exactSearchString.length - 20).trim();
            var startResults = body.search(startAnchor, searchOptions);
            var endResults = body.search(endAnchor, searchOptions);
            startResults.load("items");
            endResults.load("items");
            await context.sync();
            if (startResults.items.length > 0 && endResults.items.length > 0) {
                return startResults.items[0].expandTo(endResults.items[0]);
            }
        }
        if (cleanText.length > 10) {
            var words = cleanText.split(/\s+/);
            var substringCandidates = [];
            if (words.length >= 3) {
                var halfLen = Math.ceil(words.length / 2);
                substringCandidates.push(words.slice(-halfLen).join(" "));
                substringCandidates.push(words.slice(0, halfLen).join(" "));
                if (words.length >= 5) {
                    var qLen = Math.floor(words.length / 4);
                    substringCandidates.push(words.slice(qLen, words.length - qLen).join(" "));
                }
            }
            for (var sc = 0; sc < substringCandidates.length; sc++) {
                var candidate = substringCandidates[sc].trim();
                if (candidate.length < 8) continue;
                try {
                    var subResults = body.search(candidate, searchOptions);
                    subResults.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    if (subResults.items.length === 1) {
                        return subResults.items[0];
                    }
                } catch (e) { }
            }
        }
        if (cleanText.length > 15) {
            return await findMatchByAI(context, cleanText);
        }
        return null;
    }

    function applyFix(originalText, correctionText, btnElement, replaceFullPara)
    {
        var listRegex = /^(\([a-zA-Z0-9]{1,4}\)|[0-9]{1,4}\.|[a-zA-Z]\.|[ivxIVX]{1,4}\.)\s+/;
        var headerRegex = /^(\d+(\.\d+)*\.?)?\s*([A-Z][A-Za-z\s\/]+)(\.|:)(\s+)/;
        function cleanString(str) {
            var isListNum = /^[\d\w]+[\.\)]\s*$/.test(str.trim());
            if (!isListNum) {
                if (listRegex.test(str)) str = str.replace(listRegex, "").trim();
                var match = str.match(headerRegex);
                if (match && match[0].length < 60) {
                    str = str.substring(match[0].length).trim();
                }
            }
            return str;
        }
        var cleanOriginal = cleanString(originalText);
        var cleanCorrection = correctionText.includes("<") ? correctionText : cleanString(correctionText);
        return Word.run(function (context) {
            return findSmartMatch(context, cleanOriginal).then(function (range) {
                if (!range) {
                    btnElement.innerText = "⚠️ Match Failed";
                    btnElement.style.backgroundColor = "#f8d7da";
                    btnElement.style.color = "#721c24";
                    var overlay = showEliDialog({
                        variant: "danger",
                        icon: "⚠️",
                        title: "Manual Fix Required",
                        body: "ELI couldn't find the exact text match to apply this fix automatically.<br><br>This often happens if the text was edited recently or is inside a restricted area (like a table or header).<br><br><strong>Please make this edit manually.</strong>",
                        buttons: [
                            {
                                id: "btnOkMatchFail",
                                label: "OK, I'll fix it",
                                style: "width:100%; font-weight:bold;",
                                onclick: function () {
                                    overlay.remove();
                                },
                            },
                        ],
                    });
                    return !1;
                }
                range.load("text");
                return context.sync().then(function () {
                    var rangeText = (range.text || "").replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ").trim();
                    var lenRatio = rangeText.length / Math.max(cleanOriginal.length, 1);
                    if (lenRatio > 3 && rangeText.length > 80) {
                        btnElement.innerText = "⚠️ Imprecise";
                        btnElement.style.backgroundColor = "#fff3cd";
                        btnElement.style.color = "#856404";
                        var overlay = showEliDialog({
                            variant: "warning",
                            icon: "⚠️",
                            title: "Imprecise Match",
                            body: "ELI found a match but it covers a much larger section than expected. Auto-applying could replace the wrong text.<br><br><strong>Please apply this fix manually to be safe.</strong>",
                            buttons: [
                                {
                                    id: "btnOkImprecise",
                                    label: "OK, I'll fix it",
                                    style: "width:100%; font-weight:bold;",
                                    onclick: function () {
                                        overlay.remove();
                                    },
                                },
                            ],
                        });
                        return !1;
                    }
                    if (replaceFullPara) {
                        var para = range.paragraphs.getFirst();
                        range.font.load("name, size, color");
                        return context.sync().then(function () {
                            var insertedRange;
                            if (cleanCorrection.includes("<") && cleanCorrection.includes(">")) {
                                insertedRange = para.insertHtml(cleanCorrection, "Replace");
                            } else {
                                insertedRange = para.insertText(cleanCorrection, "Replace");
                            }
                            if (range.font.name) insertedRange.font.name = range.font.name;
                            if (range.font.size) insertedRange.font.size = range.font.size;
                            if (range.font.color) insertedRange.font.color = range.font.color;
                            btnElement.innerText = "Fixed ✓";
                            btnElement.disabled = !0;
                            btnElement.classList.add("btn-disabled");
                            return context.sync().then(function () {
                                return !0;
                            });
                        });
                    }
                    var hasHtml = cleanCorrection.includes("<") && cleanCorrection.includes(">");
                    var diff = !hasHtml ? getStringDiff(cleanOriginal, cleanCorrection) : null;
                    var useSpecificSearch = diff && diff.badPart.length < 250;
                    var specificSearch = null;
                    if (useSpecificSearch) {
                        specificSearch = range.search(diff.badPart, { matchCase: !1, ignorePunctuation: !1, matchWholeWord: !1 });
                        specificSearch.load("items");
                    }
                    return context.sync().then(async function () {
                        let shouldTrack = !(typeof userSettings !== "undefined" && userSettings.disableTrackChanges);
                        await safeToggleTracking(context, shouldTrack);
                        var targetRange = null;
                        if (useSpecificSearch && specificSearch.items.length === 1) {
                            specificSearch.items[0].insertText(diff.goodPart, "Replace");
                            targetRange = specificSearch.items[0];
                        } else {
                            if (hasHtml) {
                                range.insertHtml(cleanCorrection, "Replace");
                            } else {
                                range.insertText(cleanCorrection, "Replace");
                            }
                            targetRange = range;
                        }
                        if (targetRange) {
                            try {
                                targetRange.select();
                            } catch (e) { }
                        }
                        btnElement.innerText = "Fixed ✓";
                        btnElement.disabled = !0;
                        btnElement.classList.add("btn-disabled");
                        return context.sync().then(function () {
                            return !0;
                        });
                    });
                });
            });
        }).catch(function (error) {
            btnElement.innerText = "Error";
            return !1;
        });
    }

    function getStringDiff(oldStr, newStr) {
        function isSpace(char) {
            return char && /\s/.test(char);
        }
        var start = 0;
        while (start < oldStr.length && start < newStr.length && oldStr[start] === newStr[start]) {
            start++;
        }
        var endOld = oldStr.length - 1;
        var endNew = newStr.length - 1;
        while (endOld >= start && endNew >= start && oldStr[endOld] === newStr[endNew]) {
            endOld--;
            endNew--;
        }
        var chunk = oldStr.substring(start, endOld + 1);
        var isInsertion = start > endOld;
        var isTiny = chunk.trim().length < 3;
        var expand = isInsertion || isTiny;
        function getCurrent() {
            return oldStr.substring(start, endOld + 1);
        }
        function isAmbiguous() {
            var s = getCurrent();
            if (!s) return !0;
            return oldStr.split(s).length - 1 > 1;
        }
        var maxSteps = 20;
        while ((expand || isAmbiguous()) && maxSteps > 0) {
            expand = !1;
            maxSteps--;
            var expanded = !1;
            if (start > 0) {
                start--;
                while (start > 0 && !isSpace(oldStr[start])) {
                    start--;
                }
                expanded = !0;
            }
            if (endOld < oldStr.length - 1) {
                endOld++;
                endNew++;
                while (endOld < oldStr.length - 1 && !isSpace(oldStr[endOld])) {
                    endOld++;
                    endNew++;
                }
                expanded = !0;
            }
            if (!expanded) break;
        }
        var badPart = oldStr.substring(start, endOld + 1);
        var goodPart = newStr.substring(start, endNew + 1);
        if (!badPart || badPart.trim() === "") return { badPart: oldStr, goodPart: newStr };
        return { badPart: badPart, goodPart: goodPart };
    }

    function getCleanTextAndContext(html) {
        if (!html) return { text: "", context: "" };
        var parser = new DOMParser();
        var doc = parser.parseFromString(html, "text/html");
        var delNodes = doc.querySelectorAll(
            "del, s, strike, span[style*='line-through'], span[style*='text-decoration:line-through'], span[style*='text-decoration: line-through']",
        );
        var deletedPhrases = [];
        delNodes.forEach(function (node) {
            var txt = node.textContent.trim();
            if (txt.length > 3) deletedPhrases.push(txt);
            node.remove();
        });
        var commentNodes = doc.querySelectorAll(
            "div[style*='mso-element:comment'], .CommentText, .msocommentanchor, a[name*='_msocom_']",
        );
        commentNodes.forEach(function (node) {
            node.remove();
        });
        var brs = doc.querySelectorAll("br");
        brs.forEach(function (br) {
            br.replaceWith("\n");
        });
        var tempDiv = document.createElement("div");
        tempDiv.innerHTML = doc.body.innerHTML;
        var cleanText = tempDiv.innerText || tempDiv.textContent || "";
        cleanText = cleanText.replace(/\n\s*\n/g, "\n").trim();
        cleanText = cleanText.replace(/Page\s+\d+\s+(of\s+\d+)?/gi, " ");
        var contextMsg = "";
        if (deletedPhrases.length > 0) {
            var unique = deletedPhrases.filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i).slice(0, 5);
            contextMsg = "NOTE: The user recently deleted these phrases: [" + unique.join(", ") + "]";
        }
        return { text: cleanText, context: contextMsg };
    }

    function validateErrorData(data) {
        if (!Array.isArray(data)) return [];
        return data.filter(function (item) {
            return item && item.original && item.correction;
        });
    }

    function tryParseGeminiJSON(jsonString) {
        if (!jsonString) return {};
        var clean = jsonString
            .replace(/```json/g, "")
            .replace(/```/g, "")
            .replace(/^[^{[]*/, "")
            .replace(/[^}\]]*$/, "")
            .trim();
        try {
            return JSON.parse(clean);
        } catch (e) {
            try {
                var recoveredArray = [];
                var objectRegex = /\{[^{}]*(?:\{[^{}]*\}[^{}]*)*\}/g;
                var match;
                while ((match = objectRegex.exec(clean)) !== null) {
                    try {
                        var validObj = JSON.parse(match[0]);
                        recoveredArray.push(validObj);
                    } catch (err) {
                    }
                }
                if (recoveredArray.length > 0) {
                    return recoveredArray;
                }
            } catch (e2) {
            }
            try {
                var fixed = clean.replace(/(?<!["}])\n/g, "\\n");
                if (fixed.match(/^\[\w+\]/)) throw new Error("Plain text list detected");
                return JSON.parse(fixed);
            } catch (e3) {
                if (jsonString.includes("1.") || jsonString.includes("- ")) {
                    return {
                        summary: "AI returned plain text analysis.",
                        changes: [{ clause: "General", change: jsonString.substring(0, 500), impact: "Review Manually" }],
                    };
                }
                if (clean.startsWith("[")) return [];
                return {};
            }
        }
    }

    function callGemini(apiKey, input, modelOverride, options) {
        currentController = new AbortController();
        var signal = currentController.signal;
        var opts = options || {};
        var targetModel = modelOverride || userSettings.model || "gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview";
        var contentsPayload = Array.isArray(input) ? [{ parts: input }] : [{ parts: [{ text: input }] }];
        var googleUrl = `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/${targetModel}:generateContent`;
        var genConfig = { temperature: 0.3 };
        if (opts.jsonMode) genConfig.responseMimeType = "application/json";
        if (targetModel.indexOf("preview") !== -1) {
            var budget = opts.thinkingBudget != null ? opts.thinkingBudget : 0;
            genConfig.thinkingConfig = { thinkingBudget: budget };
        }
        return fetch(googleUrl, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "x-goog-api-key": apiKey },
            body: JSON.stringify({ contents: contentsPayload, generationConfig: genConfig }),
            signal: signal,
        })
            .then(function (res) {
                if (res.status === 503 || res.status === 429) throw new Error("OVERLOADED");
                if (!res.ok)
                    return res.text().then((t) => {
                        throw new Error("Backend Error: " + t);
                    });
                return res.json();
            })
            .then(function (data) {
                currentController = null;
                if (data.candidates && data.candidates.length > 0) {
                    var parts = data.candidates[0].content.parts;
                    return parts[parts.length - 1].text;
                }
                return "No response from AI.";
            })
            .catch(function (err) {
                if (err.name === "AbortError") {
                } else throw err;
            });
    }

    function setLoading(isLoading, type) {
        var loader = document.getElementById("loading");
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (loader && !loader.querySelector(".robot-head")) {
            loader.style.background = "transparent";
            loader.style.border = "none";
            loader.style.boxShadow = "none";
            loader.innerHTML = `
            <div class="loading-card robot-loader" style="background: transparent; border: none; box-shadow: none; padding: 10px 0;">
              <div class="robot-head">
                  <div class="robot-eyes">
                      <div class="robot-eye"></div>
                      <div class="robot-eye"></div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="mouth-container">
                      <div class="teeth-row upper">
                         <div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div>
                          <div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div>
                          <div class="tooth"></div>
                      </div>
                      <div class="teeth-row lower">
                        <div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div>
                          <div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div><div class="tooth"></div>
                          <div class="tooth"></div>
                      </div>
                      <div class="brush-anim">🪥</div>
                      <div class="foam f1"></div><div class="foam f2"></div><div class="foam f3"></div>
                  </div>
              </div>
              <p class="loading-text" style="margin-top: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #1565c0; font-size: 13px;">Processing...</p>
            </div>
          `;
        }
        var textP = loader ? loader.querySelector("p") : null;
        var buttonsToLock = document.querySelectorAll(".btn-tile, .nav-arrow");
        if (isLoading && loader && !loader.classList.contains("hidden")) return;
        if (loadingInterval) {
            clearInterval(loadingInterval);
            loadingInterval = null;
        }
        var cancelBtn = document.getElementById("btnCancelLoad");
        if (!cancelBtn && loader) {
            cancelBtn = document.createElement("button");
            cancelBtn.id = "btnCancelLoad";
            cancelBtn.innerText = "CANCEL REQUEST";
            cancelBtn.style.display = "block";
            cancelBtn.style.margin = "25px auto 0 auto";
            cancelBtn.style.width = "auto";
            cancelBtn.style.background = "linear-gradient(to bottom,#f7f9fa 0%,#dce3e8 100%)";
            cancelBtn.style.border = "1.5px solid #b0bec5";
            cancelBtn.style.borderRadius = "0";
            cancelBtn.style.fontSize = "11px";
            cancelBtn.style.padding = "8px 20px";
            cancelBtn.style.color = "#d32f2f";
            cancelBtn.style.letterSpacing = "0.5px";
            cancelBtn.style.textTransform = "uppercase";
            cancelBtn.style.fontWeight = "600";
            cancelBtn.style.boxShadow = "0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)";
            cancelBtn.style.transition = "all 0.2s ease";
            var card = loader.querySelector(".loading-card");
            (card || loader).appendChild(cancelBtn);
        }
        if (cancelBtn) {
            cancelBtn.onclick = function () {
                if (currentController) {
                    currentController.abort();
                    currentController = null;
                }
                setLoading(!1);
                showCancelledState();
            };
        }
        if (isLoading) {
            buttonsToLock.forEach(function (btn) {
                btn.style.pointerEvents = "none";
                btn.style.cursor = "wait";
            });
            var messages = LOADING_MSGS[type] || LOADING_MSGS["default"];
            var i = 0;
            if (textP) {
                textP.innerText = messages[0];
                loadingInterval = setInterval(function () {
                    i = (i + 1) % messages.length;
                    if (i === 0 && messages.length > 2) i = 2;
                    textP.innerText = messages[i];
                }, 1500);
            }
            if (loader) loader.classList.remove("hidden");
            if (out) out.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            buttonsToLock.forEach(function (btn) {
                btn.style.pointerEvents = "auto";
                btn.style.cursor = "pointer";
            });
            if (loader) loader.classList.add("hidden");
            if (out) out.classList.remove("hidden");
            setTimeout(function () {
                if (textP) textP.innerText = "Analyzing...";
            }, 200);
        }
        if (!isLoading) {
            setTimeout(function () {
                window.adjustAppZoom("auto");
            }, 50);
        }
    }

    if (!window._setLoadingHooked) {
        var origSetLoading = window.setLoading || setLoading;
        window.setLoading = function (isLoading, msg) {
            if (isLoading) window._eliActionStartTime = Date.now();
            origSetLoading(isLoading, msg);
        };
        window._setLoadingHooked = true;
    }

    function showOutput(text, isError) {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (!out) return;
        out.innerHTML = "";
        if (isError) {
            out.style.color = "red";
            out.innerText = text;
        } else {
            out.style.color = "#212529";
            out.innerHTML = text.replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
        }
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
    }

    function handleError(error) {
        if (!error) return;
        if (typeof error === "string") {
            if (error === "Invalid API Key") {
                showOutput("⚠️ Error: Please put your Google Gemini API Key at the top of the script.", !0);
                return;
            }
            error = { message: error };
        }
        var msg = error.message ? error.message : JSON.stringify(error);
        if (msg.includes("cancelled") || msg.includes("AbortError") || error.name === "AbortError") {
            showCancelledState();
            return;
        }
        if (msg === "OVERLOADED") {
            renderOverloadCard();
            return;
        }
        if (msg.toLowerCase().includes("script error")) {
            msg =
                "External Script Error. (This often happens if a library like Mammoth.js failed to load or due to browser security settings).";
        }
        showOutput("Error: " + msg, !0);
    }

    function renderOverloadCard() {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (!out) return;
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        var card = document.createElement("div");
        card.className = "error-card slide-in";
        card.style.borderLeft = "5px solid #ff9800";
        card.style.backgroundColor = "#fff3e0";
        card.style.padding = "15px";
        var html = "";
        html += "<div style='display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:10px;'>";
        html += "  <span style='font-size:24px;'>🐢</span>";
        html += "  <div>";
        html += "    <strong style='color:#e65100; font-size:16px; display:block;'>Gemini is Busy</strong>";
        html += "    <span style='color:#bf360c; font-size:12px;'>Google's servers are overloaded.</span>";
        html += "  </div>";
        html += "</div>";
        html += "<div style='color:#5d4037; font-size:13px; line-height:1.5;'>";
        html += "  Don't worry, your document is fine. The AI just needs a moment to catch its breath.<br><br>";
        html += "  <strong>Please wait 30 seconds and try again.</strong>";
        html += "</div>";
        card.innerHTML = html;
        out.appendChild(card);
    }

    function showConfigModal(type) {
        if (type === "error" && typeof recordEliStat === "function") recordEliStat("appOpenedError");
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
        var titleMap = {
            error: "Error Review",
            email: "Email Templates",
            compare: "Comparison Settings",
            filename: "File Naming",
        };
        var title = titleMap[type] || "Settings";
        var card = document.createElement("div");
        card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
        card.style.padding = "0";
        card.style.borderRadius = "0px";
        card.style.border = "1px solid #d1d5db";
        card.style.borderLeft = "5px solid #1565c0";
        card.style.background = "#fff";
        var header = createConfigHeader("SYSTEM CONFIGURATION", "⚙️", title, { marginBottom: "12px" });
        header.style.padding = "8px 15px";
        card.appendChild(header);
        var contentDiv = document.createElement("div");
        contentDiv.style.padding = "10px 15px";
        var html = "";
        if (type === "email") {
            var defaults = {
                myName: "",
                thirdParty: { subject: "", body: "" },
                requester: { subject: "", body: "" },
                byType: {},
            };
            var tmpl = userSettings.emailTemplates || defaults;
            if (!tmpl.thirdParty) tmpl.thirdParty = defaults.thirdParty;
            if (!tmpl.requester) tmpl.requester = defaults.requester;
            if (!tmpl.byType) tmpl.byType = {};
            var emailAgTypeOpts = buildAgTypeOptions({
                exclude: ["License Agreement", "Visitor Agreement", "Sponsorship Agreement"],
            });
            html += `
            <div style="margin-bottom:10px;">
                <label class="tool-label">My Name</label>

                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size:9px; color:#999; margin-top:4px;">Structure: Type > Subtype > Templates</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
            setTimeout(function () {
                var listDiv = document.getElementById("tmplList");
                var savedTemplates = [];
                loadFeatureData(STORE_TEMPLATES).then(function (data) {
                    savedTemplates = data || [];
                    renderTmplList();
                });
                function renderTmplList() {
                    listDiv.innerHTML = "";
                    if (savedTemplates.length === 0) {
                        listDiv.innerHTML =
                            "<div style='padding:10px; font-size:11px; color:#999; text-align:center;'>No templates saved.</div>";
                        return;
                    }
                    savedTemplates.forEach((t, idx) => {
                        var row = document.createElement("div");
                        row.style.cssText =
                            "display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:6px 10px; border-bottom:1px solid #eee; font-size:11px;";
                        row.innerHTML = `
                        <span style="font-weight:600; color:#37474f;">${t.name}</span>
                        <span class="del-tmpl" data-idx="${idx}" style="cursor:pointer; color:#c62828; font-weight:bold;">🗑️</span>
                    `;
                        listDiv.appendChild(row);
                    });
                    document.querySelectorAll(".del-tmpl").forEach((btn) => {
                        btn.onclick = function () {
                            savedTemplates.splice(this.dataset.idx, 1);
                            saveFeatureData(STORE_TEMPLATES, savedTemplates);
                            renderTmplList();
                        };
                    });
                }
                document.getElementById("btnUploadTmpl").onclick = function () {
                    var name = document.getElementById("newTmplName").value.trim();
                    var fileInp = document.getElementById("newTmplFile");
                    var status = document.getElementById("tmplUploadStatus");
                    if (!name) {
                        status.innerText = "⚠️ Enter a name.";
                        return;
                    }
                    if (!fileInp.files[0]) {
                        status.innerText = "⚠️ Select a file.";
                        return;
                    }
                    status.innerText = "⏳ Reading...";
                    handleFileSelect(fileInp.files[0], function (text) {
                        savedTemplates.push({ name: name, content: text });
                        saveFeatureData(STORE_TEMPLATES, savedTemplates);
                        renderTmplList();
                        status.innerText = "✅ Saved!";
                        document.getElementById("newTmplName").value = "";
                        fileInp.value = "";
                    });
                };
                document.getElementById("btnBulkUpload").onclick = function () {
                    var fileInp = document.getElementById("bulkJsonFile");
                    var btn = this;
                    if (!fileInp.files[0]) {
                        showToast("⚠️ Select JSON file");
                        return;
                    }
                    btn.innerText = "⏳ Reading...";
                    var reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function (e) {
                        try {
                            var json = JSON.parse(e.target.result);
                            if (!Array.isArray(json)) throw new Error("Format Error: Root must be an array");
                            var validItems = [];
                            json.forEach(function (item) {
                                if (item && typeof item === "object" && item.name && (item.content || item.text)) {
                                    validItems.push({
                                        name: String(item.name).trim(),
                                        content: String(item.content || item.text || ""),
                                        type: String(item.type || "General"),
                                        library: String(item.library || "Imported"),
                                    });
                                }
                            });
                            if (validItems.length === 0) throw new Error("No valid templates found.");
                            savedTemplates = savedTemplates.concat(validItems);
                            saveFeatureData(STORE_TEMPLATES, savedTemplates);
                            renderTmplList();
                            showToast("✅ Imported " + validItems.length + " templates.");
                            btn.innerText = "Import";
                            fileInp.value = "";
                        } catch (err) {
                            showToast("❌ " + err.message);
                            btn.innerText = "Import";
                        }
                    };
                    reader.readAsText(fileInp.files[0]);
                };
            }, 100);
        }
        contentDiv.innerHTML = html;
        card.appendChild(contentDiv);
        var footerDiv = document.createElement("div");
        footerDiv.style.cssText =
            "padding:15px 20px; background:#f8f9fa; border-top:1px solid #e0e0e0; display:flex; gap:10px;";
        var btnCancel = document.createElement("button");
        btnCancel.className = "btn-platinum-config";
        btnCancel.style.flex = "1";
        btnCancel.innerText = "CANCEL";
        btnCancel.onclick = showHome;
        var btnSave = document.createElement("button");
        btnSave.id = "btnSaveConfig";
        btnSave.className = "btn-platinum-config primary";
        btnSave.style.cssText = "flex: 1; font-weight:800;";
        btnSave.innerText = "SAVE SETTINGS";
        footerDiv.appendChild(btnCancel);
        footerDiv.appendChild(btnSave);
        card.appendChild(footerDiv);
        out.appendChild(card);
        if (type === "email") {
            var _tmplRef = userSettings.emailTemplates || {};
            var _editCache = {};
            var _byType =
                _tmplRef.byType && typeof _tmplRef.byType === "object" ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_tmplRef.byType)) : {};
            _editCache.__default = {
                thirdParty: { subject: (_tmplRef.thirdParty || {}).subject || "", body: (_tmplRef.thirdParty || {}).body || "" },
                requester: { subject: (_tmplRef.requester || {}).subject || "", body: (_tmplRef.requester || {}).body || "" },
            };
            Object.keys(_byType).forEach(function (k) {
                _editCache[k] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_byType[k]));
            });
            var selEmailType = document.getElementById("selEmailAgType");
            var emailHint = document.getElementById("emailTypeHint");
            var btnResetType = document.getElementById("btnResetEmailType");
            var _prevEmailType = "__default";
            function _stashEmailFields() {
                _editCache[_prevEmailType] = {
                    thirdParty: {
                        subject: document.getElementById("txtSubjTP").value,
                        body: document.getElementById("txtBodyTP").value,
                    },
                    requester: {
                        subject: document.getElementById("txtSubjReq").value,
                        body: document.getElementById("txtBodyReq").value,
                    },
                };
            }
            function _loadEmailType(key) {
                var src;
                if (_editCache[key]) {
                    src = _editCache[key];
                } else {
                    src = _editCache.__default;
                }
                document.getElementById("txtSubjTP").value = src.thirdParty.subject;
                document.getElementById("txtBodyTP").value = src.thirdParty.body;
                document.getElementById("txtSubjReq").value = src.requester.subject;
                document.getElementById("txtBodyReq").value = src.requester.body;
                if (key === "__default") {
                    emailHint.textContent = "Editing the default template used for all agreement types.";
                    btnResetType.style.display = "none";
                } else {
                    emailHint.textContent = _editCache[key]
                        ? "Custom template for \u201c" + key + "\u201d."
                        : "Using default template. Edit to customize for this type.";
                    btnResetType.style.display = _editCache[key] ? "inline-block" : "none";
                }
            }
            selEmailType.onchange = function () {
                _stashEmailFields();
                _prevEmailType = this.value;
                _loadEmailType(this.value);
            };
            btnResetType.onclick = function () {
                delete _editCache[selEmailType.value];
                _loadEmailType(selEmailType.value);
            };
            window._emailEditCache = _editCache;
            window._emailEditStash = _stashEmailFields;

        }
        btnSave.onclick = function () {
            if (type === "email") {
                if (window._emailEditStash) window._emailEditStash();
                var cache = window._emailEditCache || {};
                var byTypeSave = {};
                Object.keys(cache).forEach(function (k) {
                    if (k !== "__default") byTypeSave[k] = cache[k];
                });
                var defTmpl = cache.__default || {};
                userSettings.emailTemplates = {
                    myName: document.getElementById("txtMyName").value.trim(),
                    useFullName: document.getElementById("chkUseFullName").checked,
                    thirdParty: defTmpl.thirdParty || { subject: "", body: "" },
                    requester: defTmpl.requester || { subject: "", body: "" },
                    byType: byTypeSave,
                };
            } else if (type === "filename") {
                userSettings.fileNamePatterns = {
                    colgate: document.getElementById("patColgate").value.trim(),
                    hills: document.getElementById("patHills").value.trim(),
                };
            } else if (type === "error") {
                userSettings.dialect = document.getElementById("selDialect").value;
                userSettings.checkBrokenRefs = document.getElementById("chkRefs").checked;
                userSettings.checkFooterRef = document.getElementById("chkFooters").checked;
                userSettings.disableTrackChanges = document.getElementById("chkNoTrack").checked;
                userSettings.sensitivity = document.getElementById("selSensitivity").value;
            }
            saveCurrentSettings();
            btnSave.innerText = "SAVED!";
            setTimeout(() => {
                showHome();
            }, 600);
        };
    }

    function validateApiAndGetText(isInline, loadingType) {
        if (!isInline && loadingType) setLoading(!0, loadingType);
        if (!API_KEY || API_KEY.length < 10) {
            setLoading(!1);
            showApiKeyPrompt(function () {
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("✅ Key saved! Please click the tool again to run.");
            });
            return Promise.reject("No API Key configured");
        }
        return Word.run(async function (context) {
            var selection = context.document.getSelection();
            selection.load("text");
            await context.sync();
            var hasRealSelection = selection.text && selection.text.trim().length > 5;
            if (hasRealSelection) {
                if (loadingType) {
                    setLoading(!1);
                    try {
                        var choice = await askUserSelectionScope();
                        setLoading(!0, loadingType);
                        if (choice === "selection") return selection.text;
                    } catch (e) {
                        throw new Error("Request cancelled.");
                    }
                } else {
                    return selection.text;
                }
            }
            if (isInline) {
                return "";
            }
            var bodyHtml = context.document.body.getHtml();
            await context.sync();
            var cleanDoc = getCleanTextAndContext(bodyHtml.value);
            if (!cleanDoc.text || cleanDoc.text.trim().length < 50) {
                if (loadingType) setLoading(!1);
                throw new Error("Document is empty or too short to analyze.");
            }
            return cleanDoc.text;
        });
    }

    var AGREEMENT_DATA = null;

    function renderMainFooter() {
        if (document.getElementById("main-footer")) return;
        var footer = document.createElement("div");
        footer.id = "main-footer";
        footer.style.cssText =
            "position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; width:100%; background:#f8f9fa; border-top:1px solid #d1d5db; padding:0 12px; height:24px; z-index:9999; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; box-sizing:border-box;";
        var mode = userSettings.defaultDataSource || "onit";
        var sourceId = userSettings.dataSourceId || "Onit";
        var savedInfo = null;
        try {
            if (
                typeof Office !== "undefined" &&
                Office &&
                Office.context &&
                Office.context.document &&
                Office.context.document.settings
            ) {
                var raw = Office.context.document.settings.get("AgreementDataDetails");
                if (raw) savedInfo = raw;
            }
        } catch (e) { }
        var isLoaded = !!savedInfo;
        var rawLabel = isLoaded ? savedInfo.sourceName : mode === "local" ? "DATA" : "Load " + sourceId;
        var displayLabel = rawLabel;
        if (isLoaded && displayLabel.length > 18) {
            displayLabel = displayLabel.substring(0, 15) + "...";
        }
        if (savedInfo && !AGREEMENT_DATA) {
            mode = savedInfo.type || mode;
            if (typeof PROMPTS !== "undefined" && PROMPTS.loadDocFromDB) {
                var uniqueKey = window.CURRENT_DOC_ID || "currentDoc";
                PROMPTS.loadDocFromDB(uniqueKey).then(function (doc) {
                    if (doc) {
                        AGREEMENT_DATA = doc;
                        var btn = document.querySelector("#footerBtnViewFile span");
                        if (btn) btn.innerText = "⚡";
                    }
                });
            }
        } else if (savedInfo && savedInfo.type) {
            mode = savedInfo.type;
        }
        var html = `
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0px; min-width:120px;">
               <div id="footerBtnViewFile" title="View Processed File" onclick="window.openDocumentViewer()" style="display:${isLoaded ? "flex" : "none"}; margin-right:8px; cursor:pointer; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:0 4px; height:16px; border-radius:3px; background:#e0f7fa; border:1px solid #4dd0e1;">
                    <span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#006064;">${isLoaded ? "⏳" : "VIEW"}</span>
               </div>
               <div class="footer-divider-middle" style="display:${isLoaded ? "block" : "none"}; width:1px; height:12px; background:#b0bec5; margin-right:8px;"></div>
               <div id="footerLoaderLocal" style="display:flex; align-items:center;">
                    <label for="footerFileLoader" style="font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:${isLoaded ? "#2e7d32" : "#546e7a"}; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; cursor:${isLoaded ? "default" : "pointer"}; pointer-events:${isLoaded ? "none" : "auto"}; display:flex; align-items:center; margin:0; white-space:nowrap;">
                       <span id="txtFooterFile">${displayLabel || "DATA"}</span>
                       <span id="iconFooterFile" style="font-size:18px; margin-left:4px; transform:translateY(-2px); display:${isLoaded ? "none" : "inline"};">📂</span>
                    </label>
                    <div id="btnDeleteFile" title="Clear File & Cache" onclick="window.clearLoadedFile()" style="display:${isLoaded ? "block" : "none"}; cursor:pointer; margin-left:4px; font-size:10px; color:#c62828; font-weight:800; padding:0 3px;">✕</div>
                    <input type="file" id="footerFileLoader" style="display:none;" onchange="window.handleFooterFileLoad(this)">
               </div>
            </div>
    <div id="footerZoomControls" style="display:flex; align-items:center;
    gap:4px; height:18px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding:0 6px;
    border-radius:0; border:1px solid #d1d5db; box-sizing:border-box;">
        <span class="footer-zoom-btn" onclick="window.adjustAppZoom('out')" title="Zoom Out" style="cursor:pointer; width:14px; height:14px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:12px; line-height:1; font-weight:800; color:#546e7a; border-radius:0;">−</span>
        <span id="footerZoomVal" onclick="window.adjustAppZoom('auto')" title="Dashboard: 90% | Tools: 105%" style="cursor:pointer; font-size:8px; line-height:1; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; border-left:1px solid #ccc; border-right:1px solid #ccc; padding:0 5px;">
            Auto
        </span>
        <span class="footer-zoom-btn" onclick="window.adjustAppZoom('in')" title="Zoom In" style="cursor:pointer; width:14px; height:14px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:12px; line-height:1; font-weight:800; color:#546e7a; border-radius:0;">+</span>
    </div>
                <div id="footerRight" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0px; min-width:60px; justify-content:flex-end;">
                <span id="footerBtnSnapshot" title="Take Snapshot" style="cursor:pointer; font-size:24px; filter: sepia(1) hue-rotate(190deg) saturate(5); transform: translateY(-4px); display:inline-block;">📷</span>
                <div class="footer-divider-right" style="width:1px; height:12px; background:#b0bec5; margin:0 8px;"></div>
                <span id="footerBtnHistory" title="View Version History" style="font-size:11px; color:#546e7a; font-weight:700; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; cursor:pointer;">Versions</span>
                <span id="footerVerCount" style="font-size:9px; color:#1565c0; font-weight:800; font-family:'Inter', sans-serif; margin-left:4px; background:rgba(21,101,192,0.08); border:1px solid rgba(21,101,192,0.2); padding:0px 5px; border-radius:3px; line-height:14px; letter-spacing:0.3px;">0</span>
            </div>
        `;
        footer.innerHTML = html;
        document.body.appendChild(footer);
        document.body.style.paddingBottom = "30px";
        var fSnap = document.getElementById("footerBtnSnapshot");
        var fHist = document.getElementById("footerBtnHistory");
        if (fSnap)
            fSnap.onclick = function () {
                showVersionHistoryInterface();
            };
        if (fHist)
            fHist.onclick = function () {
                showVersionHistoryInterface(!0);
            };
        if (typeof getHistoryFromDoc === "function") {
            getHistoryFromDoc().then(function (list) {
                var cnt = list ? list.length : 0;
                var el = document.getElementById("footerVerCount");
                if (el) el.innerText = cnt;
            });
        }
    }

    window.clearLoadedFile = async function () {
        window.AGREEMENT_DATA = null;
        AGREEMENT_DATA = null;
        if (typeof GLOBAL_FILENAME !== "undefined") GLOBAL_FILENAME = "";
        if (typeof GLOBAL_FILE_BLOB !== "undefined") GLOBAL_FILE_BLOB = null;
        if (typeof PROMPTS !== "undefined") {
            try {
                var uniqueKey = window.CURRENT_DOC_ID || "currentDoc";
                await PROMPTS.saveDocToDB(uniqueKey, null);
                if (PROMPTS.deleteDocFromDB) {
                    await PROMPTS.deleteDocFromDB(uniqueKey);
                }
            } catch (e) {
            }
        }
        try {
            if (
                typeof Office !== "undefined" &&
                Office.context &&
                Office.context.document &&
                Office.context.document.settings
            ) {
                Office.context.document.settings.remove("AgreementDataDetails");
                Office.context.document.settings.saveAsync();
            }
        } catch (e) {
        }
        var label = document.querySelector("#footerLoaderLocal label");
        if (label) label.style.color = "#546e7a";
        var span = document.getElementById("txtFooterFile");
        if (span) span.innerText = "DATA";
        var icon = document.getElementById("iconFooterFile");
        if (icon) icon.style.display = "inline";
        var viewBtn = document.getElementById("footerBtnViewFile");
        if (viewBtn) viewBtn.style.display = "none";
        var delBtn = document.getElementById("btnDeleteFile");
        if (delBtn) delBtn.style.display = "none";
        var toggle = document.getElementById("footerDataToggle");
        if (toggle) toggle.style.display = "flex";
        var divider = document.querySelector(".footer-divider-left");
        if (divider) divider.style.display = "block";
        var divMid = document.querySelector(".footer-divider-middle");
        if (divMid) divMid.style.display = "none";
        var fileInput = document.getElementById("footerFileLoader");
        if (fileInput) fileInput.value = "";
        var lbl = document.querySelector("label[for='footerFileLoader']");
        if (lbl) {
            lbl.style.pointerEvents = "auto";
            lbl.style.cursor = "pointer";
        }
        var inp = document.getElementById("footerFileLoader");
        if (inp) inp.disabled = !1;
        showToast("🗑️ OARS Data Removed");
    };

    window.handleFooterFileLoad = async function (input) {
        if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
            var file = input.files[0];
            var displayName = file.name.length > 18 ? file.name.substring(0, 15) + "..." : file.name;
            var txt = document.getElementById("txtFooterFile");
            if (txt) {
                txt.innerText = displayName;
                txt.title = file.name;
                txt.parentElement.style.color = "#2e7d32";
            }
            var icon = document.getElementById("iconFooterFile");
            if (icon) icon.style.display = "none";
            var toggle = document.getElementById("footerDataToggle");
            if (toggle) toggle.style.display = "none";
            var divider = document.querySelector(".footer-divider-left");
            if (divider) divider.style.display = "none";
            var btnView = document.getElementById("footerBtnViewFile");
            if (btnView) {
                btnView.style.display = "flex";
                btnView.querySelector("span").innerText = "⏳";
            }
            var divMid = document.querySelector(".footer-divider-middle");
            if (divMid) divMid.style.display = "block";
            var btnDel = document.getElementById("btnDeleteFile");
            if (btnDel) btnDel.style.display = "block";
            var lbl = document.querySelector("label[for='footerFileLoader']");
            if (lbl) {
                lbl.style.pointerEvents = "none";
                lbl.style.cursor = "default";
            }
            input.disabled = !0;
            AGREEMENT_DATA = null;
            var uniqueKey = window.CURRENT_DOC_ID || "currentDoc";
            if (typeof PROMPTS !== "undefined") {
                try {
                    await Promise.all([PROMPTS.deleteDocFromDB(uniqueKey)]);
                } catch (e) { }
            }
            if (file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".docx")) {
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    var arrayBuffer = e.target.result;
                    mammoth
                        .convertToHtml({ arrayBuffer: arrayBuffer })
                        .then(function (result) {
                            var cleanText = result.value.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, " ");
                            AGREEMENT_DATA = { text: cleanText, name: file.name };
                            finishFooterLoad(file, uniqueKey);
                        })
                        .catch(function (err) {
                        });
                };
                reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
            } else if (file.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".pdf")) {
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    AGREEMENT_DATA = {
                        isBase64: !0,
                        mime: "application/pdf",
                        data: e.target.result.split(",")[1],
                        name: file.name,
                    };
                    finishFooterLoad(file, uniqueKey);
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(file);
            } else {
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    AGREEMENT_DATA = { text: e.target.result, name: file.name };
                    finishFooterLoad(file, uniqueKey);
                };
                reader.readAsText(file);
            }
            input.value = "";
        }
    };

    function finishFooterLoad(file, optionalBuffer) {
        window.CURRENT_AI_RESPONSE = null;
        persistAgreementState(file.name, "local");
        var uniqueKey = window.CURRENT_DOC_ID || "currentDoc";
        PROMPTS.saveDocToDB(uniqueKey, file)
            .then(() => {
                PROMPTS.saveAICacheToDB(uniqueKey, null).then(() => {
                    window.CURRENT_AI_RESPONSE = null;
                    showToast("💾 Agreement Data Loaded");
                    var statusSpan = document.querySelector("#footerBtnViewFile span");
                    if (statusSpan) statusSpan.innerText = "⏳";
                    PROMPTS.runBackgroundAIAnalysis(file);
                });
            })
            .catch((err) => {
            });
    }

    function persistAgreementState(name, type) {
        try {
            if (
                typeof Office !== "undefined" &&
                Office &&
                Office.context &&
                Office.context.document &&
                Office.context.document.settings
            ) {
                Office.context.document.settings.set("AgreementDataDetails", { sourceName: name, type: type });
                Office.context.document.settings.saveAsync(function (res) { });
            }
        } catch (e) { }
    }

    function checkSelectionState() {
        return;
    }
