    function evaluateTrophies(stats, event) {
        if (!stats.unlockedTrophies) stats.unlockedTrophies = [];
        if (!stats.unlockedDates) stats.unlockedDates = {};
        var rankBefore = window.getEliRank(stats.unlockedTrophies.length);
        var newlyUnlocked = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < ELI_TROPHIES.length; i++) {
            var t = ELI_TROPHIES[i];
            if (stats.unlockedTrophies.indexOf(t.id) === -1 && t.check(stats, event)) {
                stats.unlockedTrophies.push(t.id);
                stats.unlockedDates[t.id] = new Date().toLocaleDateString(undefined, {
                    month: "short",
                    day: "numeric",
                    year: "numeric",
                });
                newlyUnlocked.push(t);
            }
        }
        if (newlyUnlocked.length > 0 && typeof showTrophyUnlocked !== "undefined") {
            newlyUnlocked.forEach(function (t, index) {
                setTimeout(function () {
                    showTrophyUnlocked(t);
                }, index * 6500);
            });
        }
        var rankAfter = window.getEliRank(stats.unlockedTrophies.length);
        if (rankAfter !== rankBefore && typeof showRankPromotion === "function") {
            var promoDelay = newlyUnlocked.length * 6500 + 500;
            setTimeout(function () {
                showRankPromotion(rankAfter);
            }, promoDelay);
        }
        return stats;
    }

    function showRankPromotion(newRank) {
        try {
            if (!window.userSettings.rankDates) window.userSettings.rankDates = {};
            if (!window.userSettings.rankDates[newRank]) {
                window.userSettings.rankDates[newRank] = new Date().toISOString();
                saveCurrentSettings(!0);
            }
        } catch (e) { }
        var rankIcons = { Specialist: "⭐", Strategist: "🎖️", Architect: "🏛️", Executive: "👑", Grandmaster: "💎" };
        var rankColors = {
            Specialist: "#3b82f6",
            Strategist: "#8b5cf6",
            Architect: "#06b6d4",
            Executive: "#f59e0b",
            Grandmaster: "#ef4444",
        };
        var icon = rankIcons[newRank] || "🏆";
        var color = rankColors[newRank] || "#fbbf24";
        var userName = window.getCurrentUserFirstName("User");
        var overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "rank-promo-overlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
            "position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92); z-index:999999; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.5s ease;";
        var particleHtml = "";
        for (var p = 0; p < 60; p++) {
            var x = Math.random() * 100;
            var delay = Math.random() * 2;
            var dur = 2 + Math.random() * 2;
            var size = 3 + Math.random() * 6;
            var c2 = [color, "#fbbf24", "#34d399", "#f472b6", "#a78bfa"][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)];
            particleHtml +=
                '<div style="position:absolute; width:' +
                size +
                "px; height:" +
                size +
                "px; background:" +
                c2 +
                "; border-radius:50%; left:" +
                x +
                "%; top:110%; opacity:0; animation:promoParticle " +
                dur +
                "s " +
                delay +
                's ease-out forwards;"></div>';
        }
        overlay.innerHTML = `
        <style>
          @keyframes promoParticle { 0% { top:110%; opacity:0; } 20% { opacity:1; } 100% { top:${-10 + Math.random() * 20}%; opacity:0; } }
          @keyframes promoIcon { 0% { transform:scale(0) rotate(-180deg); opacity:0; } 60% { transform:scale(1.3) rotate(10deg); opacity:1; } 100% { transform:scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity:1; } }
          @keyframes promoText { 0% { transform:translateY(30px); opacity:0; } 100% { transform:translateY(0); opacity:1; } }
          @keyframes promoGlow { 0%, 100% { box-shadow:0 0 30px ${color}44, 0 0 60px ${color}22; } 50% { box-shadow:0 0 60px ${color}66, 0 0 120px ${color}33; } }
          @keyframes promoPulse { 0%, 100% { transform:scale(1); } 50% { transform:scale(1.05); } }
        </style>
        ${particleHtml}
        <div style="text-align:center; position:relative; z-index:2; animation:promoPulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;">
          <div style="font-size:80px; animation:promoIcon 1s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px ${color}); margin-bottom:16px;">${icon}</div>
          <div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:3px; color:${color}; animation:promoText 0.6s 0.4s ease-out both;">Rank Promotion</div>
          <div style="font-size:36px; font-weight:900; color:#fff; margin:8px 0; animation:promoText 0.6s 0.6s ease-out both; text-shadow:0 0 30px ${color};">${newRank}</div>
          <div style="font-size:15px; color:#cbd5e1; animation:promoText 0.6s 0.8s ease-out both;">Congratulations, <strong style="color:${color};">${userName}</strong>!</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px; color:#64748b; margin-top:6px; animation:promoText 0.6s 1s ease-out both;">Your dedication has been recognized.</div>
          ${newRank === "Specialist"
                ? `
          <div style="margin-top:20px; padding:20px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius:0; animation:promoText 0.6s 1.1s ease-out both; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), inset 0 2px 10px rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="width:60px; height:60px; margin-bottom:12px; filter:drop-shadow(0 0 15px #facc15);">
              <path d="M20 20 h60 v15 a30 30 0 0 1 -30 30 h-10 a30 30 0 0 1 -30 -30 v-15 z" fill="url(#goldGrad)" stroke="#fef08a" stroke-width="2"/>
              <path d="M10 20 h10 v15 a15 15 0 0 0 -10 -15 z" fill="#facc15" opacity="0.6"/>
              <path d="M90 20 h-10 v15 a15 15 0 0 1 10 -15 z" fill="#facc15" opacity="0.6"/>
              <path d="M40 65 l-10 25 h40 l-10 -25" fill="#facc15"/>
              <rect x="25" y="90" width="50" height="10" fill="#334155" rx="2"/>
              <path d="M35 35 l10 15 l15 -10 l-10 -15" fill="#fff" opacity="0.4"/>
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="goldGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fef08a"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#eab308"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ca8a04"/></linearGradient>
              </defs>
            </svg>
            <div style="font-size:16px; font-weight:900; color:#facc15; margin-bottom:6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(250,204,21,0.5);">Specialist Prize Unlocked!</div>
            <div style="font-size:13px; color:#f1f5f9; line-height:1.4;">You have earned the right to design your own custom trophy:</div>
            <div style="font-size:18px; font-weight:900; color:#fff; margin:8px 0; font-family:monospace; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding:4px 10px; border-radius:4px; display:inline-block; border:1px solid #334155;">"The ${userName}"</div>
            <div style="font-size:11px; color:#94a3b8; font-weight:600; margin-top:8px;">Contact your System Admin to submit your design details.</div>
          </div>
          `
                : ""
            }
          <div style="width:60px; height:3px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, ${color}, transparent); margin:24px auto; border-radius:2px; animation:promoText 0.6s 1.2s ease-out both; box-shadow:0 0 12px ${color};"></div>
          <button onclick="var o=document.getElementById('rank-promo-overlay'); o.style.opacity='0'; setTimeout(function(){o.remove();},400);" style="background:${color}; color:#0f172a; border:none; padding:12px 32px; font-size:14px; font-weight:900; border-radius:0; cursor:pointer; animation:promoText 0.6s 1.4s ease-out both, promoGlow 2s 2s ease-in-out infinite; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px;">Continue</button>
        </div>
      `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        requestAnimationFrame(function () {
            requestAnimationFrame(function () {
                overlay.style.opacity = "1";
            });
        });
    }

    function getWeekNumber(d) {
        d = new Date(Date.UTC(d.getFullYear(), d.getMonth(), d.getDate()));
        d.setUTCDate(d.getUTCDate() + 4 - (d.getUTCDay() || 7));
        var yearStart = new Date(Date.UTC(d.getUTCFullYear(), 0, 1));
        return Math.ceil(((d - yearStart) / 86400000 + 1) / 7);
    }

    var _eliStatsCache = null;

    var _eliStatsIDBLoaded = false;

    var _STATS_IDB_ID = "eli_user_stats";

    function _persistStatsToIDB(data) {
        try {
            initFeatureDB().then(function (db) {
                var tx = db.transaction(STORE_STATS, "readwrite");
                tx.objectStore(STORE_STATS).put(Object.assign({}, data, { stat_id: _STATS_IDB_ID }));
            });
        } catch (e) { }
    }

    function _loadStatsFromIDB() {
        return initFeatureDB()
            .then(function (db) {
                return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                    var tx = db.transaction(STORE_STATS, "readonly");
                    var req = tx.objectStore(STORE_STATS).get(_STATS_IDB_ID);
                    req.onsuccess = function () {
                        var r = req.result;
                        if (r) {
                            delete r.stat_id;
                            resolve(r);
                        } else {
                            resolve(null);
                        }
                    };
                    req.onerror = function () {
                        resolve(null);
                    };
                });
            })
            .catch(function () {
                return null;
            });
    }

    function _initStatsCacheFromIDB() {
        return _loadStatsFromIDB()
            .then(function (result) {
                if (result) _eliStatsCache = result;
                if (!_eliStatsCache) {
                    try {
                        var oldStats = localStorage.getItem("ELI_USER_STATS");
                        if (oldStats) {
                            _eliStatsCache = JSON.parse(oldStats);
                            _persistStatsToIDB(_eliStatsCache);
                        }
                    } catch (e) { }
                }
                _eliStatsIDBLoaded = true;
                try {
                    _refreshStatsDom();
                } catch (e) { }
            })
            .catch(function () {
                _eliStatsIDBLoaded = true;
            });
    }

    function _saveEliStats(parsed) {
        _eliStatsCache = parsed;
        _persistStatsToIDB(parsed);
    }

    function _refreshStatsDom() {
        var stats = _eliStatsCache;
        if (!stats) return;
        var nums = document.querySelectorAll("#base-stats .v1-num");
        if (nums.length >= 3) {
            nums[0].innerText = String(stats.totalActiveDays || 1);
            nums[1].innerText = String(stats.docsReviewed || 0);
            nums[2].innerText = String(stats.draftsCreated || 0);
        }
        var gNums = document.querySelectorAll("#gamification-details .v1-num");
        if (gNums.length >= 3) {
            var mins = stats.timeSavedMinutes || 0;
            var h = Math.floor(mins / 60);
            var m = mins % 60;
            gNums[0].innerText = h > 0 && m > 0 ? h + "h " + m + "m" : h > 0 ? h + "h" : m + "m";
            gNums[1].innerText = String(stats.errorsFixed || 0);
            gNums[2].innerText = String(stats.risksFound || 0);
        }
        var trophyCount = stats.unlockedTrophies ? stats.unlockedTrophies.length : 0;
        var rank = window.getEliRank ? window.getEliRank(trophyCount) : "Novice";
        var trophyEl = document.querySelector(".v1-trophy");
        if (trophyEl) {
            var rankEl = trophyEl.querySelectorAll("div");
            if (rankEl[0]) rankEl[0].innerText = rank;
            if (rankEl[1]) rankEl[1].innerText = trophyCount + " / 104";
        }
    }

    function getEliUserStats() {
        var todayObj = new Date();
        var tzLocal =
            todayObj.getFullYear() +
            "-" +
            String(todayObj.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0") +
            "-" +
            String(todayObj.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
        var today = tzLocal;
        var parsed = _eliStatsCache;
        if (!parsed) {
            if (!_eliStatsIDBLoaded) {
                return {
                    docsReviewed: 0,
                    draftsCreated: 0,
                    risksMitigated: 0,
                    currentStreak: 0,
                    totalActiveDays: 0,
                    lastReviewDate: "never",
                    unlockedTrophies: [],
                    unlockedDates: {},
                    _pendingLoad: true,
                };
            }
            parsed = {
                docsReviewed: 0,
                draftsCreated: 0,
                risksMitigated: 0,
                currentStreak: 0,
                totalActiveDays: 0,
                lastReviewDate: "never",
                unlockedTrophies: [],
                unlockedDates: {},
            };
        }
        parsed = typeof parsed === "string" ? JSON.parse(parsed) : JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(parsed));
        if (!parsed.unlockedTrophies) parsed.unlockedTrophies = [];
        if (!parsed.unlockedDates) parsed.unlockedDates = {};
        if (parsed.lastReviewDate !== today) {
            parsed.totalActiveDays = (parsed.totalActiveDays || 0) + 1;
            var currentWeek = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-W" + getWeekNumber(todayObj);
            if (parsed.lastActiveWeek !== currentWeek) {
                if (parsed.lastActiveWeek) {
                    var lastW = parseInt(parsed.lastActiveWeek.split("-W")[1]);
                    var currW = parseInt(currentWeek.split("-W")[1]);
                    if (currW === lastW + 1 || (currW === 1 && lastW >= 52)) {
                        parsed.weeklyStreak = (parsed.weeklyStreak || 1) + 1;
                    } else {
                        parsed.weeklyStreak = 1;
                    }
                } else {
                    parsed.weeklyStreak = 1;
                }
                parsed.lastActiveWeek = currentWeek;
            }
            var last = new Date(parsed.lastReviewDate);
            var curr = new Date(today);
            var diffTime = Math.abs(curr - last);
            var diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
            var isWeekendGap = !1;
            if (curr.getDay() === 1 && diffDays === 3 && last.getDay() === 5) {
                isWeekendGap = !0;
            } else if (curr.getDay() === 1 && diffDays === 2 && last.getDay() === 6) {
                isWeekendGap = !0;
            }
            if (diffDays === 1 || isWeekendGap) {
                parsed.currentStreak++;
            } else {
                parsed.currentStreak = 1;
            }
            parsed.lastReviewDate = today;
            var dayOfWeek = todayObj.getDay();
            var dayNames = ["Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat"];
            var todayName = dayNames[dayOfWeek];
            var todayYMD = today;
            if (!parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks) parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks = {};
            var dowKey = "lastActive_" + todayName;
            var dowStreakKey = "streak_" + todayName;
            var lastSameDayDate = parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks[dowKey] || null;
            if (lastSameDayDate) {
                var prevD = new Date(lastSameDayDate);
                var dayDiff = Math.round((todayObj - prevD) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
                if (dayDiff === 7) {
                    parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks[dowStreakKey] = (parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks[dowStreakKey] || 1) + 1;
                } else if (dayDiff > 7) {
                    parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks[dowStreakKey] = 1;
                }
            } else {
                parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks[dowStreakKey] = 1;
            }
            parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks[dowKey] = todayYMD;
            var monthNum = todayObj.getMonth();
            var dateNum = todayObj.getDate();
            if (dateNum === 1) {
                parsed.usedFirstOfMonth = (parsed.usedFirstOfMonth || 0) + 1;
                parsed._firstOfMonthKey = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-" + monthNum;
            }
            var tomorrow = new Date(todayObj);
            tomorrow.setDate(dateNum + 1);
            if (tomorrow.getDate() === 1) {
                parsed.usedLastOfMonth = (parsed.usedLastOfMonth || 0) + 1;
                var thisMonthKey = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-" + monthNum;
                if (parsed._firstOfMonthKey === thisMonthKey) {
                    parsed.bookendMonths = (parsed.bookendMonths || 0) + 1;
                }
            }
            if (monthNum === 4 && dateNum === 4) {
                parsed.usedMay4th = (parsed.usedMay4th || 0) + 1;
            }
            if (!parsed._weekdayTracker) parsed._weekdayTracker = {};
            var isoWeekKey = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-W" + getWeekNumber(todayObj);
            if (dayOfWeek >= 1 && dayOfWeek <= 5) {
                if (!parsed._weekdayTracker[isoWeekKey]) parsed._weekdayTracker[isoWeekKey] = [];
                if (parsed._weekdayTracker[isoWeekKey].indexOf(dayOfWeek) === -1) {
                    parsed._weekdayTracker[isoWeekKey].push(dayOfWeek);
                }
                if (parsed._weekdayTracker[isoWeekKey].length === 5) {
                    parsed.fullWeekdayWeeks = (parsed.fullWeekdayWeeks || 0) + 1;
                    delete parsed._weekdayTracker[isoWeekKey];
                }
            }
            var weekKeys = Object.keys(parsed._weekdayTracker);
            if (weekKeys.length > 3) {
                weekKeys.sort();
                while (weekKeys.length > 2) {
                    delete parsed._weekdayTracker[weekKeys.shift()];
                }
            }
            var isHoliday = false;
            if (monthNum === 0 && dateNum === 1) isHoliday = true;
            if (monthNum === 6 && dateNum === 4) isHoliday = true;
            if (monthNum === 10 && dateNum >= 22 && dateNum <= 28 && dayOfWeek === 4) isHoliday = true;
            if (monthNum === 10 && dateNum >= 21 && dateNum <= 30) isHoliday = true;
            if (monthNum === 11 && dateNum >= 24 && dateNum <= 26) isHoliday = true;
            if (isHoliday) {
                parsed.usedHoliday = (parsed.usedHoliday || 0) + 1;
            }
            _saveEliStats(parsed);
        }
        if (parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks) {
            parsed.consecutiveWednesdays = parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks["streak_Wed"] || 0;
            parsed.consecutiveFridays = parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks["streak_Fri"] || 0;
            parsed.consecutiveMondays = parsed.dayOfWeekStreaks["streak_Mon"] || 0;
        }
        parsed.hoursSaved = (parsed.timeSavedMinutes || 0) / 60;
        if ((parsed.draftsCreated || 0) > 0 && !(parsed.monthlyDrafts > 0)) {
            parsed.monthlyDrafts = parsed.draftsCreated;
        }
        if ((parsed.draftsCreated || 0) > 0 && !(parsed.dailyDrafts > 0)) {
            parsed.dailyDrafts = parsed.draftsCreated;
        }
        return parsed;
    }

    function checkQuirkyTrophy(eventName, eventData) {
        try {
            var stats = getEliUserStats();
            stats = evaluateTrophies(stats, { name: eventName, data: eventData });
            _saveEliStats(stats);
        } catch (e) { }
    }

    function recordEliStat(statName, count) {
        try {
            if (!_eliStatsIDBLoaded) return;
            var c = count !== undefined ? count : 1;
            var stats = getEliUserStats();
            if (stats._pendingLoad) return;
            if (
                statName === "docsReviewed" ||
                statName === "errorsScanned" ||
                statName === "risksScanned" ||
                statName === "appOpenedError" ||
                statName === "appOpenedRisk"
            ) {
                var docIdentifier = window.CURRENT_DOC_ID || window._currentDocHash || "unknown_doc";
                if (docIdentifier !== "unknown_doc") {
                    stats._juicedSets = stats._juicedSets || {};
                    if (!stats._juicedSets[statName]) stats._juicedSets[statName] = [];
                    if (stats._juicedSets[statName].indexOf(docIdentifier) !== -1) {
                        return;
                    }
                    stats._juicedSets[statName].push(docIdentifier);
                    if (stats._juicedSets[statName].length > 150) stats._juicedSets[statName].shift();
                }
            }
            if (stats[statName] === undefined) stats[statName] = 0;
            stats[statName] += c;
            var todayObj = new Date();
            var currentMonth = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-" + todayObj.getMonth();
            var currentDayStr = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-" + todayObj.getMonth() + "-" + todayObj.getDate();
            var currentSession = window.CURRENT_SESSION_ID || "sess_unknown";
            if (stats.currentSession !== currentSession) {
                stats.currentSession = currentSession;
                stats.sessionActions = 0;
            }
            if (stats.currentDay !== currentDayStr) {
                stats.currentDay = currentDayStr;
                stats.dailyActions = 0;
                stats.dailyUniqueActionCodes = [];
                stats.dailyDocsReviewed = 0;
                stats.dailyQuestions = 0;
                stats.dailyDrafts = 0;
            }
            stats.statActiveDays = stats.statActiveDays || {};
            stats.statActiveDays[statName] = stats.statActiveDays[statName] || [];
            if (stats.statActiveDays[statName].indexOf(currentDayStr) === -1) {
                stats.statActiveDays[statName].push(currentDayStr);
                if (stats.statActiveDays[statName].length > 25) {
                    stats.statActiveDays[statName].shift();
                }
            }
            if (statName.startsWith("appOpened") || statName === "docsReviewed") {
                stats.dailyActions = (stats.dailyActions || 0) + c;
                stats.sessionActions = (stats.sessionActions || 0) + c;
                if (statName === "appOpenedError" && stats.sessionActions === 1) {
                    stats.routineErrorStarts = (stats.routineErrorStarts || 0) + 1;
                }
            }
            if (statName.startsWith("appOpened") || statName === "docsReviewed") {
                if (!stats.dailyUniqueActionCodes) stats.dailyUniqueActionCodes = [];
                if (stats.dailyUniqueActionCodes.indexOf(statName) === -1) {
                    stats.dailyUniqueActionCodes.push(statName);
                }
            }
            if (statName === "chatMessages") {
                stats.dailyQuestions = (stats.dailyQuestions || 0) + c;
                var wk = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-W" + (typeof getWeekNumber === "function" ? getWeekNumber(todayObj) : "0");
                if (typeof getWeekNumber === "function" && stats.lastChatWeek !== wk) {
                    if (stats.lastChatWeek) {
                        var lw = parseInt(stats.lastChatWeek.split("-W")[1] || "0");
                        var cw = parseInt(wk.split("-W")[1] || "0");
                        if (cw === lw + 1 || (cw === 1 && lw >= 52)) {
                            stats.chatWeeklyStreak = (stats.chatWeeklyStreak || 1) + 1;
                        } else {
                            stats.chatWeeklyStreak = 1;
                        }
                    } else {
                        stats.chatWeeklyStreak = 1;
                    }
                    stats.lastChatWeek = wk;
                }
            }
            if (statName === "documentsCompared") {
                var wkc = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-W" + (typeof getWeekNumber === "function" ? getWeekNumber(todayObj) : "0");
                if (typeof getWeekNumber === "function" && stats.lastCompareWeek !== wkc) {
                    if (stats.lastCompareWeek) {
                        var lwc = parseInt(stats.lastCompareWeek.split("-W")[1] || "0");
                        var cwc = parseInt(wkc.split("-W")[1] || "0");
                        if (cwc === lwc + 1 || (cwc === 1 && lwc >= 52)) {
                            stats.compareWeeklyStreak = (stats.compareWeeklyStreak || 1) + 1;
                        } else {
                            stats.compareWeeklyStreak = 1;
                        }
                    } else {
                        stats.compareWeeklyStreak = 1;
                    }
                    stats.lastCompareWeek = wkc;
                }
            }
            if (statName === "documentsCompared" || statName === "trackChangesAnalyzed") {
                var wkCr = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-W" + (typeof getWeekNumber === "function" ? getWeekNumber(todayObj) : "0");
                if (typeof getWeekNumber === "function" && stats.lastCompareOrRedlineWeek !== wkCr) {
                    if (stats.lastCompareOrRedlineWeek) {
                        var lwCr = parseInt(stats.lastCompareOrRedlineWeek.split("-W")[1] || "0");
                        var cwCr = parseInt(wkCr.split("-W")[1] || "0");
                        if (cwCr === lwCr + 1 || (cwCr === 1 && lwCr >= 52)) {
                            stats.compareOrRedlineWeeklyStreak = (stats.compareOrRedlineWeeklyStreak || 1) + 1;
                        } else {
                            stats.compareOrRedlineWeeklyStreak = 1;
                        }
                    } else {
                        stats.compareOrRedlineWeeklyStreak = 1;
                    }
                    stats.lastCompareOrRedlineWeek = wkCr;
                }
            }
            if (stats.currentMonth !== currentMonth) {
                stats.currentMonth = currentMonth;
                stats.monthlyDocs = 0;
                stats.monthlyDrafts = 0;
            }
            if (statName === "docsReviewed") {
                stats.monthlyDocs = (stats.monthlyDocs || 0) + c;
                stats.dailyDocsReviewed = (stats.dailyDocsReviewed || 0) + c;
            }
            if (statName === "draftsCreated") {
                stats.dailyDrafts = (stats.dailyDrafts || 0) + c;
                stats.monthlyDrafts = (stats.monthlyDrafts || 0) + c;
            }
            var q = Math.floor(todayObj.getMonth() / 3);
            var currentQuarter = todayObj.getFullYear() + "-Q" + q;
            if (stats.currentQuarter !== currentQuarter) {
                stats.currentQuarter = currentQuarter;
                stats.quarterlyDeal360 = 0;
            }
            if (statName === "risksScanned") {
                stats.quarterlyDeal360 = (stats.quarterlyDeal360 || 0) + c;
            }
            var addedMins = 0;
            if (statName === "draftsCreated") {
                var randMins = Math.floor(Math.random() * 6) + 10;
                addedMins = randMins * c;
                stats.timeSavedMinutes = (stats.timeSavedMinutes || 0) + addedMins;
                if (!stats.draftDaysOfWeek) stats.draftDaysOfWeek = {};
                stats.draftDaysOfWeek[todayObj.getDay()] = true;
            } else if (statName === "appOpenedError" || statName === "appOpenedRisk") {
                var docWords = window.currentDocWordCount || 0;
                var readTime = docWords > 0 ? Math.ceil(docWords / 200) : statName === "appOpenedRisk" ? 10 : 5;
                var minsFromDoc = Math.max(1, readTime - 1);
                addedMins = minsFromDoc * c;
                stats.timeSavedMinutes = (stats.timeSavedMinutes || 0) + addedMins;
            }
            if (statName === "risksMitigated") {
                if (stats.risksMitigated === undefined) stats.risksMitigated = c;
                if (!stats.quarterlyRiskChecks) stats.quarterlyRiskChecks = {};
                stats.quarterlyRiskChecks[currentQuarter] = (stats.quarterlyRiskChecks[currentQuarter] || 0) + c;
            }
            stats = evaluateTrophies(stats);
            _saveEliStats(stats);
        } catch (e) {
        }
    }

    window.defaultDashboardApps = [
        "review-draft",
        "error-check",
        "executive-brief",
        "email",
        "docu-scrub",
    ];

    window.loadDashboardState = function () {
        try {
            var saved = localStorage.getItem("eli_dashboard_apps");
            if (saved) {
                var arr = JSON.parse(saved);
                var needsUpdate = !1;
                if (arr.indexOf("build-draft") > -1) {
                    arr = arr.filter(function (id) {
                        return id !== "build-draft";
                    });
                    needsUpdate = !0;
                }
                if (arr.indexOf("email-composer") > -1) {
                    arr[arr.indexOf("email-composer")] = "email";
                    needsUpdate = !0;
                }
                if (arr.indexOf("pdf-import") > -1) {
                    arr = arr.filter(function (id) {
                        return id !== "pdf-import";
                    });
                    needsUpdate = !0;
                }
                if (arr.indexOf("term-sheet") > -1) {
                    arr = arr.filter(function (id) {
                        return id !== "term-sheet";
                    });
                    needsUpdate = !0;
                }

                if (needsUpdate) localStorage.setItem("eli_dashboard_apps", JSON.stringify(arr));
                return arr;
            }
        } catch (e) { }
        return window.defaultDashboardApps.slice();
    };

    window.saveDashboardState = function (arr) {
        try {
            localStorage.setItem("eli_dashboard_apps", JSON.stringify(arr));
        } catch (e) { }
        window.dashboardApps = arr;
    };

    window.dashboardApps = window.loadDashboardState();

            desc: "Simplifies complex documents for different age groups.",
            category: "Patents",
            action: function () {
                if (typeof showEli5App === "function") showEli5App();
            },
        },
    };

    window.getCompleteAppCatalog = function () {
        return window.ELI_MASTER_CATALOG;
    };

    window.executeDashboardApp = function (appId) {
        if (!appId) return;
        var btn = document.getElementById("tp-btn-" + appId);
        if (btn) {
            btn.classList.remove("cc-recommended-action");
            var advBdg = btn.querySelector(".advisor-workflow-badge");
            if (advBdg) advBdg.remove();
        }
        if (window._activeWorkflowBadges) {
            window._activeWorkflowBadges = window._activeWorkflowBadges.filter(function (b) {
                return b.appId !== appId;
            });
        }
        window.ccRecommendationsDismissed = window.ccRecommendationsDismissed || {};
        window.ccRecommendationsDismissed[appId] = true;
        var badge = document.getElementById("badge-" + appId);
        if (badge) {
            badge.classList.remove("cc-unclicked");
            badge.innerText = "...";
            badge.style.backgroundColor = "#f59e0b";
        }
        window.updateAppBadge =
            window.updateAppBadge ||
            function (appId, count) {
                var b = document.getElementById("badge-" + appId);
                if (b) {
                    if (count === 0) {
                        b.style.display = "none";
                    } else {
                        b.style.display = "flex";
                        b.innerText = count > 99 ? "99+" : count;
                        b.style.backgroundColor = "#ef4444";
                    }
                }
            };
        if (typeof window.recordEliStat === "function") {
            var map = {
                "error-check": "appOpenedError",
                "risk-scan": "appOpenedRisk",
                "build-draft": "appOpenedDraft",
                "email-composer": "appOpenedEmail",
                compare: "appOpenedCompare",
            };
            var targetStat =
                map[appId] || "appOpened" + (appId.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + appId.slice(1)).replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, "");
            window.recordEliStat(targetStat);
        }
        var catalog = window.getCompleteAppCatalog();
        var def = catalog[appId];
        if (def && def.action) {
            try {
                if (typeof def.action === "function") def.action();
                else if (typeof def.action === "string") {
                    var fn = new Function(def.action);
                    fn();
                }
            } catch (e) {
            }
        }
    };

    function _openPlaybookDB() {
        return initFeatureDB().then(function (db) {
            return db;
        });
    }

    window._loadTrackPortPlaybooks = function () {
        return _openPlaybookDB()
            .then(function (db) {
                return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                    var tx = db.transaction(STORE_PLAYBOOKS, "readonly");
                    var store = tx.objectStore(STORE_PLAYBOOKS);
                    var req = store.getAll();
                    req.onsuccess = function () {
                        var map = {};
                        (req.result || []).forEach(function (entry) {
                            if (entry && entry.id) map[entry.id] = entry;
                        });
                        resolve(map);
                    };
                    req.onerror = function () {
                        resolve({});
                    };
                });
            })
            .catch(function () {
                return {};
            });
    };

    window._savePlaybookForType = function (type, data) {
        return _openPlaybookDB().then(function (db) {
            return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                var tx = db.transaction(STORE_PLAYBOOKS, "readwrite");
                var store = tx.objectStore(STORE_PLAYBOOKS);
                var entry = Object.assign({}, data, { id: type });
                store.put(entry);
                tx.oncomplete = function () {
                    resolve();
                };
                tx.onerror = function () {
                    reject(tx.error);
                };
            });
        });
    };

    window._deletePlaybookForType = function (type) {
        return _openPlaybookDB().then(function (db) {
            return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                var tx = db.transaction(STORE_PLAYBOOKS, "readwrite");
                var store = tx.objectStore(STORE_PLAYBOOKS);
                store.delete(type);
                tx.oncomplete = function () {
                    resolve();
                };
                tx.onerror = function () {
                    reject(tx.error);
                };
            });
        });
    };

    window._getPlaybookForType = function (agreementType) {
        return window._loadTrackPortPlaybooks().then(function (map) {
            var key = (agreementType || "").trim();
            if (!key) return null;
            if (map[key]) return map[key];
            var lower = key.toLowerCase();
            var keys = Object.keys(map);
            for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
                if (keys[i].toLowerCase() === lower) return map[keys[i]];
            }
            var aliases = {
                "mutual nda": ["non-disclosure agreement", "nda", "confidentiality agreement"],
                nda: ["non-disclosure agreement", "mutual nda", "confidentiality agreement"],
                "non-disclosure agreement": ["mutual nda", "nda", "confidentiality agreement"],
                "confidentiality agreement": ["non-disclosure agreement", "mutual nda", "nda"],
                "master services agreement": ["service agreement", "services agreement", "professional services agreement"],
                "service agreement": ["services agreement", "master services agreement"],
                "services agreement": ["service agreement", "master services agreement"],
                "professional services agreement": ["service agreement", "services agreement", "master services agreement"],
                "consulting agreement": [
                    "consultant agreement",
                    "consultant service agreement",
                    "consultant services agreement",
                    "independent contractor agreement",
                ],
                "consultant agreement": ["consulting agreement", "consultant service agreement", "consultant services agreement"],
                "consultant service agreement": ["consulting agreement", "consultant agreement", "consultant services agreement"],
                "consultant services agreement": ["consulting agreement", "consultant agreement", "consultant service agreement"],
                "statement of work": ["sow"],
                sow: ["statement of work"],
                "material transfer agreement": ["mta"],
                mta: ["material transfer agreement"],
                "joint development agreement": ["joint r&d agreement", "co-development agreement"],
                "clinical study agreement": ["clinical trial agreement", "clinical research agreement"],
                "consumer study agreement": [
                    "consumer test agreement",
                    "consumer research agreement",
                    "consumer/sensory study agreement",
                    "sensory study agreement",
                ],
                "consumer/sensory study agreement": ["consumer study agreement"],
                "sensory study agreement": ["consumer study agreement"],
                "research agreement": ["sponsored research agreement", "research collaboration agreement"],
            };
            var aliasList = aliases[lower] || [];
            for (var a = 0; a < aliasList.length; a++) {
                for (var j = 0; j < keys.length; j++) {
                    if (keys[j].toLowerCase() === aliasList[a]) return map[keys[j]];
                }
            }
            var norm = function (s) {
                return s
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .replace(/\b(agreement|mutual|confidentiality)\b/g, "")
                    .replace(/[^a-z]/g, "");
            };
            var nKey = norm(key);
            if (nKey.length >= 3) {
                for (var k = 0; k < keys.length; k++) {
                    var nStored = norm(keys[k]);
                    if (nStored.length >= 3 && (nKey.indexOf(nStored) !== -1 || nStored.indexOf(nKey) !== -1)) return map[keys[k]];
                }
            }
            return null;
        });
    };

    var TRACKPORT_ATTORNEYS_KEY = "eli_trackport_attorneys_v1";

    window._defaultAttorneyEmails = function () {
        return {
            "Jared Lerner": "jared_lerner@colpal.com",
            "Josh Trojak": "josh_trojak@colpal.com",
            "Cliff Wilkins": "clifford_wilkins@colpal.com",
            "Amelia Reid": "amelia_reid@colpal.com",
            "Andrew Nemiroff": "andrew_nemiroff@colpal.com",
        };
    };

    window._loadAttorneyEmails = function () {
        try {
            var saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(TRACKPORT_ATTORNEYS_KEY) || "null");
            return saved && typeof saved === "object" ? saved : window._defaultAttorneyEmails();
        } catch (e) {
            return window._defaultAttorneyEmails();
        }
    };

    window._saveAttorneyEmails = function (map) {
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(TRACKPORT_ATTORNEYS_KEY, JSON.stringify(map || {}));
        } catch (e) { }
    };

    window.showTrackChangesSettingsPopup = function () {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
        var agreementTypes = getAgreementTypes();
        var card = document.createElement("div");
        card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
        card.style.cssText =
            "padding:0; border-radius:0; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-left:5px solid #1565c0; background:#fff;";
        var header = document.createElement("div");
        header.style.cssText =
            "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b2a 0%,#1b263b 100%); padding:12px 15px; border-bottom:3px solid #c9a227; position:relative; overflow:hidden;";
        header.innerHTML =
            '<div style="position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(255,255,255,0.05),transparent 60%); pointer-events:none;"></div>' +
            '<div style="font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#8fa6c7; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px; margin-bottom:2px;">CONFIGURATION</div>' +
            '<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:400; color:#ffffff; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">' +
            '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none"><path d="M3 3C3 2.45 3.45 2 4 2H16L22 8V25C22 25.55 21.55 26 21 26H4C3.45 26 3 25.55 3 25V3Z" fill="#fff" stroke="#8B4513" stroke-width="1.4"/><path d="M16 2L22 8H16V2Z" fill="#e5e7eb"/><path d="M6.5 11H18" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M6.5 14H14" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M6.5 17H17" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>' +
            " Review Redline Settings</div>";
        card.appendChild(header);
        var tabBar = document.createElement("div");
        tabBar.style.cssText = "display:flex; background:#f5f5f5; border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;";
        tabBar.innerHTML =
            '<div id="tpSetTabPlaybooks" style="flex:1; text-align:center; padding:10px; cursor:pointer; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; border-bottom:3px solid #1565c0; background:white; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Playbooks</div>' +
            '<div id="tpSetTabSettings" style="flex:1; text-align:center; padding:10px; cursor:pointer; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#546e7a; border-bottom:3px solid transparent; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Settings</div>';
        card.appendChild(tabBar);
        var content = document.createElement("div");
        content.style.padding = "16px";
        card.appendChild(content);
        out.appendChild(card);
        function switchTab(tab) {
            var t1 = document.getElementById("tpSetTabPlaybooks");
            var t2 = document.getElementById("tpSetTabSettings");
            if (tab === "playbooks") {
                t1.style.borderBottomColor = "#1565c0";
                t1.style.color = "#1565c0";
                t1.style.background = "white";
                t2.style.borderBottomColor = "transparent";
                t2.style.color = "#546e7a";
                t2.style.background = "#f5f5f5";
                renderPlaybooksTab();
            } else {
                t2.style.borderBottomColor = "#1565c0";
                t2.style.color = "#1565c0";
                t2.style.background = "white";
                t1.style.borderBottomColor = "transparent";
                t1.style.color = "#546e7a";
                t1.style.background = "#f5f5f5";
                renderSettingsTab();
            }
        }
        function renderPlaybooksTab() {
            content.innerHTML =
                '<div style="text-align:center; padding:30px;"><div style="font-size:11px; color:#64748b;">Loading playbooks...</div></div>';
            window
                ._loadTrackPortPlaybooks()
                .then(function (playbooks) {
                    _renderPlaybooksTabWithData(playbooks);
                })
                .catch(function () {
                    _renderPlaybooksTabWithData({});
                });
        }
        function _renderPlaybooksTabWithData(playbooks) {
            var uploadedTypes = Object.keys(playbooks).filter(function (k) {
                return k !== "id";
            });
            var html =
                '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;">' +
                '<div class="eli-label-sm" style="color:#1e3a8a; margin-bottom:4px;">Agreement Playbooks</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b; line-height:1.4;">Upload clause mapping playbooks by agreement type. Review Redline auto-selects the matching playbook based on document detection.</div>' +
                "</div>";
            html +=
                '<div style="margin-bottom:14px; display:flex; gap:6px;">' +
                '<button id="tpSetUploadPb" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.4px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1565c0,#0d47a1); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #0d47a1; border-radius:0; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(21,101,192,0.25);">+ UPLOAD PLAYBOOK</button>' +
                '<button id="tpSetBulkUploadPb" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.4px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#4f46e5); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #4f46e5; border-radius:0; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',system-ui,sans-serif;">📦 BULK IMPORT</button>' +
                '<input type="file" id="tpSetPbFileInput" accept=".json" style="display:none;">' +
                '<input type="file" id="tpSetBulkPbFileInput" accept=".json" style="display:none;">' +
                "</div>";
            if (uploadedTypes.length === 0) {
                html +=
                    '<div style="text-align:center; padding:30px 16px; border:1px dashed #cbd5e1; background:#fafbfc;">' +
                    '<div style="font-size:24px; margin-bottom:8px; opacity:0.4;">📁</div>' +
                    '<div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#64748b;">No Playbooks Uploaded</div>' +
                    '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#94a3b8; margin-top:4px;">Click the button above to upload your first playbook.</div>' +
                    "</div>";
            } else {
                html +=
                    '<div style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; overflow:hidden;">' +
                    '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto; padding:8px 12px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e293b); gap:8px;">' +
                    '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Agreement Type</div>' +
                    '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-align:center;">Clauses</div>' +
                    '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-align:center;">Actions</div>' +
                    "</div>";
                uploadedTypes.forEach(function (type) {
                    var pb = playbooks[type];
                    var clauseCount =
                        pb && pb.clauseMapping && Array.isArray(pb.clauseMapping.clauses) ? pb.clauseMapping.clauses.length : 0;
                    var isCustom = agreementTypes.indexOf(type) === -1;
                    html +=
                        '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr auto auto; padding:8px 12px; border-top:1px solid #f1f5f9; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:' +
                        (isCustom ? "#fffbeb" : "#fff") +
                        ';">' +
                        '<div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:' +
                        (isCustom ? "#92400e" : "#0f172a") +
                        ';">' +
                        type +
                        (isCustom
                            ? ' <span style="font-size:8px; color:#b45309; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.3px;">CUSTOM</span>'
                            : "") +
                        "</div>" +
                        '<div style="text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#1e3a8a;">' +
                        clauseCount +
                        "</span></div>" +
                        '<div style="text-align:center; display:flex; gap:4px; justify-content:center;">' +
                        '<button class="tpSetPbEdit" data-pb-type="' +
                        type +
                        '" style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #93c5fd; padding:2px 8px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;">EDIT</button>' +
                        '<button class="tpSetPbDelete" data-pb-type="' +
                        type +
                        '" style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#dc2626; background:#fff; border:1px solid #fca5a5; padding:2px 8px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;">DELETE</button>' +
                        "</div></div>";
                });
                html += "</div>";
            }
            html +=
                '<div style="margin-top:12px; padding:10px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">' +
                '<label style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:8px; cursor:pointer; font-size:11px; color:#1e293b; line-height:1.35;">' +
                '<input type="checkbox" id="tpSetDisableAi" style="margin-top:2px;">' +
                "<span>Disable AI auto-run after clicking <strong>Review Redline</strong>.<br>" +
                '<span style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b;">Capture still runs; use Run AI manually when needed.</span></span>' +
                "</label></div>";
            content.innerHTML = html;
            var disableAiCb = document.getElementById("tpSetDisableAi");
            if (disableAiCb) {
                disableAiCb.checked = !!(
                    window.TrackChangesPort &&
                    typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getDisableAiOnAnalyze === "function" &&
                    window.TrackChangesPort.getDisableAiOnAnalyze()
                );
                disableAiCb.onchange = function () {
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setDisableAiOnAnalyze === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setDisableAiOnAnalyze(!!disableAiCb.checked);
                };
            }
            document.getElementById("tpSetUploadPb").onclick = function () {
                showUploadTypeChooser();
            };
            var bulkUploadBtn = document.getElementById("tpSetBulkUploadPb");
            var bulkFileInput = document.getElementById("tpSetBulkPbFileInput");
            if (bulkUploadBtn && bulkFileInput) {
                bulkUploadBtn.onclick = function () {
                    bulkFileInput.value = "";
                    bulkFileInput.click();
                };
                bulkFileInput.onchange = function (e) {
                    var file = e && e.target && e.target.files ? e.target.files[0] : null;
                    if (!file) return;
                    var reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.onload = function (evt) {
                        try {
                            var parsed = JSON.parse((evt && evt.target && evt.target.result) || "{}");
                            if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object" || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
                                if (typeof showToast === "function")
                                    showToast("Invalid bulk format — expected an object keyed by agreement type.");
                                return;
                            }
                            var keys = Object.keys(parsed).filter(function (k) {
                                return k && parsed[k] && typeof parsed[k] === "object";
                            });
                            if (keys.length === 0) {
                                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("No playbooks found in file.");
                                return;
                            }
                            var saved = 0;
                            var total = keys.length;
                            var next = function (idx) {
                                if (idx >= total) {
                                    renderPlaybooksTab();
                                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast(saved + " playbook(s) imported successfully");
                                    return;
                                }
                                var k = keys[idx];
                                var entry = parsed[k];
                                var data = {
                                    playbookClauses: entry.playbookClauses || [],
                                    clauseMapping: entry.clauseMapping || {},
                                    uploadedAt: entry.uploadedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
                                };
                                window
                                    ._savePlaybookForType(k, data)
                                    .then(function () {
                                        saved++;
                                        next(idx + 1);
                                    })
                                    .catch(function () {
                                        next(idx + 1);
                                    });
                            };
                            next(0);
                        } catch (err) {
                            if (typeof showToast === "function")
                                showToast("Invalid JSON: " + (err && err.message ? err.message : "parse error"));
                        }
                    };
                    reader.readAsText(file);
                };
            }
            content.querySelectorAll(".tpSetPbDelete").forEach(function (btn) {
                btn.onclick = function () {
                    var type = btn.getAttribute("data-pb-type");
                    if (!type) return;
                    var row = btn.closest("div") || btn.parentElement;
                    if (btn._confirmPending) return;
                    btn._confirmPending = true;
                    var origHtml = btn.innerHTML;
                    var origStyle = btn.style.cssText;
                    btn.innerHTML = "CONFIRM DELETE?";
                    btn.style.cssText +=
                        "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dc2626,#b91c1c); color:#fff; border-color:#991b1b; min-width:110px;";
                    var cancelBtn = document.createElement("button");
                    cancelBtn.innerHTML = "CANCEL";
                    cancelBtn.style.cssText =
                        "padding:3px 8px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; background:#f1f5f9; color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; margin-left:4px;";
                    btn.parentElement.insertBefore(cancelBtn, btn.nextSibling);
                    var cleanup = function () {
                        btn._confirmPending = false;
                        btn.innerHTML = origHtml;
                        btn.style.cssText = origStyle;
                        if (cancelBtn.parentElement) cancelBtn.remove();
                    };
                    cancelBtn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        cleanup();
                    };
                    btn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        window._deletePlaybookForType(type).then(function () {
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function") {
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses([]);
                            }
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function") {
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping({ libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} });
                            }
                            renderPlaybooksTab();
                            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Deleted playbook for " + type);
                        });
                    };
                };
            });
            content.querySelectorAll(".tpSetPbEdit").forEach(function (btn) {
                btn.onclick = function () {
                    var type = btn.getAttribute("data-pb-type");
                    if (!type) return;
                    if (typeof window.showPlaybookBuilderApp === "function") window.showPlaybookBuilderApp(type);
                };
            });
        }
        function showUploadTypeChooser() {
            var opts = '<option value="">— Select Agreement Type —</option>';
            agreementTypes.forEach(function (t) {
                opts += '<option value="' + t + '">' + t + "</option>";
            });
            opts += '<option value="__custom">+ New Custom Type...</option>';
            content.innerHTML =
                '<div style="margin-bottom:4px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:#1e3a8a; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.6px;">Upload Playbook</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:14px; line-height:1.4;">Step 1: Select the agreement type for this playbook.</div>' +
                '<select id="tpSetPbTypeSelect" style="width:100%; padding:10px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; border:1.5px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; margin-bottom:8px; background:#fff;">' +
                opts +
                "</select>" +
                '<input type="text" id="tpSetPbCustomName" placeholder="Enter new agreement type name..." style="display:none; width:100%; padding:10px; font-size:12px; border:1.5px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; margin-bottom:8px; box-sizing:border-box;">' +
                '<div style="display:flex; gap:8px;">' +
                '<button id="tpSetPbNext" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1565c0,#0d47a1); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #0d47a1; border-radius:0;">NEXT — CHOOSE FILE</button>' +
                '<button id="tpSetPbCancelType" style="padding:10px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#f7f9fa,#dce3e8); color:#475569; border:1.5px solid #b0bec5; border-radius:0;">CANCEL</button>' +
                "</div>" +
                '<input type="file" id="tpSetPbFileInput" accept=".json" style="display:none;">' +
                '<div id="tpSetPbStatus" style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b; min-height:14px; margin-top:8px;"></div>';
            var sel = document.getElementById("tpSetPbTypeSelect");
            var customInput = document.getElementById("tpSetPbCustomName");
            var fileInput = document.getElementById("tpSetPbFileInput");
            var statusEl = document.getElementById("tpSetPbStatus");
            sel.onchange = function () {
                customInput.style.display = sel.value === "__custom" ? "block" : "none";
            };
            document.getElementById("tpSetPbCancelType").onclick = function () {
                renderPlaybooksTab();
            };
            document.getElementById("tpSetPbNext").onclick = function () {
                var chosen = sel.value === "__custom" ? customInput.value.trim() : sel.value;
                if (!chosen) {
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Select an agreement type first.");
                    return;
                }
                EliState.set("tp.pendingPbType", chosen);
                fileInput.value = "";
                fileInput.click();
            };
            fileInput.onchange = function (e) {
                var file = e && e.target && e.target.files ? e.target.files[0] : null;
                if (!file) return;
                var chosenType = EliState.get("tp.pendingPbType") || "";
                if (!chosenType) {
                    renderPlaybooksTab();
                    return;
                }
                if (statusEl) statusEl.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#64748b;">Loading JSON...</span>';
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (evt) {
                    try {
                        var parsed = JSON.parse((evt && evt.target && evt.target.result) || "{}");
                        var sharedArray = Array.isArray(parsed)
                            ? parsed
                            : Array.isArray(parsed && parsed.clauses)
                                ? parsed.clauses
                                : [];
                        var normalizedMapping = window.parseClauseMappingJsonForPort(
                            Array.isArray(parsed) ? { clauses: parsed } : parsed,
                        );
                        savePlaybookForType(chosenType, sharedArray, normalizedMapping);
                    } catch (err) {
                        if (statusEl)
                            statusEl.innerHTML =
                                '<span style="color:#b91c1c;">Invalid JSON (' +
                                (err && err.message ? err.message : "parse error") +
                                ")</span>";
                    }
                };
                reader.readAsText(file);
            };
        }
        function savePlaybookForType(type, sharedArray, normalizedMapping) {
            var data = {
                playbookClauses: sharedArray,
                clauseMapping: normalizedMapping,
                uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            };
            window._savePlaybookForType(type, data).then(function () {
                if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function")
                    window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses(sharedArray);
                if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function")
                    window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping(normalizedMapping);
                renderPlaybooksTab();
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Playbook saved for " + type);
            });
        }
        function renderSettingsTab() {
            var emails = window._loadAttorneyEmails();
            var names = Object.keys(emails);
            var html =
                '<div style="margin-bottom:14px;">' +
                '<div class="eli-label-sm" style="color:#1e3a8a; margin-bottom:4px;">Attorney Email Addresses</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b; line-height:1.4;">Configure email addresses for the Completed Review internal email flow.</div>' +
                "</div>";
            html +=
                '<div style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:14px;">' +
                '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:140px 1fr; padding:8px 12px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a,#1e293b); gap:8px;">' +
                '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Attorney</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">Email Address</div>' +
                "</div>";
            names.forEach(function (name) {
                html +=
                    '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:140px 1fr; padding:6px 12px; border-top:1px solid #f1f5f9; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:#fff;">' +
                    '<div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#0f172a;">' +
                    name +
                    "</div>" +
                    '<input type="text" class="tpSetAttEmail" data-att-name="' +
                    name +
                    '" value="' +
                    (emails[name] || "") +
                    '" style="width:100%; padding:6px 8px; font-size:11px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; font-family:monospace; box-sizing:border-box;">' +
                    "</div>";
            });
            html += "</div>";
            html +=
                '<div style="display:flex; gap:8px; margin-bottom:14px;">' +
                '<button id="tpSetSaveEmails" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#15803d); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #15803d; border-radius:0; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',system-ui,sans-serif;">SAVE EMAILS</button>' +
                '<button id="tpSetResetEmails" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#f7f9fa,#dce3e8); color:#475569; border:1.5px solid #b0bec5; border-radius:0; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',system-ui,sans-serif;">RESET TO DEFAULT</button>' +
                "</div>";
            html += '<div id="tpSetEmailStatus" style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b; min-height:14px;"></div>';
            content.innerHTML = html;
            document.getElementById("tpSetSaveEmails").onclick = function () {
                var updated = {};
                content.querySelectorAll(".tpSetAttEmail").forEach(function (inp) {
                    var n = inp.getAttribute("data-att-name");
                    if (n) updated[n] = inp.value.trim();
                });
                window._saveAttorneyEmails(updated);
                document.getElementById("tpSetEmailStatus").innerHTML =
                    '<span style="color:#166534; font-weight:700;">Attorney emails saved.</span>';
            };
            document.getElementById("tpSetResetEmails").onclick = function () {
                window._saveAttorneyEmails(window._defaultAttorneyEmails());
                renderSettingsTab();
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Attorney emails reset to defaults.");
            };
        }
        document.getElementById("tpSetTabPlaybooks").onclick = function () {
            switchTab("playbooks");
        };
        document.getElementById("tpSetTabSettings").onclick = function () {
            switchTab("settings");
        };
        renderPlaybooksTab();
        var footer = document.createElement("div");
        footer.style.cssText = "padding:15px; border-top:1px solid #ddd; background:#fafafa;";
        var btnClose = document.createElement("button");
        btnClose.className = "btn-secondary";
        btnClose.innerHTML = "← HOME";
        btnClose.onclick = showHome;
        footer.appendChild(btnClose);
        card.appendChild(footer);
    };

    window._showPlaybookSwitcher = function () {
        var existing = document.getElementById("trackPortPlaybookSwitcher");
        if (existing) {
            existing.remove();
            return;
        }
        window
            ._loadTrackPortPlaybooks()
            .then(function (playbooks) {
                window._renderPlaybookSwitcher(playbooks);
            })
            .catch(function () {
                window._renderPlaybookSwitcher({});
            });
    };

    window._renderPlaybookSwitcher = function (playbooks) {
        var types = Object.keys(playbooks).filter(function (k) {
            return k !== "id";
        });
        var overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "trackPortPlaybookSwitcher";
        overlay.style.cssText =
            "position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45); z-index:2147483000; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;";
        var modal = document.createElement("div");
        modal.style.cssText =
            "background:#fff; width:min(380px, 92vw); border:1px solid #d1d5db; box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); border-radius:0; overflow:hidden; font-family:'Segoe UI',sans-serif;";
        var headerHtml =
            '<div style="padding:12px 14px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b2a,#1b263b); border-bottom:3px solid #c9a227;">' +
            '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#8fa6c7; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px;">SWITCH PLAYBOOK</div>' +
            '<div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:600; color:#fff; margin-top:2px;">Select Active Playbook</div></div>';
        var bodyHtml = '<div style="padding:12px; max-height:320px; overflow:auto;">';
        if (types.length === 0) {
            bodyHtml +=
                '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#94a3b8; text-align:center; padding:20px;">No playbooks uploaded yet. Open settings to upload.</div>';
        } else {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            var current = (session && session._autoSelectedPlaybook) || "";
            types.forEach(function (type) {
                var pb = playbooks[type];
                var count =
                    pb && pb.clauseMapping && Array.isArray(pb.clauseMapping.clauses) ? pb.clauseMapping.clauses.length : 0;
                var isActive = type === current;
                bodyHtml +=
                    '<button class="tpPbSwitchBtn" data-pb-switch-type="' +
                    type +
                    '" style="width:100%; text-align:left; padding:10px 12px; margin-bottom:6px; ' +
                    "background:" +
                    (isActive ? "linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#dbeafe)" : "#f8fafc") +
                    "; " +
                    "border:1.5px solid " +
                    (isActive ? "#3b82f6" : "#e2e8f0") +
                    '; border-radius:0; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a;">' +
                    '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">' +
                    "<span>" +
                    type +
                    "</span>" +
                    '<span style="font-size:9px; color:#64748b; font-weight:400;">' +
                    count +
                    " clauses" +
                    (isActive ? ' <span style="color:#2563eb; font-weight:700;">ACTIVE</span>' : "") +
                    "</span>" +
                    "</div></button>";
            });
        }
        bodyHtml +=
            '<button class="tpPbSwitchBtn" data-pb-switch-type="__none" style="width:100%; text-align:left; padding:10px 12px; margin-bottom:6px; background:#fef2f2; border:1.5px solid #fca5a5; border-radius:0; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#991b1b;">Use AI Inference (No Playbook)</button>';
        bodyHtml += "</div>";
        var footerHtml =
            '<div style="padding:8px 12px; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0; display:flex; justify-content:flex-end;">' +
            '<button id="tpPbSwitchClose" style="padding:8px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#f7f9fa,#dce3e8); color:#475569; border:1.5px solid #b0bec5; border-radius:0;">CLOSE</button></div>';
        modal.innerHTML = headerHtml + bodyHtml + footerHtml;
        overlay.appendChild(modal);
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.onclick = function (e) {
            if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        };
        modal.querySelector("#tpPbSwitchClose").onclick = function () {
            overlay.remove();
        };
        modal.querySelectorAll(".tpPbSwitchBtn").forEach(function (btn) {
            btn.onclick = function () {
                var type = btn.getAttribute("data-pb-switch-type");
                var session =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                        : null;
                if (type === "__none") {
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses([]);
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping({ libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} });
                    if (session) {
                        session._autoSelectedPlaybook = "";
                        session.aiPreReadUsed = true;
                    }
                } else {
                    var pb = playbooks[type];
                    if (pb) {
                        var _switchMapping = pb.clauseMapping
                            ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(pb.clauseMapping))
                            : { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
                        if (_switchMapping.articleGuidance) {
                            var _swUsedIds = {};
                            (_switchMapping.clauses || []).forEach(function (c) {
                                if (c.articleId) _swUsedIds[c.articleId] = true;
                            });
                            Object.keys(_switchMapping.articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                                if (!_swUsedIds[k]) delete _switchMapping.articleGuidance[k];
                            });
                        }
                        if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function")
                            window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses(pb.playbookClauses || []);
                        if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function")
                            window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping(_switchMapping);
                        if (session) {
                            session._autoSelectedPlaybook = type;
                            session.clauseMapping = _switchMapping;
                            session.aiPreReadUsed = false;
                        }
                    }
                }
                overlay.remove();
                if (session && typeof window.renderTrackPortWorkbench === "function") window.renderTrackPortWorkbench(session);
                if (typeof showToast === "function")
                    showToast(type === "__none" ? "Switched to AI inference mode." : "Switched to " + type + " playbook.");
            };
        });
    };

    window.toggleAppMode = function () {
        window._eliAppMode = window._eliAppMode === 'build' ? 'review' : 'build';
        window._eliKeepBuildMode = window._eliAppMode === 'build';
        var modePill = document.getElementById('eli-mode-toggle-pill');
        if (modePill) {
            modePill.innerText = window._eliAppMode === 'build' ? '⚙️ BUILD MODE' : '🔍 REVIEW MODE';
            modePill.style.background = window._eliAppMode === 'build' ? '#f59e0b' : '#1565c0';
            modePill.style.color = '#fff';
        }

        var redlinePill = document.getElementById('eli-redline-pill-row');
        if (redlinePill) redlinePill.style.display = window._eliAppMode !== 'build' && window._eliHomeRedlineCount > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';

        window.refreshDashboardGrid();
    };

    window.showLegalReviewSettingsMenu = function () {
        var overlay = showEliDialog({
            variant: "neutral",
            icon: "⚙️",
            title: "Legal Review Settings",
            body: `
                <div style="margin-bottom:15px; font-size:12px; color:#546e7a;">Select which module you would like to configure:</div>
                <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">
                    <button id="btnLrRisk" class="btn-platinum-config" style="width:100%; font-size:12px; padding:12px; font-weight:800; border-radius:6px; box-sizing:border-box;">🛡️ Legal Risks & Rules</button>
                    <button id="btnLrCompare" class="btn-platinum-config" style="width:100%; font-size:12px; padding:12px; font-weight:800; border-radius:6px; box-sizing:border-box;">⚖️ Compare Draft</button>
                    <button id="btnLrRedline" class="btn-platinum-config" style="width:100%; font-size:12px; padding:12px; font-weight:800; border-radius:6px; box-sizing:border-box;">📝 Review Redline</button>
                </div>
            `,
            buttons: [
                {
                    id: "btnLrCancel",
                    label: "Cancel",
                    cls: "btn-secondary",
                    style: "width:100%; font-size:12px; padding:12px; font-weight:800; border-radius:6px;",
                    onclick: function () {
                        overlay.remove();
                    }
                }
            ]
        });

        setTimeout(() => {
            var btnRisk = overlay.querySelector("#btnLrRisk");
            if (btnRisk) btnRisk.onclick = function () {
                overlay.remove();
                if (typeof showRiskRulesManager === "function") showRiskRulesManager();
            };

            var btnCompare = overlay.querySelector("#btnLrCompare");
            if (btnCompare) btnCompare.onclick = function () {
                overlay.remove();
                if (typeof showConfigModal === "function") showConfigModal("compare");
            };

            var btnRedline = overlay.querySelector("#btnLrRedline");
            if (btnRedline) btnRedline.onclick = function () {
                overlay.remove();
                if (typeof showTrackChangesSettingsPopup === "function") showTrackChangesSettingsPopup();
            };
        }, 0);
    };

    window.renderGridHTML = function () {
