                    <button id="btnRunScrub" class="obsidian-button" onclick="executeDocuScrub(null, window._frScrubCallback)">
                        <div class="beam"></div><span style="position:relative; z-index:10;">Scrub Document</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
    }


    function _frGetFinalStage() {
        return `
            <div class="stage-container">
                <div class="stage-content">
                    <div class="step-indicator">
                        <div class="step-dot complete"></div>
                        <div class="step-dot complete"></div>
                        <div class="step-dot active"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="margin-bottom:24px;">
                        <h2 style="font-size: 32px; color: var(--midnight); margin:0 0 8px 0;">Step 02 // Final Audit</h2>
                        
                    </div>

                    <div style="padding:16px; background:#fffbeb; border-left:4px solid var(--gold-leaf); margin-bottom:32px; box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(212,175,55,0.08);">
                        <div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:var(--gold-leaf); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1.5px; margin-bottom:8px;">Brief Summary of Agreement</div>
                        <textarea id="ebOverview" style="width:100%; background:transparent; border:1px dashed transparent; padding:4px; resize:none; outline:none; font-family:var(--font-legal); font-size:14px; color:#334155; line-height:1.6; transition:border-color 0.2s;" oninput="window._ebData.overview=this.value; _ebAutoGrow(this)"></textarea>
                    </div>

                    <div class="label-ceremony">📋 Key Review Items</div>
                    
                    <div id="ebCards"></div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="stage-footer">
                    <button id="ebGenEmailBtn" class="obsidian-button" onclick="ebShowEmail()" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--primary-lux) 0%,var(--midnight) 100%);">
                        <div class="beam"></div><span style="position:relative; z-index:10;">Generate Approval Email</span>
                    </button>
                    <button id="ebRunBtn" style="display:none;" onclick="runExecutiveBrief()">HIDDEN GENERATE BTN</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
    }


    function _ebMatchTypeToList(rawType, list) {
        if (!rawType) return null;
        var clean = String(rawType)
            .toLowerCase()
            .replace(/[^a-z ]/g, "")
            .trim();
        if (!clean) return null;
        var keywordMap = [
            { key: "nondisclosure", score: 100 },
            { key: "disclosure", score: 80 },
            { key: "nda", score: 100 },
            { key: "confidential", score: 60 },
            { key: "material transfer", score: 100 },
            { key: "mta", score: 100 },
            { key: "transfer", score: 40 },
            { key: "clinical study", score: 100 },
            { key: "clinical", score: 70 },
            { key: "consumer study", score: 100 },
            { key: "consumer", score: 50 },
            { key: "research", score: 100 },
            { key: "consulting", score: 100 },
            { key: "consultant", score: 80 },
            { key: "grant", score: 100 },
            { key: "joint development", score: 100 },
            { key: "joint", score: 50 },
            { key: "license", score: 100 },
            { key: "licensing", score: 80 },
            { key: "master services", score: 100 },
            { key: "master service", score: 100 },
            { key: "msa", score: 100 },
            { key: "master", score: 60 },
            { key: "statement of work", score: 100 },
            { key: "sow", score: 100 },
            { key: "speaker", score: 100 },
            { key: "visitor", score: 100 },
            { key: "sponsorship", score: 100 },
            { key: "sponsor", score: 60 },
            { key: "amendment", score: 100 },
            { key: "renewal", score: 100 },
            { key: "termination", score: 100 },
            { key: "service", score: 30 },
        ];
        var bestIdx = -1,
            bestScore = 0;
        for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
            var optText = String(list[i]).toLowerCase();
            var s = 0;
            if (optText === clean) s += 500;
            for (var k = 0; k < keywordMap.length; k++) {
                if (clean.indexOf(keywordMap[k].key) > -1 && optText.indexOf(keywordMap[k].key) > -1) {
                    s += keywordMap[k].score;
                }
            }
            if (s > bestScore) {
                bestScore = s;
                bestIdx = i;
            }
        }
        return bestIdx !== -1 ? list[bestIdx] : null;
    }

    function _ebDetectAgreementType() {
        var list = getAgreementTypes();
        var docKey = window.CURRENT_DOC_ID || "currentDoc";
        if (window._ebDetectedTypeCache && window._ebDetectedTypeCache.key === docKey) {
            return Promise.resolve(window._ebDetectedTypeCache.value);
        }
        function cache(value) {
            window._ebDetectedTypeCache = { key: docKey, value: value };
            return value;
        }
        function fromAiCache() {
            if (typeof PROMPTS === "undefined" || !PROMPTS.loadDocFromDB) return Promise.resolve(null);
            var dbPromise = PROMPTS.loadDocFromDB(docKey);
            var timer = new Promise(function (r) {
                setTimeout(function () {
                    r(null);
                }, 1500);
            });
            return Promise.race([dbPromise, timer])
                .then(function (rec) {
                    if (!rec || !rec.aiCache || !Array.isArray(rec.aiCache)) return null;
                    var found = null;
                    rec.aiCache.forEach(function (it) {
                        if (!it || !it.field) return;
                        var f = String(it.field).toLowerCase();
                        if (!found && (f.indexOf("type") > -1 || f.indexOf("agreement") > -1)) {
                            found = it.data;
                        }
                    });
                    return _ebMatchTypeToList(found, list);
                })
                .catch(function () {
                    return null;
                });
        }
        function fromAiScan() {
            return Word.run(function (context) {
                var body = context.document.body;
                body.load("text");
                return context.sync().then(function () {
                    var sample = (body.text || "").substring(0, 8000);
                    if (!sample.trim()) return null;
                    var prompt =
                        "Identify the agreement type of the document excerpt below. Return ONLY a single line — the most specific matching name from this list (or your best generic guess if none fit):\n" +
                        list
                            .map(function (t) {
                                return "- " + t;
                            })
                            .join("\n") +
                        "\n\n" +
                        "DOCUMENT EXCERPT:\n" +
                        sample;
                    return callGemini(API_KEY, prompt).then(function (raw) {
                        if (!raw) return null;
                        var firstLine = String(raw)
                            .split("\n")[0]
                            .replace(/^[-•*\d.\s]+/, "")
                            .replace(/^["']|["']$/g, "")
                            .trim();
                        return _ebMatchTypeToList(firstLine, list);
                    });
                });
            }).catch(function () {
                return null;
            });
        }
        return fromAiCache().then(function (cached) {
            if (cached) return cache(cached);
            return fromAiScan().then(function (scanned) {
                return cache(scanned);
            });
        });
    }

    function _ebBuildEmptyData(type) {
        var keyTerms = getExecBriefTerms(type);
        return {
            overview: "",
            commitments: keyTerms.map(function (t) {
                return { title: t, details: "", ref: "—", severity: "Low", included: true, quote: "" };
            }),
        };
    }

    function _ebInjectShimmerCss() {
        if (document.getElementById("eb-shimmer-style")) return;
        var s = document.createElement("style");
        s.id = "eb-shimmer-style";
        s.textContent =
            "@keyframes ebShimmerSlide{0%{background-position:-300px 0;}100%{background-position:300px 0;}}" +
            ".eb-shimmer-bar{display:block;height:14px;margin:7px 0;background:#e2e8f0;background-image:linear-gradient(90deg,#e2e8f0 0,#f1f5f9 60px,#e2e8f0 120px);background-size:300px 100%;animation:ebShimmerSlide 1.4s infinite linear;border-radius:3px;}" +
            ".eb-shimmer-bar.tall{height:18px;}" +
            ".eb-shimmer-wrap{padding:4px 0;}" +
            "@keyframes ebGhostPulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.85;}50%{opacity:1;}}" +
            ".eb-card-generating{animation:ebGhostPulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;}";
        document.head.appendChild(s);
    }

    function _ebShowGenerating() {
        _ebInjectShimmerCss();
        var ov = document.getElementById("ebOverview");
        if (ov && !document.getElementById("ebOverviewPh")) {
            var oph = document.createElement("div");
            oph.id = "ebOverviewPh";
            oph.className = "eb-shimmer-wrap";
            oph.innerHTML =
                '<span class="eb-shimmer-bar tall" style="width:95%;"></span>' +
                '<span class="eb-shimmer-bar tall" style="width:88%;"></span>' +
                '<span class="eb-shimmer-bar tall" style="width:62%;"></span>';
            ov.style.display = "none";
            ov.parentNode.insertBefore(oph, ov.nextSibling);
        }
        var details = document.querySelectorAll("#ebCards textarea[data-eb-details]");
        details.forEach(function (ta) {
            var ph = document.createElement("div");
            ph.className = "eb-card-shimmer eb-shimmer-wrap";
            ph.innerHTML =
                '<span class="eb-shimmer-bar" style="width:96%;"></span>' +
                '<span class="eb-shimmer-bar" style="width:90%;"></span>' +
                '<span class="eb-shimmer-bar" style="width:74%;"></span>';
            ta.style.display = "none";
            ta.parentNode.insertBefore(ph, ta.nextSibling);
            var card = ta.closest("div[style*='border-left:4px solid']");
            if (card) card.classList.add("eb-card-generating");
        });
        var btn = document.getElementById("ebRunBtn");
        if (btn) {
            btn.dataset.origLabel = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.innerHTML =
                '<span style="display:inline-block; animation: ebGhostPulse 1.4s infinite;">✨ Generating Final Review…</span>';
            btn.disabled = true;
            btn.style.opacity = "0.85";
            btn.style.cursor = "wait";
        }
    }

    function _ebRestoreFromGenerating() {
        var oph = document.getElementById("ebOverviewPh");
        if (oph) oph.remove();
        document.querySelectorAll(".eb-card-shimmer").forEach(function (e) {
            e.remove();
        });
        var ov = document.getElementById("ebOverview");
        if (ov) ov.style.display = "";
        document.querySelectorAll("#ebCards textarea[data-eb-details]").forEach(function (ta) {
            ta.style.display = "";
        });
        document.querySelectorAll(".eb-card-generating").forEach(function (c) {
            c.classList.remove("eb-card-generating");
        });
        var btn = document.getElementById("ebRunBtn");
        if (btn) {
            if (btn.dataset.origLabel) btn.innerHTML = btn.dataset.origLabel;
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.style.opacity = "";
            btn.style.cursor = "";
        }
    }

    function _ebGetRequester() {
        var sel = document.getElementById("ebReqSel");
        if (!sel) return { name: "Requester", email: "" };
        if (sel.value === "__manual__") {
            return {
                name: (document.getElementById("ebReqName") || {}).value || "Requester",
                email: (document.getElementById("ebReqEmail") || {}).value || "",
            };
        }
        var found = (window._ebSavedReqs || []).find(function (r) {
            return String(r.id) === String(sel.value);
        });
        return found || { name: "Requester", email: "" };
    }

    // Returns the document body as plain text with track changes "accepted" —

    // deletions are dropped and insertions are kept — so AI tools that should

    // reason about the resulting agreement (e.g. Final Review) don't see the

    // redline noise that body.text would otherwise interleave.

    function getAcceptedDraftText(context, maxChars) {
        var ooxmlResult = context.document.body.getOoxml();
        return context.sync().then(function () {
            var raw = ooxmlResult.value || "";
            raw = raw.replace(/<w:del\b[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/w:del>/g, "");
            raw = raw.replace(/<w:del\b[^>]*\/>/g, "");
            raw = raw.replace(/<w:moveFrom\b[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/w:moveFrom>/g, "");
            raw = raw.replace(/<w:ins\b[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/w:ins>/g, "$1");
            raw = raw.replace(/<w:moveTo\b[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/w:moveTo>/g, "$1");
            var matches = raw.match(/<w:t[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/w:t>/g) || [];
            var text = matches
                .map(function (m) {
                    return m.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, "");
                })
                .join(" ")
                .replace(/&amp;/g, "&")
                .replace(/&lt;/g, "<")
                .replace(/&gt;/g, ">")
                .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
                .replace(/&apos;/g, "'")
                .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                .trim();
            if (maxChars && text.length > maxChars) text = text.substring(0, maxChars);
            return text;
        });
    }

    // Author roster is persisted PER DOCUMENT inside the Word file itself

    // (Office.context.document.settings → "eli_author_roster"). That way the

    // modal only asks once per document — subsequent questions on the same doc

    // reuse the saved classifications — but nothing leaks across documents and

    // nothing is written to local/IndexedDB storage. Internal vs external is

    // still assumed from the tool user + saved requesters list before
    consulting

    // the per-doc roster.

    var ELI_AUTHOR_ROSTER_KEY = "eli_author_roster";

    window._eliAuthorRosterCache = null;

    function _eliReadAuthorRosterFromDocSettings() {
        try {
            if (
                typeof Office === "undefined" ||
                !Office.context ||
                !Office.context.document ||
                !Office.context.document.settings
            ) {
                return {};
            }
            var raw = Office.context.document.settings.get(ELI_AUTHOR_ROSTER_KEY);
            if (!raw) return {};
            var parsed = typeof raw === "string" ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw;
            return parsed && typeof parsed === "object" ? parsed : {};
        } catch (_) {
            return {};
        }
    }

    function _eliWriteAuthorRosterToDocSettings(roster) {
        return new Promise(function (resolve) {
            try {
                if (
                    typeof Office === "undefined" ||
                    !Office.context ||
                    !Office.context.document ||
                    !Office.context.document.settings
                ) {
                    return resolve();
                }
                Office.context.document.settings.set(ELI_AUTHOR_ROSTER_KEY, JSON.stringify(roster || {}));
                Office.context.document.settings.saveAsync(function () {
                    resolve();
                });
            } catch (_) {
                resolve();
            }
        });
    }

    window._eliEnsureAuthorRosterLoaded = function () {
        // Merge document settings with any in-memory cache. If a previous
        // saveAsync was still in flight, a plain read can be empty while the
        // in-session cache already has the user's picks — take the union.
        var fromDoc = _eliReadAuthorRosterFromDocSettings();
        var mem = window._eliAuthorRosterCache && typeof window._eliAuthorRosterCache === "object" ? window._eliAuthorRosterCache : {};
        window._eliAuthorRosterCache = Object.assign({}, fromDoc, mem);
        return Promise.resolve(window._eliAuthorRosterCache);
    };

    window.getAuthorRoster = function () {
        if (!window._eliAuthorRosterCache) {
            window._eliAuthorRosterCache = _eliReadAuthorRosterFromDocSettings();
        }
        return window._eliAuthorRosterCache || {};
    };

    window.setAuthorClassification = function (name, kind) {
        if (!name) return;
        var r = window._eliAuthorRosterCache || _eliReadAuthorRosterFromDocSettings();
        if (!kind) {
            delete r[name];
        } else if (kind === "internal" || kind === "external" || kind === "unknown") {
            r[name] = kind;
        } else {
            delete r[name];
        }
        window._eliAuthorRosterCache = r;
        // Persistence happens once when the modal finishes (avoids saveAsync races
        // and ensures the next runChatQuery sees a merged roster in _eliEnsure…).
    };

    window._eliInternalNamesCache = null;

    window._eliEnsureInternalNamesLoaded = function () {
        if (window._eliInternalNamesCache) return Promise.resolve(window._eliInternalNamesCache);
        if (typeof loadFeatureData !== "function" || typeof STORE_REQUESTERS === "undefined") {
            window._eliInternalNamesCache = { names: [], emails: [] };
            return Promise.resolve(window._eliInternalNamesCache);
        }
        return loadFeatureData(STORE_REQUESTERS)
            .then(function (data) {
                var list = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
                var names = [];
                var emails = [];
                list.forEach(function (r) {
                    if (r && r.name) names.push(String(r.name).trim().toLowerCase());
                    if (r && r.email) emails.push(String(r.email).trim().toLowerCase());
                });
                window._eliInternalNamesCache = { names: names, emails: emails };
                return window._eliInternalNamesCache;
            })
            .catch(function () {
                window._eliInternalNamesCache = { names: [], emails: [] };
                return window._eliInternalNamesCache;
            });
    };

    function _eliIsKnownInternal(authorName) {
        if (!authorName) return false;
        var lower = String(authorName).trim().toLowerCase();
        // --- Collect every identity string the system knows for the current user ---
        var identities = [];
        try {
            if (typeof userSettings !== "undefined" && userSettings) {
                if (userSettings.emailTemplates && userSettings.emailTemplates.myName)
                    identities.push(String(userSettings.emailTemplates.myName).trim().toLowerCase());
                if (userSettings.firstName)
                    identities.push(String(userSettings.firstName).trim().toLowerCase());
                if (userSettings.name)
                    identities.push(String(userSettings.name).trim().toLowerCase());
                if (userSettings.displayName)
                    identities.push(String(userSettings.displayName).trim().toLowerCase());
            }
            ["eli_user_first_name", "eli_user_name", "userFirstName", "userName"].forEach(function (key) {
                var v = localStorage.getItem(key);
                if (v) identities.push(String(v).trim().toLowerCase());
            });
            if (typeof Office !== "undefined" && Office.context && Office.context.mailbox && Office.context.mailbox.userProfile) {
                var dn = (Office.context.mailbox.userProfile.displayName || "").trim().toLowerCase();
                if (dn) identities.push(dn);
                var em = (Office.context.mailbox.userProfile.emailAddress || "").trim().toLowerCase();
                if (em) identities.push(em);
            }
        } catch (_) { }
        // De-dup
        var seen = {};
        identities = identities.filter(function (id) {
            if (!id || id.length < 2 || seen[id]) return false;
            seen[id] = true;
            return true;
        });
        // --- Exact match against any known identity ---
        for (var i = 0; i < identities.length; i++) {
            if (lower === identities[i]) return true;
            // Substring containment (e.g. "Smith, John" vs "John Smith")
            if (lower.indexOf(identities[i]) >= 0 || identities[i].indexOf(lower) >= 0) return true;
        }
        // --- Fuzzy word-overlap match (mirrors getTrackPortCurrentUserName logic) ---
        var authorParts = lower.split(/[\s,]+/).filter(function (p) { return p.length >= 3; });
        if (authorParts.length) {
            for (var k = 0; k < identities.length; k++) {
                var idParts = identities[k].split(/[\s,]+/).filter(function (p) { return p.length >= 3; });
                for (var a = 0; a < authorParts.length; a++) {
                    for (var b = 0; b < idParts.length; b++) {
                        if (authorParts[a] === idParts[b]) return true;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        // --- Requester list check (existing) ---
        var cache = window._eliInternalNamesCache;
        if (cache) {
            if (cache.names && cache.names.indexOf(lower) !== -1) return true;
            if (cache.emails && cache.emails.indexOf(lower) !== -1) return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    function _eliRosterLookup(roster, name) {
        if (!roster || !name) return null;
        if (roster[name]) return roster[name];
        var lower = String(name).trim().toLowerCase();
        var keys = Object.keys(roster);
        for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
            if (keys[i].trim().toLowerCase() === lower) return roster[keys[i]];
        }
        return null;
    }

    window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt = function (authors) {
        if (!authors || !authors.length) return {};
        var roster = window.getAuthorRoster();
        var out = {};
        authors.forEach(function (a) {
            var saved = _eliRosterLookup(roster, a);
            if (saved) {
                out[a] = saved;
                return;
            }
            if (_eliIsKnownInternal(a)) {
                out[a] = "internal";
                return;
            }
            out[a] = "external";
        });
        return out;
    };

    // Returns the subset of authors that have not yet been classified by the
    user

    // AND don't match an auto-detected internal (current user or saved
    requester).

    window.getUnclassifiedAuthors = function (authors) {
        if (!authors || !authors.length) return [];
        var roster = window.getAuthorRoster();
        var result = authors.filter(function (a) {
            if (!a) return false;
            if (_eliRosterLookup(roster, a)) return false;
            if (_eliIsKnownInternal(a)) return false;
            return true;
        });
        return result;
    };

    // Approach B: surface a modal asking the user to classify any unknown
    authors,

    // resolves with the full roster (known + just-classified). Resolves
    immediately

    // when there are no unknowns. Reused by Ask ELI and Review Redline.

    window.ensureAuthorsClassified = function (authors, options) {
        options = options || {};
        return Promise.all([window._eliEnsureInternalNamesLoaded(), window._eliEnsureAuthorRosterLoaded()]).then(function () {
            return _eliShowAuthorClassificationModal(authors, options);
        });
    }


    function _eliShowAuthorClassificationModal(authors, options) {
        return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
            var unknown = window.getUnclassifiedAuthors(authors || []);
            var roster = window.getAuthorRoster();
            window._eliTempAuthorMap = authors || [];
            // Build list of auto-classified (assumed) authors
            var assumed = (authors || []).filter(function (a) {
                if (!a) return false;
                if (unknown.indexOf(a) !== -1) return false; // already in unknown bucket
                return true;
            });
            // If opened standalone (not from a tool flow), show even if nothing unknown
            var isStandalone = !!(options && options.standalone);
            if (!unknown.length && !assumed.length) {
                resolve(window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt(authors || []));
                return;
            }
            if (!unknown.length && !isStandalone) {
                resolve(window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt(authors || []));
                return;
            }
            var existing = document.getElementById("eli-author-modal-overlay");
            if (existing) existing.remove();
            var overlay = document.createElement("div");
            overlay.id = "eli-author-modal-overlay";
            overlay.style.cssText =
                "position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:100000; background:rgba(15,23,42,0.45); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;";
            var modal = document.createElement("div");
            modal.style.cssText =
                "position:relative; background:#fff; width:420px; max-width:92vw; max-height:88vh; overflow:auto; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-left:4px solid #1565c0; box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(15,23,42,0.28); padding:28px; padding-top:40px; box-sizing:border-box;";
            var closeBtnHtml =
                '<button type="button" id="eli-author-modal-close" title="Close" style="position:absolute; top:8px; right:10px; z-index:2; width:30px; height:30px; padding:0; border:none; background:transparent; color:#64748b; font-size:18px; line-height:1; cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>';
            var srcLabel = options.source ? options.source : "this document";
            var headerHtml =
                '<div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.6px; margin-bottom:8px;">Redlines Detected - Author Attribution</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:18px; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:10px;">Who do these authors work for?</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:14px; color:#475569; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:20px;">' +
                "I found " + (authors || []).length + " author" + ((authors || []).length === 1 ? "" : "s") +
                " in " + srcLabel + ". Classify them below to help ELI understand context and provide better, tailored analysis." +
                "</div>";
            // --- Assumed Internal section ---
            var assumedHtml = "";
            if (assumed.length) {
                assumedHtml =
                    '<details style="margin-bottom:14px; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-top:12px;">' +
                    '<summary style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; outline:none; user-select:none;">' +
                    '<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5"/></svg>' +
                    assumed.length + ' Classified Author' + (assumed.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '</summary>' +
                    '<div style="margin-top:8px;">';
                assumed.forEach(function (name) {
                    var safe = name.replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
                    var dateStr = (options && options.authorDates && options.authorDates[name]) ? " (" + options.authorDates[name] + ")" : "";
                    var savedKind = _eliRosterLookup(roster, name);
                    var autoKind = savedKind || (_eliIsKnownInternal(name) ? "internal" : "external");
                    var idx = window._eliTempAuthorMap.indexOf(name);
                    var badgeHtml = savedKind
                        ? '<div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#475569; background:#f1f5f9; padding:2px 6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.3px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;">SAVED</div>'
                        : '<div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#16a34a; background:#dcfce7; padding:2px 6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.3px;">AUTO</div>';
                    assumedHtml +=
                        '<div data-author-idx="' + idx + '" data-author="' + safe + '" data-resolved="' + autoKind + '" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; padding:8px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;">' +
                        '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">' +
                        '<div style="font-weight:700; font-size:12px; color:#0f172a; flex:1; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">' + safe + '<span style="font-weight:400; color:#94a3b8; font-size:10px;">' + dateStr + '</span></div>' +
                        badgeHtml +
                        '</div>' +
                        '<div class="eli-auth-choice" style="display:flex; gap:6px;">' +
                        '<button data-kind="internal" style="flex:1; padding:9px 12px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;' +
                        (autoKind === "internal" ? ' background:#1565c0; color:#fff; border:1px solid #1565c0;' : ' background:#f8fafc; color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;') +
                        '">👤 Colgate</button>' +
                        '<button data-kind="external" style="flex:1; padding:9px 12px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;' +
                        (autoKind === "external" ? ' background:#475569; color:#fff; border:1px solid #475569;' : ' background:#f8fafc; color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;') +
                        '">🏢 Third Party</button>' +
                        '<button data-kind="unknown" title="Unsure" style="flex:0 0 auto; width:32px; padding:9px 0; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;' +
                        (autoKind === "unknown" ? ' background:#d97706; color:#fff; border:1px solid #d97706;' : ' background:#f8fafc; color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;') +
                        '">?</button>' +
                        '</div></div>';
                });
                assumedHtml += '</div></details>';
            }
            // --- Needs Classification section ---
            var unknownSectionHtml = "";
            if (unknown.length) {
                unknownSectionHtml =
                    '<div style="margin-bottom:6px;">' +
                    '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#dc2626; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.8px; margin-bottom:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">' +
                    '<svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="2.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>' +
                    'Needs Classification</div>';
                unknown.forEach(function (name) {
                    var safe = name.replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
                    var dateStr = (options && options.authorDates && options.authorDates[name]) ? " (" + options.authorDates[name] + ")" : "";
                    var idx = window._eliTempAuthorMap.indexOf(name);
                    unknownSectionHtml +=
                        '<div data-author-idx="' + idx + '" data-author="' + safe + '" data-resolved="external" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; padding:10px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;">' +
                        '<div style="font-weight:700; font-size:13px; color:#0f172a; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">' + safe + '<span style="font-weight:400; color:#94a3b8; font-size:10px;">' + dateStr + '</span></div>' +
                        '<div class="eli-auth-choice" style="display:flex; gap:8px;">' +
                        '<button data-kind="internal" style="flex:1; padding:10px 12px; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; background:#f8fafc; color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;">👤 Colgate</button>' +
                        '<button data-kind="external" style="flex:1; padding:10px 12px; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; background:#475569; color:#fff; border:1px solid #475569;">🏢 Third Party</button>' +
                        '<button data-kind="unknown" title="I don\u2019t know who this is \u2014 don\u2019t assume" style="flex:0 0 auto; width:36px; padding:10px 0; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; background:#f8fafc; color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1;">?</button>' +
                        '</div></div>';
                });
                unknownSectionHtml += '</div>';
            }
            var footerHtml =
                '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; align-items:center; margin-top:10px; gap:10px;">' +
                '<button id="eli-author-skip" style="background:transparent; border:none; color:#dc2626; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; text-decoration:underline; margin-right:auto; display:' + (unknown.length ? 'none' : 'block') + ';">' +
                'Reset identifications</button>' +
                '<button id="eli-author-continue" style="background:#1565c0; color:#fff; border:none; padding:9px 18px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;">' +
                (isStandalone ? 'Save' : 'Continue') + '</button>' +
                "</div>";
            modal.innerHTML = closeBtnHtml + headerHtml + unknownSectionHtml + assumedHtml + footerHtml;
            overlay.appendChild(modal);
            document.body.appendChild(overlay);

            function cancelAndClose() {
                overlay.remove();
                if (isStandalone) {
                    resolve(window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt(authors || []));
                } else {
                    if (typeof showHome === "function") showHome();
                    reject(new Error("Request cancelled."));
                }
            }
            var closeBtn = document.getElementById("eli-author-modal-close");
            if (closeBtn) {
                closeBtn.onmouseenter = function () {
                    closeBtn.style.background = "#f1f5f9";
                    closeBtn.style.color = "#0f172a";
                };
                closeBtn.onmouseleave = function () {
                    closeBtn.style.background = "transparent";
                    closeBtn.style.color = "#64748b";
                };
                closeBtn.onclick = function (ev) {
                    if (ev) ev.stopPropagation();
                    cancelAndClose();
                };
            }
            function refreshContinueState() {
                var allRows = modal.querySelectorAll("[data-author]");
                var done = true;
                allRows.forEach(function (r) {
                    if (!r.getAttribute("data-resolved")) done = false;
                });
                var contBtn = modal.querySelector("#eli-author-continue");
                if (done) {
                    contBtn.disabled = false;
                    contBtn.style.background = "#1565c0";
                    contBtn.style.cursor = "pointer";
                }
            }
            modal.querySelectorAll(".eli-auth-choice").forEach(function (choice) {
                choice.addEventListener("click", function (ev) {
                    var btn = ev.target.closest("button[data-kind]");
                    if (!btn) return;
                    var row = btn.closest("[data-author-idx]");
                    var idx = parseInt(row.getAttribute("data-author-idx"), 10);
                    var name = window._eliTempAuthorMap[idx];
                    var kind = btn.getAttribute("data-kind");
                    window.setAuthorClassification(name, kind);
                    row.setAttribute("data-resolved", kind);
                    // Remove auto badge if user changed it
                    var autoBadge = row.querySelector("[style*='#dcfce7']");
                    if (autoBadge) { autoBadge.style.background = "#fef3c7"; autoBadge.style.color = "#92400e"; autoBadge.innerText = "EDITED"; }
                    choice.querySelectorAll("button[data-kind]").forEach(function (b) {
                        var active = b.getAttribute("data-kind") === kind;
                        var activeBg = kind === "internal" ? "#1565c0" : kind === "external" ? "#475569" : "#d97706";
                        var bg = active ? activeBg : "#f8fafc";
                        var color = active ? "#fff" : "#475569";
                        var border = active ? bg : "#cbd5e1";
                        b.style.background = bg;
                        b.style.color = color;
                        b.style.borderColor = border;
                    });
                    refreshContinueState();
                });
            });
            function finish() {
                modal.querySelectorAll("[data-author-idx]").forEach(function (row) {
                    var idx = parseInt(row.getAttribute("data-author-idx"), 10);
                    var name = window._eliTempAuthorMap[idx];
                    var kind = row.getAttribute("data-resolved") || "external";
                    window.setAuthorClassification(name, kind);
                });
                var r = window.getAuthorRoster() || window._eliAuthorRosterCache || {};
                _eliWriteAuthorRosterToDocSettings(r).then(function () {
                    overlay.remove();
                    // Refresh home banner status if visible
                    var banner = document.getElementById("eli-redline-banner");
                    if (banner && banner.style.display !== "none") {
                        var dots = banner.querySelectorAll("span[style*='border-radius:50%']");
                        if (dots.length) { dots[0].style.background = "#22c55e"; dots[0].style.boxShadow = "0 0 4px #22c55e"; }
                        var labels = banner.querySelectorAll("span[style*='text-transform:uppercase']");
                        if (labels.length) labels[0].textContent = "Classified";
                    }
                    resolve(window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt(authors || []));
                });
            }
            modal.querySelector("#eli-author-skip").onclick = function () {
                if (unknown.length) {
                    return;
                } else {
                    var btn = document.getElementById("eli-author-skip");
                    if (btn.getAttribute("data-confirming") !== "1") {
                        btn.setAttribute("data-confirming", "1");
                        btn.innerText = "Click again to confirm reset";
                        btn.style.color = "#dc2626";
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            btn.removeAttribute("data-confirming");
                            btn.innerText = "Reset identifications";
                        }, 3500);
                    } else {
                        window._eliAuthorRosterCache = {};
                        _eliWriteAuthorRosterToDocSettings({}).then(function () {
                            overlay.remove();
                            if (typeof showHome === "function") showHome(); // trigger home refresh so pill resets
                            resolve({});
                        });
                    }
                }
            };
            modal.querySelector("#eli-author-continue").onclick = function () {
                var btn = modal.querySelector("#eli-author-continue");
                if (btn.disabled) return;
                finish();
            };
        });
    }

    // Standalone opener for the home banner — not part of a tool flow promise
    chain

    window._openRedlineAuthorModal = function () {
        var authors = window._eliHomeRedlineAuthors || [];
        if (!authors.length) {
            if (typeof Word === "undefined" || !Word.run) return;
            if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(true, "default");
            Word.run(function (context) {
                var body = context.document.body;
                var changes = body.getTrackedChanges();
                changes.load("items/author");
                return context.sync().then(function () {
                    var aSet = {};
                    for (var i = 0; i < changes.items.length; i++) {
                        if (changes.items[i].author) aSet[changes.items[i].author] = true;
                    }
                    window._eliHomeRedlineAuthors = Object.keys(aSet);
                    return window._eliHomeRedlineAuthors;
                });
            }).then(function (fetchedAuthors) {
                if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(false);
                if (!fetchedAuthors || !fetchedAuthors.length) return;
                Promise.all([window._eliEnsureInternalNamesLoaded(), window._eliEnsureAuthorRosterLoaded()]).then(function () {
                    _eliShowAuthorClassificationModal(fetchedAuthors, { source: "this document", standalone: true });
                });
            }).catch(function (err) {
                if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(false);
            });
            return;
        }
        Promise.all([window._eliEnsureInternalNamesLoaded(), window._eliEnsureAuthorRosterLoaded()]).then(function () {
            _eliShowAuthorClassificationModal(authors, { source: "this document", standalone: true });
        });
    };

    function _markRedlinesInOoxml(raw, maxChars) {
        var hasRedlines = /<w:(ins|del|moveFrom|moveTo)\b/.test(raw);
        if (!hasRedlines) return { text: "", hasRedlines: false, authors: [] };
        var _authorsSet = Object.create(null);
        function _innerText(inner) {
            var matches = inner.match(/<w:(?:t|delText)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/w:(?:t|delText)>/g) || [];
            return matches
                .map(function (m) {
                    return m.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, "");
                })
                .join("")
                .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                .trim();
        }
        function _author(openTag) {
            var m = openTag.match(/\bw:author=(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)')/);
            var name = (m && (m[1] || m[2])) || "";
            if (name) _authorsSet[name] = true;
            return name;
        }
        function _marker(label, author, content) {
            var who = author ? " by " + author : "";
            return "<w:t>[" + label + who + ": " + content + "]</w:t>";
        }
        raw = raw.replace(/(<w:del\b[^>]*>)([\s\S]*?)<\/w:del>/g, function (_, openTag, inner) {
            var t = _innerText(inner);
            return t ? _marker("DELETED", _author(openTag), t) : "";
        });
        raw = raw.replace(/<w:del\b[^>]*\/>/g, "");
        raw = raw.replace(/(<w:ins\b[^>]*>)([\s\S]*?)<\/w:ins>/g, function (_, openTag, inner) {
            var t = _innerText(inner);
            return t ? _marker("INSERTED", _author(openTag), t) : "";
        });
        raw = raw.replace(/(<w:moveFrom\b[^>]*>)([\s\S]*?)<\/w:moveFrom>/g, function (_, openTag, inner) {
            var t = _innerText(inner);
            return t ? _marker("MOVED FROM", _author(openTag), t) : "";
        });
        raw = raw.replace(/(<w:moveTo\b[^>]*>)([\s\S]*?)<\/w:moveTo>/g, function (_, openTag, inner) {
            var t = _innerText(inner);
            return t ? _marker("MOVED TO", _author(openTag), t) : "";
        });
        var matches = raw.match(/<w:t[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/w:t>/g) || [];
        var text = matches
            .map(function (m) {
                return m.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, "");
            })
            .join(" ")
            .replace(/&amp;/g, "&")
            .replace(/&lt;/g, "<")
            .replace(/&gt;/g, ">")
            .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
            .replace(/&apos;/g, "'")
            .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
            .trim();
        if (maxChars && text.length > maxChars) text = text.substring(0, maxChars);
        return { text: text, hasRedlines: true, authors: Object.keys(_authorsSet) };
    }

    function getRedlineMarkedText(context, maxChars) {
        var ooxmlResult = context.document.body.getOoxml();
        return context.sync().then(function () {
            return _markRedlinesInOoxml(ooxmlResult.value || "", maxChars);
        });
    }

    function getRedlineMarkedRangeText(context, range, maxChars) {
        var ooxmlResult = range.getOoxml();
        return context.sync().then(function () {
            return _markRedlinesInOoxml(ooxmlResult.value || "", maxChars);
        });
    }

    function runExecutiveBrief() {
        showToast("⏳ Running final audit generation...");
        var typeSel = document.getElementById("ebTypeSel");
        var type = typeSel ? typeSel.value : window._ebType;
        if (!type) return;
        var existing = window._ebData || _ebBuildEmptyData(type);
        var keyTerms = (existing.commitments || []).map(function (c) {
            return c.title;
        });
        if (!keyTerms.length) keyTerms = getExecBriefTerms(type);
        _ebShowGenerating();

        var templatePromise = Promise.resolve(null);
        if (keyTerms.indexOf("Major Deviations from Standard Agreement") > -1) {
            templatePromise = loadFeatureData(STORE_TEMPLATES).then(function (templates) {
                templates = templates || [];
                var match = null;
                for (var i = 0; i < templates.length; i++) {
                    if (templates[i].type === type) { match = templates[i]; break; }
                }
                if (!match) {
                    var searchName = type === "Non-Disclosure Agreement" ? "NDA" : (type === "Material Transfer Agreement" ? "MTA" : type);
                    for (var i = 0; i < templates.length; i++) {
                        if (templates[i].name && templates[i].name.toLowerCase().indexOf(searchName.toLowerCase()) > -1) { match = templates[i]; break; }
                    }
                }
                return match;
            }).catch(function () { return null; });
        }

        templatePromise.then(function (templateData) {
            Word.run(function (context) {
                return getAcceptedDraftText(context, 100000).then(function (docText) {
                    var prompt =
                        "You are a Senior Legal Liaison at Colgate-Palmolive. Read the agreement excerpt below and produce a factual executive brief for the business requester to approve before execution.\n\n" +
                        "AGREEMENT TYPE: " +
                        type +
                        "\n\n" +
                        "REQUIRED OUTPUT (raw JSON only, no markdown):\n" +
                        "{\n" +
                        '  "overview": "2-3 sentence factual summary of what this agreement does and the parties involved.",\n' +
                        '  "commitments": [\n' +
                        '    { "title": "<exact key term title>", "details": "2-4 sentence factual summary of both parties\' obligations under this term.", "ref": "<section/clause reference, e.g. \'Sec 5.2\' or \'Ex A\' or \'—\' if not specified>", "quote": "<8-20 word VERBATIM excerpt copied EXACTLY from the document that anchors this clause, used by a search function to locate it; empty string if not addressed>", "severity": "Success | Medium | Low" }\n' +
                        "  ]\n" +
                        "}\n\n" +
                        "KEY TERMS TO COVER (one commitment per term in this exact order):\n" +
                        keyTerms
                            .map(function (t, i) {
                                return i + 1 + ". " + t;
                            })
                            .join("\n") +
                        "\n\n" +
                        "RULES:\n" +
                        "- Be matter-of-fact. No legal analysis, no recommendations — just clearly explain what each party committed to.\n" +
                        "- If a key term is not addressed in the document, set details to 'Not addressed in this agreement.', ref to '—', and quote to ''.\n" +
                        "- 'severity' is contextual: Success = favorable/standard, Medium = noteworthy, Low = minor administrative.\n" +
                        "- Use the EXACT title text given.\n" +
                        "- 'details' MUST be substantive (3+ full sentences) covering scope, each party's obligations, and any thresholds, dates, or exceptions. The 'quote' field is separate metadata and does NOT replace, summarize, or shorten any detail content.\n" +
                        "- 'quote' MUST be a contiguous verbatim excerpt copied character-for-character from the document — no paraphrasing, no quote marks added — so it can be located by a literal search.\n" +
                        "- DEFAULT-RULE INTERPRETATIONS — when a term is silent, explain what the silence means in practice:\n" +
                        "    • 'Major Deviations from Standard Agreement': Compare the DOCUMENT EXCERPT against the STANDARD TEMPLATE (if provided below). Summarize only substantive, material deviations. State the differences strictly factually without any commentary, judgment, or subjective words like 'notable', 'restrictive', 'unreasonable', or 'concerning'. Completely ignore changes to text originally enclosed in brackets (e.g. party names, dates, specific purpose fields) and formatting changes.\n" +
                        "    • 'Conflicts of Interest' / 'Non-Solicit / Conflicts': if the agreement does NOT restrict the third party from working with others on related subject matter, set details to: 'Not addressed in this agreement. By default, the third party is free to work for other parties (including competitors) on related subject matter during the term of this agreement.' Set ref to '—' and quote to ''.\n" +
                        "    • 'Publication Control' / 'Publication Rights': if silent, default rule is the third party may publish freely; explain that.\n" +
                        "    • 'IP Ownership of Results' / 'IP & Deliverables': if silent, default rule is each party owns what it creates; explain that.\n" +
                        "    • 'Confidentiality Duration': if silent, default rule is no time limit on confidentiality obligations; explain that.\n\n" +
                        (templateData && templateData.content ? "STANDARD TEMPLATE:\n" + templateData.content + "\n\n" : "") +
                        "DOCUMENT EXCERPT:\n" +
                        docText;
                    return callGemini(API_KEY, prompt, null, { jsonMode: true }).then(function (res) {
                        var aiData = tryParseGeminiJSON(res) || {};
                        if (!Array.isArray(aiData.commitments)) aiData.commitments = [];
                        var aiByTitle = {};
                        aiData.commitments.forEach(function (c) {
                            if (c && c.title) aiByTitle[String(c.title).toLowerCase().trim()] = c;
                        });
                        var merged = {
                            overview: aiData.overview || existing.overview || "",
                            commitments: existing.commitments.map(function (orig) {
                                var match = aiByTitle[String(orig.title).toLowerCase().trim()];
                                return {
                                    title: orig.title,
                                    details: (match && match.details) || orig.details || "",
                                    ref: (match && match.ref) || orig.ref || "—",
                                    quote: (match && match.quote) || orig.quote || "",
                                    severity: (match && match.severity) || orig.severity || "Low",
                                    included: orig.included !== false,
                                };
                            }),
                        };
                        renderExecutiveBriefResults(merged, type, false);
                        try {
                            if (typeof window.addActivity === "function") {
                                var _ebIncluded = (merged.commitments || []).filter(function (c) {
                                    return c.included !== false;
                                }).length;
                                window.addActivity({
                                    type: "approval-brief",
                                    icon: "💼",
                                    label: "Final Review",
                                    summary: type + " — " + _ebIncluded + " review item" + (_ebIncluded === 1 ? "" : "s"),
                                    payload: { data: merged, type: type },
                                });
                            }
                        } catch (_) { }
                    });
                });
            }).catch(function (e) {
                _ebRestoreFromGenerating();
                showToast("⚠️ Brief failed: " + (e.message || e));
            });
        });
    }

    function _ebAutoGrow(el) {
        if (!el) return;
        el.style.height = "auto";
        el.style.height = el.scrollHeight + 2 + "px";
    }

    window._ebAutoGrow = _ebAutoGrow;


    function renderExecutiveBriefResults(data, type, isEmpty) {
        // This function is no longer called in the new flow to render the full UI.
        // However, it is called when runExecutiveBrief() finishes to render the updated data!
        _ebRestoreFromGenerating();
        window._ebData = data;
        window._ebType = type;

        // Auto-grow textareas
        var ov = document.getElementById("ebOverview");
        if (ov) {
            ov.value = window._ebData.overview || "";
            _ebAutoGrow(ov);
        }

        ebRenderCards(false);
    }


    function ebRenderCards(isEmpty) {
        var wrap = document.getElementById("ebCards");
        if (!wrap || !window._ebData) return;
        var html = "";
        var detailPlaceholder = isEmpty ? "Awaiting AI summary — click Generate above, or type details manually." : "";
        window._ebData.commitments.forEach(function (item, idx) {
            var sev = String(item.severity || "Low");
            var color = sev === "Medium" ? "#f57f17" : sev === "Success" ? "#2e7d32" : "#1565c0";
            var excluded = !item.included;
            var hasAnchor = !!(item.quote || (item.ref && item.ref !== "—" && item.ref !== "Manual") || item.details);
            html +=
                '<div style="background:white; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; margin:0 15px 14px; padding:14px 16px; border-left:4px solid ' +
                color +
                "; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);" +
                (excluded ? " opacity:0.55; border-left-color:#94a3b8 !important; background:#f8fafc;" : "") +
                '">' +
                '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; margin-bottom:8px; gap:10px;">' +
                '<div style="flex:1; min-width:0;">' +
                '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap;">' +
                '<span contenteditable="true" data-eb-title="' +
                idx +
                '" oninput="window._ebData.commitments[' +
                idx +
                '].title=this.textContent" style="font-family:\'Inter\', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; outline:none; padding:2px 0; letter-spacing:-0.2px; border-bottom:1px solid transparent; min-width:40px; max-width:100%;" onfocus="this.style.borderBottomColor=\'#cbd5e1\'" onblur="this.style.borderBottomColor=\'transparent\'">' +
                _ebEsc(item.title || "") +
                "</span>" +
                '<button type="button" title="Locate in document" onclick="window.ebLocate(' +
                idx +
                ', this)"' +
                (hasAnchor ? "" : " disabled") +
                ' style="background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; color:#1d4ed8; font-size:14px; padding:4px 9px; cursor:' +
                (hasAnchor ? "pointer" : "not-allowed") +
                "; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; line-height:1; flex-shrink:0;" +
                (hasAnchor ? "" : " opacity:0.4;") +
                '">🔍</button>' +
                "</div>" +
                '<div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:' +
                color +
                '; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin-top:4px;">' +
                _ebEsc(item.ref || "—") +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>" +
                '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; flex-shrink:0;">' +
                '<label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; cursor:pointer;">' +
                '<input type="checkbox" ' +
                (item.included ? "checked" : "") +
                ' onchange="window._ebData.commitments[' +
                idx +
                '].included=this.checked; window.ebRenderCards(); window.ebUpdateCount();" />' +
                '<span style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">' +
                (item.included ? "Include" : "Skip") +
                "</span>" +
                "</label>" +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>" +
                '<textarea data-eb-details placeholder="' +
                _ebEsc(detailPlaceholder) +
                '" oninput="window._ebData.commitments[' +
                idx +
                "].details=this.value; window._ebAutoGrow(this);\" style=\"width:100%; background:transparent; border:1px dashed transparent; padding:6px; resize:vertical; outline:none; font-family:Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size:14px; color:#334155; line-height:1.6; min-height:60px; box-sizing:border-box; overflow:hidden;\" onfocus=\"this.style.borderColor='#c9a227'; this.style.background='#fffef7';\" onblur=\"this.style.borderColor='transparent'; this.style.background='transparent';\">" +
                _ebEsc(item.details || "") +
                "</textarea>" +
                "</div>";
        });
        wrap.innerHTML = html;
        wrap.querySelectorAll("textarea[data-eb-details]").forEach(_ebAutoGrow);
    }

    function ebUpdateCount() {
        var el = document.getElementById("ebCount");
        if (el && window._ebData)
            el.textContent = window._ebData.commitments.filter(function (c) {
                return c.included;
            }).length;
    }

    function ebAddPoint() {
        if (!window._ebData) {
            showToast("⚠️ Open the Final Review tool first.");
            return;
        }
        var overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.className = "eli-overlay eb-add-overlay";
        var dialog = document.createElement("div");
        dialog.className = "eli-dialog info slide-in";
        dialog.style.cssText =
            "width: min(92vw, 520px); max-width: 92vw; max-height: 90vh; padding: 18px; resize: both; overflow: auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column;";
        dialog.innerHTML =
            '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:6px;">' +
            '<div class="eli-dialog-title" style="margin:0;">✨ Add a Key Term</div>' +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-add-close style="background:transparent; border:none; font-size:20px; cursor:pointer; color:#64748b; padding:0 6px;">×</button>' +
            "</div>" +
            '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:12px; text-align:left; line-height:1.5;">Ask ELI to scan the document for an additional point, or add a blank card to fill in manually.</div>' +
            '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:4px; text-align:left;">✨ Ask ELI to Scan Agreement</div>' +
            '<textarea id="ebAddQuery" placeholder="e.g. Are there any travel reimbursement caps? &#10;or&#10;What are the renewal terms?" style="width:100%; min-height:90px; padding:10px; font-size:12px; border:1.5px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:6px; font-family:\'Inter\', system-ui, sans-serif; box-sizing:border-box; resize:vertical; outline:none; line-height:1.5;"></textarea>' +
            '<div style="display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:10px;">' +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-add-ask class="btn-platinum-config primary" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-weight:800;">✨ Ask ELI</button>' +
            "</div>" +
            '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin:14px 0;">' +
            '<hr style="flex:1; border:none; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;">' +
            '<span style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#cbd5e1; letter-spacing:1px;">OR</span>' +
            '<hr style="flex:1; border:none; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;">' +
            "</div>" +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-add-blank class="btn-platinum-config" style="width:100%; padding:10px; font-weight:800;">➕ Add Blank Card</button>' +
            '<div id="ebAddStatus" style="font-size:11px; color:#64748b; margin-top:10px; text-align:center; min-height:14px;"></div>';
        overlay.appendChild(dialog);
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        function closeAdd() {
            overlay.remove();
        }
        function setBusy(busy, msg) {
            var ask = dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-add-ask]");
            var blank = dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-add-blank]");
            var status = dialog.querySelector("#ebAddStatus");
            if (ask) ask.disabled = busy;
            if (blank) blank.disabled = busy;
            if (status) status.textContent = msg || "";
        }
        function pushCommitment(c) {
            window._ebData.commitments.push({
                title: c.title || "New Key Term",
                details: c.details || "",
                ref: c.ref || "Manual",
                quote: c.quote || "",
                severity: c.severity || "Low",
                included: true,
            });
            ebRenderCards();
            ebUpdateCount();
        }
        dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-add-close]").onclick = closeAdd;
        dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-add-blank]").onclick = function () {
            pushCommitment({
                title: "New Key Term",
                details: "Factual summary of both parties' obligations...",
                ref: "Manual",
            });
            closeAdd();
        };
        dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-add-ask]").onclick = function () {
            var query = (dialog.querySelector("#ebAddQuery") || {}).value || "";
            query = String(query).trim();
            if (!query) {
                showToast("⚠️ Enter a question for ELI first.");
                return;
            }
            setBusy(true, "🔍 Scanning document...");
            var type = window._ebType || "Agreement";
            Word.run(function (context) {
                var body = context.document.body;
                body.load("text");
                return context.sync().then(function () {
                    var docText = (body.text || "").substring(0, 100000);
                    var prompt =
                        "You are a Senior Legal Liaison at Colgate-Palmolive. Read the agreement excerpt below and answer the requester's question with a single, factual key term entry.\n\n" +
                        "AGREEMENT TYPE: " +
                        type +
                        "\n" +
                        "REQUESTER QUESTION: " +
                        query +
                        "\n\n" +
                        "RETURN RAW JSON (no markdown):\n" +
                        '{ "title": "<concise key term name, max 5 words>", "details": "<2-4 sentence factual summary of both parties\' obligations on this point>", "ref": "<section/clause reference like \'Sec 5.2\' or \'Ex A\' or \'—\' if not specified>", "quote": "<8-20 word VERBATIM excerpt copied EXACTLY from the document that anchors this clause; empty string if not addressed>", "severity": "Success | Medium | Low" }\n\n' +
                        "RULES:\n" +
                        "- Be matter-of-fact. Just say what each party committed to.\n" +
                        "- If the document does not address the question, set details to 'Not addressed in this agreement.', ref to '—', and quote to ''.\n" +
                        "- 'severity' is contextual: Success = favorable/standard, Medium = noteworthy, Low = minor administrative.\n" +
                        "- 'quote' MUST be a contiguous verbatim excerpt copied character-for-character from the document so it can be located by literal search.\n\n" +
                        "DOCUMENT EXCERPT:\n" +
                        docText;
                    return callGemini(API_KEY, prompt, null, { jsonMode: true }).then(function (res) {
                        var c = tryParseGeminiJSON(res) || {};
                        if (!c.title) c.title = query.length > 30 ? query.substring(0, 27) + "..." : query;
                        pushCommitment(c);
                        showToast("✅ Added: " + c.title);
                        closeAdd();
                    });
                });
            }).catch(function (e) {
                setBusy(false, "");
                showToast("⚠️ Scan failed: " + (e.message || e));
            });
        };
        setTimeout(function () {
            var q = dialog.querySelector("#ebAddQuery");
            if (q) q.focus();
        }, 50);
    }

    function _ebToBold(s) {
        return String(s)
            .replace(/[A-Z]/g, function (c) {
                return String.fromCodePoint(0x1d400 + (c.charCodeAt(0) - 0x41));
            })
            .replace(/[a-z]/g, function (c) {
                return String.fromCodePoint(0x1d41a + (c.charCodeAt(0) - 0x61));
            })
            .replace(/[0-9]/g, function (c) {
                return String.fromCodePoint(0x1d7ce + (c.charCodeAt(0) - 0x30));
            });
    }

    function _ebExtractCpRef(callback) {
        if (window._ebData && typeof window._ebData.cpRef === "string") {
            callback(window._ebData.cpRef);
            return;
        }
        try {
            Word.run(function (context) {
                var body = context.document.body;
                body.load("text");
                var sections = context.document.sections;
                sections.load("items");
                return context.sync().then(function () {
                    var footerLoads = [];
                    sections.items.forEach(function (sec) {
                        ["Primary", "FirstPage", "EvenPages"].forEach(function (kind) {
                            try {
                                var f = sec.getFooter(kind);
                                f.load("text");
                                footerLoads.push(f);
                            } catch (e) { }
                        });
                    });
                    return context.sync().then(function () {
                        var refRegex = /CP\s*Ref(?:erence)?\s*[:#]?\s*([A-Za-z]?-?\s*[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9\-_/]*)/i;
                        var altRegex = /\b(A-\d{3,})\b/;
                        var sources = [body.text || ""];
                        footerLoads.forEach(function (f) {
                            try {
                                sources.push(f.text || "");
                            } catch (e) { }
                        });
                        var found = "";
                        for (var i = 0; i < sources.length && !found; i++) {
                            var m = sources[i].match(refRegex);
                            if (m && m[1]) {
                                found = m[1].replace(/\s+/g, "").trim();
                                break;
                            }
                            var m2 = sources[i].match(altRegex);
                            if (m2 && m2[1]) {
                                found = m2[1].trim();
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                        if (window._ebData) window._ebData.cpRef = found;
                        callback(found);
                    });
                });
            }).catch(function () {
                callback("");
            });
        } catch (e) {
            callback("");
        }
    }

    function ebShowEmail() {
        if (!window._ebData) return;
        _ebExtractCpRef(function (cpRef) {
            _ebShowEmailDialog(cpRef);
        });
    }

    function _ebShowEmailDialog(cpRef) {
        if (!window._ebData) return;
        var requester = _ebGetRequester();
        var firstName = String(requester.name || "Requester").split(" ")[0];
        var type = window._ebType || "Agreement";
        var senderName = window.getCurrentUserFirstName("Legal");
        var included = window._ebData.commitments.filter(function (c) {
            return c.included;
        });
        var refTag = cpRef ? " (CP Ref: " + cpRef + ")" : "";
        var subject = "Action Required: Requester Summary - " + type + refTag;
        var keyTermsHeader = _ebToBold("Key Terms for Your Review:");
        var confirmLine = _ebToBold(
            "Please confirm if you are comfortable with these terms so we can finalize the document.",
        );
        var overviewHtml = window._ebData.overview
            ? '<br><br><span style="padding:4px 0; font-weight:500; color:#b45309;">' +
            _ebEsc(window._ebData.overview) +
            "</span><br><br>"
            : "<br><br>";
        var bodyHtml =
            "Hi " +
            _ebEsc(firstName) +
            ",<br><br>" +
            "Legal has completed the review of the <b>" +
            _ebEsc(type) +
            "</b>. Below is a concise summary of the deal structure and key commitments for your approval before we move to execution:" +
            overviewHtml +
            _ebEsc(keyTermsHeader) +
            "<br><br>" +
            (included.length
                ? included
                    .map(function (c) {
                        return "• <b>" + _ebEsc(c.title) + ":</b> " + _ebEsc(c.details);
                    })
                    .join("<br>")
                : "<i>No items selected.</i>") +
            "<br><br>" +
            _ebEsc(confirmLine) +
            "<br><br>" +
            "Thanks,<br>" +
            _ebEsc(senderName);
        var overviewText = window._ebData.overview ? "\n" + window._ebData.overview + "\n\n" : "\n\n";
        var plainBody =
            "Hi " +
            firstName +
            ",\n\n" +
            "Legal has completed the review of the " +
            type +
            ". Below is a concise summary of the deal structure and key commitments for your approval before we move to execution:" +
            overviewText +
            _ebToBold("Key Terms for Your Review:") +
            "\n" +
            included
                .map(function (c) {
                    return "• " + c.title + ": " + c.details;
                })
                .join("\n") +
            "\n\n" +
            _ebToBold("Please confirm if you are comfortable with these terms so we can finalize the document.") +
            "\n\nThanks,\n" +
            senderName;
        var ccEmail = "tech_agreements@colpal.com";
        var gmailUrl =
            "https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1" +
            "&to=" +
            encodeURIComponent(requester.email || "") +
            "&cc=" +
            encodeURIComponent(ccEmail) +
            "&su=" +
            encodeURIComponent(subject) +
            "&body=" +
            encodeURIComponent(plainBody);
        var overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.className = "eli-overlay eb-email-overlay";
        var dialog = document.createElement("div");
        dialog.className = "eli-dialog info slide-in";
        dialog.style.cssText =
            "width: min(92vw, 720px); max-width: 92vw; max-height: 90vh; padding: 16px; resize: both; overflow: auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column;";
        dialog.innerHTML =
            '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:10px;">' +
            '<div class="eli-dialog-title" style="margin:0;">📧 Email Preview</div>' +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-close style="background:transparent; border:none; font-size:20px; cursor:pointer; color:#64748b; padding:0 6px;">×</button>' +
            "</div>" +
            '<div style="font-size:12px; line-height:1.5; color:#1e293b; flex:1; min-height:200px; overflow-y:auto; padding:12px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; text-align:left;">' +
            '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:8px;">' +
            "<b>To:</b> " +
            _ebEsc(requester.email || "(no email)") +
            "<br>" +
            "<b>CC:</b> " +
            _ebEsc(ccEmail) +
            "<br>" +
            '<b>Subject:</b> <span id="ebEmailSubject" contenteditable="true" style="outline:none; border-bottom:1px dashed transparent; padding:1px 2px;" onfocus="this.style.borderBottomColor=\'#cbd5e1\'; this.style.background=\'#fff\';" onblur="this.style.borderBottomColor=\'transparent\'; this.style.background=\'transparent\';">' +
            _ebEsc(subject) +
            "</span>" +
            "</div>" +
            '<hr style="margin:8px 0;">' +
            '<div id="ebEmailBody" contenteditable="true" style="outline:none; min-height:120px; padding:4px; border:1px dashed transparent; border-radius:3px;" onfocus="this.style.borderColor=\'#cbd5e1\'; this.style.background=\'#fff\';" onblur="this.style.borderColor=\'transparent\'; this.style.background=\'transparent\';">' +
            bodyHtml +
            "</div>" +
            '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#94a3b8; margin-top:6px; text-align:right; font-style:italic;">✏️ Click subject or body to edit</div>' +
            "</div>" +
            '<div class="eli-dialog-actions" style="margin-top:12px; flex-shrink:0; display:flex; gap:8px;">' +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-mail class="btn-action" style="flex:1; font-weight:bold;">📧 Open in Gmail</button>' +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-copy class="btn-action" style="flex:1; font-weight:bold;">📋 Copy</button>' +
            '<button type="button" data-eb-close-2 class="btn-action" style="flex:1;">Close</button>' +
            "</div>";
        overlay.appendChild(dialog);
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        function closeEmail() {
            overlay.remove();
        }
        dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-close]").onclick = closeEmail;
        dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-close-2]").onclick = closeEmail;
        function _ebGetLive() {
            var liveSubject = (dialog.querySelector("#ebEmailSubject") || {}).innerText || subject;
            var bodyEl = dialog.querySelector("#ebEmailBody");
            var liveBodyHtml = bodyEl ? bodyEl.innerHTML : bodyHtml;
            var liveIncluded = window._ebData
                ? window._ebData.commitments.filter(function (c) {
                    return c.included;
                })
                : included;
            var overviewSegment =
                window._ebData && window._ebData.overview ? (window._ebData.overview || "").trim() + "\n\n" : "";
            var liveBodyText =
                "Hi " +
                firstName +
                ",\n\n" +
                "Legal has completed the review of the " +
                type +
                ". Below is a concise summary of the deal structure and key commitments for your approval before we move to execution:\n\n" +
                overviewSegment +
                _ebToBold("Key Terms for Your Review:") +
                "\n\n" +
                liveIncluded
                    .map(function (c) {
                        return "• " + c.title + ": " + c.details;
                    })
                    .join("\n") +
                "\n\n" +
                _ebToBold("Please confirm if you are comfortable with these terms so we can finalize the document.") +
                "\n\nThanks,\n" +
                senderName;
            return { subject: liveSubject.trim(), bodyHtml: liveBodyHtml, bodyText: liveBodyText };
        }
        dialog.querySelector("[data-eb-copy]").onclick = function () {
            var live = _ebGetLive();
            var clipText =
                "To: " +
                (requester.email || "") +
                "\n" +
                "CC: " +
                ccEmail +
                "\n" +
                "Subject: " +
                live.subject +
                "\n\n" +
                live.bodyText;
            var clipHtml =
                '<div style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif; font-size:13px; color:#1e293b;">' +
                '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:8px;"><b>To:</b> ' +
                _ebEsc(requester.email || "") +
                "<br><b>CC:</b> " +
                _ebEsc(ccEmail) +
                "<br><b>Subject:</b> " +
                _ebEsc(live.subject) +
                "</div>" +
