                    <span id="fixationLabel" style="font-size:14px; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0;">40%</span>
                </div>
                <input type="range" id="focusIntensity" min="10" max="80" step="10" value="40" style="width:100%; cursor:pointer; margin-bottom:10px;">
            </div>
            <button id="btnApplyBionic" class="btn-platinum-config primary" style="width:100%; padding:12px; font-weight:800; background:#1565c0; color:white; border-radius:0px; margin-bottom:10px;">
                🚀 APPLY FAST BOLDING
            </button>
            <button id="btnRevertBionic" class="btn-action" style="width:100%; padding:10px; font-weight:700; background:#fff; color:#c62828; border:1px solid #ef9a9a; border-radius:0px;">
                ↺ REVERT ALL BOLD
            </button>
        `;
        out.appendChild(container);
        const slider = document.getElementById("focusIntensity");
        const label = document.getElementById("fixationLabel");
        slider.oninput = function () {
            label.innerText = this.value + "%";
        };
        document.getElementById("btnApplyBionic").onclick = function () {
            executeBionicBoldingFast(parseInt(slider.value));
        };
        document.getElementById("btnRevertBionic").onclick = function () {
            revertBionicBolding();
        };
        var homeBtn = document.createElement("button");
        homeBtn.className = "btn-action";
        homeBtn.style.cssText = "width:calc(100% - 30px); margin:15px; padding:12px; font-weight:800;";
        homeBtn.innerText = "🏠 RETURN TO ELI";
        homeBtn.onclick = showHome;
        out.appendChild(homeBtn);
    }

    async function revertBionicBolding() {
        setLoading(!0, "default");
        await Word.run(async (context) => {
            const doc = context.document;
            let wasTracking = !1;
            if (doc.hasOwnProperty("changeTrackingMode")) {
                doc.load("changeTrackingMode");
                await context.sync();
                wasTracking = doc.changeTrackingMode !== "Off";
                if (wasTracking) doc.changeTrackingMode = "Off";
            }
            doc.body.font.bold = !1;
            await context.sync();
            if (wasTracking) {
                doc.changeTrackingMode = "TrackAll";
                await context.sync();
            }
            setLoading(!1);
            showToast("✅ Document Restored to Normal");
        }).catch(handleError);
    }

    async function executeBionicBoldingFast(fixationPercent) {
        setLoading(!0, "default");
        await Word.run(async (context) => {
            const doc = context.document;
            let wasTracking = !1;
            if (doc.hasOwnProperty("changeTrackingMode")) {
                doc.load("changeTrackingMode");
                await context.sync();
                wasTracking = doc.changeTrackingMode !== "Off";
                if (wasTracking) {
                    doc.changeTrackingMode = "Off";
                    await context.sync();
                }
            }
            const paragraphs = doc.body.paragraphs;
            paragraphs.load("items");
            await context.sync();
            let totalWordsProcessed = 0;
            for (let i = 0; i < paragraphs.items.length; i++) {
                let para = paragraphs.items[i];
                para.load("text");
                await context.sync();
                const text = para.text;
                if (!text || text.trim().length <= 1) continue;
                const words = text.split(/(\s+)/);
                totalWordsProcessed += words.filter((w) => w.trim().length > 0).length;
                const processedHtml = words
                    .map((word) => {
                        if (/^\s+$/.test(word)) return word;
                        const match = word.match(/^([a-zA-Z0-9''-]+)([^a-zA-Z0-9]*)$/);
                        if (!match) return word;
                        const mainWord = match[1];
                        const punctuation = match[2] || "";
                        const boldLen = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(mainWord.length * (fixationPercent / 100)));
                        const boldPart = mainWord.substring(0, boldLen);
                        const regularPart = mainWord.substring(boldLen);
                        return `<span style="font-weight:bold;">${boldPart}</span><span>${regularPart}</span>${punctuation}`;
                    })
                    .join("");
                para.insertHtml(processedHtml, "Replace");
            }
            if (wasTracking) {
                doc.changeTrackingMode = "TrackAll";
                await context.sync();
            }
            setLoading(!1);
            if (typeof recordEliStat !== "undefined") {
                recordEliStat("bionicWords", totalWordsProcessed);
                if (typeof checkQuirkyTrophy === "function") {
                    checkQuirkyTrophy("focus_flow", { words: totalWordsProcessed });
                }
            }
            showToast("✅ Applied (Fonts Preserved) - " + totalWordsProcessed + " words");
        }).catch(handleError);
    }

    function showRiskRulesManager() {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
        var header = createConfigHeader("CONFIGURATION", "⚙️", "Risk Rules Engine");
        out.appendChild(header);
        var toolbar = document.createElement("div");
        toolbar.style.cssText = "padding:0 15px 15px 15px; display:flex; gap:10px;";
        toolbar.innerHTML =
            eliButton("UPLOAD JSON", { id: "btnUploadRules", icon: "📂", style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;" }) +
            eliButton("EXPORT JSON", { id: "btnExportRules", icon: "⬇️", style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;" }) +
            eliButton("DELETE ALL", { id: "btnDeleteAllRules", icon: "🗑️", danger: true, style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;" }) +
            '<input type="file" id="fileRuleUpload" accept=".json" style="display:none;">';
        out.appendChild(toolbar);
        var listContainer = document.createElement("div");
        listContainer.id = "rulesListContainer";
        listContainer.style.cssText = "padding:0 15px; overflow-y:auto; max-height:calc(100vh - 180px);";
        out.appendChild(listContainer);
        var addBtnWrap = document.createElement("div");
        addBtnWrap.style.cssText = "padding:0 15px;";
        addBtnWrap.innerHTML = eliButton("ADD NEW RULE", {
            id: "btnAddNewRule",
            primary: true,
            icon: "➕",
            style: "width:100%; padding:12px; font-weight:800;",
        });
        out.appendChild(addBtnWrap);
        addBtnWrap.querySelector("#btnAddNewRule").onclick = () => showRuleEditor();
        loadFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES).then((data) => {
            var rules = data || [];
            if (rules.length === 0) {
                rules = [
                    {
                        id: "rule_ai_protection",
                        type: "LLM and Artificial Intelligence",
                        check:
                            "Ensure Supplier MUST disclose AI usage. Verify Supplier is PROHIBITED from using Colgate Data to train their models. Confirm Colgate owns all AI outputs.",
                        clause: `(a) “AI Technologies” means deep learning, machine learning, and other artificial intelligence technologies. Prior to making use of any AI Technologies in providing the Deliverables or performing the Services (except for incidental use), Supplier shall disclose in writing to Company a description of the AI Technologies to be used and the purpose for using them.\n\n(b) Supplier shall not use Company Confidential Information to train, test or verify (“Train”) any AI models, unless (i) such Training is approved by Company in writing or (ii) the AI model is specifically developed for Company’s exclusive use. All Company inputs, and all outputs that constitute Deliverables generated by the AI Technologies, constitute Company’s Confidential Information hereunder. Supplier agrees that Company owns any such outputs and/or models generated by or through the use of Company Confidential Information.\n\n(c) Supplier warrants that (i) Supplier AI Technologies were developed and trained in compliance with all applicable laws; (ii) Supplier’s use of AI Technologies shall comply with all applicable laws; and (iii) Supplier shall not commingle information about Company’s strategies with that of any third party to facilitate collusive behavior.`,
                    },
                ];
                saveFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES, rules);
            }
            renderRulesList(rules);
        });
        document.getElementById("btnDeleteAllRules").onclick = function () {
            var overlay = showEliDialog({
                variant: "danger",
                icon: "🗑️",
                title: "Delete All Rules?",
                body: "This will wipe the entire rule database.<br><br>(The system will re-seed the default AI rule upon reload.)",
                buttons: [
                    {
                        id: "btnConfDelAll",
                        label: "Yes, Delete",
                        cls: "btn-action",
                        style: "flex:1; background:#c62828; color:white; border:none; font-weight:bold;",
                    },
                    {
                        id: "btnCancelDelAll",
                        label: "Cancel",
                        style: "flex:1;",
                        onclick: function () {
                            overlay.remove();
                        },
                    },
                ],
            });
            document.getElementById("btnConfDelAll").onclick = function () {
                saveFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES, []).then(() => {
                    overlay.remove();
                    showToast("🗑️ All Rules Deleted. Reloading...");
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        showRiskRulesManager();
                    }, 800);
                });
            };
        };
        document.getElementById("btnUploadRules").onclick = () => document.getElementById("fileRuleUpload").click();
        document.getElementById("fileRuleUpload").onchange = function (e) {
            var file = e.target.files[0];
            if (!file) return;
            var reader = new FileReader();
            reader.onload = function (evt) {
                try {
                    var json = JSON.parse(evt.target.result);
                    if (Array.isArray(json)) {
                        loadFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES).then((current) => {
                            var combined = (current || []).concat(json);
                            var unique = [];
                            var ids = new Set();
                            combined.forEach((r) => {
                                if (!r.id) r.id = "rule_" + Date.now() + Math.random();
                                if (!ids.has(r.id)) {
                                    unique.push(r);
                                    ids.add(r.id);
                                }
                            });
                            saveFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES, unique).then(() => {
                                showToast(`✅ Loaded ${json.length} rules.`);
                                renderRulesList(unique);
                            });
                        });
                    } else {
                        showToast("❌ Invalid JSON format");
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    showToast("❌ Error parsing JSON");
                }
            };
            reader.readAsText(file);
        };
        document.getElementById("btnExportRules").onclick = function () {
            loadFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES).then((rules) => {
                var jsonStr = JSON.stringify(rules, null, 2);
                var overlay = document.createElement("div");
                overlay.className = "eli-overlay";
                overlay.style.zIndex = "99999";
                var box = document.createElement("div");
                box.className = "tool-box slide-in";
                box.style.cssText =
                    "background:white; width:450px; max-width:90%; padding:0; border-radius:0px; border:1px solid #1565c0; box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); display:flex; flex-direction:column;";
                box.innerHTML = window.createConfigHeader(null, null, "EXPORT RULES <button id='btnCloseExport' style='float:right; border:none; background:none; cursor:pointer; color:inherit; font-weight:bold;'>✕</button>").outerHTML + `
                    <div style="padding:15px; background:#f0f7ff; border-bottom:1px solid #bbdefb;">
                        <div style="font-size:11px; color:#546e7a;">
                            Copy the JSON below to back up your risk rules.
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <textarea id="exportArea" style="width:100%; height:250px; border:none; background:#fafafa; padding:10px; font-family:monospace; font-size:10px; resize:none; box-sizing:border-box; outline:none; color:#333;">${jsonStr}</textarea>
                    <div style="padding:15px; display:flex; gap:10px; background:#fff; border-top:1px solid #e0e0e0;">
                        ${eliButton("COPY TO CLIPBOARD", { id: "btnCopyExport", primary: true, icon: "📄", style: "flex:2; padding:12px; font-weight:800; font-size:12px;" })}
                        <button id="btnDownloadFile" class="btn-action" style="flex:1; background:#f5f5f5; color:#333; border:1px solid #ccc;">⬇️ Download</button>
                    </div>
                `;
                overlay.appendChild(box);
                document.body.appendChild(overlay);
                document.getElementById("btnCloseExport").onclick = () => overlay.remove();
                document.getElementById("btnCopyExport").onclick = function () {
                    var txt = document.getElementById("exportArea");
                    txt.select();
                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt.value).then(() => {
                        this.innerText = "✅ COPIED!";
                        this.style.background = "#2e7d32";
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            this.innerText = "📄 COPY TO CLIPBOARD";
                            this.style.background = "#1565c0";
                        }, 2000);
                    });
                };
                document.getElementById("btnDownloadFile").onclick = function () {
                    var blob = new Blob([jsonStr], { type: "application/json" });
                    var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
                    var a = document.createElement("a");
                    a.href = url;
                    a.download = "Colgate_Risk_Rules.json";
                    document.body.appendChild(a);
                    a.click();
                    document.body.removeChild(a);
                    showToast("⬇️ Download Started");
                };
            });
        };
    }

    function renderRulesList(rules) {
        var container = document.getElementById("rulesListContainer");
        container.innerHTML = "";
        rules.forEach((r, idx) => {
            var isEnabled = r.enabled !== false;
            var card = document.createElement("div");
            card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
            var accentColor = isEnabled ? "#7b1fa2" : "#cbd5e1";
            card.style.cssText =
                "background:white; border:1px solid #ddd; border-left:4px solid " +
                accentColor +
                "; padding:12px; margin-bottom:10px; border-radius:0px; position:relative;" +
                (isEnabled ? "" : " opacity:0.6;");
            var typeDisplay = r.type;
            if (Array.isArray(r.agreementTypes) && r.agreementTypes.length > 0) {
                typeDisplay = r.agreementTypes.join(", ");
            }
            var statusBadge = eliBadge(isEnabled ? "ON" : "OFF", isEnabled ? "success" : "default");
            card.innerHTML =
                '<div style="position:absolute; top:8px; right:8px; display:flex; gap:5px; align-items:center;">' +
                '<label style="cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px;">' +
                '<input type="checkbox" class="chk-rule-toggle" ' +
                (isEnabled ? "checked" : "") +
                ' style="cursor:pointer;"> ' +
                statusBadge +
                "</label>" +
                '<button class="btn-edit-rule" style="background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:14px;" title="Edit">✏️</button>' +
                '<button class="btn-del-rule" style="background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; font-size:14px;" title="Delete">🗑️</button>' +
                "</div>" +
                eliSectionLabel("AGREEMENT TYPE", { color: "#7b1fa2" }) +
                '<div style="font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#333; margin-bottom:8px;">' +
                typeDisplay +
                "</div>" +
                eliSectionLabel("RISK CHECK", { color: "#c62828" }) +
                '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#555; line-height:1.4;">' +
                r.check +
                "</div>";
            card.querySelector(".chk-rule-toggle").onchange = function () {
                var enabled = this.checked;
                loadFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES).then(function (allRules) {
                    var list = allRules || [];
                    var target = list.find(function (x) {
                        return x.id === r.id;
                    });
                    if (target) target.enabled = enabled;
                    saveFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES, list).then(function () {
                        renderRulesList(list);
                    });
                });
            };
            card.querySelector(".btn-edit-rule").onclick = () => showRuleEditor(r);
            card.querySelector(".btn-del-rule").onclick = () => {
                var overlay = showEliDialog({
                    variant: "danger",
                    icon: "🗑️",
                    title: "Delete Rule?",
                    body: "Are you sure you want to remove this risk rule?",
                    buttons: [
                        {
                            id: "btnConfDelSingle",
                            label: "Delete",
                            cls: "btn-action",
                            style: "flex:1; background:#c62828; color:white; border:none; font-weight:bold;",
                        },
                        {
                            id: "btnCancelDelSingle",
                            label: "Cancel",
                            style: "flex:1;",
                            onclick: function () {
                                overlay.remove();
                            },
                        },
                    ],
                });
                document.getElementById("btnConfDelSingle").onclick = function () {
                    var newRules = rules.filter((x) => x.id !== r.id);
                    saveFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES, newRules).then(() => {
                        overlay.remove();
                        renderRulesList(newRules);
                        showToast("🗑️ Rule Deleted");
                    });
                };
            };
            container.appendChild(card);
        });
    }

    function showRuleEditor(rule) {
        var isEdit = !!rule;
        var data = rule || { type: "", check: "", clause: "", agreementTypes: [], enabled: true };
        var selectedTypes = data.agreementTypes || (data.type ? [data.type] : []);
        var customTypes = [];
        selectedTypes.forEach(function (t) {
            var inCatalog = AGREEMENT_TYPE_CATALOG.some(function (c) {
                return c.label === t;
            });
            if (!inCatalog) customTypes.push(t);
        });
        var overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.className = "eli-overlay";
        var box = document.createElement("div");
        box.className = "tool-box slide-in";
        box.style.cssText =
            "background:white; width:380px; max-height:85vh; padding:20px; border-left:5px solid #7b1fa2; box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius:0px; overflow-y:auto;";
        var checkboxesHtml = AGREEMENT_TYPE_CATALOG.map(function (cat) {
            var checked = selectedTypes.indexOf(cat.label) !== -1 ? "checked" : "";
            return (
                '<label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 0; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#334155;"><input type="checkbox" class="chk-agree-type" value="' +
                cat.label +
                '" ' +
                checked +
                ' style="cursor:pointer;"> ' +
                cat.label +
                "</label>"
            );
        }).join("");
        var customHtml = customTypes
            .map(function (ct) {
                return (
                    '<label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 0; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#7b1fa2;"><input type="checkbox" class="chk-agree-type" value="' +
                    ct +
                    '" checked style="cursor:pointer;"> ' +
                    ct +
                    ' <span style="font-size:9px; color:#94a3b8;">(custom)</span></label>'
                );
            })
            .join("");
        box.innerHTML = `
            ${eliSectionLabel(isEdit ? "EDIT RULE" : "NEW RULE", { color: "#7b1fa2", fontSize: "12px", marginBottom: "15px" })}
            <label class="tool-label">Applies to Agreement Types</label>
            <div id="agreeTypeCheckboxes" style="max-height:180px; overflow-y:auto; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:6px; padding:8px 12px; margin-bottom:8px; background:#f8fafc;">
                ${checkboxesHtml}
                ${customHtml}
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                <input type="text" id="editCustomAgreeType" class="tool-input" placeholder="Type a custom agreement type here..." style="width:100%; margin:0 0 6px 0; font-size:13px; padding:10px 12px; height:auto; border:2px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:6px; box-sizing:border-box;">
                <button id="btnAddCustomType" class="btn-action" style="width:100%; padding:10px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; background:#7b1fa2; color:white; border-radius:6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;">+ Add Custom Agreement Type</button>
            </div>
            <label class="tool-label">Risk Check Description</label>
            <textarea id="editRuleCheck" class="tool-input" style="height:60px;">${data.check}</textarea>
            <label class="tool-label">Suggested Clause (Optional)</label>
            <textarea id="editRuleClause" class="tool-input" style="height:60px;">${data.clause || ""}</textarea>
            <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:10px;">
                <button id="btnSaveRule" class="btn-action" style="flex:1; background:#7b1fa2; color:white; font-weight:bold;">SAVE</button>
                <button id="btnCancelRule" class="btn-action" style="flex:1;">Cancel</button>
            </div>
        `;
        overlay.appendChild(box);
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        document.getElementById("btnAddCustomType").onclick = function () {
            var input = document.getElementById("editCustomAgreeType");
            var val = input.value.trim();
            if (!val) return;
            var container = document.getElementById("agreeTypeCheckboxes");
            var lbl = document.createElement("label");
            lbl.style.cssText =
                "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 0; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#7b1fa2;";
            lbl.innerHTML =
                '<input type="checkbox" class="chk-agree-type" value="' +
                val +
                '" checked style="cursor:pointer;"> ' +
                val +
                ' <span style="font-size:9px; color:#94a3b8;">(custom)</span>';
            container.appendChild(lbl);
            input.value = "";
        };
        document.getElementById("btnCancelRule").onclick = () => overlay.remove();
        document.getElementById("btnSaveRule").onclick = function () {
            var checkboxes = overlay.querySelectorAll(".chk-agree-type:checked");
            var types = [];
            checkboxes.forEach(function (cb) {
                types.push(cb.value);
            });
            var newCheck = document.getElementById("editRuleCheck").value;
            var newClause = document.getElementById("editRuleClause").value;
            if (types.length === 0 || !newCheck) {
                showToast("⚠️ Select at least one agreement type and add a check description");
                return;
            }
            loadFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES).then((rules) => {
                var list = rules || [];
                if (isEdit) {
                    var idx = list.findIndex((r) => r.id === data.id);
                    if (idx !== -1)
                        list[idx] = {
                            ...list[idx],
                            type: types.join(", "),
                            agreementTypes: types,
                            check: newCheck,
                            clause: newClause,
                        };
                } else {
                    list.push({
                        id: "rule_" + Date.now(),
                        type: types.join(", "),
                        agreementTypes: types,
                        check: newCheck,
                        clause: newClause,
                        enabled: true,
                    });
                }
                saveFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES, list).then(() => {
                    renderRulesList(list);
                    overlay.remove();
                    showToast("✅ Rule Saved");
                });
            });
        };
    }


    window.showLegalReview = function (mode) {
        if (mode === 'risks') {
            window._legalRisksLauncherSettings = { showUsage: false, runCompare: false };
            if (typeof runDeal360Analysis === 'function') return runDeal360Analysis();
        } else if (mode === 'template') {
            if (typeof showCompareToTemplateApp === 'function') return showCompareToTemplateApp();
        }
        if (typeof window.showReviewDraftApp === 'function') return window.showReviewDraftApp();
    };

    window.showLegalRisksLauncher = function () { window.showLegalReview(); };

    async function runDeal360Analysis() {
        window._eliActionStartTime = Date.now();
        if (typeof recordEliStat === "function") recordEliStat("appOpenedRisk");
        setLoading(!0, "legal");
        try {
            var text = await validateApiAndGetText(!1, "legal");
            var allRules = await loadFeatureData(STORE_RISK_RULES);
            var detectedType = (window._eliDocType || "").toLowerCase();
            var rules = (allRules || []).filter(function (r) {
                if (r.enabled === false) return false;
                var types = r.agreementTypes || (r.type ? [r.type] : []);
                var isUniversal = types.some(function (t) {
                    return t.toLowerCase().indexOf("all") !== -1;
                });
                if (isUniversal) return true;
                var allAliases = [];
                types.forEach(function (t) {
                    var catEntry = (typeof AGREEMENT_TYPE_CATALOG !== "undefined" ? AGREEMENT_TYPE_CATALOG : []).find(function (c) {
                        return c.label === t;
                    });
                    if (catEntry) {
                        allAliases = allAliases.concat(catEntry.aliases);
                    } else {
                        allAliases.push(t.toLowerCase().trim());
                        t.toLowerCase()
                            .split(/[\s,/&]+/)
                            .filter(function (w) {
                                return w.length > 2;
                            })
                            .forEach(function (w) {
                                allAliases.push(w);
                            });
                    }
                });
                return allAliases.some(function (alias) {
                    return detectedType.indexOf(alias) !== -1 || alias.indexOf(detectedType) !== -1;
                });
            });
            var launcherCfg = window._legalRisksLauncherSettings || {};
            var showUsage = launcherCfg.showUsage !== false;
            var prompt = PROMPTS.BALANCED_REVIEW(text, rules, showUsage);
            var comparePromise = null;
            var cmpMode = "new";
            if (launcherCfg.comparePayload) {
                var cText = "";
                if (launcherCfg.comparePayload.template) {
                    cText = launcherCfg.comparePayload.template.content;
                } else if (launcherCfg.comparePayload.version) {
                    if (launcherCfg.comparePayload.version.html) {
                        cText = launcherCfg.comparePayload.version.html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ");
                        if (typeof getCleanTextAndContext === "function") {
                            try { cText = getCleanTextAndContext(launcherCfg.comparePayload.version.html).text; } catch (e) { }
                        }
                    } else {
                        cText = launcherCfg.comparePayload.version.text || "";
                    }
                } else {
                    cText = launcherCfg.comparePayload.text || "";
                }
                cmpMode = launcherCfg.comparePayload.template ? "template" : (launcherCfg.comparePayload.version ? "version" : (launcherCfg.comparePayload.mode || "new"));
                var originalText = cText; // Uploaded/Past/Template is always the baseline
                var newText = text; // Current document is always the new draft
                var poModeFallback = cmpMode === "old" ? "3rd party" : "our";
                comparePromise = callGemini(API_KEY, PROMPTS.COMPARE(originalText, newText, cmpMode, poModeFallback));
            }

            var [result, compareRawResult] = await Promise.all([
                callGemini(API_KEY, prompt),
                comparePromise || Promise.resolve(null)
            ]);
            var data = tryParseGeminiJSON(result);
            if (Array.isArray(data)) {
                data = { items: data };
            } else if (!data.items) {
                var foundKey = Object.keys(data).find((key) => Array.isArray(data[key]));
                data.items = foundKey ? data[foundKey] : [];
            }
            if (data.items && data.items.length > 0) {
                data.items.forEach((item) => {
                    if (!item.category) item.category = "Risk";
                    var cat = item.category.toLowerCase().trim();
                    if (cat.includes("risk") || cat.includes("liability") || cat.includes("issue")) {
                        item.category = "Risk";
                    } else if (
                        cat.includes("usage") ||
                        cat.includes("ops") ||
                        cat.includes("operational") ||
                        cat.includes("restriction")
                    ) {
                        item.category = "Usage";
                    } else {
                        item.category = "Risk";
                    }
                });
            }
            var ruleNames = rules.map(function (r) {
                return (r.type || "").toLowerCase().trim();
            });
            if (data.items) {
                data.items.forEach(function (item) {
                    if (item.rule_applied) {
                        var applied = item.rule_applied.toLowerCase().trim();
                        var valid = ruleNames.some(function (name) {
                            return name && (applied.indexOf(name) !== -1 || name.indexOf(applied) !== -1);
                        });
                        if (!valid) item.rule_applied = "";
                    }
                });
            }
            window.deal360Data = data;
            window.deal360Overview = data.overview || "Analysis complete.";
            window.deal360Balance = data.balance_analysis || "";
            window.deal360RenderTime = Date.now();
            if (typeof checkQuirkyTrophy === "function" && data.items) {
                var rCount = data.items.filter(function (i) {
                    return i.category === "Risk";
                }).length;
                var tMatch = text.match(/[A-Z][a-z]+(?=\s+(?:means|shall mean|is defined as))/g);
                var tCount = tMatch ? new Set(tMatch).size : 0;
                checkQuirkyTrophy("deal360", { risks: rCount, terms: tCount });
            }
            setLoading(!1);
            if (typeof recordEliStat !== "undefined") recordEliStat("docsReviewed");
            if (data.items && data.items.length > 0) {
                if (typeof recordEliStat !== "undefined") recordEliStat("risksFound", data.items.length);
            }
            var hasCompare = !!compareRawResult;
            if (hasCompare) {
                try { data._cmpData = tryParseGeminiJSON(compareRawResult); }
                catch (e) { console.error("Comparison parsing error", e); }
                data._cmpMode = cmpMode;
                data._hasCompare = true;
            }

            var rulesWereActive = rules && rules.length > 0;
            data._rulesWereActive = rulesWereActive;

            if (!data.items || data.items.length === 0) {
                renderBalancedResults(data, rulesWereActive, hasCompare);
                var _l3Dur = window._eliActionStartTime ? Date.now() - window._eliActionStartTime : 0;
                window.addActivity({
                    type: "legal-360", icon: "⚡", label: "Legal Risks", summary: "✅ No risks detected",
                    payload: data, durationMs: _l3Dur
                });
            } else {
                renderBalancedResults(data, rulesWereActive, hasCompare);
                var riskCount = data.items.filter(function (i) { return i.category === "Risk"; }).length;
                var summaryParts = [];
                if (riskCount > 0) summaryParts.push(riskCount + " Risk" + (riskCount !== 1 ? "s" : ""));
                var usageCount = data.items.length - riskCount;
                if (usageCount > 0) summaryParts.push(usageCount + " Ops");
                var _l3Dur2 = window._eliActionStartTime ? Date.now() - window._eliActionStartTime : 0;
                window.addActivity({
                    type: "legal-360", icon: "⚡", label: "Legal Risks", summary: summaryParts.join(" · ") + " detected",
                    payload: data, durationMs: _l3Dur2
                });
            }

            if (hasCompare && data._cmpData) {
                setTimeout(function () { renderCompareResults(data._cmpData, data._cmpMode, "lrlCompareTarget"); }, 50);
            }
        } catch (e) {
            setLoading(!1);
            window._eliActionStartTime = 0;
            if (e.message && (e.message.includes("cancelled") || e.message.includes("AbortError"))) {
                showCancelledState();
                return;
            }
            showOutput("Analysis Failed: " + e.message, !0);
        }
    }

    function showPremiumEmptyState(opts) {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (!out) return;
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
        var card = document.createElement("div");
        card.className = "eli-cancel-card slide-in";
        var iconClass = "eli-empty-state-icon " + (opts.iconType || "info");
        card.innerHTML =
            '<div class="eli-empty-state" style="padding:40px 24px;">' +
            '<div class="' +
            iconClass +
            '">' +
            (opts.icon || "ℹ️") +
            "</div>" +
            '<div class="eli-empty-state-title">' +
            (opts.title || "Nothing Found") +
            "</div>" +
            '<div class="eli-empty-state-desc">' +
            (opts.desc || "") +
            "</div>" +
            "</div>";
        var btnRow = document.createElement("div");
        btnRow.style.cssText = "display:flex; gap:10px; padding:0 24px 24px; justify-content:center;";
        if (opts.retryLabel && opts.retryAction) {
            var btnRetry = document.createElement("button");
            btnRetry.className = "btn-platinum-config primary";
            btnRetry.innerHTML = opts.retryLabel;
            btnRetry.onclick = opts.retryAction;
            btnRow.appendChild(btnRetry);
        }
        var btnHome = document.createElement("button");
        btnHome.className = "btn-platinum-config";
        btnHome.innerHTML = "← HOME";
        btnHome.onclick = showHome;
        btnRow.appendChild(btnHome);
        card.appendChild(btnRow);
        out.appendChild(card);
    }

    function showCancelledState() {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (!out) return;
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.classList.remove("hidden");
        var card = document.createElement("div");
        card.className = "eli-cancel-card slide-in";
        card.innerHTML =
            '<div class="eli-empty-state" style="padding:40px 24px;">' +
            '<div class="eli-empty-state-icon warning">🛑</div>' +
            '<div class="eli-empty-state-title">Request Cancelled</div>' +
            '<div class="eli-empty-state-desc">The operation was stopped. No changes were made to your document.</div>' +
            "</div>";
        var btnRow = document.createElement("div");
        btnRow.style.cssText = "display:flex; gap:10px; padding:0 24px 24px; justify-content:center;";
        var btnHome = document.createElement("button");
        btnHome.className = "btn-platinum-config";
        btnHome.innerHTML = "← HOME";
        btnHome.onclick = showHome;
        btnRow.appendChild(btnHome);
        card.appendChild(btnRow);
        out.appendChild(card);
    }

    function renderBalancedResults(data, rulesActive, skipButtons) {
        if (!data || !data.items) {
            showOutput("Invalid AI Response", !0);
            return;
        }
        window.deal360Overview = data.overview || "No summary available.";
        window.deal360Balance = data.balance_analysis || "";
        window.deal360Data = data;
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        out.innerHTML = "";
        out.innerHTML += `
            <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b2a 0%, #1b263b 100%); padding:12px 15px; border-bottom:3px solid #c9a227; margin-bottom:15px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                <div style="font-family:'Georgia', serif; font-size:18px; color:white; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
                    <span>📊 LEGAL RISKS</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
                    <span style="font-size:14px; color:white; opacity:0.8; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold;" onclick="if(window.deal360RenderTime && (Date.now() - window.deal360RenderTime < 3000)) { if(typeof checkQuirkyTrophy === 'function') checkQuirkyTrophy('speed_reader', {}); } showHome()">✕</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div id="lrlCompareTarget"></div>
        `;
        if (rulesActive) {
            out.innerHTML += eliCard({
                className: "slide-in",
                accentColor: "#2e7d32",
                background: "#e8f5e9",
                borderWidth: "5px",
                style: "border-color:#c8e6c9; margin:0 8px 15px 8px;",
                padding: "10px",
                children:
                    '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">' +
                    '<div style="font-size:18px;">🛡️</div>' +
                    "<div>" +
                    eliSectionLabel("COLGATE RULES ACTIVE", { color: "#1b5e20", marginBottom: "2px" }) +
                    '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#2e7d32;">Analysis includes your custom risk database.</div>' +
                    "</div>" +
                    "</div>",
            });
        }
        var overviewHtml = `
            <div onclick="var el=document.getElementById('sec_IssuesOverview'); var isHid = el.classList.toggle('hidden'); document.getElementById('sec_IssuesOverview_arrow').textContent = isHid ? '◀' : '▼'; document.getElementById('sec_IssuesOverview_hint').style.opacity = isHid ? '1' : '0';" 
                 style="cursor:pointer; margin:0 14px 10px 14px; padding:6px 10px; background:#1565c015; border-left:3px solid #1565c0; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                <div style="font-size:12px; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0; text-transform:uppercase; flex:1;">
                    📋 Issues Overview
                </div>
                <div id="sec_IssuesOverview_hint" style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; opacity:0.6; letter-spacing:1px; flex:1; text-align:center; transition:opacity 0.2s; white-space:nowrap;">
                    CLICK ANYWHERE TO EXPAND
                </div>
                <div style="flex:1; text-align:right;">
                    <div id="sec_IssuesOverview_arrow" style="font-size:10px; color:#1565c0; display:inline-block;">◀</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div id="sec_IssuesOverview" class="hidden">`;
        overviewHtml += eliCard({
            className: "tool-box slide-in",
            accentColor: "#1565c0",
            borderWidth: "5px",
            padding: "15px",
            style: "margin:0 14px 15px 14px;",
            children:
                '<div style="font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; margin-bottom:5px;">' +
                (data.overview || "Agreement Analysis") +
                "</div>" +
                '<div style="font-size:13px; color:#37474f; line-height:1.5;">' +
                (data.balance_analysis || "") +
                "</div>",
        });
        overviewHtml += `</div>`;
        var risks = data.items.filter((i) => i.category === "Risk");
        var usage = data.items.filter((i) => i.category === "Usage");
        function renderSection(title, list, color, icon, type, prependHtml) {
            var sectionId = "sec_" + title.replace(/\s/g, "");
            var isRisk = type === "risk";
            var html = `
            <div style="margin-bottom:16px;">
            <div onclick="var el=document.getElementById('${sectionId}'); el.classList.toggle('hidden'); document.getElementById('${sectionId}_arrow').textContent = el.classList.contains('hidden') ? '◀' : '▼';" 
                 style="background:${color}; padding:10px 14px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; cursor:pointer; user-select:none; border-radius:0;">
                <span style="font-size:15px;">${icon}</span>
                <div style="font-size:13px; font-weight:800; color:#fff; letter-spacing:0.3px; text-transform:uppercase;">${title}</div>
                <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25); padding:2px 8px; border-radius:3px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#fff;">${list.length}</div>
                <span id="${sectionId}_arrow" style="margin-left:auto; font-size:10px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">${type === "win" ? "◀" : "▼"}</span>
            </div>
            <div id="${sectionId}" class="${type === "win" ? "hidden" : ""}" style="border:1.5px solid ${color}; border-top:none; background:#fafbfc; padding:12px 0;">
            ${prependHtml || ""}`;
            if (list.length === 0)
                html +=
                    '<div class="eli-empty-state" style="padding:24px 16px; text-align:center;"><div class="eli-empty-state-icon success" style="margin-bottom:8px;">✅</div><div class="eli-empty-state-desc" style="margin:0;">No items found in this category.</div></div>';
            list.forEach((item, idx) => {
                var cardId = sectionId + "_card_" + idx;
                var ruleHtml = "";
                var ruleName = (item.rule_applied || "").trim();
                if (ruleName.length > 1 && ruleName.toLowerCase() !== "n/a" && ruleName.toLowerCase() !== "none") {
                    ruleHtml =
                        ' <span style="margin-left:6px; vertical-align:middle; white-space:nowrap;">' +
                        eliBadge("🛡️ COLGATE RULE APPLIED: " + ruleName, "purple") +
                        "</span>";
                }
                var watchoutHtml =
                    item.watchout && item.category === "Usage"
                        ? `<div style="margin-top:8px; background:#fff3cd; padding:8px; border-left:3px solid #ffc107; font-size:12px; color:#856404;">
            <strong>⚠️ WATCHOUT:</strong> ${item.watchout}
         </div>`
                        : "";
                var safeText = item.text
                    .replace(/\\/g, "\\\\")
                    .replace(/'/g, "\\'")
                    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
                    .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, " ");
                var rawRef = item.clause_ref || "";
                var cleanRef = rawRef
                    .replace(/\s*(&|and|\|)\s*.*Rule.*$/i, "")
                    .replace(/\s*\(?Rule.*\)?/i, "")
                    .trim();
                var rawRef = item.clause_ref || "";
                var cleanRef = rawRef
                    .replace(/(\s+(&|and|\||-)\s+)?\(?(Rule|Colgate|Policy).*$/i, "")
                    .replace(/\s*\(?Rule.*\)?/i, "")
                    .trim();
                var safeRef = cleanRef.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
                var safeText = (item.text || "")
                    .replace(/\\/g, "\\\\")
                    .replace(/'/g, "\\'")
                    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
                    .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, " ");
                var txtLower = (item.text || "").toLowerCase();
                var titleLower = (item.title || "").toLowerCase();
                var statLower = (item.status || "").toLowerCase();
                var isMissingState =
                    statLower === "missing" ||
                    !txtLower ||
                    txtLower.length < 3 ||
                    txtLower.includes("not found") ||
                    txtLower.includes("missing") ||
                    txtLower === "n/a" ||
                    titleLower.includes("missing");
                var buttons = "";
                if (isMissingState) {
                    buttons = eliButton("LOCATE", {
                        icon: "📍",
                        style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;",
                        onclick: "checkAndLocate('" + safeRef + "', '" + safeRef + "', this)",
                    });
                } else {
                    buttons = eliButton("LOCATE", {
                        icon: "📍",
                        style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;",
                        onclick: "checkAndLocate('" + safeRef + "', '" + safeText + "', this)",
                    });
                }
                if (isRisk) {
                    var suggRaw = item.fix_suggestion || "";
                    var suggLower = suggRaw.toLowerCase();
                    var isDeletion =
                        suggLower.includes("delete") ||
                        suggLower.includes("remove") ||
                        suggLower.includes("omit") ||
                        suggLower.includes("strike");
                    var safeSuggestion = "";
                    if (suggRaw) {
                        var prefix = isMissingState ? "Write this clause to " : "Rewrite this clause to ";
                        safeSuggestion = (prefix + suggRaw)
                            .replace(/'/g, "\\'")
                            .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
                            .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, " ");
                    }
                    if (isDeletion) {
                        buttons += eliButton("DELETE", {
                            primary: true,
                            icon: "🗑️",
                            style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;",
                            onclick: "showToast('🗑️ Please manually delete this clause in the document.')",
                        });
                    } else {
                        buttons += eliButton("FIX", {
                            primary: true,
                            icon: "⚡",
                            style: "flex:1; font-size:10px;",
                            onclick: "showRewriteEditor('" + safeText + "', '" + safeSuggestion + "', " + isMissingState + ")",
                        });
                    }
                    buttons += eliButton("✕", {
                        style: "flex:0 0 30px;",
                        danger: true,
                        onclick: "ignoreRiskCard('" + cardId + "')",
                    });
                }
                var refBadge =
                    cleanRef && cleanRef !== "General"
                        ? `<span style="font-size:10px; color:#999; margin-left:6px; font-weight:400;">(${cleanRef})</span>`
                        : "";
                var sevColor = color;
                if (item.category === "Usage") {
                    sevColor = "#1d4ed8"; // Blue for Usage
                } else if (item.severity) {
                    var sl = item.severity.toLowerCase();
                    if (sl === "high") sevColor = "#c62828";
                    else if (sl === "medium") sevColor = "#e65100";
                    else if (sl === "low") sevColor = "#2e7d32";
                } else {
                    sevColor = "#c62828"; // Default Red for Legal
                }
                html += `
                <div id="${cardId}" class="slide-in" style="background:white; border:2px solid ${sevColor}; border-top:4px solid ${sevColor}; margin:0 14px 12px 14px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); overflow:hidden; display:flex;">
                    <div style="flex:1;">
                        <div style="padding:12px;">
                            <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start; margin-bottom:6px;">
                                <div style="font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:#333; line-height:1.4;">
                                    <span style="color:${sevColor}; margin-right:4px;">${idx + 1}.</span>${item.title} ${refBadge} ${ruleHtml}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div style="font-size:12px; color:#546e7a; margin-bottom:8px; font-style:italic; background:#f9f9f9; padding:6px; border-radius:3px;">"${(item.text || "").substring(0, 150)}..."</div>
                            ${item.analysis ? `<div style="font-size:13px; color:#333; line-height:1.4;">${item.analysis}</div>` : ""}
                            ${isRisk && item.fix_suggestion ? `<div style="margin-top:8px; background:#fff8e1; padding:8px; border:1px solid #ffe0b2; font-size:12px; color:#e65100;"><strong>💡 Suggestion:</strong> ${item.fix_suggestion}</div>` : ""}
                            ${watchoutHtml}
                            <div style="display:flex; gap:5px; margin-top:12px; padding-top:10px; border-top:1px dashed #eee;">
                                ${buttons}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
            });
            html += `</div></div>`;
            return html;
        }

        var launcherCfg = window._legalRisksLauncherSettings || {};
        var showUsage = launcherCfg.showUsage !== false;
        if (showUsage && usage.length > 0) {
            var combinedRisks = risks.concat(usage);
            out.innerHTML += renderSection("Legal & Usage Risks", combinedRisks, "#c62828", "🔴", "risk", overviewHtml);
        } else {
            out.innerHTML += renderSection("Legal Risks", risks, "#c62828", "🔴", "risk", overviewHtml);
        }
        if (!skipButtons) {
            out.innerHTML += '<button class="btn-secondary" style="margin-top:14px;" onclick="showHome()">← HOME</button>';
        }
    }

    window.ignoreRiskCard = function (id) {
        var el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) {
            el.style.transition = "all 0.4s ease";
            el.style.transform = "translateX(100%)";
            el.style.opacity = "0";
            setTimeout(() => {
                el.remove();
                showToast("Risk Ignored");
            }, 400);
        }
    };

    window.showUsageRadarApp = function () {
        executeUsageScan();
    };

    function executeUsageScan() {
        var out = document.getElementById("output");
        if (out) out.innerHTML = "";
        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("🔎 Radar Scanning...");
        if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(!0, "usage");
        validateApiAndGetText(!1, "summary")
            .then(function (text) {
                if (!text || text.trim().length === 0) {
                    if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(!1);
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("⚠️ No text found.");
                    return;
                }
                var prompt = `
    You are a Commercial IT Analyst for Colgate. Your sole job is to protect
    Colgate.

    TASK: Deep dive into the provided text. Identify usage restrictions,
    operational limits, SLA parameters, or technical constraints ONLY IF THEY
    NEGATIVELY IMPACT COLGATE.

    CRITICAL RULE 1: DO NOT flag any restrictions or obligations placed on the
    counterparty/vendor. If a clause says "The Vendor shall not...", IGNORE IT
    completely. 

    CRITICAL RULE 2: DO NOT flag rights, powers, or privileges granted TO
    Colgate. If Colgate HAS the right to do something (e.g., "Colgate may delay
    publication"), that is a BENEFIT, not a restriction, and MUST be ignored.

    ONLY report on limits placed on Colgate (e.g. "Colgate is limited to 3
    seats", "Colgate must provide notice in 30 days"). If you report a risk that
    does not restrict Colgate, you will be penalized.

    EXTRACT TABLE ROWS (JSON):

    [
      { 
        "topic": "Topic Name (e.g. API Limits)", 
        "detail": "The specific constraint (e.g. Max 1000 calls/day)", 
        "impact": "Operational Impact (e.g. High risk of throttling)",
        "watchout": "Specific warning (e.g. Overage fees apply automatically)",
        "suggestion": "Mitigation strategy (e.g. Pre-purchase bucket or negotiate cap)",
        "quote": "The exact short text snippet from the document where this is stated"
      }
    ]

    If no specific usage terms found, return empty array.

    TEXT:

    ${text.substring(0, 500000)}

    `;
                return callGemini(API_KEY, prompt, null, { jsonMode: true }).then(function (res) {
                    if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(!1);
                    var data = tryParseGeminiJSON(res);
                    if (Array.isArray(data)) data = { items: data };
                    else if (!data.items) {
                        var foundKey = Object.keys(data).find(k => Array.isArray(data[k]));
                        data.items = foundKey ? data[foundKey] : [];
                    }

                    if (data.items) {
                        data.items.forEach(function (item) {
                            item.category = "Usage";
                            item.risk_level = "Medium";
                            item.title = item.topic + (item.detail ? ": " + item.detail : "");
                            item.analysis = item.impact ? "Impact: " + item.impact : (item.quote ? "Excerpt: " + item.quote : "");
                            item.fix_suggestion = item.suggestion || "";
                            item.watchout = item.watchout || "";
                            item.text = item.quote || "";
                        });
                    }

                    data.overview = "Usage Limits & Constraints Analysis";

                    if (typeof renderBalancedResults === "function") {
                        renderBalancedResults(data, false, false);
                    }

                    try {
                        if (typeof window.addActivity === "function") {
                            window.addActivity({
                                type: "usage-risks",
                                icon: "📡",
                                label: "Usage Risks",
                                summary: (data.items ? data.items.length : 0) + " constraint(s) detected",
                                payload: data
                            });
                        }
                    } catch (_) { }
                });
            })
            .catch(function (e) {
                if (typeof setLoading === "function") setLoading(!1);
                var msg = e && e.message ? e.message : String(e);
                if (msg !== "Request cancelled.") if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Error: " + msg);
            });
    }


    function toggleMainFooter(show) {
        var footer = document.getElementById("main-footer");
        if (footer) {
            footer.style.display = show ? "flex" : "none";
            document.body.style.paddingBottom = show ? "30px" : "0px";
        }
    }


    if (typeof window.lastLocateReqId === "undefined") window.lastLocateReqId =
    0;

    if (typeof window.activeLocateBtn === "undefined") window.activeLocateBtn =
    null;


    window.showMissingClauseDialog = function (title) {
        var overlay = showEliDialog({
            variant: "neutral",
            icon: "🚫",
            title: "Clause Missing",
            zIndex: "2147483660",
            body:
                'The clause <strong>"' +
                title +
                '"</strong> was not found in the document.<br><br>It is absent or has been removed.',
            buttons: [
                {
                    id: "btnOkMissing",
                    label: "OK",
                    style: "width:100%; font-weight:bold;",
                    onclick: function () {
                        overlay.remove();
                    },
                },
            ],
        });
    };

    async function fastLocateClause(context, textSnippet, sectionRef,
    clauseTitle, maxResults = 10) {
        try {
            if (!context || !context.document) {
                return [];
            }
            var body = context.document.body;
            var rawSnippet = (textSnippet || "")
                .replace(/[\u2018\u2019]/g, "'")
                .replace(/[\u201C\u201D]/g, '"')
                .replace(/[\r\n]+/g, " ")
                .replace(/…/g, "...");
            if (rawSnippet.includes("...")) {
                var parts = rawSnippet.split("...");
                var longestPart = parts.reduce(function (a, b) {
                    return a.length > b.length ? a : b;
                }, "");
                rawSnippet = longestPart;
            }
            var cleanSnippet = rawSnippet.substring(0, 60).trim();
            var cleanRefs = [];
            var cleanRef = "";
            if (sectionRef && sectionRef !== "General" && sectionRef.toLowerCase() !== "null") {
                if (sectionRef.indexOf("[X.X]") !== -1) {
                    cleanRefs.push("[X.X]");
                } else {
                    var matches = sectionRef.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)+|\d+)/g);
                    if (matches) {
                        for (var k = 0; k < matches.length; k++) {
                            var r = matches[k].trim();
                            if (r.charAt(r.length - 1) === ".") r = r.slice(0, -1);
                            if (r) cleanRefs.push(r);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            if (cleanRefs.length > 0) cleanRef = cleanRefs[0];
            var searchTitle = "";
            if (clauseTitle) {
                searchTitle = clauseTitle.replace(/^(Section|Article|Clause|Rule)\s*[\d\.]+\s*[:\-\.]?\s*/i, "").trim();
            }
            var uniqueResults = [];
            var seenTexts = [];
            function addMatch(para, method) {
                if (!para) return !1;
                try {
                    var identifier = "unknown";
                    try {
                        if (para.text) identifier = para.text.substring(0, 100);
                    } catch (e) {
                        identifier = Math.random().toString();
                    }
                    if (seenTexts.indexOf(identifier) === -1) {
                        seenTexts.push(identifier);
                        uniqueResults.push({ paragraph: para, method: method });
                        return !0;
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                }
                return !1;
            }
            if (cleanSnippet.length > 15) {
                try {
                    var textResults = body.search(cleanSnippet, { ignoreSpace: !0, ignorePunctuation: !0 });
                    textResults.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    if (textResults.items.length > 0) {
                        for (var i = 0; i < textResults.items.length && uniqueResults.length < maxResults; i++) {
                            if (textResults.items[i]) {
                                var para = textResults.items[i].paragraphs.getFirst();
                                para.load("text");
                                await context.sync();
                                addMatch(para, "text");
                            }
                        }
                        if (uniqueResults.length > 0) {
                            return uniqueResults.map(function (r) {
                                return r.paragraph;
                            });
                        }
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                }
            }
            if (searchTitle.length > 3 && uniqueResults.length < maxResults) {
                try {
                    var titleResults = body.search(searchTitle, { matchCase: !1, ignoreSpace: !0 });
                    titleResults.load("items/paragraph/text");
                    await context.sync();
                    for (var i = 0; i < titleResults.items.length && uniqueResults.length < maxResults; i++) {
                        var item = titleResults.items[i];
                        if (!item || !item.paragraph) continue;
                        var pText = item.paragraph.text.trim().toLowerCase();
                        var titleLow = searchTitle.toLowerCase();
                        if (pText.length < 100 && pText.indexOf(titleLow) !== -1) {
                            addMatch(item.paragraph, "title");
                            continue;
                        }
                        var startsWithRef = !1;
                        if (cleanRefs.length > 0) {
                            var firstRef = cleanRefs[0].toLowerCase();
                            if (pText.indexOf(firstRef + " " + titleLow) === 0) startsWithRef = !0;
                        }
                        if (pText.indexOf(titleLow) === 0 || startsWithRef) {
                            addMatch(item.paragraph, "title");
                        }
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                }
            }
            if (cleanRefs.length > 0 && uniqueResults.length < maxResults) {
                try {
                    var lists = body.lists;
                    lists.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    for (var r = 0; r < cleanRefs.length; r++) {
                        var targetRef = cleanRefs[r];
                        var safeRef = targetRef.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
                        var refResults = body.search(targetRef, { matchCase: !1, ignoreSpace: !0 });
                        refResults.load("items/paragraph/text");
                        await context.sync();
                        var pattern = "^(?:(?:Section|Clause|Article|Rule|§)s?\\s*)?" + safeRef + "(?:[\\s\\.\\:\\)\\,\\-\\/]|$)";
                        var headerRegex = new RegExp(pattern, "i");
                        for (var i = 0; i < refResults.items.length && uniqueResults.length < maxResults; i++) {
                            var item = refResults.items[i];
                            if (!item || !item.paragraph) continue;
                            var pText = item.paragraph.text.trim();
                            if (
                                pText === targetRef ||
                                pText === targetRef + "." ||
                                headerRegex.test(pText) ||
                                pText.indexOf(targetRef) === 0
                            ) {
                                addMatch(item.paragraph, "ref-header");
                            }
                        }
                        for (var i = 0; i < lists.items.length && uniqueResults.length < maxResults; i++) {
                            var list = lists.items[i];
                            var listParas = list.paragraphs;
                            listParas.load("items/list/levelString");
                            await context.sync();
                            for (var j = 0; j < listParas.items.length; j++) {
                                var p = listParas.items[j];
                                if (p.list && p.list.levelString) {
                                    var num = p.list.levelString.trim();
                                    if (num === targetRef || num === targetRef + ".") {
                                        addMatch(p, "ref-list");
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                }
            }
            if (uniqueResults.length === 0 && textSnippet && textSnippet.length > 20) {
                if (typeof findMatchByAI === "function") {
                    try {
                        var aiRange = await findMatchByAI(context, textSnippet);
                        if (aiRange) {
                            var aiPara = aiRange.paragraphs.getFirst();
                            aiPara.load("text");
                            await context.sync();
                            addMatch(aiPara, "ai");
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                    }
                }
            }
            return uniqueResults.map(function (result) {
                return result.paragraph;
            });
        } catch (error) {
            return [];
        }
    }

    window.checkAndLocate = function (clauseRef, textToFind, btnElement) {
        var txtLower = (textToFind || "").toLowerCase();
        var treatAsPlaceholder =
            !textToFind ||
            textToFind.length < 3 ||
            txtLower.includes("missing") ||
            txtLower.includes("not found") ||
            txtLower.includes("absent") ||
            txtLower === "n/a";
        var seedText = treatAsPlaceholder ? clauseRef : textToFind;
        if (!seedText || String(seedText).trim().length < 2) {
            showMissingClauseDialog(clauseRef || "Clause");
            return;
        }
        var cleanText = seedText;
        if (/['"“”‘’]/.test(seedText)) {
            var parts = String(seedText).split(/['"“”‘’]/);
            var longest = parts.reduce(function (a, b) {
                return a.length > b.length ? a : b;
            }, "");
            if (longest.trim().length > 4) {
                cleanText = longest.trim();
            } else {
                cleanText = String(seedText).replace(/['"“”‘’]/g, "");
            }
        }
        var cleanRef = (clauseRef || "")
            .replace(/(\s+(&|and|\||-)\s+)?\(?(Rule|Colgate|Policy).*$/i, "")
            .replace(/\s*\(.*Rule.*\)/i, "")
            .trim()
            .replace(/[\(\)]/g, "")
            .trim();
        if (!cleanRef && clauseRef) cleanRef = clauseRef;
        if (
            cleanRef &&
            (cleanRef.includes("&") || /\b(and)\b/i.test(cleanRef) || cleanRef.includes("/") || cleanRef.includes(","))
        ) {
            var overlay = showEliDialog({
                variant: "warning",
                icon: "⚠️",
                title: "Multi-Section Item",
                body:
                    "This item references multiple locations:<br><strong>" +
                    cleanRef +
                    "</strong><br><br>Please review these sections manually.",
                buttons: [
                    {
                        id: "btnMultiOk",
                        label: "OK",
                        style: "width:100%; font-weight:bold;",
                        onclick: function () {
                            overlay.remove();
                        },
                    },
                ],
            });
            return;
        }
        locateCompareLikeTrackChanges(cleanText, btnElement, cleanRef, clauseRef);
    };

    function extractTextFromOoxml(ooxml) {
        var xml = String(ooxml || "");
        if (!xml) return "";
        var matches = xml.match(/<w:t[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/w:t>/gi) || [];
        if (!matches.length) {
            return xml
                .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ")
                .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                .trim();
        }
        var text = matches
            .map(function (chunk) {
                return String(chunk || "")
                    .replace(/<w:t[^>]*>/i, "")
                    .replace(/<\/w:t>/i, "");
            })
            .join(" ");
        return text
            .replace(/&amp;/g, "&")
            .replace(/&lt;/g, "<")
            .replace(/&gt;/g, ">")
            .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
            .replace(/&#39;/g, "'")
            .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
            .trim();
    }

    function locateCompareLikeTrackChanges(textToFind, btnElement, clauseRef,
    rawClauseRef, options) {
        Word.run(async function (context) {
            var norm = function (s) {
                return String(s || "")
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ")
                    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                    .trim();
            };
            var clean = String(textToFind || "")
                .replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ")
                .trim();
            if (!clean) return { type: "NONE" };
            if (clean.length > 250) clean = clean.substring(0, 250);
            var body = context.document.body;
            if (options && (options.isDeletion || options.hasTrackedPriority)) {
                var delHint = String(options.deletedSnippet || "");
                var revisions = body.getTrackedChanges();
                revisions.load("items");
                await context.sync();
                if (revisions.items && revisions.items.length > 0) {
                    var candidates = [];
                    for (var i = 0; i < revisions.items.length; i++) {
                        var rev = revisions.items[i];
                        rev.load("type");
                        var rr = rev.getRange();
                        rr.load("text");
                        var ox = rr.getOoxml();
                        candidates.push({ change: rev, range: rr, ooxml: ox });
                    }
                    await context.sync();
                    var norm = function (s) {
                        return String(s || "")
                            .toLowerCase()
                            .replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ")
                            .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                            .trim();
                    };
                    var hintNorm = norm(delHint);
                    var clauseNorm = norm(clauseRef);
                    var best = null;
                    var bestScore = -1;
                    for (var j = 0; j < candidates.length; j++) {
                        var cand = candidates[j];
                        var t = String(cand.change.type || "").toLowerCase();
                        if (options.isDeletion) {
                            if (t !== "deletion" && t !== "deleted") continue;
                        } else if (t !== "deletion" && t !== "deleted" && t !== "replacement" && t !== "insertion") {
                            continue;
                        }
                        var cText = cand.range.text || extractTextFromOoxml(cand.ooxml.value) || "";
                        var cNorm = norm(cText);
                        if (!cNorm) continue;
                        var score = 0;
                        if (hintNorm) {
                            if (cNorm === hintNorm) score += 100;
                            else if (cNorm.indexOf(hintNorm) !== -1 || hintNorm.indexOf(cNorm) !== -1) score += 75;
                            var hintWords = hintNorm.split(/\s+/).filter(function (w) {
                                return w.length > 3;
                            });
                            for (var hw = 0; hw < hintWords.length; hw++) {
                                if (cNorm.indexOf(hintWords[hw]) !== -1) score += 5;
                            }
                        }
                        if (clauseNorm && cNorm.indexOf(clauseNorm) !== -1) score += 20;
                        if (score > bestScore) {
                            bestScore = score;
                            best = cand;
                        }
                    }
                    if (best && bestScore > 0) {
                        best.range.select();
                        best.range.scrollIntoView();
                        await context.sync();
                        return { type: "FOUND_TRACKED", count: 1 };
                    }
                }
            }
            var anchorsRaw = [
                clean,
                options && options.originalSnippet ? options.originalSnippet : "",
                options && options.newSnippet ? options.newSnippet : "",
                options && options.deletedSnippet ? options.deletedSnippet : "",
                clauseRef || "",
            ];
            var seenAnchors = {};
            var anchors = [];
            for (var a = 0; a < anchorsRaw.length; a++) {
                var anchor = String(anchorsRaw[a] || "")
                    .replace(/\[DELETED\]|\[NEWLY ADDED\]/gi, "")
                    .replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ")
                    .trim();
                if (anchor.length > 120) anchor = anchor.substring(0, 120).trim();
                if (anchor.length < 4) continue;
                var key = anchor.toLowerCase();
                if (seenAnchors[key]) continue;
                seenAnchors[key] = !0;
                anchors.push(anchor);
            }
            for (var ai = 0; ai < anchors.length; ai++) {
                var matches = await fastLocateClause(context, anchors[ai], clauseRef || "", rawClauseRef || clauseRef || "", 6);
                if (matches && matches.length > 0) {
                    var targetFromFast = matches[0];
                    targetFromFast.select();
                    targetFromFast.getRange().scrollIntoView();
                    await context.sync();
                    return { type: "FOUND_FAST", count: matches.length };
                }
            }
            var results = body.search(clean, { matchCase: !1, ignoreSpace: !0, ignorePunctuation: !0 });
            results.load("items");
            await context.sync();
            if (results.items && results.items.length > 0) {
                var target = results.items[0];
                target.select();
                target.scrollIntoView();
                await context.sync();
                return { type: "FOUND", count: results.items.length };
            }
            return { type: "NONE" };
        })
            .then(function (res) {
                if (!res || res.type === "NONE") {
                    showToast("⚠️ Could not locate.");
                    return;
                }
                var label = clauseRef ? " (" + clauseRef + ")" : "";
                if (res.count && res.count > 1) {
                    showToast("📍 Located" + label + " (multiple matches)");
                } else {
                    showToast("📍 Located" + label);
                }
            })
            .catch(function (e) {
                showToast("⚠️ Could not locate.");
            });
    }

    window.compareLocateFromCard = function (
        searchText,
        clauseRef,
        btnElement,
        isDeletion,
        encodedDeletedSnippet,
        encodedOriginalSnippet,
        encodedNewSnippet,
    ) {
        var deletedSnippet = "";
        var originalSnippet = "";
        var newSnippet = "";
        try {
            deletedSnippet = encodedDeletedSnippet ? decodeURIComponent(encodedDeletedSnippet) : "";
        } catch (e) {
            deletedSnippet = encodedDeletedSnippet || "";
        }
        try {
            originalSnippet = encodedOriginalSnippet ? decodeURIComponent(encodedOriginalSnippet) : "";
        } catch (e) {
            originalSnippet = encodedOriginalSnippet || "";
        }
        try {
            newSnippet = encodedNewSnippet ? decodeURIComponent(encodedNewSnippet) : "";
        } catch (e) {
            newSnippet = encodedNewSnippet || "";
        }
