                            "</span></div>" +
                            '<span style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#3b82f6; background:#dbeafe; border:1px solid #93c5fd; padding:2px 8px;">' +
                            count +
                            " clauses</span>";
                        row.onclick = function () {
                            window.showPlaybookBuilderApp(key);
                        };
                        chooserBody.appendChild(row);
                    });
                    chooserCard.appendChild(chooserBody);
                    var chooserFooter = document.createElement("div");
                    chooserFooter.style.cssText =
                        "padding:10px 15px; border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; align-items:center;";
                    var btnBuildNew = document.createElement("button");
                    btnBuildNew.innerHTML = '<span style="margin-right:6px;">📄</span> BUILD NEW PLAYBOOK FROM DOCUMENT';
                    btnBuildNew.style.cssText =
                        "width:100%; padding:10px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; " +
                        "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#1d4ed8); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #1d4ed8; border-radius:0; font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.25);";
                    btnBuildNew.onclick = function () {
                        window._showBuildNewPlaybookFromDoc();
                    };
                    chooserFooter.appendChild(btnBuildNew);
                    var btnExportAll = document.createElement("button");
                    btnExportAll.innerHTML = '<span style="margin-right:6px;">📦</span> EXPORT ALL PLAYBOOKS';
                    btnExportAll.style.cssText =
                        "width:100%; padding:10px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; " +
                        "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#4f46e5); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #4f46e5; border-radius:0; font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;";
                    btnExportAll.onclick = function () {
                        window._loadTrackPortPlaybooks().then(function (allPb) {
                            var keys = Object.keys(allPb).filter(function (k) {
                                return k !== "id";
                            });
                            if (keys.length === 0) {
                                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("No playbooks to export.");
                                return;
                            }
                            var bulk = {};
                            keys.forEach(function (k) {
                                var entry = allPb[k];
                                bulk[k] = {
                                    playbookClauses: entry.playbookClauses || [],
                                    clauseMapping: entry.clauseMapping || {},
                                    uploadedAt: entry.uploadedAt || "",
                                };
                            });
                            var jsonStr = JSON.stringify(bulk, null, 2);
                            var ta = document.createElement("textarea");
                            ta.value = jsonStr;
                            ta.style.cssText = "position:fixed; left:-9999px; top:-9999px;";
                            document.body.appendChild(ta);
                            ta.select();
                            try {
                                document.execCommand("copy");
                            } catch (e) { }
                            ta.remove();
                            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast(keys.length + " playbook(s) copied to clipboard as JSON");
                        });
                    };
                    chooserFooter.appendChild(btnExportAll);
                    var btnHome = document.createElement("button");
                    btnHome.innerHTML = "HOME";
                    btnHome.style.cssText =
                        "width:100%; padding:8px 24px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8ecf1,#d1d5db); color:#1b263b; border:1.5px solid #9ca3af; border-radius:0;";
                    btnHome.onclick = function () {
                        if (typeof showHome === "function") showHome();
                    };
                    chooserFooter.appendChild(btnHome);
                    chooserCard.appendChild(chooserFooter);
                    out.appendChild(chooserCard);
                })
                .catch(function () {
                    out.innerHTML = '<div style="padding:20px; text-align:center; color:#dc2626;">Failed to load playbooks.</div>';
                });
            return;
        }
        var editingType = agreementType || "";
        window._loadTrackPortPlaybooks().then(function (playbooks) {
            var pbData = editingType ? playbooks[editingType] : null;
            var clauses =
                pbData && pbData.clauseMapping && Array.isArray(pbData.clauseMapping.clauses)
                    ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(pbData.clauseMapping.clauses))
                    : [];
            var libraryName = (pbData && pbData.clauseMapping && pbData.clauseMapping.libraryName) || editingType || "";
            var articleGuidance =
                pbData && pbData.clauseMapping && pbData.clauseMapping.articleGuidance
                    ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(pbData.clauseMapping.articleGuidance))
                    : {};
            var _usedArticleIds = {};
            clauses.forEach(function (c) {
                if (c.articleId) _usedArticleIds[c.articleId] = true;
            });
            Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                if (!_usedArticleIds[k]) delete articleGuidance[k];
            });
            var escHtml = function (s) {
                var d = document.createElement("div");
                d.appendChild(document.createTextNode(s || ""));
                return d.innerHTML;
            };
            var card = document.createElement("div");
            card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
            card.style.cssText =
                "padding:0; border-radius:0; border:1px solid #d1d5db; border-left:5px solid #c9a227; background:#fff; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; min-height:0;";
            var header = document.createElement("div");
            header.style.cssText =
                "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b2a 0%,#1b263b 100%); padding:12px 15px; border-bottom:3px solid #c9a227; position:relative; overflow:hidden;";
            header.innerHTML =
                '<div style="position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(255,255,255,0.05),transparent 60%); pointer-events:none;"></div>' +
                '<div style="font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#8fa6c7; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px; margin-bottom:2px;">PLAYBOOK EDITOR</div>' +
                '<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif; font-size:16px; font-weight:400; color:#ffffff; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">' +
                '<span style="font-size:18px;">📚</span> ' +
                escHtml(editingType || "New Playbook") +
                "</div>";
            card.appendChild(header);
            var body = document.createElement("div");
            body.id = "pbEditorBody";
            body.style.cssText = "padding:16px; flex:1; overflow:auto; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; min-height:0;";
            card.appendChild(body);
            function normalizeArticleKey(raw) {
                return (raw || "")
                    .trim()
                    .replace(/^article\s+/i, "")
                    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                    .toUpperCase();
            }
            function buildArticleGroups() {
                var groups = {};
                var order = [];
                var canonMap = {};
                clauses.forEach(function (clause, ci) {
                    var rawKey = (clause.articleId || "").trim() || "(Ungrouped)";
                    var normKey = rawKey === "(Ungrouped)" ? rawKey : normalizeArticleKey(rawKey);
                    if (!canonMap[normKey]) {
                        canonMap[normKey] = rawKey;
                        groups[rawKey] = [];
                        order.push(rawKey);
                    }
                    var displayKey = canonMap[normKey];
                    groups[displayKey].push(ci);
                });
                Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (ak) {
                    var normAk = normalizeArticleKey(ak);
                    var found = false;
                    for (var i = 0; i < order.length; i++) {
                        if (normalizeArticleKey(order[i]) === normAk) {
                            found = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (!found) {
                        order.push(ak);
                        groups[ak] = [];
                    }
                });
                return { groups: groups, order: order };
            }
            function renderClauseHtml(ci) {
                var clause = clauses[ci];
                if (!clause) return "";
                var fallbacks = Array.isArray(clause.fallbacks) ? clause.fallbacks : [];
                var fbHtml = "";
                fallbacks.forEach(function (fb, fi) {
                    fbHtml +=
                        '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:flex-start; padding:6px 8px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; margin-bottom:4px;">' +
                        '<div style="flex:1;">' +
                        '<input type="text" data-fb-field="level" data-ci="' +
                        ci +
                        '" data-fi="' +
                        fi +
                        '" value="' +
                        escHtml(fb.level || "") +
                        '" placeholder="Level label..." style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; box-sizing:border-box; margin-bottom:4px;">' +
                        '<textarea data-fb-field="text" data-ci="' +
                        ci +
                        '" data-fi="' +
                        fi +
                        '" rows="2" placeholder="Fallback text..." style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; resize:vertical; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',sans-serif;">' +
                        escHtml(fb.text || "") +
                        "</textarea>" +
                        "</div>" +
                        '<button class="pbDeleteFb" data-ci="' +
                        ci +
                        '" data-fi="' +
                        fi +
                        '" style="font-size:9px; color:#dc2626; background:#fff; border:1px solid #fca5a5; padding:2px 6px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0; margin-top:2px; flex-shrink:0;">DEL</button>' +
                        "</div>";
                });
                return (
                    '<details data-pb-clause-idx="' +
                    ci +
                    '" style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0; margin-bottom:6px; background:#fff; margin-left:12px;">' +
                    '<summary style="padding:8px 10px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; list-style:none;">' +
                    '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">' +
                    '<span class="pbClauseArrow" style="font-size:8px; color:#94a3b8;">&#9654;</span>' +
                    '<span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a;">' +
                    escHtml(clause.id || "Clause " + (ci + 1)) +
                    "</span>" +
                    (clause.sectionId
                        ? '<span style="font-size:9px; color:#64748b;">' + escHtml(clause.sectionId) + "</span>"
                        : "") +
                    "</div>" +
                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:4px; align-items:center;">' +
                    (fallbacks.length > 0
                        ? '<span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0; background:#dbeafe; border:1px solid #93c5fd; padding:1px 5px;">' +
                        fallbacks.length +
                        " FB</span>"
                        : "") +
                    (clause.lockClause
                        ? '<span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#dc2626; background:#fee2e2; border:1px solid #fca5a5; padding:1px 5px;">LOCK</span>'
                        : "") +
                    '<button class="pbDeleteClause" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" style="font-size:8px; color:#dc2626; background:#fff; border:1px solid #fca5a5; padding:1px 5px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">DEL</button>' +
                    "</div></summary>" +
                    '<div style="padding:10px;">' +
                    '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; margin-bottom:2px;">ID</div>' +
                    '<div style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; background:#f8fafc; color:#64748b; box-sizing:border-box;">' +
                    escHtml(clause.id || "") +
                    "</div></div>" +
                    '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:8px; margin-bottom:8px;">' +
                    '<div><div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin-bottom:2px;"><span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px;">Article</span>' +
                    (ci > 0
                        ? '<button class="pbCopyPrevArticle" data-ci="' +
                        ci +
                        '" style="font-size:7px; color:#6366f1; background:#eef2ff; border:1px solid #a5b4fc; padding:0 4px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0; line-height:14px;" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" title="Copy from previous clause">&#x2398;</button>'
                        : "") +
                    "</div>" +
                    '<input type="text" data-clause-field="articleId" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" value="' +
                    escHtml(clause.articleId || "") +
                    '" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; box-sizing:border-box;"></div>' +
                    '<div><div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin-bottom:2px;"><span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px;">Section</span>' +
                    (ci > 0
                        ? '<button class="pbCopyPrevSection" data-ci="' +
                        ci +
                        '" style="font-size:7px; color:#6366f1; background:#eef2ff; border:1px solid #a5b4fc; padding:0 4px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0; line-height:14px;" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" title="Copy from previous clause">&#x2398;</button>'
                        : "") +
                    "</div>" +
                    '<input type="text" data-clause-field="sectionId" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" value="' +
                    escHtml(clause.sectionId || "") +
                    '" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; box-sizing:border-box;"></div>' +
                    '<div><div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; margin-bottom:2px;">Sub-Clause</div>' +
                    '<input type="text" data-clause-field="sectionSubClause" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" value="' +
                    escHtml(clause.sectionSubClause || "") +
                    '" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; box-sizing:border-box;"></div></div>' +
                    '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; margin-bottom:2px;">Clause Text</div>' +
                    '<textarea data-clause-field="text" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" rows="3" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; resize:vertical; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',sans-serif;">' +
                    escHtml(clause.text || "") +
                    "</textarea></div>" +
                    '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;"><div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; margin-bottom:2px;">Guidance Comment</div>' +
                    '<textarea data-clause-field="guidanceComment" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" rows="2" style="width:100%; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; resize:vertical; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',sans-serif;">' +
                    escHtml(clause.guidanceComment || "") +
                    "</textarea></div>" +
                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;">' +
                    '<label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#1e293b; cursor:pointer;"><input type="checkbox" data-clause-field="lockClause" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '"' +
                    (clause.lockClause ? " checked" : "") +
                    ' style="accent-color:#dc2626;"> Lock Clause</label>' +
                    '<input type="text" data-clause-field="lockComment" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" value="' +
                    escHtml(clause.lockComment || "") +
                    '" placeholder="Lock reason..." style="flex:1; padding:4px 6px; font-size:10px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; box-sizing:border-box;"></div>' +
                    '<div><div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#1565c0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; margin-bottom:4px;">Fallbacks (' +
                    fallbacks.length +
                    ")</div>" +
                    fbHtml +
                    '<button class="pbAddFb" data-ci="' +
                    ci +
                    '" style="width:100%; padding:5px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #93c5fd; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;">+ ADD FALLBACK</button></div>' +
                    "</div></details>"
                );
            }
            function renderEditor() {
                var openArticles = {};
                var openClauses = {};
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-article]").forEach(function (d) {
                    if (d.open) openArticles[d.getAttribute("data-pb-article")] = true;
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-clause-idx]").forEach(function (d) {
                    if (d.open) {
                        var ci = parseInt(d.getAttribute("data-pb-clause-idx"), 10);
                        var clause = clauses[ci];
                        if (clause) openClauses[clause.id || "idx_" + ci] = true;
                    }
                });
                var artData = buildArticleGroups();
                var totalArticles = artData.order.length;
                var html =
                    '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:14px;">' +
                    '<div><span class="eli-label-sm" style="color:#1e3a8a;">' +
                    totalArticles +
                    " Articles</span>" +
                    '<span style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b; margin-left:8px;">' +
                    clauses.length +
                    " Clauses</span></div>" +
                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px;">' +
                    '<button id="pbExpandAll" style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #93c5fd; padding:3px 8px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;">EXPAND ALL</button>' +
                    '<button id="pbCollapseAll" style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#475569; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; padding:3px 8px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;">COLLAPSE ALL</button>' +
                    "</div></div>";
                artData.order.forEach(function (artKey) {
                    var clauseIdxs = artData.groups[artKey] || [];
                    var guidanceText = articleGuidance[artKey] || "";
                    html +=
                        '<details data-pb-article="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" style="border:1px solid #bfdbfe; margin-bottom:10px; background:#fafbfc;">' +
                        '<summary style="padding:10px 12px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#dbeafe); border-bottom:1px solid #bfdbfe; list-style:none;">' +
                        '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">' +
                        '<span class="pbArticleArrow" style="font-size:9px; color:#3b82f6;">&#9654;</span>' +
                        '<span class="eli-label" style="color:#1e3a8a;">' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        "</span>" +
                        "</div>" +
                        '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">' +
                        '<span style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#3b82f6;">' +
                        clauseIdxs.length +
                        " clauses</span>" +
                        '<button class="pbDeleteArticle" data-del-article="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" style="font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#dc2626; background:#fee2e2; border:1px solid #fca5a5; padding:1px 6px; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0;" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">DEL</button>' +
                        "</div>" +
                        "</summary>" +
                        '<div style="padding:10px 12px;">' +
                        '<details data-pb-guidance="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" style="margin-bottom:10px; border:1px solid #fde68a; background:#fffbeb;">' +
                        '<summary style="padding:6px 8px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; list-style:none;">' +
                        '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">' +
                        '<span class="pbGuidanceArrow" style="font-size:8px; color:#b45309;">&#9654;</span>' +
                        '<span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#92400e; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px;">Article Guidance</span></div>' +
                        (guidanceText
                            ? '<span style="font-size:8px; color:#b45309; font-weight:600; max-width:140px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap;">' +
                            escHtml(guidanceText.substring(0, 40)) +
                            (guidanceText.length > 40 ? "..." : "") +
                            "</span>"
                            : '<span style="font-size:8px; color:#d4a574; font-style:italic;">empty</span>') +
                        "</summary>" +
                        '<div style="padding:6px 8px;">' +
                        '<textarea data-article-guidance="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" rows="' +
                        Math.max(2, (guidanceText.match(/\n/g) || []).length + 2) +
                        '" placeholder="Enter guidance for this article..." style="width:100%; padding:5px 6px; font-size:13px; border:1px solid #fde68a; border-radius:0; resize:vertical; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:\'Segoe UI\',sans-serif; background:#fffef5; line-height:1.5; overflow:hidden;">' +
                        escHtml(guidanceText) +
                        "</textarea>" +
                        '<button class="pbAiImproveGuidance" data-ai-article="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" style="margin-top:4px; padding:4px 10px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f4ff,#e0e7ff); color:#4338ca; border:1px solid #a5b4fc; border-radius:0; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">✨ AI IMPROVE</button>' +
                        '<div class="pbAiSuggestionBox" data-ai-suggestion-article="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" style="display:none; margin-top:6px; border:1px solid #a5b4fc; background:#f5f3ff; padding:8px;"></div>' +
                        "</div></details>";
                    clauseIdxs.forEach(function (ci) {
                        html += renderClauseHtml(ci);
                    });
                    html +=
                        '<button class="pbAddClauseToArt" data-article="' +
                        escHtml(artKey) +
                        '" style="width:100%; padding:6px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#1565c0; background:#eff6ff; border:1px solid #93c5fd; cursor:pointer; border-radius:0; margin-top:6px;">+ ADD CLAUSE TO THIS ARTICLE</button>' +
                        "</div></details>";
                });
                html +=
                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:10px;">' +
                    '<button id="pbAddClause" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#2563eb); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #2563eb; border-radius:0;">+ ADD CLAUSE</button>' +
                    '<button id="pbAddArticle" style="flex:1; padding:10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c9a227,#b8860b); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #b8860b; border-radius:0;">+ ADD ARTICLE</button>' +
                    "</div>";
                body.innerHTML = html;
                wireEditorEvents();
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-article]").forEach(function (d) {
                    if (openArticles[d.getAttribute("data-pb-article")]) {
                        d.open = true;
                        d.dispatchEvent(new Event("toggle"));
                    }
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-clause-idx]").forEach(function (d) {
                    var ci = parseInt(d.getAttribute("data-pb-clause-idx"), 10);
                    var clause = clauses[ci];
                    var key = clause ? clause.id || "idx_" + ci : null;
                    if (key && openClauses[key]) {
                        d.open = true;
                        d.dispatchEvent(new Event("toggle"));
                    }
                });
            }
            function wireEditorEvents() {
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-article]").forEach(function (det) {
                    var arrow = det.querySelector(".pbArticleArrow");
                    var sync = function () {
                        if (arrow) arrow.innerHTML = det.open ? "&#9660;" : "&#9654;";
                    };
                    sync();
                    det.addEventListener("toggle", sync);
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-guidance]").forEach(function (det) {
                    var arrow = det.querySelector(".pbGuidanceArrow");
                    var sync = function () {
                        if (arrow) arrow.innerHTML = det.open ? "&#9660;" : "&#9654;";
                    };
                    sync();
                    det.addEventListener("toggle", function () {
                        sync();
                        if (det.open) {
                            var ta = det.querySelector("textarea[data-article-guidance]");
                            if (ta) {
                                ta.style.height = "auto";
                                ta.style.height = ta.scrollHeight + "px";
                            }
                        }
                    });
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("textarea[data-article-guidance]").forEach(function (ta) {
                    var autoSize = function () {
                        ta.style.height = "auto";
                        ta.style.height = ta.scrollHeight + "px";
                    };
                    ta.addEventListener("input", autoSize);
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbAiImproveGuidance").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function () {
                        var artKey = btn.getAttribute("data-ai-article") || "";
                        var textarea = body.querySelector('textarea[data-article-guidance="' + artKey + '"]');
                        var suggestionBox = body.querySelector('[data-ai-suggestion-article="' + artKey + '"]');
                        if (!textarea || !suggestionBox) return;
                        var currentText = (textarea.value || "").trim();
                        if (!currentText) {
                            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Enter guidance text first");
                            return;
                        }
                        btn.disabled = true;
                        btn.innerHTML = "✨ IMPROVING...";
                        btn.style.opacity = "0.6";
                        suggestionBox.style.display = "none";
                        var articleClauses = clauses.filter(function (c) {
                            return normalizeArticleKey(c.articleId) === normalizeArticleKey(artKey);
                        });
                        var clauseContext = articleClauses
                            .map(function (c) {
                                return (c.id || "") + ": " + (c.text || "").substring(0, 200);
                            })
                            .join("\n");
                        var prompt =
                            "You are a legal playbook expert. Improve the following article-level guidance for a contract review playbook. " +
                            'The article is: "' +
                            artKey +
                            '". ' +
                            (clauseContext ? "It contains these clauses:\n" + clauseContext + "\n\n" : "") +
                            'Current guidance:\n"' +
                            currentText +
                            '"\n\n' +
                            "Rewrite as concise bullet points using '- ' prefix. Each bullet should be one clear, direct statement about the company's expected position or the key risk if the clause deviates. " +
                            "Do NOT use numbered lists, checklists, headers, sub-bullets, or markdown bold/italic. " +
                            "Keep each bullet to one sentence. Output ONLY the improved guidance text, nothing else.";
                        validateApiAndGetText(true)
                            .then(function () {
                                return callGemini(API_KEY, prompt);
                            })
                            .then(function (res) {
                                btn.disabled = false;
                                btn.innerHTML = "✨ AI IMPROVE";
                                btn.style.opacity = "1";
                                var improved = (res || "").replace(/^"|"$/g, "").trim();
                                if (!improved) {
                                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("No suggestion returned");
                                    return;
                                }
                                suggestionBox.style.display = "block";
                                var formatted = improved.replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/>/g, "&gt;");
                                formatted = formatted.replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong style="color:#312e81;">$1</strong>');
                                formatted = formatted.replace(
                                    /^#{1,3}\s+(.+)$/gm,
                                    '<div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#312e81; margin:8px 0 4px;">$1</div>',
                                );
                                formatted = formatted.replace(
                                    /^[-•]\s+(.+)$/gm,
                                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; margin:2px 0; padding-left:4px;"><span style="color:#6366f1; font-weight:700;">•</span><span>$1</span></div>',
                                );
                                formatted = formatted.replace(
                                    /^(\d+)\.\s+(.+)$/gm,
                                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; margin:2px 0; padding-left:4px;"><span style="color:#6366f1; font-weight:700; min-width:14px;">$1.</span><span>$2</span></div>',
                                );
                                formatted = formatted.replace(/\n{2,}/g, '<div style="margin-top:8px;"></div>');
                                formatted = formatted.replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
                                suggestionBox.innerHTML =
                                    '<div style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#4338ca; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px; margin-bottom:6px; padding-bottom:4px; border-bottom:1px solid #c7d2fe;">AI Suggestion</div>' +
                                    '<div style="font-size:13px; color:#1e1b4b; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:10px; padding:8px 10px; background:#ede9fe; border-left:3px solid #6366f1;">' +
                                    formatted +
                                    "</div>" +
                                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px;">' +
                                    '<button class="pbAcceptSuggestion" style="flex:1; padding:6px 8px; font-size:9px; font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a); color:#fff; border:1px solid #16a34a; border-radius:0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.3px;">ACCEPT</button>' +
                                    '<button class="pbDismissSuggestion" style="flex:1; padding:6px 8px; font-size:9px; font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f5f9,#e2e8f0); color:#475569; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.3px;">DISMISS</button></div>';
                                suggestionBox.querySelector(".pbAcceptSuggestion").onclick = function () {
                                    textarea.value = improved;
                                    articleGuidance[artKey] = improved;
                                    suggestionBox.style.display = "none";
                                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Guidance updated");
                                };
                                suggestionBox.querySelector(".pbDismissSuggestion").onclick = function () {
                                    suggestionBox.style.display = "none";
                                };
                            })
                            .catch(function (e) {
                                btn.disabled = false;
                                btn.innerHTML = "✨ AI IMPROVE";
                                btn.style.opacity = "1";
                                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("AI Improve failed");
                            });
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("details[data-pb-clause-idx]").forEach(function (det) {
                    var arrow = det.querySelector(".pbClauseArrow");
                    var sync = function () {
                        if (arrow) arrow.innerHTML = det.open ? "&#9660;" : "&#9654;";
                    };
                    sync();
                    det.addEventListener("toggle", sync);
                });
                var expandBtn = body.querySelector("#pbExpandAll");
                var collapseBtn = body.querySelector("#pbCollapseAll");
                if (expandBtn)
                    expandBtn.onclick = function () {
                        body.querySelectorAll("details").forEach(function (d) {
                            d.open = true;
                            d.dispatchEvent(new Event("toggle"));
                        });
                    };
                if (collapseBtn)
                    collapseBtn.onclick = function () {
                        body.querySelectorAll("details").forEach(function (d) {
                            d.open = false;
                            d.dispatchEvent(new Event("toggle"));
                        });
                    };
                var addClauseBtn = body.querySelector("#pbAddClause");
                if (addClauseBtn)
                    addClauseBtn.onclick = function () {
                        collectEdits();
                        clauses.push({
                            id: "clause-" + (clauses.length + 1),
                            title: "",
                            text: "",
                            articleId: "",
                            sectionId: "",
                            sectionSubClause: "",
                            guidanceComment: "",
                            fallbacks: [],
                            lockClause: false,
                            lockComment: "",
                        });
                        renderEditor();
                    };
                var addArticleBtn = body.querySelector("#pbAddArticle");
                if (addArticleBtn)
                    addArticleBtn.onclick = function () {
                        collectEdits();
                        // window.prompt() is suppressed in Office Add-in iframes; use an inline input dialog.
                        var overlay = showEliDialog({
                            variant: "info",
                            icon: "📝",
                            title: "Add Article",
                            body: "Enter the new article name:",
                            extraHtml:
                                '<input id="pbNewArticleInput" type="text" autocomplete="off" placeholder="e.g. Confidentiality" ' +
                                'style="width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; margin-top:10px; padding:8px 10px; ' +
                                'border:1px solid #b0bec5; border-radius:4px; font-size:13px;" />' +
                                '<div id="pbNewArticleErr" style="color:#c62828; font-size:11px; min-height:14px; margin-top:6px;"></div>',
                            buttons: [
                                {
                                    id: "btnNewArticleCancel",
                                    label: "Cancel",
                                    cls: "btn-secondary",
                                    style: "flex:1; margin-right:6px;",
                                    onclick: function () {
                                        overlay.remove();
                                    },
                                },
                                {
                                    id: "btnNewArticleAdd",
                                    label: "Add",
                                    style: "flex:1; margin-left:6px; font-weight:bold;",
                                    onclick: function () {
                                        var input = document.getElementById("pbNewArticleInput");
                                        var errEl = document.getElementById("pbNewArticleErr");
                                        var newName = (input && input.value ? input.value : "").trim();
                                        if (!newName) {
                                            if (errEl) errEl.innerText = "Please enter a name.";
                                            if (input) input.focus();
                                            return;
                                        }
                                        var normNew = normalizeArticleKey(newName);
                                        var existingMatch = Object.keys(articleGuidance).find(function (k) {
                                            return normalizeArticleKey(k) === normNew;
                                        });
                                        if (existingMatch) {
                                            if (errEl)
                                                errEl.innerText =
                                                    'Article "' + existingMatch + '" already exists (matches "' + newName + '").';
                                            if (input) input.focus();
                                            return;
                                        }
                                        articleGuidance[newName] = "";
                                        overlay.remove();
                                        renderEditor();
                                    },
                                },
                            ],
                        });
                        var inputEl = document.getElementById("pbNewArticleInput");
                        if (inputEl) {
                            setTimeout(function () {
                                inputEl.focus();
                            }, 50);
                            inputEl.onkeydown = function (e) {
                                if (e.key === "Enter") {
                                    e.preventDefault();
                                    var addBtn = document.getElementById("btnNewArticleAdd");
                                    if (addBtn) addBtn.click();
                                } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
                                    e.preventDefault();
                                    overlay.remove();
                                }
                            };
                        }
                    };
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbAddClauseToArt").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function () {
                        var artKey = btn.getAttribute("data-article") || "";
                        collectEdits();
                        clauses.push({
                            id: "clause-" + (clauses.length + 1),
                            title: "",
                            text: "",
                            articleId: artKey === "(Ungrouped)" ? "" : artKey,
                            sectionId: "",
                            sectionSubClause: "",
                            guidanceComment: "",
                            fallbacks: [],
                            lockClause: false,
                            lockComment: "",
                        });
                        renderEditor();
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbDeleteClause").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var ci = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                        collectEdits();
                        clauses.splice(ci, 1);
                        renderEditor();
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbDeleteArticle").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var artKey = btn.getAttribute("data-del-article");
                        if (!artKey) return;
                        collectEdits();
                        var artClauses = clauses.filter(function (c) {
                            return (c.articleId || "").trim() === artKey;
                        });
                        var doDelete = function () {
                            clauses = clauses.filter(function (c) {
                                return (c.articleId || "").trim() !== artKey;
                            });
                            delete articleGuidance[artKey];
                            var normKey = normalizeArticleKey(artKey);
                            Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                                if (normalizeArticleKey(k) === normKey) delete articleGuidance[k];
                            });
                            var usedIds = {};
                            clauses.forEach(function (c) {
                                if (c.articleId) usedIds[c.articleId] = true;
                            });
                            Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                                if (!usedIds[k]) delete articleGuidance[k];
                            });
                            var data = {
                                playbookClauses: clauses,
                                clauseMapping: { libraryName: libraryName, clauses: clauses, articleGuidance: articleGuidance },
                                uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                            };
                            window._savePlaybookForType(editingType, data).then(function () {
                                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast('Deleted article "' + artKey + '" and saved');
                            });
                            renderEditor();
                        };
                        if (artClauses.length > 0) {
                            btn.innerHTML = "CONFIRM? (" + artClauses.length + " clauses will be removed)";
                            btn.style.cssText +=
                                "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dc2626,#b91c1c); color:#fff; border-color:#991b1b; min-width:200px; padding:2px 8px;";
                            btn.onclick = function (e2) {
                                e2.stopPropagation();
                                doDelete();
                            };
                            return;
                        }
                        doDelete();
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbCopyPrevArticle").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var ci = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                        if (isNaN(ci) || ci < 1 || !clauses[ci - 1]) return;
                        collectEdits();
                        var prevVal = (clauses[ci - 1].articleId || "").trim();
                        if (!prevVal) {
                            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Previous clause has no article");
                            return;
                        }
                        var inp = body.querySelector('input[data-clause-field="articleId"][data-ci="' + ci + '"]');
                        if (inp) inp.value = prevVal;
                        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Copied article: " + prevVal);
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbCopyPrevSection").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var ci = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                        if (isNaN(ci) || ci < 1 || !clauses[ci - 1]) return;
                        collectEdits();
                        var prevVal = (clauses[ci - 1].sectionId || "").trim();
                        if (!prevVal) {
                            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Previous clause has no section");
                            return;
                        }
                        var inp = body.querySelector('input[data-clause-field="sectionId"][data-ci="' + ci + '"]');
                        if (inp) inp.value = prevVal;
                        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Copied section: " + prevVal);
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbCopyArticle").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function (e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var artKey = btn.getAttribute("data-copy-article");
                        if (!artKey) return;
                        collectEdits();
                        var artClauses = [];
                        clauses.forEach(function (c) {
                            if ((c.articleId || "").trim() === artKey) artClauses.push(c);
                        });
                        var newArtKey = artKey + " (Copy)";
                        var copies = artClauses.map(function (c) {
                            var copy = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(c));
                            copy.articleId = newArtKey;
                            copy.id = (copy.id || "Clause") + " (Copy)";
                            return copy;
                        });
                        copies.forEach(function (c) {
                            clauses.push(c);
                        });
                        if (articleGuidance[artKey]) articleGuidance[newArtKey] = articleGuidance[artKey];
                        renderEditor();
                        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast('Article "' + artKey + '" duplicated');
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbDeleteFb").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function () {
                        var ci = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                        var fi = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-fi"), 10);
                        collectEdits();
                        if (clauses[ci] && Array.isArray(clauses[ci].fallbacks)) clauses[ci].fallbacks.splice(fi, 1);
                        renderEditor();
                    };
                });
                body.querySelectorAll(".pbAddFb").forEach(function (btn) {
                    btn.onclick = function () {
                        var ci = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                        collectEdits();
                        if (clauses[ci]) {
                            if (!Array.isArray(clauses[ci].fallbacks)) clauses[ci].fallbacks = [];
                            clauses[ci].fallbacks.push({ level: "", text: "", color: "" });
                        }
                        renderEditor();
                        var det = body.querySelector('details[data-pb-clause-idx="' + ci + '"]');
                        if (det) {
                            det.open = true;
                            var parent = det.closest("details[data-pb-article]");
                            if (parent) parent.open = true;
                        }
                    };
                });
            }
            function collectEdits() {
                body.querySelectorAll("[data-clause-field]").forEach(function (inp) {
                    var ci = parseInt(inp.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                    var field = inp.getAttribute("data-clause-field");
                    if (isNaN(ci) || !field || !clauses[ci]) return;
                    if (field === "lockClause") {
                        clauses[ci][field] = !!inp.checked;
                    } else {
                        clauses[ci][field] = (inp.value || inp.innerText || "").toString();
                    }
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("[data-fb-field]").forEach(function (inp) {
                    var ci = parseInt(inp.getAttribute("data-ci"), 10);
                    var fi = parseInt(inp.getAttribute("data-fi"), 10);
                    var field = inp.getAttribute("data-fb-field");
                    if (isNaN(ci) || isNaN(fi) || !field || !clauses[ci] || !clauses[ci].fallbacks || !clauses[ci].fallbacks[fi])
                        return;
                    clauses[ci].fallbacks[fi][field] = (inp.value || inp.innerText || "").toString();
                });
                body.querySelectorAll("[data-article-guidance]").forEach(function (inp) {
                    var artKey = inp.getAttribute("data-article-guidance");
                    if (!artKey) return;
                    var val = (inp.value || "").toString();
                    articleGuidance[artKey] = val;
                    var normKey = normalizeArticleKey(artKey);
                    Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                        if (k !== artKey && normalizeArticleKey(k) === normKey) {
                            if (!articleGuidance[k] || articleGuidance[k] === val) delete articleGuidance[k];
                        }
                    });
                });
            }
            var footer = document.createElement("div");
            footer.style.cssText =
                "padding:12px 16px; border-top:1px solid #ddd; background:#fafafa; display:flex; gap:6px; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box;";
            var btnSave = document.createElement("button");
            btnSave.innerHTML = "SAVE";
            btnSave.style.cssText =
                "flex:1; min-width:0; padding:10px 4px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.4px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; " +
                "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#15803d); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #15803d; border-radius:0; " +
                "font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(22,163,74,0.25);";
            btnSave.onclick = function () {
                collectEdits();
                var canonMap = {};
                clauses.forEach(function (c) {
                    var raw = (c.articleId || "").trim();
                    if (!raw) return;
                    var norm = normalizeArticleKey(raw);
                    if (!canonMap[norm]) canonMap[norm] = raw;
                    c.articleId = canonMap[norm];
                });
                var usedArticleIds = {};
                clauses.forEach(function (c) {
                    if (c.articleId) usedArticleIds[c.articleId] = true;
                });
                var cleanGuidance = {};
                Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                    if (!usedArticleIds[k]) return;
                    var norm = normalizeArticleKey(k);
                    var canon = canonMap[norm] || k;
                    if (!cleanGuidance[canon]) {
                        cleanGuidance[canon] = articleGuidance[k];
                    } else if (!cleanGuidance[canon] && articleGuidance[k]) {
                        cleanGuidance[canon] = articleGuidance[k];
                    }
                });
                articleGuidance = cleanGuidance;
                var data = {
                    playbookClauses: clauses,
                    clauseMapping: { libraryName: libraryName, clauses: clauses, articleGuidance: articleGuidance },
                    uploadedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                };
                window._savePlaybookForType(editingType, data).then(function () {
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses(clauses);
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping({
                            libraryName: libraryName,
                            clauses: clauses,
                            articleGuidance: articleGuidance,
                        });
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Playbook saved for " + editingType);
                });
            };
            footer.appendChild(btnSave);
            var btnExport = document.createElement("button");
            btnExport.innerHTML = "COPY JSON";
            btnExport.style.cssText =
                "flex:1; min-width:0; padding:10px 4px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.4px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; " +
                "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#4f46e5); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #4f46e5; border-radius:0; " +
                "font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;";
            btnExport.onclick = function () {
                collectEdits();
                var exportObj = { libraryName: libraryName, clauses: clauses, articleGuidance: articleGuidance };
                var jsonStr = JSON.stringify(exportObj, null, 2);
                var ta = document.createElement("textarea");
                ta.value = jsonStr;
                ta.style.cssText = "position:fixed; left:-9999px; top:-9999px;";
                document.body.appendChild(ta);
                ta.select();
                try {
                    document.execCommand("copy");
                } catch (e) { }
                ta.remove();
                if (typeof showToast === "function")
                    showToast("Playbook JSON copied to clipboard — paste into a .json file to save");
            };
            footer.appendChild(btnExport);
            var btnBack = document.createElement("button");
            btnBack.className = "btn-secondary";
            btnBack.style.cssText = "flex:1; min-width:0; font-size:10px;";
            btnBack.innerHTML = "← BACK";
            btnBack.onclick = function () {
                if (typeof window.showTrackChangesSettingsPopup === "function") window.showTrackChangesSettingsPopup();
            };
            footer.appendChild(btnBack);
            card.appendChild(footer);
            out.appendChild(card);
            renderEditor();
        });
    };

    (function () {
        var _TPSET_IDB_ID = "eli_trackport_settings";
        var _tpSettingsCache = null;
        var _defaultTpSettings = function () {
            return {
                playbookClauses: [],
                clauseMapping: { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} },
                autoRunAi: false,
                disableAiOnAnalyze: false,
            };
        };
        function _persistTpSettingsToIDB(data) {
            try {
                initFeatureDB().then(function (db) {
                    var tx = db.transaction(STORE_STATS, "readwrite");
                    tx.objectStore(STORE_STATS).put(Object.assign({}, data, { stat_id: _TPSET_IDB_ID }));
                });
            } catch (e) { }
        }
        function loadTrackPortSettings() {
            if (_tpSettingsCache) return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_tpSettingsCache));
            return _defaultTpSettings();
        }
        function saveTrackPortSettings(settings) {
            var data = settings || _defaultTpSettings();
            _tpSettingsCache = data;
            _persistTpSettingsToIDB(data);
        }
        function _initTpSettingsCache() {
            initFeatureDB()
                .then(function (db) {
                    return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                        var tx = db.transaction(STORE_STATS, "readonly");
                        var req = tx.objectStore(STORE_STATS).get(_TPSET_IDB_ID);
                        req.onsuccess = function () {
                            var r = req.result;
                            if (r) {
                                delete r.stat_id;
                                _tpSettingsCache = r;
                            }
                            resolve();
                        };
                        req.onerror = function () {
                            resolve();
                        };
                    });
                })
                .catch(function () { });
        }
        _initTpSettingsCache();
        var TRACK_PORT_SESSION_DB_NAME = "eli-track-port-sessions";
        var TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE = "sessions";
        var TRACK_PORT_SESSION_POINTER_KEY = "eli_track_port_last_session_id_v1";
        var trackPortPersistTimer = null;
        function openTrackPortSessionDb() {
            return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                if (typeof indexedDB === "undefined" || !indexedDB) {
                    reject(new Error("IndexedDB unavailable"));
                    return;
                }
                var req = indexedDB.open(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_DB_NAME, 1);
                req.onupgradeneeded = function (evt) {
                    var db = evt && evt.target ? evt.target.result : null;
                    if (!db) return;
                    if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE)) {
                        db.createObjectStore(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE, { keyPath: "id" });
                    }
                };
                req.onsuccess = function () {
                    resolve(req.result);
                };
                req.onerror = function () {
                    reject(req.error || new Error("Failed to open IndexedDB"));
                };
            });
        }
        function saveTrackPortSessionPointer(sessionId) {
            return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                try {
                    if (
                        typeof Office === "undefined" ||
                        !Office ||
                        !Office.context ||
                        !Office.context.document ||
                        !Office.context.document.settings
                    ) {
                        resolve();
                        return;
                    }
                    Office.context.document.settings.set(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_POINTER_KEY, sessionId || "");
                    Office.context.document.settings.saveAsync(function () {
                        resolve();
                    });
                } catch (_e) {
                    resolve();
                }
            });
        }
        function getTrackPortSessionPointer() {
            try {
                if (
                    typeof Office === "undefined" ||
                    !Office ||
                    !Office.context ||
                    !Office.context.document ||
                    !Office.context.document.settings
                ) {
                    return "";
                }
                return String(Office.context.document.settings.get(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_POINTER_KEY) || "");
            } catch (_e) {
                return "";
            }
        }
        window.clearTrackPortSessionPointer = function clearTrackPortSessionPointer() {
            return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                try {
                    if (
                        typeof Office === "undefined" ||
                        !Office ||
                        !Office.context ||
                        !Office.context.document ||
                        !Office.context.document.settings
                    ) {
                        resolve();
                        return;
                    }
                    Office.context.document.settings.set(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_POINTER_KEY, "");
                    Office.context.document.settings.saveAsync(function () {
                        resolve();
                    });
                } catch (_e) {
                    resolve();
                }
            });
        }
        window.deletePersistedTrackPortSessionById = async function deletePersistedTrackPortSessionById(sessionId) {
            var id = normalizePortWhitespace(sessionId || "");
            if (!id) return;
            try {
                var db = await openTrackPortSessionDb();
                await new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                    var tx = db.transaction(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE, "readwrite");
                    var store = tx.objectStore(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE);
                    store.delete(id);
                    tx.oncomplete = function () {
                        resolve();
                    };
                    tx.onerror = function () {
                        reject(tx.error || new Error("Failed to delete persisted track-port session"));
                    };
                });
                try {
                    db.close();
                } catch (_closeErr) { }
            } catch (_e) { }
        }
        window.promptTrackPortRestoreDecision = function promptTrackPortRestoreDecision() {
            return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                var existing = document.getElementById("track-port-restore-choice-overlay");
                if (existing) existing.remove();
                var overlay = document.createElement("div");
                overlay.id = "track-port-restore-choice-overlay";
                overlay.style.cssText =
                    "position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:2147483606; background:radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, rgba(30,64,175,0.18), rgba(2,6,23,0.72)); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;";
                var card = document.createElement("div");
                card.style.cssText =
                    "width:min(440px,92vw); background:#ffffff; border-radius:0; overflow:hidden; " +
                    "border:1px solid #bfdbfe; box-shadow:0 24px 48px rgba(15,23,42,0.22), 0 4px 12px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); " +
                    "font-family:Inter,'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;";
                card.innerHTML =
                    '<div style="padding:24px 24px 16px; text-align:center; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff 0%,#dbeafe 100%);">' +
                    '<div style="margin-bottom:10px;">' +
                    '<svg width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">' +
                    '<path d="M3 12a9 9 0 109-9"/><polyline points="3 3 3 12 9 12"/></svg></div>' +
                    '<div style="font-size:16px; font-weight:800; color:#1e3a8a; letter-spacing:0.3px;">Previous Session Found</div>' +
                    '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#3b82f6; margin-top:4px; font-weight:500;">Review Redline</div>' +
                    "</div>" +
                    '<div style="padding:16px 24px; font-size:13px; color:#334155; line-height:1.55; text-align:center;">' +
                    "A saved session exists for this document with your previous review progress. Would you like to pick up where you left off?" +
                    "</div>" +
                    '<div style="padding:4px 24px 20px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px;">' +
                    '<button id="track-port-restore-continue" style="width:100%; padding:12px 16px; font-size:13px; font-weight:800; ' +
                    "letter-spacing:0.3px; border:none; border-radius:0; cursor:pointer; " +
                    "color:#fff; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb 0%,#1d4ed8 100%); " +
                    "box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(37,99,235,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15); " +
                    "font-family:Inter,'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif; " +
                    'display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; transition:all 0.15s ease;">' +
                    '<svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">' +
                    '<path d="M3 12a9 9 0 109-9"/><polyline points="3 3 3 12 9 12"/></svg>' +
                    "Restore Past Session</button>" +
                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:8px;">' +
                    '<button id="track-port-restore-fresh" style="flex:1; padding:9px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; ' +
                    "letter-spacing:0.2px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; cursor:pointer; " +
                    "color:#475569; background:#f8fafc; " +
                    "font-family:Inter,'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif; transition:all 0.15s ease;\">Start Fresh</button>" +
                    '<button id="track-port-restore-cancel" style="flex:1; padding:9px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; ' +
                    "letter-spacing:0.2px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; cursor:pointer; " +
                    "color:#94a3b8; background:transparent; " +
                    "font-family:Inter,'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif; transition:all 0.15s ease;\">Cancel</button>" +
                    "</div></div>";
                overlay.appendChild(card);
                document.body.appendChild(overlay);
                var finish = function (choice) {
                    if (overlay && overlay.parentNode) overlay.remove();
                    resolve(choice || "cancel");
                };
                var restoreBtn = card.querySelector("#track-port-restore-continue");
                var freshBtn = card.querySelector("#track-port-restore-fresh");
                var cancelBtn = card.querySelector("#track-port-restore-cancel");
                if (restoreBtn)
                    restoreBtn.onclick = function () {
                        finish("restore");
                    };
                if (freshBtn)
                    freshBtn.onclick = function () {
                        finish("fresh");
                    };
                if (cancelBtn)
                    cancelBtn.onclick = function () {
                        finish("cancel");
                    };
                overlay.onclick = function (evt) {
                    if (evt.target === overlay) finish("cancel");
                };
            });
        }
        var TRACK_PORT_SESSION_LRU_LIMIT = 15;
        function pruneTrackPortSessions(keepCount, protectedId) {
            var keep = typeof keepCount === "number" && keepCount > 0 ? keepCount : TRACK_PORT_SESSION_LRU_LIMIT;
            var safeId = normalizePortWhitespace(protectedId || "");
            return openTrackPortSessionDb()
                .then(function (db) {
                    return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                        var rows = [];
                        try {
                            var tx = db.transaction(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE, "readonly");
                            var store = tx.objectStore(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE);
                            var cReq = store.openCursor();
                            cReq.onsuccess = function (evt) {
                                var cursor = evt.target.result;
                                if (cursor) {
                                    var rec = cursor.value || {};
                                    rows.push({
                                        id: rec.id || cursor.primaryKey,
                                        savedAt: rec.savedAt || "",
                                    });
                                    cursor.continue();
                                }
                            };
                            tx.oncomplete = function () {
                                resolve(rows);
                            };
                            tx.onerror = function () {
                                resolve(rows);
                            };
                        } catch (_e) {
                            resolve(rows);
                        }
                    }).then(function (allRows) {
                        if (!allRows.length || allRows.length <= keep) return null;
                        allRows.sort(function (a, b) {
                            if (a.savedAt < b.savedAt) return 1;
                            if (a.savedAt > b.savedAt) return -1;
                            return 0;
                        });
                        var toDelete = allRows.slice(keep).filter(function (r) {
                            return r.id && r.id !== safeId;
                        });
                        if (!toDelete.length) return null;
                        return new Promise(function (resolve) {
                            try {
                                var tx = db.transaction(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE, "readwrite");
                                var store = tx.objectStore(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE);
                                toDelete.forEach(function (r) {
                                    try {
                                        store.delete(r.id);
                                    } catch (_delErr) { }
                                });
                                tx.oncomplete = function () {
                                    resolve(toDelete.length);
                                };
                                tx.onerror = function () {
                                    resolve(0);
                                };
                            } catch (_e) {
                                resolve(0);
                            }
                        });
                    }).finally(function () {
                        try {
                            db.close();
                        } catch (_closeErr) { }
                    });
                })
                .catch(function () {
                    return null;
                });
        }
        function queuePersistTrackPortSession(session) {
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) || session.rawChanges.length === 0) return;
            var snapshot = null;
            try {
                snapshot = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(session));
            } catch (_cloneErr) {
                snapshot = null;
            }
            if (!snapshot) return;
            snapshot._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = false;
            snapshot._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = false;
            snapshot.trackPortViewMode = trackPortViewMode === "sections" ? "sections" : "articles";
            var sessionId =
                normalizePortWhitespace(snapshot.persistedSessionId || snapshot.captureId || "") ||
                "track-port-" + String(Date.now()) + "-" + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
            snapshot.persistedSessionId = sessionId;
            session.persistedSessionId = sessionId;
            if (trackPortPersistTimer) clearTimeout(trackPortPersistTimer);
            trackPortPersistTimer = setTimeout(function () {
                openTrackPortSessionDb()
                    .then(function (db) {
                        return new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                            var tx = db.transaction(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE, "readwrite");
                            var store = tx.objectStore(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE);
                            store.put({
                                id: sessionId,
                                savedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                                session: snapshot,
                            });
                            tx.oncomplete = function () {
                                resolve();
                            };
                            tx.onerror = function () {
                                reject(tx.error || new Error("Failed to persist track-port session"));
                            };
                        })
                            .then(function () {
                                return saveTrackPortSessionPointer(sessionId);
                            })
                            .finally(function () {
                                try {
                                    db.close();
                                } catch (_closeErr) { }
                            });
                    })
                    .then(function () {
                        return pruneTrackPortSessions(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_LRU_LIMIT, sessionId);
                    })
                    .catch(function (e) { });
            }, 450);
        }
        window.loadPersistedTrackPortSession = async function loadPersistedTrackPortSession() {
            var sessionId = getTrackPortSessionPointer();
            if (!sessionId) return null;
            try {
                var db = await openTrackPortSessionDb();
                var record = await new Promise(function (resolve, reject) {
                    var tx = db.transaction(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE, "readonly");
                    var store = tx.objectStore(TRACK_PORT_SESSION_STORE);
                    var req = store.get(sessionId);
                    req.onsuccess = function () {
                        resolve(req.result || null);
                    };
                    req.onerror = function () {
                        reject(req.error || new Error("Failed to load track-port session"));
                    };
                });
                try {
                    db.close();
                } catch (_closeErr) { }
                var restored = record && record.session ? record.session : null;
                if (!restored || !Array.isArray(restored.rawChanges)) return null;
                restored._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = false;
                restored._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = false;
                restored.persistedSessionId = sessionId;
