                        var results = context.document.body.search(term, {
                            matchCase: false,
                            matchWholeWord: false,
                            ignorePunct: true,
                            ignoreSpace: true,
                        });
                        results.load("items");
                        await context.sync();
                        if (results.items.length > 0) {
                            results.items[0].select();
                            await context.sync();
                            found = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (!found) {
                    var bestIndex = -1;
                    var bestScore = 0;
                    var targetText = item.locateText || item.plainText || item.text || "";
                    liveParagraphs.items.forEach(function (paragraph, paragraphIndex) {
                        var score = calculatePortMatchScore(targetText, paragraph.text || "");
                        if (score > bestScore) {
                            bestScore = score;
                            bestIndex = paragraphIndex;
                        }
                    });
                    if (bestIndex >= 0) {
                        var target = liveParagraphs.items[bestIndex].getRange();
                        target.select();
                        await context.sync();
                        found = true;
                    }
                }
            })
                .then(function () {
                    if (!found) return;
                    var latest =
                        window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                            ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                            : activeSession;
                    if (!latest) return;
                    latest.clauseLocateState = latest.clauseLocateState || {};
                    latest.clauseLocateState[String(index)] = true;
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(latest);
                    }
                })
                .catch(function (e) {
                    if (ELI_DEBUG) console.error("Port locate row failed:", e);
                });
        }
        window.locateTrackPortArticle = function (articleKey) {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            var groupedAi = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : null;
            if (!groupedAi || !groupedAi[articleKey]) return;
            var group = groupedAi[articleKey];
            var decodedLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(group && group.article ? group.article : "");
            var articleLabel = decodedLabel === "Unassigned Article" ? "" : decodedLabel;
            window.setTrackPortStatus(
                articleLabel
                    ? "Locating article header: " + articleLabel + "..."
                    : "Locating article from first mapped clause...",
            );
            var firstRevisionIndex = getPortFirstRevisionIndexForArticle(groupedAi, articleKey);
            var foundHeader = false;
            var tryHeaderLocate = Promise.resolve();
            if (articleLabel) {
                tryHeaderLocate = Word.run(async function (context) {
                    var normalizedLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(articleLabel);
                    var labelUpper = normalizedLabel.toUpperCase();
                    var labelTokens = labelUpper.split(" ").filter(Boolean);
                    var paragraphs = context.document.body.paragraphs;
                    paragraphs.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    paragraphs.items.forEach(function (p) {
                        p.load("text");
                    });
                    await context.sync();
                    var bestHeader = null;
                    var bestScore = 0;
                    paragraphs.items.forEach(function (paragraph) {
                        var text = normalizePortWhitespace(paragraph.text || "");
                        if (!text) return;
                        var textUpper = text.toUpperCase();
                        var alphaOnly = text.replace(/[^A-Za-z]/g, "");
                        var isAllCaps = alphaOnly.length > 0 && alphaOnly === alphaOnly.toUpperCase();
                        var looksHeadingLength = text.length <= 220;
                        if (!isAllCaps || !looksHeadingLength) return;
                        var tokenHits = 0;
                        labelTokens.forEach(function (token) {
                            if (token.length >= 3 && textUpper.indexOf(token) >= 0) tokenHits += 1;
                        });
                        var tokenScore = labelTokens.length ? tokenHits / labelTokens.length : 0;
                        var similarity = calculatePortMatchScore(labelUpper, textUpper);
                        var score = Math.max(tokenScore, similarity);
                        if ((tokenScore >= 0.5 || similarity >= 0.35) && score > bestScore) {
                            bestScore = score;
                            bestHeader = paragraph.getRange();
                        }
                    });
                    if (bestHeader) {
                        bestHeader.select();
                        await context.sync();
                        foundHeader = true;
                        return;
                    }
                }).catch(function (e) {
                    foundHeader = false;
                });
            }
            return tryHeaderLocate.then(async function () {
                if (!foundHeader && firstRevisionIndex > 0) {
                    var selected = await locatePortFullParagraphFromRevisionIndex(firstRevisionIndex, session);
                    if (!selected && typeof window.locateTrackedChange === "function") {
                        await window.locateTrackedChange(firstRevisionIndex - 1);
                    }
                    window.setTrackPortStatus(
                        "Located first revised paragraph for article" + (articleLabel ? ": " + articleLabel : "."),
                    );
                } else if (foundHeader) {
                    window.setTrackPortStatus(
                        "Located article header in live document" + (articleLabel ? ": " + articleLabel : "."),
                    );
                }
            });
        };
        window.locateTrackPortSection = function (articleKey, sectionKey) {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            var groupedAi = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : null;
            if (
                !groupedAi ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey] ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey].sections ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey].sections[sectionKey]
            )
                return;
            var articleGroup = groupedAi[articleKey] || {};
            var articleName = normalizePortWhitespace(articleGroup.article || "");
            if (/^\s*(preamble|recitals?)\s*$/i.test(articleName)) {
                return window.locateTrackPortArticle(articleKey);
            }
            var sectionGroup = groupedAi[articleKey].sections[sectionKey] || { section: "", clauses: [] };
            var sectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(sectionGroup.section || "").replace(/\s*\u00B6\d+$/, "");
            var sectionClauses = sectionGroup.clauses || [];
            var firstClause = sectionClauses.length > 0 ? sectionClauses[0] : null;
            var subSectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(
                (firstClause && (firstClause.subSection || firstClause.sectionSubClause || firstClause.subClause)) || "",
            );
            var isSplitSection = /::p\d+$/.test(sectionKey);
            var locateLabel = isSplitSection ? "" : (subSectionName || sectionName);
            var statusLabel = isSplitSection ? normalizePortWhitespace(sectionGroup.section || "") : (subSectionName || sectionName || "(No Section)");
            window.setTrackPortStatus("Locating section: " + statusLabel + "...");
            var firstRevisionIndex = getPortFirstRevisionIndexForSection(groupedAi, articleKey, sectionKey);
            var found = false;
            var rawChanges = session && session.rawChanges ? session.rawChanges : [];
            var firstRowIdx = firstClause ? Math.max(0, Number(firstClause.revisionIndex || 1) - 1) : -1;
            var firstRow = firstRowIdx >= 0 ? rawChanges[firstRowIdx] || {} : {};
            var trySectionLocate = Word.run(async function (context) {
                var liveParagraphs = context.document.body.paragraphs;
                liveParagraphs.load("items");
                await context.sync();
                liveParagraphs.items.forEach(function (p) {
                    p.load("text");
                });
                await context.sync();
                // --- NEW: Prioritize finding actual clause content in multi-paragraph sections ---
                var bestIdx = -1;
                var bestScore = 0;
                var allCandidates = [];
                for (var c = 0; c < sectionClauses.length; c++) {
                    var cIdx = Math.max(0, Number(sectionClauses[c].revisionIndex || 1) - 1);
                    var cRow = rawChanges[cIdx] || {};
                    var cLocateText = cRow.locateText || cRow.plainText || "";
                    if (!cLocateText || cLocateText.length < 5) continue;

                    var sourceIdxForScoring = typeof cRow.sourceParagraphIndex === "number" ? cRow.sourceParagraphIndex : -1;
                    liveParagraphs.items.forEach(function (paragraph, pIdx) {
                        var similarityScore = calculatePortMatchScore(cLocateText, paragraph.text || "");
                        var proximityScore = sourceIdxForScoring >= 0 ? 1 / (1 + Math.abs(pIdx - sourceIdxForScoring)) : 0;
                        var score = similarityScore * 4 + proximityScore * 2;
                        if (similarityScore > 0.1) {
                            allCandidates.push({ paragraphIndex: pIdx, score: score });
                            if (score > bestScore) {
                                bestScore = score;
                                bestIdx = pIdx;
                            }
                        }
                    });
                    if (bestScore > 4.5) break;
                }

                if (bestIdx >= 0) {
                    allCandidates.sort(function (a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
                    var uniqueCandidates = [];
                    var seenIdx = {};
                    for (var ac = 0; ac < allCandidates.length; ac++) {
                        if (!seenIdx[allCandidates[ac].paragraphIndex]) {
                            seenIdx[allCandidates[ac].paragraphIndex] = true;
                            uniqueCandidates.push(allCandidates[ac].paragraphIndex);
                        }
                    }
                    var sectionLocateKey = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
                    var _lc = EliState.get("tp.locateCandidates") || {};
                    _lc[sectionLocateKey] = uniqueCandidates;
                    EliState.set("tp.locateCandidates", _lc);
                    var _li = EliState.get("tp.locateIndex") || {};
                    _li[sectionLocateKey] = 0;
                    EliState.set("tp.locateIndex", _li);

                    liveParagraphs.items[bestIdx].getRange().select();
                    await context.sync();
                    found = true;
                }

                if (!found && locateLabel) {
                    var terms = buildPortLocateTerms(locateLabel);
                    for (var i = 0; i < terms.length; i++) {
                        var results = context.document.body.search(terms[i], {
                            matchCase: false,
                            matchWholeWord: false,
                            ignorePunct: true,
                            ignoreSpace: true,
                        });
                        results.load("items");
                        await context.sync();
                        if (results.items.length > 0) {
                            var sourceIdxForScoring =
                                firstRow && typeof firstRow.sourceParagraphIndex === "number"
                                    ? Number(firstRow.sourceParagraphIndex)
                                    : -1;
                            var referenceTexts = getPortLocateCandidateTexts(firstRow).slice(0, 4);
                            var searchCandidates = [];
                            results.items.slice(0, 25).forEach(function (rangeItem) {
                                rangeItem.load("text");
                                var paras = rangeItem.paragraphs;
                                paras.load("items");
                                searchCandidates.push({ range: rangeItem, paragraphs: paras });
                            });
                            await context.sync();
                            searchCandidates.forEach(function (candidate) {
                                if (candidate.paragraphs.items.length > 0) {
                                    candidate.paragraphs.items[0].load("text");
                                }
                            });
                            await context.sync();
                            var rankedCandidates = [];
                            searchCandidates.forEach(function (candidate, candIdx) {
                                var paraText =
                                    candidate.paragraphs.items.length > 0
                                        ? normalizePortWhitespace(candidate.paragraphs.items[0].text || "")
                                        : normalizePortWhitespace(candidate.range.text || "");
                                var similarityScore = 0;
                                referenceTexts.forEach(function (refText) {
                                    similarityScore = Math.max(similarityScore, calculatePortMatchScore(refText, paraText));
                                });
                                var paragraphIndex = -1;
                                if (paraText) {
                                    for (var p = 0; p < liveParagraphs.items.length; p++) {
                                        var liveText = normalizePortWhitespace(liveParagraphs.items[p].text || "");
                                        if (
                                            liveText &&
                                            (liveText === paraText || liveText.indexOf(paraText) >= 0 || paraText.indexOf(liveText) >= 0)
                                        ) {
                                            paragraphIndex = p;
                                            break;
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                var proximityScore = 0;
                                if (sourceIdxForScoring >= 0 && paragraphIndex >= 0) {
                                    proximityScore = 1 / (1 + Math.abs(paragraphIndex - sourceIdxForScoring));
                                }
                                var localScore = similarityScore * 4 + proximityScore * 2;
                                rankedCandidates.push({
                                    candidate: candidate,
                                    score: localScore,
                                    paragraphIndex: paragraphIndex,
                                    candIdx: candIdx,
                                });
                            });
                            rankedCandidates.sort(function (a, b) {
                                return b.score - a.score;
                            });
                            var sectionLocateKey = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
                            var _lc = EliState.get("tp.locateCandidates") || {};
                            _lc[sectionLocateKey] = rankedCandidates
                                .map(function (rc) {
                                    return rc.paragraphIndex;
                                })
                                .filter(function (pi) {
                                    return pi >= 0;
                                });
                            EliState.set("tp.locateCandidates", _lc);
                            var _li = EliState.get("tp.locateIndex") || {};
                            _li[sectionLocateKey] = 0;
                            EliState.set("tp.locateIndex", _li);
                            var bestCandidate = rankedCandidates.length > 0 ? rankedCandidates[0].candidate : null;
                            var chosen = bestCandidate || searchCandidates[0];
                            if (chosen && chosen.paragraphs && chosen.paragraphs.items.length > 0) {
                                chosen.paragraphs.items[0].getRange().select();
                            } else if (chosen && chosen.range) {
                                chosen.range.select();
                            } else {
                                results.items[0].select();
                            }
                            await context.sync();
                            found = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                // Legacy firstRow fallback removed in favor of prioritized clause scanning above
                if (!found && locateLabel) {
                    var labelUpper = normalizePortWhitespace(locateLabel).toUpperCase();
                    var labelTokens = labelUpper.split(" ").filter(Boolean);
                    var bestHeaderIdx = -1;
                    var bestHeaderScore = 0;
                    liveParagraphs.items.forEach(function (paragraph, paragraphIdx) {
                        var text = normalizePortWhitespace(paragraph.text || "");
                        if (!text) return;
                        var textUpper = text.toUpperCase();
                        var alphaOnly = text.replace(/[^A-Za-z]/g, "");
                        var isAllCaps = alphaOnly.length > 0 && alphaOnly === alphaOnly.toUpperCase();
                        if (!isAllCaps || text.length > 220) return;
                        var tokenHits = 0;
                        labelTokens.forEach(function (token) {
                            if (token.length >= 3 && textUpper.indexOf(token) >= 0) tokenHits += 1;
                        });
                        var tokenScore = labelTokens.length ? tokenHits / labelTokens.length : 0;
                        var similarity = calculatePortMatchScore(labelUpper, textUpper);
                        var score = Math.max(tokenScore, similarity);
                        if ((tokenScore >= 0.5 || similarity >= 0.35) && score > bestHeaderScore) {
                            bestHeaderScore = score;
                            bestHeaderIdx = paragraphIdx;
                        }
                    });
                    if (bestHeaderIdx >= 0) {
                        liveParagraphs.items[bestHeaderIdx].getRange().select();
                        await context.sync();
                        found = true;
                    }
                }
                if (
                    !found &&
                    typeof firstRow.sourceParagraphIndex === "number" &&
                    firstRow.sourceParagraphIndex >= 0 &&
                    firstRow.sourceParagraphIndex < liveParagraphs.items.length
                ) {
                    var targetByIndex = liveParagraphs.items[firstRow.sourceParagraphIndex].getRange();
                    targetByIndex.select();
                    await context.sync();
                    found = true;
                }
                var fuzzyLocateKey = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
                var existingCandidates = (EliState.get("tp.locateCandidates") || {})[fuzzyLocateKey];
                if (!existingCandidates || existingCandidates.length < 2) {
                    var fuzzyRefTexts = [];
                    if (locateLabel) fuzzyRefTexts.push(normalizePortWhitespace(locateLabel));
                    var firstRowText = normalizePortWhitespace(firstRow.locateText || firstRow.plainText || firstRow.text || "");
                    if (firstRowText) fuzzyRefTexts.push(firstRowText);
                    var additionsRef = normalizePortWhitespace(firstRow.additionsText || "");
                    var deletionsRef = normalizePortWhitespace(firstRow.deletionsText || firstRow.deletedText || "");
                    if (additionsRef.length > 5) fuzzyRefTexts.push(additionsRef);
                    if (deletionsRef.length > 5) fuzzyRefTexts.push(deletionsRef);
                    if (fuzzyRefTexts.length > 0) {
                        var fuzzyScoredParas = [];
                        liveParagraphs.items.forEach(function (paragraph, pIdx) {
                            var pText = normalizePortWhitespace(paragraph.text || "");
                            if (!pText || pText.length < 3) return;
                            var bestFuzzyScore = 0;
                            fuzzyRefTexts.forEach(function (ref) {
                                var containsBonus = 0;
                                if (ref.length >= 4 && pText.toUpperCase().indexOf(ref.toUpperCase()) >= 0) containsBonus = 0.3;
                                else if (ref.length >= 4) {
                                    var refTokens = ref
                                        .toUpperCase()
                                        .split(/\s+/)
                                        .filter(function (t) {
                                            return t.length >= 3;
                                        });
                                    var hitCount = 0;
                                    refTokens.forEach(function (tok) {
                                        if (pText.toUpperCase().indexOf(tok) >= 0) hitCount++;
                                    });
                                    if (refTokens.length > 0) containsBonus = 0.2 * (hitCount / refTokens.length);
                                }
                                var sim = calculatePortMatchScore(ref, pText) + containsBonus;
                                if (sim > bestFuzzyScore) bestFuzzyScore = sim;
                            });
                            if (bestFuzzyScore > 0.15) {
                                fuzzyScoredParas.push({ paragraphIndex: pIdx, score: bestFuzzyScore });
                            }
                        });
                        fuzzyScoredParas.sort(function (a, b) {
                            return b.score - a.score;
                        });
                        var fuzzyCandidateIdxs = fuzzyScoredParas.slice(0, 15).map(function (fp) {
                            return fp.paragraphIndex;
                        });
                        if (existingCandidates && existingCandidates.length === 1) {
                            var existingIdx = existingCandidates[0];
                            fuzzyCandidateIdxs = fuzzyCandidateIdxs.filter(function (idx) {
                                return idx !== existingIdx;
                            });
                            fuzzyCandidateIdxs.unshift(existingIdx);
                        }
                        if (fuzzyCandidateIdxs.length >= 2) {
                            var _lc2 = EliState.get("tp.locateCandidates") || {};
                            _lc2[fuzzyLocateKey] = fuzzyCandidateIdxs;
                            EliState.set("tp.locateCandidates", _lc2);
                            var _li2 = EliState.get("tp.locateIndex") || {};
                            _li2[fuzzyLocateKey] = 0;
                            EliState.set("tp.locateIndex", _li2);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }).catch(function (e) {
                found = false;
            });
            return trySectionLocate.then(function () {
                var sectionLocateKeyPost = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
                var candidatesPost = (EliState.get("tp.locateCandidates") || {})[sectionLocateKeyPost];
                if (candidatesPost && candidatesPost.length >= 2) {
                    var cardDomKey = encodeURIComponent(articleKey) + "::" + encodeURIComponent(sectionKey);
                    var sectionCard = document.querySelector('[data-track-port-section-card="' + cardDomKey + '"]');
                    if (sectionCard && !sectionCard.querySelector("[data-track-port-relocate-btn]")) {
                        var stamp = sectionCard.querySelector("[data-track-port-section-stamp]");
                        var anchor = stamp ? stamp.parentNode : null;
                        if (!anchor) {
                            var flagBadge = sectionCard.querySelector("[data-track-port-flag-badge]");
                            anchor = flagBadge ? flagBadge.parentNode : null;
                        }
                        if (anchor) {
                            var relocSpan = document.createElement("span");
                            relocSpan.setAttribute("data-track-port-relocate-btn", sectionLocateKeyPost);
                            relocSpan.title = "Try next match (" + candidatesPost.length + " locations found)";
                            relocSpan.style.cssText =
                                "display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-left:5px; width:20px; height:20px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; opacity:0.5; background:transparent; border:1px solid transparent; transition:all 0.15s ease; flex-shrink:0; vertical-align:middle;";
                            relocSpan.onmouseenter = function () {
                                this.style.opacity = "1";
                                this.style.background = "#dbeafe";
                                this.style.borderColor = "#93c5fd";
                            };
                            relocSpan.onmouseleave = function () {
                                this.style.opacity = "0.5";
                                this.style.background = "transparent";
                                this.style.borderColor = "transparent";
                            };
                            relocSpan.onclick = function (e) {
                                e.stopPropagation();
                                e.preventDefault();
                                window.relocateTrackPortSection(articleKey, sectionKey);
                                return false;
                            };
                            relocSpan.innerHTML =
                                '<svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#1e40af" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/><line x1="11" y1="8" x2="11" y2="14"/><line x1="8" y1="11" x2="14" y2="11"/></svg>';
                            if (stamp) {
                                anchor.insertBefore(relocSpan, stamp);
                            } else {
                                anchor.appendChild(relocSpan);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (!found && firstRevisionIndex > 0 && typeof window.locateTrackedChange === "function") {
                    return window.locateTrackedChange(firstRevisionIndex - 1).then(function () {
                        var s1 =
                            window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                                ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                                : null;
                        if (s1) {
                            s1.sectionLocateState = s1.sectionLocateState || {};
                            s1.sectionLocateState[String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey)] = true;
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function")
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(s1);
                        }
                        window.setTrackPortStatus(
                            "Located first revised paragraph for section: " + (locateLabel || "(No Section)") + ".",
                        );
                    });
                }
                var s2 =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                        : null;
                if (s2) {
                    s2.sectionLocateState = s2.sectionLocateState || {};
                    s2.sectionLocateState[String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey)] = true;
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(s2);
                }
                window.setTrackPortStatus(
                    found
                        ? "Located section in live document: " + (locateLabel || "(No Section)") + "."
                        : "Located first revised paragraph for section: " + (locateLabel || "(No Section)") + ".",
                );
            });
        };
        window.relocateTrackPortSection = function (articleKey, sectionKey) {
            var sectionLocateKey = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
            var candidates = (EliState.get("tp.locateCandidates") || {})[sectionLocateKey];
            if (!candidates || candidates.length < 2) {
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("No alternate locations found for this section.");
                return;
            }
            var _liCycle = EliState.get("tp.locateIndex") || {};
            var currentIdx = (_liCycle[sectionLocateKey] || 0) + 1;
            if (currentIdx >= candidates.length) currentIdx = 0;
            _liCycle[sectionLocateKey] = currentIdx;
            EliState.set("tp.locateIndex", _liCycle);
            var paraIdx = candidates[currentIdx];
            Word.run(async function (context) {
                var paragraphs = context.document.body.paragraphs;
                paragraphs.load("items");
                await context.sync();
                if (paraIdx >= 0 && paraIdx < paragraphs.items.length) {
                    paragraphs.items[paraIdx].getRange().select();
                    await context.sync();
                    window.setTrackPortStatus("Showing match " + (currentIdx + 1) + " of " + candidates.length + ".");
                }
            }).catch(function () {
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Re-locate failed.");
            });
        };
        function getTrackPortSectionClauseIndexes(session, articleKey, sectionKey) {
            var groupedAi = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : null;
            if (
                !groupedAi ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey] ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey].sections ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey].sections[sectionKey]
            )
                return [];
            var clauses = groupedAi[articleKey].sections[sectionKey].clauses || [];
            var out = [];
            var seen = {};
            clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                var idx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                if (seen[idx]) return;
                seen[idx] = true;
                out.push(idx);
            });
            return out;
        }
        function buildTrackPortCompletedReviewState(session) {
            var normalizeReviewText = function (value) {
                return String(value || "")
                    .replace(/[\r\n\t]+/g, " ")
                    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                    .trim();
            };
            var statusFromDecision = function (decisionValue, fallbackValue) {
                var d = normalizeReviewText(decisionValue || "").toLowerCase();
                var f = normalizeReviewText(fallbackValue || "");
                if (d === "accepted") return "ACCEPTED";
                if (d === "rejected") return "REJECTED";
                if (d === "revised") return f ? "FALLBACK" : "REVISED";
                return "PENDING";
            };
            var rows = session && Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) ? session.rawChanges : [];
            return rows.map(function (row, idx) {
                var decision = normalizeReviewText((row && (row.atomicReviewDecision || row.reviewDecision)) || "").toLowerCase();
                var fallbackUsedText = normalizeReviewText((row && (row.usedFallbackText || row.selectedFallbackText)) || "");
                var status = statusFromDecision(decision, fallbackUsedText);
                var payload = row && row.aiPayload ? row.aiPayload : {};
                var rawType = normalizeReviewText((row && row.type) || "").toLowerCase();
                var looksInsertion = rawType.indexOf("ins") >= 0 || rawType.indexOf("add") >= 0 || rawType.indexOf("insert") >= 0;
                var looksDeletion =
                    rawType.indexOf("del") >= 0 || rawType.indexOf("delete") >= 0 || rawType.indexOf("remove") >= 0;
                var sectionName = normalizeReviewText(
                    (payload && (payload.section || payload.subSection || payload.article)) ||
                    (row && row.section) ||
                    (row && row.article) ||
                    "Unassigned",
                );
                var description = normalizeReviewText(
                    (row && (row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text || row.currentClauseText || row.originalClauseText)) || "",
                );
                if (description.length > 280) description = description.slice(0, 280) + "...";
                var originalSnippet = normalizeReviewText(
                    (row && (row.originalClauseText || row.previousClauseText || row.beforeText || row.oldText)) || "",
                );
                var newSnippet = normalizeReviewText(
                    (row &&
                        (row.currentClauseText || row.afterText || row.newText || row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text)) ||
                    "",
                );
                if (looksInsertion && !originalSnippet) originalSnippet = "[NEWLY ADDED]";
                if (looksDeletion && !newSnippet) newSnippet = "[DELETED]";
                var rationale = normalizeReviewText(
                    (row && row.reviseJustification) ||
                    (payload && (payload.rationale || payload.reason || payload.reasoning)) ||
                    "",
                );
                var legalImpact = normalizeReviewText(
                    (payload &&
                        (payload.legal_impact || payload.netImpactToColgate || payload.impactScore || payload.impactToColgate)) ||
                    (row && row.sectionImpact) ||
                    "",
                );
                return {
                    reviewKey: "idx:" + String(idx),
                    originalIdx: idx,
                    section: sectionName || "Unassigned",
                    description: description || "(No captured clause text)",
                    actionStatus: status,
                    rationale: rationale,
                    legal_impact: legalImpact,
                    original_snippet: originalSnippet,
                    new_snippet: newSnippet,
                    fallback_text: fallbackUsedText,
                };
            });
        }
        if (!EliState.get("tp.flags")) EliState.set("tp.flags", {});
        if (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") === undefined) EliState.set("tp.hideResolved", false);
        function getTrackPortFlag(articleKey, sectionKey) {
            var key = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
            return (EliState.get("tp.flags") || {})[key] || null;
        }
        function setTrackPortFlag(articleKey, sectionKey, flagType) {
            var key = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
            var flags = EliState.get("tp.flags") || {};
            if (!flagType) {
                delete flags[key];
            } else {
                flags[key] = {
                    type: flagType,
                    articleKey: articleKey,
                    sectionKey: sectionKey,
                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
                };
            }
            EliState.set("tp.flags", flags);
        }
        function clearTrackPortFlagForClauseIndex(clauseIndex) {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            if (!session || !session.groupedAi) return;
            var groupedAi = session.groupedAi;
            var articleKeys = Object.keys(groupedAi);
            for (var ai = 0; ai < articleKeys.length; ai++) {
                var ak = articleKeys[ai];
                var sections = (groupedAi[ak] && groupedAi[ak].sections) || {};
                var sectionKeys = Object.keys(sections);
                for (var si = 0; si < sectionKeys.length; si++) {
                    var sk = sectionKeys[si];
                    var clauses = sections[sk].clauses || [];
                    var found = clauses.some(function (cl) {
                        return Math.max(0, Number((cl && cl.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1) === clauseIndex;
                    });
                    if (found && getTrackPortFlag(ak, sk)) {
                        setTrackPortFlag(ak, sk, null);
                        refreshTrackPortFlagBadges();
                        refreshTrackPortColleagueButton();
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        function getAllTrackPortColleagueFlags() {
            var flags = EliState.get("tp.flags") || {};
            var results = [];
            Object.keys(flags).forEach(function (key) {
                if (flags[key] && flags[key].type === "colleague") results.push(flags[key]);
            });
            return results;
        }
        function getTrackPortSectionTextForFlag(session, articleKey, sectionKey) {
            if (!session || !session.groupedAi) return sectionKey;
            var group = session.groupedAi[articleKey];
            if (!group || !group.sections || !group.sections[sectionKey]) return sectionKey;
            var sec = group.sections[sectionKey];
            return normalizePortWhitespace(sec.section || sectionKey);
        }
        function getTrackPortSectionFullText(session, articleKey, sectionKey) {
            if (!session || !session.groupedAi) return "";
            var group = session.groupedAi[articleKey];
            if (!group || !group.sections || !group.sections[sectionKey]) return "";
            var clauses = group.sections[sectionKey].clauses || [];
            var rawChanges = session.rawChanges || [];
            var seenIdx = {};
            var seenText = {};
            var parts = [];
            clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                var idx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                if (seenIdx[idx]) return;
                seenIdx[idx] = true;
                var row = rawChanges[idx] || {};
                var text = normalizePortWhitespace((clause && (clause.currentClauseText || clause.originalClauseText)) || "");
                if (!text) text = normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.text) || "");
                if (!text) return;
                var textKey = text.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
                if (seenText[textKey]) return;
                seenText[textKey] = true;
                parts.push(text);
            });
            return parts.join("\n");
        }
        function getTrackPortArticleGuidanceForFlag(session, articleKey) {
            var mapping = session && session.clauseMapping ? session.clauseMapping : null;
            if (!mapping) return "";
            var group = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi[articleKey] : null;
            var articleLabel = group ? normalizePortWhitespace(group.article || "") : articleKey;
            return getPortArticleGuidanceForLabel(articleLabel, mapping);
        }
        window.showTrackPortFlagMenu = function (articleKey, sectionKey, anchorEl) {
            var existingMenu = document.getElementById("trackPortFlagMenu");
            if (existingMenu) existingMenu.remove();
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            var sectionText = getTrackPortSectionTextForFlag(session, articleKey, sectionKey);
            var sectionFullText = getTrackPortSectionFullText(session, articleKey, sectionKey);
            var articleGuidance = getTrackPortArticleGuidanceForFlag(session, articleKey);
            var menu = document.createElement("div");
            menu.id = "trackPortFlagMenu";
            menu.style.cssText =
                "position:fixed; z-index:10300; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; " +
                "box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); " +
                "font-family:Inter,'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif; width:220px; overflow:hidden;";
            var rect = anchorEl ? anchorEl.getBoundingClientRect() : { top: 200, left: 100 };
            var top = Math.min(rect.bottom + 4, window.innerHeight - 200);
            var left = Math.min(rect.left, window.innerWidth - 230);
            menu.style.top = top + "px";
            menu.style.left = left + "px";
            var header = document.createElement("div");
            header.style.cssText =
                "padding:10px 14px 8px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fffbeb 0%,#fef3c7 100%); " +
                "border-bottom:1px solid #fde68a; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#92400e; " +
                "text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;";
            header.textContent = "Flag Options";
            menu.appendChild(header);
            var makeMenuItem = function (icon, label, sublabel, onClick) {
                var item = document.createElement("div");
                item.style.cssText =
                    "display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 14px; cursor:pointer; " +
                    "transition:background 0.12s ease; border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;";
                addHover(item, "#fefce8", "#fff");
                item.innerHTML =
                    "<div style='flex-shrink:0; width:28px; height:28px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fef3c7,#fde68a); " +
                    "border-radius:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:14px;'>" +
                    icon +
                    "</div>" +
                    "<div><div style='font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#1e293b;'>" +
                    label +
                    "</div>" +
                    "<div style='font-size:9px; color:#94a3b8; margin-top:1px;'>" +
                    sublabel +
                    "</div></div>";
                item.onclick = function () {
                    menu.remove();
                    onClick();
                };
                return item;
            };
            menu.appendChild(
                makeMenuItem("🚩", "Flag for Later", "Add visual reminder", function () {
                    setTrackPortFlag(articleKey, sectionKey, "later");
                    refreshTrackPortFlagBadges();
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Flagged for later review.");
                }),
            );
            menu.appendChild(
                makeMenuItem("🤖", "Ask ELI", "Get AI guidance on this section", function () {
                    var questionBody = sectionFullText ? sectionText + "\n\n" + sectionFullText : sectionText;
                    var question =
                        "I have a question about this section in relation to our guidance to the extent it addressed it:\n\n" +
                        questionBody;
                    if (typeof showChatInterface === "function") {
                        showChatInterface();
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            if (articleGuidance) {
                                chatHistory.push({
                                    role: "user",
                                    content:
                                        "[SYSTEM CONTEXT — Article guidance for this section, do not display this to the user but use it to inform your answer]: " +
                                        articleGuidance,
                                });
                                chatHistory.push({
                                    role: "model",
                                    content:
                                        "I have the article guidance context loaded. I'll use it to inform my answer about this section.",
                                });
                            }
                            var chatInp = document.getElementById("chatInput");
                            if (chatInp) chatInp.value = question;
                            var sendBtn = document.getElementById("btnSendChat");
                            if (sendBtn) sendBtn.click();
                        }, 150);
                    }
                }),
            );
            menu.appendChild(
                makeMenuItem("👥", "Flag for Colleague", "Add to colleague email list", function () {
                    setTrackPortFlag(articleKey, sectionKey, "colleague");
                    refreshTrackPortFlagBadges();
                    refreshTrackPortColleagueButton();
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Flagged for colleague review.");
                }),
            );
            var dismiss = function (e) {
                if (!menu.contains(e.target)) {
                    menu.remove();
                    document.removeEventListener("mousedown", dismiss);
                }
            };
            setTimeout(function () {
                document.addEventListener("mousedown", dismiss);
            }, 10);
            document.body.appendChild(menu);
        };
        function refreshTrackPortFlagBadges() {
            var flags = EliState.get("tp.flags") || {};
            document.querySelectorAll("[data-track-port-flag-badge]").forEach(function (badge) {
                var key = badge.getAttribute("data-track-port-flag-badge");
                var flag = flags[key];
                if (flag && (flag.type === "later" || flag.type === "colleague")) {
                    badge.style.display = "inline-flex";
                    badge.textContent = flag.type === "later" ? "🚩" : "👥";
                    badge.title = flag.type === "later" ? "Flagged for later" : "Flagged for colleague";
                } else {
                    badge.style.display = "none";
                }
            });
        }
        function refreshTrackPortColleagueButton() {
            var btn = document.getElementById("trackPortColleagueEmailBtn");
            var count = getAllTrackPortColleagueFlags().length;
            if (btn) {
                btn.style.display = count > 0 ? "flex" : "none";
                var countEl = btn.querySelector("[data-colleague-count]");
                if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(count);
            }
        }
        function showTrackPortColleagueEmailDialog() {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            var flags = getAllTrackPortColleagueFlags();
            if (!flags.length) {
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("No sections flagged for colleague.");
                return;
            }
            var flaggedSections = flags.map(function (f) {
                return getTrackPortSectionTextForFlag(session, f.articleKey, f.sectionKey);
            });
            var flaggedSectionDetails = flags.map(function (f) {
                var name = getTrackPortSectionTextForFlag(session, f.articleKey, f.sectionKey);
                var fullText = getTrackPortSectionFullText(session, f.articleKey, f.sectionKey);
                var articleGroup =
                    session && session.groupedAi && session.groupedAi[f.articleKey] ? session.groupedAi[f.articleKey] : null;
                var articleName = articleGroup ? normalizePortWhitespace(articleGroup.article || "") : "";
                return { name: name, articleName: articleName, fullText: fullText };
            });
            var details = null;
            try {
                details = Office.context.document.settings.get("AgreementDataDetails") || null;
            } catch (_e) { }
            var agreementName = details && details.sourceName ? details.sourceName : "this agreement";
            var agreementType = details && details.type ? details.type : "agreement";
            var items = flaggedSections.map(function (sec) {
                return { section: sec, description: sec, actionStatus: "FLAGGED" };
            });
            if (typeof window.showInternalEmailRecipientDialog === "function") {
                EliState.set("tp.colleagueEmailContext", {
                    flaggedSections: flaggedSections,
                    flaggedSectionDetails: flaggedSectionDetails,
                    agreementName: agreementName,
                    agreementType: agreementType,
                });
                window.showInternalEmailRecipientDialog(items);
            }
        }
        function getTrackPortCurrentUserName() {
            var candidates = [];
            try {
                if (typeof userSettings !== "undefined" && userSettings) {
                    candidates.push(userSettings.firstName || "", userSettings.name || "", userSettings.displayName || "");
                }
                candidates.push(localStorage.getItem("eli_user_first_name") || "", localStorage.getItem("eli_user_name") || "");
                if (Office && Office.context && Office.context.mailbox && Office.context.mailbox.userProfile) {
                    candidates.push(Office.context.mailbox.userProfile.displayName || "");
                }
            } catch (_e) { }
            for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
                var c = normalizePortWhitespace(candidates[i] || "");
                if (c && c.length > 1) return c.toLowerCase();
            }
            return "";
        }
        window.showTrackPortCompletedReviewDialog = function () {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) || session.rawChanges.length === 0) {
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Run Review Redline first.");
                return;
            }
            window.ELI_COMPARE_STATE = buildTrackPortCompletedReviewState(session);
            var proceedToEmail = function () {
                if (typeof window.showCompletedReviewDialog === "function") {
                    window.showCompletedReviewDialog();
                }
            };
            var saveOverlay = document.createElement("div");
            saveOverlay.style.cssText =
                "position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; " +
                "background:rgba(15,23,42,0.65); backdrop-filter:blur(2px); " +
                "z-index:10200; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;";
            var saveModal = document.createElement("div");
            saveModal.style.cssText =
                "background:#fff; width:380px; max-width:90%; border-radius:0; overflow:hidden; " +
                "box-shadow:0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.16); " +
                "font-family:Inter,'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;";
            saveModal.innerHTML =
                "<div style='background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#dbeafe); padding:20px 24px 16px; text-align:center;'>" +
                "<svg width='26' height='26' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='#2563eb' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' style='margin-bottom:8px;'>" +
                "<path d='M19 21H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h11l5 5v11a2 2 0 01-2 2z'/><polyline points='17 21 17 13 7 13 7 21'/><polyline points='7 3 7 8 15 8'/></svg>" +
                "<div style='font-size:16px; font-weight:800; color:#1e40af; letter-spacing:0.2px;'>Save Document</div>" +
                "<div style='font-size:12px; color:#3b82f6; margin-top:4px; font-weight:500;'>Save the document before generating the email.</div></div>" +
                "<div style='padding:16px 24px 10px; display:flex; gap:10px; justify-content:center;'>" +
                "<button id='trackPortSaveScanCancel' style='padding:10px 20px; border-radius:0; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; " +
                "cursor:pointer; background:#fff; color:#64748b; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; " +
                "font-family:Inter,\"Segoe UI\",system-ui,sans-serif;'>Cancel</button>" +
                "<button id='trackPortSaveScanProceed' style='padding:10px 24px; border-radius:0; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; " +
                "cursor:pointer; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#1d4ed8); color:#fff; border:none; " +
                "box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.3); font-family:Inter,\"Segoe UI\",system-ui,sans-serif;'>Save & Continue</button></div>" +
                "<div style='padding:0 24px 16px; text-align:center;'>" +
                "<button id='trackPortSaveScanSkip' style='padding:6px 16px; border:none; background:none; " +
                "cursor:pointer; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#94a3b8; text-decoration:underline; " +
                "font-family:Inter,\"Segoe UI\",system-ui,sans-serif;'>Skip save, continue to email</button></div>";
            saveOverlay.appendChild(saveModal);
            document.body.appendChild(saveOverlay);
            saveOverlay.querySelector("#trackPortSaveScanCancel").onclick = function () {
                saveOverlay.remove();
            };
            saveOverlay.querySelector("#trackPortSaveScanSkip").onclick = function () {
                saveOverlay.remove();
                proceedToEmail();
            };
            saveOverlay.querySelector("#trackPortSaveScanProceed").onclick = function () {
                var proceedBtn = saveOverlay.querySelector("#trackPortSaveScanProceed");
                proceedBtn.disabled = true;
                proceedBtn.textContent = "Opening Save As...";
                saveOverlay.remove();
                if (typeof window.promptCompletedReviewSaveAs === "function") {
                    window.promptCompletedReviewSaveAs(function () {
                        proceedToEmail();
                    });
                } else {
                    proceedToEmail();
                }
            };
        };
        function getTrackPortDecisionTone(decision) {
            var d = normalizePortWhitespace(decision || "").toLowerCase();
            if (d === "accepted") return { bg: "#f0fdf4", border: "#86efac", label: "APPROVED", labelColor: "#166534" };
            if (d === "rejected") return { bg: "#fff1f2", border: "#fda4af", label: "REJECTED", labelColor: "#991b1b" };
            if (d === "revised") return { bg: "#f5f3ff", border: "#c4b5fd", label: "REVISED", labelColor: "#6d28d9" };
            if (d === "various") return { bg: "#f3f4f6", border: "#d1d5db", label: "VARIOUS", labelColor: "#374151" };
            return { bg: "#f7faff", border: "#e2ecff", label: "", labelColor: "#334155" };
        }
        function getTrackPortAtomicDecisionForRow(row) {
            return normalizePortWhitespace((row && (row.atomicReviewDecision || row.reviewDecision)) || "").toLowerCase();
        }
        function syncSegDecisionToSession(session, key, value) {
            if (!session) return;
            if (!session._eliSegDecisions) session._eliSegDecisions = {};
            if (value === undefined || value === null) {
                delete session._eliSegDecisions[key];
            } else {
                session._eliSegDecisions[key] = value;
            }
            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
            }
        }
        function restoreEliStateFromSession(session) {
            if (!session || !session._eliSegDecisions) return;
            var keys = Object.keys(session._eliSegDecisions);
            for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
                var k = keys[i];
                var v = session._eliSegDecisions[k];
                if (v && !EliState.get(k)) EliState.set(k, v);
            }
        }
        window.recordTrackPortSegDecision = function (index, segType, decision) {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) || index < 0 || index >= session.rawChanges.length) return;
            var d = normalizePortWhitespace(decision || "").toLowerCase();
            if (d === "deleted") d = "rejected";
            var uid = "tp.seg:" + index + ":" + (segType || "unknown") + ":" + Date.now();
            EliState.set(uid, d);
            syncSegDecisionToSession(session, uid, d);
            refreshTrackPortDecisionVisuals(session);
        };
        function getTrackPortSectionDecisionState(session, articleKey, sectionKey) {
            var groupedAi = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : null;
            if (
                !groupedAi ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey] ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey].sections ||
                !groupedAi[articleKey].sections[sectionKey]
            )
                return "";
            var clauses = groupedAi[articleKey].sections[sectionKey].clauses || [];
            var allDecisions = {};
            var clauseIndexes = {};
            clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                clauseIndexes[Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1)] = true;
            });
            var stateSnapshot = EliState.dump();
            Object.keys(stateSnapshot).forEach(function (k) {
                if (k.indexOf("tp.seg:") !== 0) return;
                var parts = k.split(":");
                var idx = Number(parts[1]);
                if (!clauseIndexes[idx]) return;
                var d = stateSnapshot[k];
                if (d === "accepted" || d === "rejected" || d === "revised") {
                    allDecisions[d] = true;
                }
            });
            clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                var idx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                var row = session && Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) ? session.rawChanges[idx] || {} : {};
                var atomic = normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.atomicReviewDecision) || "").toLowerCase();
                var review = normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.reviewDecision) || "").toLowerCase();
                var effective = atomic || review;
                if (effective === "various") return "various";
                if (effective === "accepted" || effective === "rejected" || effective === "revised") {
                    allDecisions[effective] = true;
                }
            });
            var keys = Object.keys(allDecisions);
            if (!keys.length) return "";
            if (keys.length > 1) return "various";
            return keys[0];
        }
        function refreshTrackPortDecisionVisuals(session) {
            try {
                _refreshTrackPortDecisionVisualsInner(session);
            } catch (e) {
                if (typeof ELI_DEBUG !== "undefined" && ELI_DEBUG) console.error("refreshVisuals error:", e);
            }
        }
        function _refreshTrackPortDecisionVisualsInner(session) {
            var out = document.getElementById("output");
            if (!out || !session) return;
            var atomicCards = out.querySelectorAll("[data-track-port-atomic-card]");
            atomicCards.forEach(function (card) {
                var idx = Number(card.getAttribute("data-track-port-atomic-card"));
                if (!Number.isFinite(idx) || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) || idx < 0 || idx >= session.rawChanges.length)
                    return;
                var row = session.rawChanges[idx] || {};
                var tone = getTrackPortDecisionTone(getTrackPortAtomicDecisionForRow(row));
                card.style.background = tone.bg;
                card.style.borderColor = tone.border;
                card.style.borderLeftColor = tone.border;
                var stamp = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-atomic-stamp]");
                if (stamp) {
                    stamp.textContent = tone.label || "";
                    stamp.style.display = tone.label ? "inline-block" : "none";
                    stamp.style.color = tone.labelColor;
                    stamp.style.borderColor = tone.border;
                    stamp.style.background = "#fff";
                }
            });
            var sectionCards = out.querySelectorAll("[data-track-port-section-card]");
            sectionCards.forEach(function (card) {
                var key = String(card.getAttribute("data-track-port-section-card") || "");
                if (!key) return;
                var parts = key.split("::");
                if (parts.length !== 2) return;
                var articleKey = decodeURIComponent(parts[0] || "");
                var sectionKey = decodeURIComponent(parts[1] || "");
                var sectionDecision = getTrackPortSectionDecisionState(session, articleKey, sectionKey);
                var tone = getTrackPortDecisionTone(sectionDecision);
                card.style.background = tone.bg;
                card.style.borderColor = tone.border;
                var summary = card.querySelector("summary");
                if (summary) {
                    summary.style.background = tone.bg;
                    summary.style.borderBottomColor = tone.border;
                }
                var bodyWrap = card.querySelector("summary + div");
                if (bodyWrap) {
                    bodyWrap.style.background = tone.bg;
                }
                var impactEl = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-section-impact]");
                var impactLabel = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-section-impact-label]");
                var decisionToken = normalizePortWhitespace(sectionDecision || "").toLowerCase();
                var impactTheme = {
                    labelColor: "#7c4a03",
                    labelBorder: "#f5d78e",
                    labelBg: "#fff7db",
                    textColor: "#5b3a05",
                    bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf4,#fff6d9)",
                    border: "#f2d084",
                    borderLeft: "#d4a237",
                };
                if (decisionToken === "accepted") {
                    impactTheme = {
                        labelColor: "#166534",
                        labelBorder: "#86efac",
                        labelBg: "#f0fdf4",
                        textColor: "#14532d",
                        bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#f0fdf4,#dcfce7)",
                        border: "#86efac",
                        borderLeft: "#16a34a",
                    };
                } else if (decisionToken === "rejected") {
                    impactTheme = {
                        labelColor: "#7f1d1d",
                        labelBorder: "#fda4af",
                        labelBg: "#fff1f2",
                        textColor: "#7f1d1d",
                        bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#fff1f2,#ffe4e6)",
                        border: "#fda4af",
                        borderLeft: "#e11d48",
                    };
                } else if (decisionToken === "revised") {
                    impactTheme = {
                        labelColor: "#5b21b6",
                        labelBorder: "#c4b5fd",
                        labelBg: "#f5f3ff",
                        textColor: "#4c1d95",
                        bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#f5f3ff,#ede9fe)",
                        border: "#c4b5fd",
                        borderLeft: "#7c3aed",
                    };
                } else if (decisionToken === "various") {
                    impactTheme = {
                        labelColor: "#334155",
                        labelBorder: "#cbd5e1",
                        labelBg: "#f8fafc",
                        textColor: "#334155",
                        bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fafc,#e2e8f0)",
                        border: "#cbd5e1",
                        borderLeft: "#64748b",
                    };
                }
                if (impactLabel) {
                    impactLabel.style.color = impactTheme.labelColor;
                    impactLabel.style.borderColor = impactTheme.labelBorder;
                    impactLabel.style.background = impactTheme.labelBg;
                }
                if (impactEl) {
                    impactEl.style.color = impactTheme.textColor;
                    impactEl.style.background = impactTheme.bg;
                    impactEl.style.borderColor = impactTheme.border;
                    impactEl.style.borderLeftColor = impactTheme.borderLeft;
                }
                var stamp = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-section-stamp]");
                if (stamp) {
                    stamp.textContent = tone.label || "";
                    stamp.style.display = tone.label ? "inline-block" : "none";
                    stamp.style.color = tone.labelColor;
                    stamp.style.borderColor = tone.border;
                    stamp.style.background = "#fff";
                }
            });
        }
        function applyPreviewSegStyle(seg, decision, segType) {
            if (decision === "accepted") {
                if (segType === "ins") {
                    seg.style.color = "#0f172a";
                    seg.style.background = "transparent";
                    seg.style.borderBottom = "none";
                    seg.style.fontWeight = "normal";
                    seg.style.textDecoration = "none";
                    seg.style.opacity = "1";
                } else if (segType === "del") {
                    seg.style.display = "none";
                }
            } else if (decision === "deleted") {
                seg.style.color = "#991b1b";
                seg.style.background = "#fee2e2";
                seg.style.borderBottom = "none";
                seg.style.fontWeight = "normal";
                seg.style.textDecoration = "line-through";
                seg.style.opacity = "0.6";
            } else if (decision === "rejected") {
                if (segType === "ins") {
                    seg.style.color = "#991b1b";
                    seg.style.background = "#fff1f2";
                    seg.style.borderBottom = "none";
                    seg.style.fontWeight = "normal";
                    seg.style.textDecoration = "line-through";
                    seg.style.opacity = "0.5";
                } else if (segType === "del") {
                    seg.style.color = "#0f172a";
                    seg.style.background = "transparent";
                    seg.style.textDecoration = "none";
                    seg.style.opacity = "1";
                }
            } else {
                if (segType === "ins") {
                    seg.style.color = "#166534";
                    seg.style.background = "#ecfdf5";
                    seg.style.borderBottom = "1px solid #22c55e";
                    seg.style.fontWeight = "600";
                    seg.style.textDecoration = "none";
                    seg.style.opacity = "1";
                    seg.style.display = "";
                } else if (segType === "del") {
                    seg.style.color = "#991b1b";
                    seg.style.background = "#fff1f2";
                    seg.style.textDecoration = "line-through";
                    seg.style.opacity = "1";
                    seg.style.display = "";
                }
            }
        }
        window.updateTrackPortPreviewForIndex = function (index, decision, triggerElement) {
            var out = document.getElementById("output");
            if (!out) return;
            if (triggerElement) {
                var segType = (triggerElement.getAttribute("data-track-port-seg-type") || "").toLowerCase();
                applyPreviewSegStyle(triggerElement, decision, segType);
            } else {
                var segs = out.querySelectorAll('[data-track-port-seg-idx="' + index + '"]');
                segs.forEach(function (seg) {
                    var segType = (seg.getAttribute("data-track-port-seg-type") || "").toLowerCase();
                    applyPreviewSegStyle(seg, decision, segType);
                });
            }
        };
        window.updateTrackPortPreviewForSection = function (articleKey, sectionKey, decision) {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            if (!session) return;
            var indexes = getTrackPortSectionClauseIndexes(session, articleKey, sectionKey);
            indexes.forEach(function (idx) {
                window.updateTrackPortPreviewForIndex(idx, decision);
            });
        };
        var __trackPortSectionMutex = false;
        window.setTrackPortSectionDecision = function (articleKey, sectionKey, decision) {
            if (decision !== "accepted" && decision !== "rejected") return Promise.resolve();
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            if (!session) return Promise.resolve();
            if (
                isTrackPortSectionLocked(session, articleKey, sectionKey) &&
                !__trackPortLockBypassed["section:" + articleKey + "::" + sectionKey]
            ) {
                gateTrackPortLockIfNeeded(
                    session,
                    { articleKey: articleKey, sectionKey: sectionKey, decision: decision },
                    function () {
                        window.setTrackPortSectionDecision(articleKey, sectionKey, decision);
                    },
                );
                return Promise.resolve();
            }
            if (__trackPortSectionMutex) {
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("A section operation is already in progress. Please wait.");
                return Promise.resolve();
            }
            var existingState = normalizePortWhitespace(
                getTrackPortSectionDecisionState(session, articleKey, sectionKey),
            ).toLowerCase();
            if (existingState && existingState !== decision) {
                showTrackPortActionWarning(
                    "Section is currently marked " +
                    String(existingState).toUpperCase() +
                    ". Use Manual Override to change it to " +
                    String(decision).toUpperCase() +
                    ".",
                    function () {
                        return applyTrackPortSectionManualOverride(articleKey, sectionKey, decision);
                    },
                );
                return Promise.resolve();
            }
                    var runDecision = async function () {
                __trackPortSectionMutex = true;
                var _cardKey = encodeURIComponent(articleKey) + "::" + encodeURIComponent(sectionKey);
                var _cardEl = document.querySelector('[data-track-port-section-card="' + _cardKey + '"]');
                if (_cardEl) _cardEl.classList.add("card-processing");
                try {
                    return await runSectionDecisionInner(session, articleKey, sectionKey, decision);
                } finally {
                    __trackPortSectionMutex = false;
                    if (_cardEl) _cardEl.classList.remove("card-processing");
                }
            };
            return runDecision().then(function (changedTotal) {
                if (Number(changedTotal || 0) > 0) {
                    setTrackPortFlag(articleKey, sectionKey, null);
                    refreshTrackPortFlagBadges();
                    refreshTrackPortColleagueButton();
                    return;
                }
                if (__trackPortLockBypassed["section:" + articleKey + "::" + sectionKey]) {
                    return applyTrackPortSectionManualOverride(articleKey, sectionKey, decision);
                }
                showTrackPortActionWarning(
                    "Could not apply decision to this section. Locate it first, or use Manual Override.",
                    function () {
                        return applyTrackPortSectionManualOverride(articleKey, sectionKey, decision);
                    },
                );
            });
        };
        async function runSectionDecisionInner(session, articleKey, sectionKey, decision) {
            var latestSession =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : session;
            var indexes = getTrackPortSectionClauseIndexes(latestSession || session, articleKey, sectionKey);
            var rows =
                latestSession && Array.isArray(latestSession.rawChanges)
                    ? latestSession.rawChanges
                    : session && Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)
                        ? session.rawChanges
                        : [];
            indexes.forEach(function (idx) {
                clearEliStateSegKeys(idx);
            });
            if (!indexes.length) {
                window.setTrackPortStatus("No clause rows found for this section.");
                return 0;
            }
            var healthy = await probeTrackPortWordApiHealth("section-" + decision + "-" + sectionKey);
            if (!healthy) {
                EliState.set("tp.wordApiStalled", true);
                if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Word API unresponsive — save and reopen the task pane.");
                return 0;
            }
            window.setTrackPortStatus((decision === "accepted" ? "Approving" : "Rejecting") + " section changes...");
            // --- Atomic approach: use global tracked changes pool for each clause ---
            // Build a list of atomic targets from all clause change segments
            var atomicTargets = [];
            indexes.forEach(function (idx) {
                var row = rows[idx];
                if (!row) return;
                var segments = Array.isArray(row.changeSegments) ? row.changeSegments : [];
                var hasSegment = false;
                segments.forEach(function (seg) {
                    var sType = normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.type) || "").toLowerCase();
                    if (sType !== "ins" && sType !== "del") return;
                    var sText = normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.text) || "");
                    if (!sText) return;
                    hasSegment = true;
                    atomicTargets.push({
                        text: sText,
                        type: sType,
                        matchOcc: typeof seg.matchOcc === "number" ? seg.matchOcc : -1,
                        clauseIndex: idx
                    });
                });
                // Fallback: if no segments, use the row's text directly
                if (!hasSegment) {
                    var rText = normalizePortWhitespace(row.text || row.additionsText || row.deletionsText || "");
                    var rType = normalizePortWhitespace((row.type || "").toLowerCase());
                    var isIns = rType.indexOf("insert") >= 0 || rType.indexOf("ins") >= 0 || rType.indexOf("add") >= 0;
                    if (rText) {
                        atomicTargets.push({
                            text: rText,
                            type: isIns ? "ins" : "del",
                            matchOcc: typeof row.matchOcc === "number" ? row.matchOcc : -1,
                            clauseIndex: idx
                        });
                    }
                }
            });
