            if (!atomicTargets.length) {
                window.setTrackPortStatus("No resolvable change segments found for this section.");
                return 0;
            }
            var changedTotal = 0;
            var resolvedApiChanges = [];
            var processingStartTime = Date.now();
            var MAX_PROCESSING_TIME = 15000;
            // Process each atomic target using the global tracked changes pool
            for (var ti = 0; ti < atomicTargets.length; ti++) {
                var timeRemaining = MAX_PROCESSING_TIME - (Date.now() - processingStartTime);
                if (timeRemaining <= 0) {
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Processing timed out (15s limit).");
                    break;
                }
                var at = atomicTargets[ti];
                var expectedApiType = (at.type.indexOf("ins") >= 0 || at.type.indexOf("add") >= 0) ? "add" : "del";
                var segChanged = 0;
                var resolvedRacText = null;
                var resolvedRacType = null;
                var wordRunPromise = Word.run(async function (context) {
                    var tcs = context.document.body.getTrackedChanges();
                    tcs.load(["text", "type"]);
                    await context.sync();
                    if (!tcs.items || tcs.items.length === 0) return;
                    var pool = tcs.items.filter(function (item) {
                        return item.type.toLowerCase().indexOf(expectedApiType) !== -1 &&
                            isAtomicMatch(item.text, at.text);
                    });
                    var target = (at.matchOcc >= 0 && pool[at.matchOcc]) ? pool[at.matchOcc] : pool[0];
                    if (!target) return;
                    resolvedRacText = target.text;
                    resolvedRacType = target.type;
                    if (decision === "accepted") target.accept();
                    else target.reject();
                    await context.sync();
                    segChanged = 1;
                }).catch(function (e) {
                    if (typeof ELI_DEBUG !== "undefined" && ELI_DEBUG) console.error("Section atomic decision failed:", e);
                });
                var timeoutPromise = new Promise(function (resolve) {
                    setTimeout(function () { resolve("TIMEOUT"); }, timeRemaining);
                });
                var raceResult = await Promise.race([wordRunPromise, timeoutPromise]);
                if (raceResult === "TIMEOUT") {
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Processing timed out (15s limit).");
                    break;
                }
                if (segChanged > 0) {
                    changedTotal += segChanged;
                    if (resolvedRacText && resolvedRacType) {
                        resolvedApiChanges.push({ text: resolvedRacText, type: resolvedRacType });
                    }
                }
            }
            // Mark affected rows with the decision
            if (changedTotal > 0) {
                EliState.set("tp.wordApiStalled", false);
                indexes.forEach(function (idx) {
                    var r = rows[idx];
                    if (r) {
                        r.atomicReviewDecision = decision;
                        r.reviewDecision = decision;
                    }
                });
                if (resolvedApiChanges.length > 0) {
                    propagateTrackPortDecisionToCoveredClauses(latestSession || session, resolvedApiChanges, decision, indexes);
                }
                if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                    window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(latestSession || session);
                }
            }
            var latest =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : latestSession || session;
            if (latest) refreshTrackPortDecisionVisuals(latest);
            if (changedTotal > 0) {
                window.setTrackPortStatus((decision === "accepted" ? "Approved" : "Rejected") + " section changes.");
            }
            if (decision === "rejected" && changedTotal > 0) {
                promptTrackPortJustificationIfNeeded("rejected", {
                    scope: "section",
                    scopeLabel: "section",
                    clauseIndexes: indexes,
                    articleKey: articleKey,
                    sectionKey: sectionKey,
                });
            }
            return changedTotal;
        }
        window.openTrackPortSectionReviseDialog = function (articleKey, sectionKey) {
            var session =
                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                    : null;
            if (!session) return;
            if (
                isTrackPortSectionLocked(session, articleKey, sectionKey) &&
                !__trackPortLockBypassed["section:" + articleKey + "::" + sectionKey]
            ) {
                gateTrackPortLockIfNeeded(
                    session,
                    { articleKey: articleKey, sectionKey: sectionKey, decision: "revised" },
                    function () {
                        window.openTrackPortSectionReviseDialog(articleKey, sectionKey);
                    },
                );
                return;
            }
            var existingState = normalizePortWhitespace(
                getTrackPortSectionDecisionState(session, articleKey, sectionKey),
            ).toLowerCase();
            if (existingState && existingState !== "revised") {
                showTrackPortActionWarning(
                    "Section is currently marked " +
                    String(existingState).toUpperCase() +
                    ". Use Manual Override to change it to REVISED.",
                    function () {
                        return applyTrackPortSectionManualOverride(articleKey, sectionKey, "revised");
                    },
                );
                return;
            }
            var runRevise = function () {
                var latestSession =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                        : session;
                var indexes = getTrackPortSectionClauseIndexes(latestSession || session, articleKey, sectionKey);
                if (!indexes.length) {
                    window.setTrackPortStatus("No clause rows found for this section.");
                    return;
                }
                return window.openTrackPortReviseDialog(indexes[0]);
            };
            return runRevise();
        };
        function showTrackPortPlaceholder(message, session) {
            var out = document.getElementById("output");
            if (!out) return;
            out.innerHTML = "";
            out.classList.remove("hidden");
            var card = document.createElement("div");
            card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
            card.style.cssText = "background:#fff; border:1px solid #dbe4f0; border-left:5px solid #1565c0; padding:14px;";
            var count = 0;
            if (session && Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) count = session.rawChanges.length;
            if (session && Array.isArray(session.raw) && session.raw.length) count = session.raw.length;
            card.innerHTML =
                '<div class="eli-label" style="color:#1565c0;">Review Redline (Port Mode)</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:13px; color:#1f2937; font-weight:700; margin-top:6px;">Legacy analyzer gutted and ready for new engine.</div>' +
                '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#475569; margin-top:8px; line-height:1.5;">' +
                (message || "Attach a TrackChangesPort adapter to run the new flow.") +
                "</div>" +
                '<div style="margin-top:10px; font-size:11px; color:#64748b;">Captured tracked changes: <strong>' +
                count +
                "</strong></div>";
            out.appendChild(card);
            var btnRunAi = document.createElement("button");
            btnRunAi.className = "btn-action";
            btnRunAi.innerText = "▶ Run AI";
            btnRunAi.style.cssText = "margin-top:10px; padding:6px 10px; font-size:11px;";
            btnRunAi.onclick = function () {
                if (typeof window.runTrackChangesAiFromSession === "function") window.runTrackChangesAiFromSession(btnRunAi);
            };
            out.appendChild(btnRunAi);
            var btnBack = document.createElement("button");
            btnBack.className = "btn-action";
            btnBack.innerText = "⬅ Back to Compare Hub";
            btnBack.style.marginTop = "12px";
            btnBack.onclick = function () {
                if (typeof showCompareToTemplateApp === "function") showCompareToTemplateApp();
                else showHome();
            };
            out.appendChild(btnBack);
        }
        function escapePortHtml(value) {
            return String(value === null || value === undefined ? "" : value)
                .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
                .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
                .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
                .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
                .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
        }
        function renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, options) {
            restoreEliStateFromSession(session);
            var out = document.getElementById("output");
            if (!out) return;
            var previousOpenState = {};
            var previousDetails = out.querySelectorAll("details[data-track-port-key]");
            previousDetails.forEach(function (node) {
                var key = node.getAttribute("data-track-port-key") || "";
                if (key) previousOpenState[key] = !!node.open;
            });
            var previousScrollArea = out.querySelector("#track-port-scroll-area");
            var previousScrollTop = previousScrollArea ? previousScrollArea.scrollTop : 0;
            var isRerender = out.innerHTML.length > 100;
            out.innerHTML = "";
            out.classList.remove("hidden");
            if (!isRerender) out.classList.add("eli-view-enter");
            if (!document.getElementById("track-port-shimmer-style")) {
                var shimmerStyle = document.createElement("style");
                shimmerStyle.id = "track-port-shimmer-style";
                shimmerStyle.textContent =
                    "@keyframes trackPortShimmer{0%{transform:translateX(-100%);}100%{transform:translateX(100%);}}" +
                    ".track-port-skeleton{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#e2e8f0;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;}" +
                    ".track-port-skeleton::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(226,232,240,0),rgba(255,255,255,.8),rgba(226,232,240,0));animation:trackPortShimmer 1.2s infinite;}" +
                    "details[data-track-port-group='1'] > summary{list-style:none;}" +
                    "details[data-track-port-group='1'] > summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none;}";
                document.head.appendChild(shimmerStyle);
            }
            var rawChanges = session && Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) ? session.rawChanges : [];
            var analysis = session && session.analysis ? session.analysis : null;
            var grouped = session && session.grouped ? session.grouped : {};
            var mappingForUi =
                session && session.clauseMapping
                    ? session.clauseMapping
                    : window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getClauseMapping === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getClauseMapping()
                        : { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
            var opts = options || {};
            var statusText = "";
            var showRunAi = opts.showRunAi !== false;
            var aiRunActive = !!(
                window.TrackChangesPort &&
                typeof window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive === "function" &&
                window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive()
            );
            var countDistinctParagraphs = function (clauses) {
                var seen = {};
                var count = 0;
                (clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                    var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                    var row = rawChanges[rowIdx];
                    var paraIdx = row && typeof row.sourceParagraphIndex === "number" ? row.sourceParagraphIndex : -1;
                    var key = paraIdx >= 0 ? "p:" + paraIdx : "r:" + rowIdx;
                    if (seen[key]) return;
                    seen[key] = true;
                    count += 1;
                });
                return count;
            };
            var isDetailOpen = function (detailKey, defaultOpen) {
                if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(previousOpenState, detailKey)) return previousOpenState[detailKey];
                return !!defaultOpen;
            };
            var shimmerBar = function (widthPx, heightPx) {
                return '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:' + widthPx + "px; height:" + heightPx + 'px;"></span>';
            };
            var card = document.createElement("div");
            card.className = "tool-box slide-in";
            card.style.cssText =
                "background:#fff; border:1px solid #dbe4f0; border-left:5px solid #1565c0; padding:12px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; min-height:calc(100vh - 180px);";
            var metrics = (session && session.metrics) || {};
            var insCount = Number(metrics.insertionCount || 0);
            var delCount = Number(metrics.deletionCount || 0);
            if (!insCount && !delCount) {
                rawChanges.forEach(function (c) {
                    var t = String((c && c.type) || "").toLowerCase();
                    if (t.indexOf("insert") !== -1 || t.indexOf("ins") !== -1) insCount++;
                    if (t.indexOf("delete") !== -1 || t.indexOf("del") !== -1 || t.indexOf("remove") !== -1) delCount++;
                });
            }
            var listHtml = rawChanges.length
                ? rawChanges
                    .slice(0, 40)
                    .map(function (change, idx) {
                        var text = String((change && change.text) || "").trim();
                        var clipped = text.length > 240 ? text.substring(0, 240) + "..." : text;
                        var author = String((change && change.author) || "Unknown");
                        var type = String((change && change.type) || "Change");
                        var decision = String((change && change.reviewDecision) || "");
                        var fallbackCount = getTrackPortFallbackEntriesForRow(change).length;
                        var fallbackBadgeHtml =
                            fallbackCount > 0
                                ? '<span style="position:absolute; top:-5px; right:-5px; min-width:14px; height:14px; padding:0 3px; border-radius:999px; background:#dc2626; color:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size:8px; font-weight:800; line-height:12px; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.22);">' +
                                escapePortHtml(String(Math.min(99, fallbackCount))) +
                                "</span>"
                                : "";
                        var decisionBadge = decision
                            ? eliBadge(
                                decision === "accepted" ? "Accepted" : decision === "rejected" ? "Rejected" : "Revised",
                                decision === "accepted" ? "accepted" : decision === "rejected" ? "rejected" : "revised",
                            )
                            : "";
                        return (
                            '<div data-track-port-clause-card="' + idx + '" style="border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:0; padding:8px; margin-top:6px; background:#fff;">' +
                            '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:8px; align-items:flex-start;">' +
                            '<div style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:#1e40af;">#' +
                            (idx + 1) +
                            " - " +
                            escapePortHtml(type) +
                            " - " +
                            escapePortHtml(author) +
                            "</div>" +
                            '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:3px 8px; font-size:10px;" onclick="locateTrackedChange(' +
                            idx +
                            ')">Locate</button>' +
                            "</div>" +
                            '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:6px; align-items:center;">' +
                            '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:2px 8px; font-size:10px; border-color:#16a34a; color:#166534; background:' +
                            (decision === "accepted" ? "#dcfce7" : "#fff") +
                            ';" onclick="setTrackPortClauseDecision(' +
                            idx +
                            ", 'accepted')\">Accept</button>" +
                            '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:2px 8px; font-size:10px; border-color:#dc2626; color:#991b1b; background:' +
                            (decision === "rejected" ? "#fee2e2" : "#fff") +
                            ';" onclick="setTrackPortClauseDecision(' +
                            idx +
                            ", 'rejected')\">Reject</button>" +
                            '<button class="btn-action" style="position:relative; overflow:visible; padding:2px 6px 2px 5px; font-size:10px; border-color:#7c3aed; color:#6d28d9;" onclick="openTrackPortReviseDialog(' +
                            idx +
                            ')">⚡Revise' +
                            fallbackBadgeHtml +
                            "</button>" +
                            decisionBadge +
                            "</div>" +
                            '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#334155; line-height:1.4; margin-top:4px;">' +
                            escapePortHtml(clipped || "(No text captured)") +
                            "</div>" +
                            "</div>"
                        );
                    })
                    .join("")
                : '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#64748b; margin-top:8px;">No tracked changes found. Turn on Track Changes and make edits first.</div>';
            var groupedAi = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : null;
            // --- Split multi-paragraph sections into sub-sections for per-paragraph control ---
            if (groupedAi && typeof groupedAi === "object") {
                Object.keys(groupedAi).forEach(function (artKey) {
                    var artGroup = groupedAi[artKey];
                    if (!artGroup || !artGroup.sections) return;
                    var sectionKeys = Object.keys(artGroup.sections);
                    sectionKeys.forEach(function (secKey) {
                        // Skip already-split sub-sections from a previous render
                        if (/::p\d+$/.test(secKey)) return;
                        var secGroup = artGroup.sections[secKey];
                        var clauses = (secGroup && secGroup.clauses) || [];
                        if (clauses.length <= 1) return;
                        // Group clauses by distinct paragraph
                        var paraGroups = {};
                        var paraOrder = [];
                        clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                            var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                            var row = rawChanges[rowIdx];
                            var paraIdx = row && typeof row.sourceParagraphIndex === "number" ? row.sourceParagraphIndex : -1;
                            var pKey = paraIdx >= 0 ? "p:" + paraIdx : "r:" + rowIdx;
                            if (!paraGroups[pKey]) {
                                paraGroups[pKey] = [];
                                paraOrder.push(pKey);
                            }
                            paraGroups[pKey].push(clause);
                        });
                        if (paraOrder.length <= 1) return;
                        // Multiple paragraphs — split into sub-sections
                        delete artGroup.sections[secKey];
                        var baseName = normalizePortWhitespace((secGroup && secGroup.section) || "");
                        paraOrder.forEach(function (pKey, pIdx) {
                            var subSecKey = secKey + "::p" + String(pIdx + 1);
                            artGroup.sections[subSecKey] = {
                                section: baseName + " \u00B6" + String(pIdx + 1),
                                clauses: paraGroups[pKey]
                            };
                        });
                    });
                });
                session.groupedAi = groupedAi;
            }
            var hierarchicalListHtml = "";
            var controlsHtml = "";
            var comparisonLeftControlsHtml = "";
            var comparisonRightControlsHtml = "";
            if (groupedAi && typeof groupedAi === "object") {
                var articleBuckets = getOrderedPortArticleKeys(groupedAi);
                var hasNamedArticles = articleBuckets.some(function (k) {
                    return !isPortUnassignedArticleKey(k, groupedAi);
                });
                var hideArticlesTab =
                    !hasNamedArticles ||
                    (trackPortViewMode === "sections" &&
                        !EliState.get("tp.viewModeUserSet") &&
                        !!(session && session.aiPreReadUsed));
                if (articleBuckets.length > 0) {
                    comparisonLeftControlsHtml =
                        '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">' +
                        (hideArticlesTab
                            ? ""
                            : '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:4px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.45px; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; ' +
                            (trackPortViewMode === "articles"
                                ? "color:#e2e8f0; border:1px solid #93c5fd; background:linear-gradient(120deg,#1d4ed8,#1e40af); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(191,219,254,0.32);"
                                : "color:#bfdbfe; border:1px solid rgba(147,197,253,0.45); background:rgba(15,23,42,0.28);") +
                            '" onclick="setTrackPortViewMode(\'articles\')">Articles</button>') +
                        '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:4px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.45px; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; ' +
                        (trackPortViewMode === "sections"
                            ? "color:#e2e8f0; border:1px solid #93c5fd; background:linear-gradient(120deg,#1d4ed8,#1e40af); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(191,219,254,0.32);"
                            : "color:#bfdbfe; border:1px solid rgba(147,197,253,0.45); background:rgba(15,23,42,0.28);") +
                        '" onclick="setTrackPortViewMode(\'sections\')">Sections</button>' +
                        '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:4px 10px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.45px; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; ' +
                        (trackPortViewMode === "list"
                            ? "color:#e2e8f0; border:1px solid #93c5fd; background:linear-gradient(120deg,#1d4ed8,#1e40af); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(191,219,254,0.32);"
                            : "color:#bfdbfe; border:1px solid rgba(147,197,253,0.45); background:rgba(15,23,42,0.28);") +
                        '" onclick="setTrackPortViewMode(\'list\')">List</button>' +
                        "</div>";
                    var hideResolvedCheckboxHtml =
                        '<label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; cursor:pointer; user-select:none; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid ' +
                        (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") ? "#f59e0b" : "rgba(148,163,184,0.4)") +
                        "; background:" +
                        (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") ? "linear-gradient(135deg,#fffbeb,#fef3c7)" : "transparent") +
                        ';">' +
                        '<input type="checkbox" ' +
                        (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") ? "checked" : "") +
                        " onchange=\"EliState.set('tp.hideResolved',this.checked); if(typeof window.renderTrackPortWorkbench==='function'){var s=window.TrackChangesPort&&window.TrackChangesPort.getSession?window.TrackChangesPort.getSession():null; if(s)window.renderTrackPortWorkbench(s);}\" " +
                        'style="accent-color:#f59e0b; width:13px; height:13px; cursor:pointer;" />' +
                        '<span style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.4px; color:' +
                        (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") ? "#92400e" : "#94a3b8") +
                        ';">Hide Resolved</span></label>';
                    comparisonRightControlsHtml =
                        '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-end; gap:12px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.35px; text-transform:uppercase; white-space:nowrap;">' +
                        '<span onclick="toggleTrackPortGroups(true)" style="cursor:pointer; color:#93c5fd;">Expand All</span>' +
                        '<span style="color:rgba(148,163,184,0.8);">|</span>' +
                        '<span onclick="toggleTrackPortGroups(false)" style="cursor:pointer; color:#cbd5e1;">Collapse All</span>' +
                        "</div>";
                    var articleAnalysesForLookup =
                        analysis && Array.isArray(analysis.articleAnalyses) ? analysis.articleAnalyses : [];
                    var sectionAnalysesForLookup =
                        analysis && Array.isArray(analysis.sectionAnalyses) ? analysis.sectionAnalyses : [];
                    var normKey = function (v) {
                        return normalizePortWhitespace(v || "").toLowerCase();
                    };
                    var buildPortArticleImpactFromSections = function (articleLabel) {
                        var articleNorm = normKey(articleLabel);
                        if (!articleNorm) return "";
                        var seen = {};
                        var parts = [];
                        sectionAnalysesForLookup.forEach(function (s) {
                            if (normKey(s && s.article) !== articleNorm) return;
                            var part = normalizePortWhitespace((s && (s.netImpactToColgate || s.impactScore)) || "");
                            if (!part) return;
                            var canon = part.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
                            if (seen[canon]) return;
                            seen[canon] = true;
                            parts.push(part);
                        });
                        return parts.slice(0, 3).join(" ");
                    };
                    if (trackPortViewMode === "sections") {
                        hierarchicalListHtml = articleBuckets
                            .map(function (articleKey) {
                                var articleGroup = groupedAi[articleKey] || { article: "Unassigned Article", sections: {} };
                                var articleName = articleGroup.article || "Unassigned Article";
                                var articleGroupKey = "sections-article::" + articleKey;
                                var sectionCards = Object.keys(articleGroup.sections || {})
                                    .map(function (sectionKey, sectionIdx) {
                                        var sectionGroup = articleGroup.sections[sectionKey] || { section: "", clauses: [] };
                                        var rawSectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(sectionGroup.section || "");
                                        var sectionName = !rawSectionName || rawSectionName === "(No Section)" ? articleName : rawSectionName;
                                        var sectionIsLocked = isTrackPortSectionLocked(session, articleKey, sectionKey);
                                        var sectionDomKey = encodeURIComponent(
                                            (normKey(articleName) || articleKey) + "::" + (normKey(sectionName) || sectionKey),
                                        );
                                        var sectionGroupKey = "sections-section::" + articleKey + "::" + sectionKey;
                                        var sectionImpact =
                                            sectionAnalysesForLookup.find(function (s) {
                                                return normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.sectionDomKey) || "") === sectionDomKey;
                                            }) ||
                                            sectionAnalysesForLookup.find(function (s) {
                                                var articleMatch = normKey(s && s.article) === normKey(articleName);
                                                if (!articleMatch) return false;
                                                var targetSectionNorm = normKey(sectionName);
                                                var sourceSectionNorm = normKey(s && s.section);
                                                if (sourceSectionNorm === targetSectionNorm) return true;
                                                if (rawSectionName === "(No Section)") {
                                                    return (
                                                        !sourceSectionNorm ||
                                                        sourceSectionNorm === "(no section)" ||
                                                        sourceSectionNorm === normKey(articleName)
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                return false;
                                            }) ||
                                            sectionAnalysesForLookup.find(function (s) {
                                                var articleCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken(articleName);
                                                var sectionCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken(sectionName);
                                                var sourceArticleCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken((s && s.article) || "");
                                                var sourceSectionRaw = normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.section) || "");
                                                var sourceSectionUi =
                                                    !sourceSectionRaw || sourceSectionRaw === "(No Section)"
                                                        ? (s && s.article) || ""
                                                        : sourceSectionRaw;
                                                var sourceSectionCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken(sourceSectionUi);
                                                return (
                                                    !!articleCanon &&
                                                    !!sectionCanon &&
                                                    articleCanon === sourceArticleCanon &&
                                                    sectionCanon === sourceSectionCanon
                                                );
                                            }) ||
                                            // Fallback for split sub-sections: strip ¶N suffix
                                            (function () {
                                                var strippedName = sectionName.replace(/\s*\u00B6\d+$/, "");
                                                if (strippedName === sectionName) return null;
                                                var strippedNorm = normKey(strippedName);
                                                return sectionAnalysesForLookup.find(function (s) {
                                                    return normKey(s && s.article) === normKey(articleName) &&
                                                        normKey(s && s.section) === strippedNorm;
                                                }) || sectionAnalysesForLookup.find(function (s) {
                                                    return toPortCanonicalSectionToken((s && s.article) || "") === toPortCanonicalSectionToken(articleName) &&
                                                        toPortCanonicalSectionToken((s && s.section) || "") === toPortCanonicalSectionToken(strippedName);
                                                });
                                            })();
                                        var sectionImpactText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                                            (sectionImpact && (sectionImpact.netImpactToColgate || sectionImpact.impactScore)) || "",
                                        );
                                        var sectionImpactHtml = sectionImpact
                                            ? escapePortHtml(
                                                sectionImpactText ||
                                                "No section-specific net impact was returned. Review this section manually.",
                                            )
                                            : shimmerBar(220, 10) +
                                            ' <span style="display:inline-block; width:8px;"></span>' +
                                            shimmerBar(140, 10);
                                        var sectionDecisionState = getTrackPortSectionDecisionState(session, articleKey, sectionKey);
                                        var sectionTone = getTrackPortDecisionTone(sectionDecisionState);
                                        var sectionCardDomKey = encodeURIComponent(articleKey) + "::" + encodeURIComponent(sectionKey);
                                        var editorSeen = {};
                                        var dateSeen = {};
                                        var sectionEditors = [];
                                        var sectionDates = [];
                                        (sectionGroup.clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                                            var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                                            var row = rawChanges[rowIdx] || {};
                                            var author = normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.author) || "");
                                            if (author) {
                                                var authorKey = author.toLowerCase();
                                                if (!editorSeen[authorKey]) {
                                                    editorSeen[authorKey] = true;
                                                    sectionEditors.push(author);
                                                }
                                            }
                                            var date = normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.date) || "");
                                            if (date && !dateSeen[date]) {
                                                dateSeen[date] = true;
                                                sectionDates.push(date);
                                            }
                                        });
                                        var sectionModifiedMeta = sectionEditors.length
                                            ? "Modified by: " +
                                            sectionEditors.join(", ") +
                                            (sectionDates.length ? " (" + sectionDates.join(", ") + ")" : "")
                                            : "";
                                        var sectionCommentBuckets = {};
                                        (sectionGroup.clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                                            var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                                            var row = rawChanges[rowIdx] || {};
                                            var rowComments = Array.isArray(row.counterpartyComments) ? row.counterpartyComments : [];
                                            rowComments.forEach(function (comment) {
                                                var rawText = String((comment && comment.text) || "")
                                                    .replace(/\r\n?/g, "\n")
                                                    .trim();
                                                var normText = normalizePortWhitespace(rawText);
                                                if (!normText) return;
                                                var cAuthor = normalizePortWhitespace((comment && comment.author) || "");
                                                var cDate = normalizePortWhitespace((comment && comment.date) || "");
                                                var bucketKey = (cAuthor + "|" + cDate).toLowerCase();
                                                if (!sectionCommentBuckets[bucketKey]) {
                                                    sectionCommentBuckets[bucketKey] = {
                                                        author: cAuthor,
                                                        date: cDate,
                                                        parts: [],
                                                        partCanonSeen: {},
                                                    };
                                                }
                                                var canonText = normText.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, "");
                                                if (!canonText) return;
                                                if (!sectionCommentBuckets[bucketKey].partCanonSeen[canonText]) {
                                                    sectionCommentBuckets[bucketKey].partCanonSeen[canonText] = true;
                                                    sectionCommentBuckets[bucketKey].parts.push(rawText);
                                                }
                                            });
                                        });
                                        var sectionComments = [];
                                        Object.keys(sectionCommentBuckets).forEach(function (bucketKey) {
                                            var bucket = sectionCommentBuckets[bucketKey];
                                            var mergedText = String((bucket.parts || []).join("\n\n")).trim();
                                            if (!mergedText) return;
                                            sectionComments.push({ author: bucket.author, date: bucket.date, text: mergedText });
                                        });
                                        var sectionCommentCount = sectionComments.length;
                                        var sectionFallbackSeen = {};
                                        var sectionFallbackCount = 0;
                                        (sectionGroup.clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                                            var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                                            var rowForFallback = rawChanges[rowIdx] || {};
                                            var clauseFallbacks = getTrackPortFallbackEntriesForRow(rowForFallback);
                                            clauseFallbacks.forEach(function (fallback) {
                                                var fallbackText = normalizePortWhitespace((fallback && fallback.text) || "");
                                                if (!fallbackText) return;
                                                var canonical = fallbackText.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
                                                if (sectionFallbackSeen[canonical]) return;
                                                sectionFallbackSeen[canonical] = true;
                                                sectionFallbackCount += 1;
                                            });
                                        });
                                        var sectionGuidanceParts = [];
                                        var sectionGuidanceSeen = {};
                                        (sectionGroup.clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                                            var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                                            var rowForGuidance = rawChanges[rowIdx] || {};
                                            var g = "";
                                            if (rowForGuidance.aiPayload && rowForGuidance.aiPayload.clauseGuidance) {
                                                g = normalizePortWhitespace(rowForGuidance.aiPayload.clauseGuidance);
                                            }
                                            if (!g && rowForGuidance.mappedClause) {
                                                g = normalizePortWhitespace(
                                                    rowForGuidance.mappedClause.guidanceComment || rowForGuidance.mappedClause.clauseGuidance || "",
                                                );
                                            }
                                            if (!g) return;
                                            var canon = g.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
                                            if (sectionGuidanceSeen[canon]) return;
                                            sectionGuidanceSeen[canon] = true;
                                            sectionGuidanceParts.push(g);
                                        });
                                        var sectionGuidanceText = sectionGuidanceParts.join("\n\n");
                                        var sectionGuidanceDomId = ("track-port-section-guidance-" + articleKey + "-" + sectionKey).replace(
                                            /[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,
                                            "_",
                                        );
                                        var sectionFallbackBadgeHtml =
                                            sectionFallbackCount > 0
                                                ? '<span style="position:absolute; top:-8px; right:-9px; min-width:14px; height:14px; padding:0 3px; border-radius:999px; background:#dc2626; color:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72); font-size:8px; font-weight:800; line-height:12px; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.22);">' +
                                                escapePortHtml(String(Math.min(99, sectionFallbackCount))) +
                                                "</span>"
                                                : "";
                                        var sectionCommentsDomId = ("track-port-section-comments-" + articleKey + "-" + sectionKey).replace(
                                            /[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g,
                                            "_",
                                        );
                                        var sectionCommentsBodyHtml = sectionComments.length
                                            ? sectionComments
                                                .map(function (comment, commentIndex) {
                                                    var cMeta = [comment.author, comment.date].filter(Boolean).join(" - ");
                                                    return (
                                                        '<div style="padding:6px; border:1px solid #dbe7f8; background:#fff; margin-top:6px; max-width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; overflow-wrap:anywhere;">' +
                                                        '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#475569; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:700; overflow-wrap:anywhere;">Comment ' +
                                                        String(commentIndex + 1) +
                                                        (cMeta ? " (" + escapePortHtml(cMeta) + ")" : "") +
                                                        "</div>" +
                                                        '<div style="font-size:11px; color:#0f172a; line-height:1.45; white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-word; overflow-wrap:anywhere;">' +
                                                        escapePortHtml(comment.text) +
                                                        "</div>" +
                                                        "</div>"
                                                    );
                                                })
                                                .join("")
                                            : '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#64748b;">No counterparty comments attached to this section.</div>';
                                        var previewSeen = {};
                                        var sectionPreviewHtml = (sectionGroup.clauses || [])
                                            .map(function (clause) {
                                                var rowIdx = Math.max(0, Number((clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                                                var row = rawChanges[rowIdx] || {};
                                                var segments = Array.isArray(row.changeSegments) ? row.changeSegments : [];
                                                var signature = segments
                                                    .map(function (seg) {
                                                        return (
                                                            normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.type) || "") +
                                                            ":" +
                                                            normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.text) || "")
                                                        );
                                                    })
                                                    .join("|");
                                                if (!signature) {
                                                    signature = normalizePortWhitespace(
                                                        (clause &&
                                                            (clause.currentClauseText ||
                                                                clause.additionsText ||
                                                                clause.deletionsText ||
                                                                clause.originalClauseText)) ||
                                                        "",
                                                    );
                                                }
                                                if (!signature || previewSeen[signature]) return "";
                                                previewSeen[signature] = true;
                                                var contentHtml = segments.length
                                                    ? segments
                                                        .map(function (seg, segIdx) {
                                                            var segFullText = String(seg && seg.text ? seg.text : "");
                                                            var segRawText = segFullText.trim();
                                                            var segText = escapePortHtml(segRawText);
                                                            var segType = normalizePortWhitespace(seg && seg.type ? seg.type : "").toLowerCase();
                                                            var encodedSegText = encodeURIComponent(segRawText);
                                                            var prefix = "";
                                                            if (segIdx > 0) {
                                                                var prevSegText = String(
                                                                    segments[segIdx - 1] && segments[segIdx - 1].text ? segments[segIdx - 1].text : "",
                                                                );
                                                                if (/^\s/.test(segFullText) || /\s$/.test(prevSegText)) prefix = " ";
                                                            }
                                                            if (segType === "ins") {
                                                                return (
                                                                    prefix +
                                                                    '<span data-track-port-seg-idx="' +
                                                                    rowIdx +
                                                                    '" data-track-port-seg-text="' +
                                                                    escapePortHtml(encodedSegText) +
                                                                    '" data-track-port-seg-type="ins" style="cursor:pointer; color:#166534; background:#ecfdf5; border-bottom:1px solid #22c55e; font-weight:600;" onclick="openTrackPortAtomicActionMenu(' +
                                                                    rowIdx +
                                                                    ', this); return false;">' +
                                                                    segText +
                                                                    "</span>"
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            if (segType === "del") {
                                                                return (
                                                                    prefix +
                                                                    '<span data-track-port-seg-idx="' +
                                                                    rowIdx +
                                                                    '" data-track-port-seg-text="' +
                                                                    escapePortHtml(encodedSegText) +
                                                                    '" data-track-port-seg-type="del" style="cursor:pointer; color:#991b1b; background:#fff1f2; text-decoration:line-through;" onclick="openTrackPortAtomicActionMenu(' +
                                                                    rowIdx +
                                                                    ', this); return false;">' +
                                                                    segText +
                                                                    "</span>"
                                                                );
                                                            }
                                                            return prefix + '<span style="color:#0f172a;">' + segText + "</span>";
                                                        })
                                                        .join("")
                                                    : '<span style="color:#0f172a;">' +
                                                    escapePortHtml(
                                                        normalizePortWhitespace(
                                                            (clause &&
                                                                (clause.currentClauseText ||
                                                                    clause.additionsText ||
                                                                    clause.deletionsText ||
                                                                    clause.originalClauseText)) ||
                                                            "",
                                                        ) || "(No change text captured)",
                                                    ) +
                                                    "</span>";
                                                return (
                                                    '<div style="margin-top:6px; padding:7px 8px; border:1px solid #dbe7f8; background:#fff;">' +
                                                    contentHtml +
                                                    '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-end; margin-top:7px; padding-top:6px; border-top:1px solid #dbe7f8; font-size:9px; color:#475569; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.25px; text-transform:uppercase;">' +
                                                    "Click highlighted revision for actions" +
                                                    "</div>" +
                                                    "</div>"
                                                );
                                            })
                                            .filter(Boolean)
                                            .slice(0, 2)
                                            .join("");
                                        if (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") && sectionDecisionState) {
                                            var allClausesDecided = (sectionGroup.clauses || []).every(function (cl) {
                                                var ci = Math.max(0, Number((cl && cl.revisionIndex) || 1) - 1);
                                                var r = session && Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) ? session.rawChanges[ci] || {} : {};
                                                var eff = normalizePortWhitespace(r.atomicReviewDecision || r.reviewDecision || "").toLowerCase();
                                                return eff === "accepted" || eff === "rejected" || eff === "revised";
                                            });
                                            if (allClausesDecided) return "";
                                        }
                                        var sectionFlagKey = String(articleKey) + "::" + String(sectionKey);
                                        var sectionFlag = getTrackPortFlag(articleKey, sectionKey);
                                        var sectionFlagBadgeHtml =
                                            '<span data-track-port-flag-badge="' +
                                            escapePortHtml(sectionFlagKey) +
                                            '" style="' +
                                            (sectionFlag ? "display:inline-flex;" : "display:none;") +
                                            " align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin-left:5px; width:18px; height:18px; " +
                                            "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fef3c7,#fde68a); border:1px solid #f59e0b; border-radius:4px; " +
                                            'font-size:10px; line-height:1; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(245,158,11,0.2);" title="' +
                                            (sectionFlag
                                                ? sectionFlag.type === "later"
                                                    ? "Flagged for later"
                                                    : "Flagged for colleague"
                                                : "") +
                                            '">' +
                                            (sectionFlag ? (sectionFlag.type === "later" ? "🚩" : "👥") : "") +
                                            "</span>";
                                        return (
                                            '<details data-track-port-group="1" data-track-port-key="' +
                                            escapePortHtml(sectionGroupKey) +
                                            '" data-track-port-section-card="' +
                                            escapePortHtml(sectionCardDomKey) +
                                            '" style="margin:10px 0; border:1px solid ' +
                                            sectionTone.border +
                                            "; background:" +
                                            sectionTone.bg +
                                            '; box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(15,23,42,0.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.92);"' +
                                            (isDetailOpen(sectionGroupKey, false) ? " open" : "") +
                                            ">" +
                                            "<summary onclick=\"locateTrackPortSection(decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            '\')); event.preventDefault(); return false;" style="position:relative; cursor:pointer; color:#1e293b; padding:0 0 0 26px; background:' +
                                            sectionTone.bg +
                                            "; border-bottom:1px solid " +
                                            sectionTone.border +
                                            '; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95);">' +
                                            "<span onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); var d=this.closest('details'); if(d){d.open=!d.open; if(d.open){var rp=d.querySelector('[data-redline-preview]'); if(rp)rp.setAttribute('open','');}} return false;\" style=\"position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:26px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; background:#dbeafe; border-right:1px solid #93c5fd; cursor:pointer;\">" +
                                            '<span style="flex:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:13px; font-weight:800; color:#1e3a8a; line-height:1;">' +
                                            escapePortHtml(String(sectionIdx + 1)) +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            '<span class="track-port-arrow" style="font-size:8px; line-height:1; color:#1e3a8a; padding-bottom:3px;">▼</span>' +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            '<span style="position:absolute; left:50%; top:-1px; transform:translateX(-50%); font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#1e3a8a; background:#e8f1ff; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; border-top:0; padding:1px 7px 0 7px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.25px; pointer-events:none;">Click to locate</span>' +
                                            '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:9px 10px 4px 10px;">' +
                                            '<span><span style="font-size:13px; font-weight:800;">' +
                                            escapePortHtml(sectionName) +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            (sectionIsLocked
                                                ? '<span title="May require approval" style="margin-left:5px; font-size:12px; vertical-align:middle; opacity:0.85;">🔒</span>'
                                                : "") +
                                            sectionFlagBadgeHtml +
                                            ' <span style="font-weight:700; color:#334155; font-size:11px;">(' +
                                            escapePortHtml(String(countDistinctParagraphs(sectionGroup.clauses || []))) +
                                            ")</span>" +
                                            '<span data-track-port-section-stamp="' +
                                            escapePortHtml(sectionCardDomKey) +
                                            '" style="margin-left:6px; ' +
                                            (sectionTone.label ? "" : "display:none;") +
                                            "font-size:9px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.35px; color:" +
                                            sectionTone.labelColor +
                                            "; border:1px solid " +
                                            sectionTone.border +
                                            '; background:#fff; padding:1px 6px; border-radius:0;">' +
                                            escapePortHtml(sectionTone.label) +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            (sectionModifiedMeta
                                                ? '<div style="margin-top:2px; font-size:9px; font-weight:600; color:#64748b;">' +
                                                escapePortHtml(sectionModifiedMeta) +
                                                "</div>"
                                                : "") +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            '<span style="display:flex; gap:5px; align-items:center; position:relative;">' +
                                            '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:4px 11px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.28px; font-family:Inter, \'Segoe UI\', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; border-color:#bbf7d0; color:#0b1220; background:#f0fdf4; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.96), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); updateTrackPortPreviewForSection(decodeURIComponent(\'' +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            "'), 'accepted'); setTrackPortSectionDecision(decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            "'), 'accepted'); return false;\">Approve</button>" +
                                            '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:4px 11px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.28px; font-family:Inter, \'Segoe UI\', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; border-color:#fecdd3; color:#0b1220; background:#fff1f2; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); updateTrackPortPreviewForSection(decodeURIComponent(\'' +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            "'), 'rejected'); setTrackPortSectionDecision(decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            "'), 'rejected'); return false;\">Reject</button>" +
                                            '<span style="display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; position:relative;">' +
                                            '<button class="btn-action" style="position:relative; overflow:visible; padding:4px 8px 4px 6px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.2px; font-family:Inter, \'Segoe UI\', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; border-color:#ddd6fe; color:#0b1220; background:#f5f3ff; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); openTrackPortSectionReviseDialog(decodeURIComponent(\'' +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            "')); return false;\">⚡Revise" +
                                            sectionFallbackBadgeHtml +
                                            "</button>" +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            '<button class="btn-action" style="padding:4px 8px; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.2px; ' +
                                            "font-family:Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; " +
                                            "border:1px solid #f59e0b; color:#92400e; " +
                                            "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fffbeb 0%,#fef3c7 100%); " +
                                            'box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9), 0 1px 3px rgba(245,158,11,0.18);" ' +
                                            "onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); showTrackPortFlagMenu(decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            "'), this); return false;\">🚩</button>" +
                                            '<button onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); window.resetTrackPortSectionOverride(decodeURIComponent(\'' +
                                            encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                            "'), decodeURIComponent('" +
                                            encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) +
                                            '\')); return false;" class="btn-manual-override" style="position:absolute; top:calc(100% + 16px); left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:transparent; border:none; color:#94a3b8; font-family:Inter, sans-serif; font-size:8px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.8px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; padding:2px 8px; transition:all 0.2s; z-index:10;" onmouseover="if(!this.closest(\'.manual-override-active\')) this.style.color=\'#475569\';" onmouseout="if(!this.closest(\'.manual-override-active\')) this.style.color=\'#94a3b8\';">Manual Override</button>' +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            "</div>" +
                                            '<div style="padding:3px 10px 8px 10px; border-top:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,0.3); margin-top:2px; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:flex-start; gap:8px;">' +
                                            '<span style="display:block; flex:1 1 100%; min-width:0;"><span data-track-port-section-impact-label="' +
                                            sectionDomKey +
                                            '" style="display:inline-block; font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#7c4a03; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.45px; border:1px solid #f5d78e; background:#fff7db; padding:1px 6px; margin-bottom:4px;">Net Impact</span>' +
                                            (sectionGuidanceText
                                                ? "<button onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); window._showSectionGuidanceDialog('" +
                                                escapePortHtml(sectionGuidanceDomId) +
                                                '\'); return false;" style="display:inline-block; margin-left:6px; margin-bottom:4px; padding:1px 7px; font-size:9px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.3px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; border:1px solid #93c5fd; color:#1e40af; background:#eff6ff; vertical-align:middle;">📘 Guidance</button>' +
                                                '<div id="' +
                                                escapePortHtml(sectionGuidanceDomId) +
                                                '" style="display:none;" data-guidance="' +
                                                escapePortHtml(sectionGuidanceText) +
                                                '"></div>'
                                                : "") +
                                            '<span data-track-port-section-impact="' +
                                            sectionDomKey +
                                            '" style="display:block; width:100%; max-width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; font-size:14px; font-weight:600; color:#5b3a05; font-family:Garamond, \'Times New Roman\', serif; line-height:1.7; letter-spacing:0.06px; text-wrap:pretty; text-align:justify; text-align-last:left; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf4,#fff6d9); border:1px solid #f2d084; border-left:3px solid #d4a237; padding:7px 9px; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.88); overflow-wrap:anywhere;">' +
                                            sectionImpactHtml +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            "</span>" +
                                            (sectionCommentCount > 0
                                                ? "<button onclick=\"event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); window.toggleTrackPortSectionComments('" +
                                                escapePortHtml(sectionCommentsDomId) +
                                                '\'); return false;" class="btn-action" style="padding:3px 8px; font-size:9px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.25px; border-radius:0; border-color:#bfdbfe; color:#1e3a8a; background:#eff6ff; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto;">Counterparty Comments (' +
                                                escapePortHtml(String(sectionCommentCount)) +
                                                ")</button>"
                                                : "") +
                                            "</div>" +
                                            "</summary>" +
                                            '<div style="padding:9px 10px;">' +
                                            (sectionCommentCount > 0
                                                ? '<div id="' +
                                                escapePortHtml(sectionCommentsDomId) +
                                                '" data-open="0" style="display:none; margin-bottom:8px; max-width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fbff,#eef4ff); padding:7px 8px; overflow-wrap:anywhere;">' +
                                                '<div class="eli-label-sm" style="color:#1e3a8a;">Counterparty Comments (' +
                                                escapePortHtml(String(sectionCommentCount)) +
                                                ")</div>" +
                                                sectionCommentsBodyHtml +
                                                "</div>"
                                                : "") +
                                            '<details data-redline-preview="1" style="margin-bottom:8px; border:1px solid #c5d9f2; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f6f9ff,#eef4ff); box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.7);"' +
                                            (EliState.get("tp.showRedlinePreviews") ? " open" : "") +
                                            ' onclick="event.stopPropagation();">' +
                                            '<summary style="cursor:pointer; list-style:none; font-size:9.5px; font-weight:800; color:#475569; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; padding:7px 10px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:5px;">' +
        '<span>Redline Preview</span>' +
        '<button onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); updateTrackPortPreviewForSection(decodeURIComponent(\'' + encodeURIComponent(articleKey) + '\'), decodeURIComponent(\'' + encodeURIComponent(sectionKey) + '\'), \'reset\'); return false;" style="padding:2px 6px; font-size:8.5px; border-radius:3px; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; background:#f8fafc; color:#64748b; cursor:pointer; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; transition:all 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background=\'#f1f5f9\'; this.style.color=\'#0f172a\';" onmouseout="this.style.background=\'#f8fafc\'; this.style.color=\'#64748b\';">Reset View</button>' +
        "</summary>" +
                                            "<div style=\"font-size:14px; line-height:1.78; color:#0b1220; font-family:Garamond, 'Times New Roman', serif; text-align:justify; text-align-last:left; padding:6px 10px 10px 10px; border-top:1px solid #dbe7f8; background:#fff; letter-spacing:0.15px;\">" +
                                            (sectionPreviewHtml ||
                                                '<div style="padding:6px; color:#64748b; font-style:italic;">No change text captured for this section.</div>') +
                                            "</div>" +
                                            "</details>" +
                                            "</div>" +
                                            "</details>"
                                        );
                                    })
                                    .join("");
                                if (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") && !sectionCards.replace(/\s/g, "")) return "";
                                return (
                                    '<details data-track-port-group="1" data-track-port-key="' +
                                    escapePortHtml(articleGroupKey) +
                                    '" style="margin:10px 0 8px 0; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; background:#f8fbff;"' +
                                    (isDetailOpen(articleGroupKey, true) ? " open" : "") +
                                    ">" +
                                    '<summary style="cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:800; color:#1e293b; padding:7px 10px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#e0ecff,#d8e7ff); border-bottom:1px solid #bfdbfe; display:grid; grid-template-columns:90px 1fr 90px; align-items:center; gap:8px;">' +
                                    '<span style="justify-self:start;"><span class="track-port-arrow" style="display:inline-block; width:12px; color:#1e40af;">▼</span></span>' +
                                    '<span style="justify-self:center; text-align:center;">' +
                                    escapePortHtml(articleName) +
                                    "</span>" +
                                    '<span style="justify-self:end; font-size:10px; color:#334155; font-weight:700;">Sections: ' +
                                    escapePortHtml(String(Object.keys(articleGroup.sections || {}).length)) +
                                    "</span>" +
                                    "</summary>" +
                                    '<div style="padding:6px 8px;">' +
                                    sectionCards +
                                    "</div>" +
                                    "</details>"
                                );
                            })
                            .join("");
                        if (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved") && !hierarchicalListHtml.replace(/\s/g, "")) {
                            hierarchicalListHtml =
                                '<div style="margin:40px 0; text-align:center; padding:24px 16px;">' +
                                '<div style="font-size:28px; margin-bottom:10px;">✅</div>' +
                                '<div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:800; color:#166534; letter-spacing:0.3px;">All Revisions Resolved</div>' +
                                '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#64748b; margin-top:6px; line-height:1.5;">Every section has been reviewed. Uncheck <strong>Hide Resolved</strong> to see all sections again.</div>' +
                                "</div>";
                        }
                    } else if (trackPortViewMode === "list") {
                        var rawChanges = session.rawChanges || [];
                        if (EliState.get("tp.hideResolved")) {
                            // For a simple pass, we'll just show them all in list mode, or we can filter.
                            // We will just show all of them.
                        }
                        if (rawChanges.length === 0) {
