                            hierarchicalListHtml = '<div style="margin:40px 0; text-align:center; padding:24px 16px;"><div style="font-size:28px; margin-bottom:10px;">✅</div><div style="font-size:14px; font-weight:800; color:#166534;">No Tracked Changes Found</div></div>';
                        } else {
                            hierarchicalListHtml = rawChanges.map(function(change, idx) {
                                var text = (change.text || "").substring(0, 150) + ((change.text || "").length > 150 ? "..." : "");
                                var type = change.type || "Change";
                                var bg = type === "Insert" ? "#e6ffed" : type === "Delete" ? "#ffeef0" : "#f1f5f9";
                                var color = type === "Insert" ? "#166534" : type === "Delete" ? "#991b1b" : "#475569";
                                var strikethrough = type === "Delete" ? "text-decoration: line-through;" : "";
                                var desc = escapePortHtml(text || "Formatting / Whitespace");
                                
                                return '<div style="margin-bottom:8px; padding:12px; background:white; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:4px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">' +
                                       '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px;">' +
                                          '<span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; color:' + color + '; background:' + bg + '; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:3px;">' + type + '</span>' +
                                          '<span style="font-size:10px; color:#94a3b8;">#' + (idx + 1) + '</span>' +
                                       '</div>' +
                                       '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:12px; line-height:1.4; word-wrap:break-word; ' + strikethrough + '">' + desc + '</div>' +
                                       '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px;">' +
                                          '<button onclick="locateTrackedChange(' + idx + ')" style="flex:1; padding:6px; background:#f1f5f9; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:3px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#475569; cursor:pointer;">Locate 🔍</button>' +
                                          '<button onclick="executeListAction(' + idx + ', \'accept\')" style="flex:1; padding:6px; background:#22c55e; border:none; border-radius:3px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:white; cursor:pointer;">Accept</button>' +
                                          '<button onclick="executeListAction(' + idx + ', \'reject\')" style="flex:1; padding:6px; background:#ef4444; border:none; border-radius:3px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:white; cursor:pointer;">Reject</button>' +
                                       '</div>' +
                                       '</div>';
                            }).join("");
                        }
                    } else {
                        hierarchicalListHtml = articleBuckets
                            .map(function (articleKey) {
                                var articleGroup = groupedAi[articleKey] || { article: "Unassigned Article", sections: {} };
                                var articleName = articleGroup.article || "Unassigned Article";
                                var articleDomKey = encodeURIComponent(normKey(articleName) || articleKey);
                                var articleGroupKey = "articles-article::" + articleKey;
                                var sectionKeys = Object.keys(articleGroup.sections || {});
                                var articleClausesFlat = sectionKeys.reduce(function (sum, sk) {
                                    var sectionGroup = articleGroup.sections[sk] || { clauses: [] };
                                    return sum.concat(Array.isArray(sectionGroup.clauses) ? sectionGroup.clauses : []);
                                }, []);
                                var articleClauseCount = countDistinctParagraphs(articleClausesFlat);
                                var articleImpact = articleAnalysesForLookup.find(function (a) {
                                    return normKey(a && a.article) === normKey(articleName);
                                });
                                var forceReviewedBadge = articleClauseCount > 0 && shouldForceReviewedArticleBadge(articleName);
                                var badgeValueForDisplay = forceReviewedBadge
                                    ? "needs review"
                                    : articleImpact && articleImpact.badgeRecommendation;
                                var badgeMeta = getPortBadgePresentation(badgeValueForDisplay);
                                var articleGuidance = getPortArticleGuidanceForLabel(articleName, mappingForUi);
                                var articleImpactText =
                                    normalizePortWhitespace((articleImpact && articleImpact.impactToColgate) || "") ||
                                    buildPortArticleImpactFromSections(articleName);
                                var articleImpactHtml = articleImpactText
                                    ? escapePortHtml(articleImpactText)
                                    : shimmerBar(250, 10) + ' <span style="display:inline-block; width:8px;"></span>' + shimmerBar(120, 10);
                                var articleSummaryHtml =
                                    articleImpact && articleImpact.summaryOfChanges
                                        ? escapePortHtml(articleImpact.summaryOfChanges)
                                        : shimmerBar(240, 10) +
                                        ' <span style="display:inline-block; width:8px;"></span>' +
                                        shimmerBar(150, 10);
                                var articleBadgeHtml =
                                    (articleImpact && articleImpact.badgeRecommendation) || forceReviewedBadge
                                        ? '<span style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:5px; text-align:center;"><span style="display:inline-block; width:11px; text-align:center; font-size:10px; line-height:1;">' +
                                        badgeMeta.iconHtml +
                                        "</span><span>" +
                                        escapePortHtml(badgeMeta.label) +
                                        "</span></span>"
                                        : shimmerBar(78, 12);
                                return (
                                    '<details data-track-port-group="1" data-track-port-article-key="' +
                                    articleDomKey +
                                    '" data-track-port-key="' +
                                    escapePortHtml(articleGroupKey) +
                                    '" style="margin:12px 0; border:1px solid #bccfe9; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(15,23,42,0.12), 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9) inset, 0 -2px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.05) inset; border-radius:0; overflow:hidden;"' +
                                    (isDetailOpen(articleGroupKey, true) ? " open" : "") +
                                    ">" +
                                    "<summary onclick=\"locateTrackPortArticle(decodeURIComponent('" +
                                    encodeURIComponent(articleKey) +
                                    '\')); event.preventDefault(); return false;" style="position:relative; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; font-weight:800; color:#fff; padding:11px 14px; background:linear-gradient(118deg,#12346f,#1d4a94 48%,#3b82f6); border-bottom:1px solid #1e3a8a; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(219,234,254,0.28);">' +
                                    '<span style="position:absolute; left:50%; top:-1px; transform:translateX(-50%); font-size:8px; font-weight:600; color:rgba(219,234,254,0.9); background:transparent; border-top:0; border-left:0; border-right:0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(147,197,253,0.45); padding:1px 6px 0 6px; border-radius:0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2px; pointer-events:none;">CLICK TO LOCATE</span>' +
                                    '<span style="position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:26px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#dbeafe; background:rgba(59,130,246,0.28); border-top:1px solid rgba(191,219,254,0.5); border-right:1px solid rgba(191,219,254,0.5); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(191,219,254,0.5); border-left:0;">' +
                                    escapePortHtml(String(articleBuckets.indexOf(articleKey) + 1)) +
                                    "</span>" +
                                    '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:92px 1fr 92px; align-items:center; gap:8px;">' +
                                    '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-start; padding-left:30px;">' +
                                    '<span class="track-port-arrow" onclick="event.stopPropagation(); event.preventDefault(); var d=this.closest(\'details\'); if(d){d.open=!d.open;} return false;" style="display:inline-block; width:12px; color:#bfdbfe;">▶</span>' +
                                    "</div>" +
                                    '<div style="text-align:center; font-size:16px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.2px;">' +
                                    escapePortHtml(articleName) +
                                    "</div>" +
                                    '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; align-items:center;"><span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:900; color:' +
                                    badgeMeta.color +
                                    "; background:" +
                                    badgeMeta.bg +
                                    "; border:1px solid " +
                                    badgeMeta.border +
                                    "; box-shadow:" +
                                    badgeMeta.shadow +
                                    '; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:0; letter-spacing:0.35px; text-transform:uppercase; line-height:1;">' +
                                    '<span data-track-port-article-badge="' +
                                    articleDomKey +
                                    '">' +
                                    articleBadgeHtml +
                                    "</span>" +
                                    "</span></div>" +
                                    "</div>" +
                                    "</summary>" +
                                    '<div style="padding:12px 14px;">' +
                                    '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:10px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fbff,#f1f6ff); border:1px solid #c8d8f0; border-left:3px solid #1d4ed8; border-radius:0; padding:13px 14px; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);"><div style="display:inline-block; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:#1e3a8a; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.55px; margin-bottom:8px; padding:2px 6px; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; background:#eff6ff;">Summary of Changes</div><span data-track-port-article-summary="' +
                                    articleDomKey +
                                    '" style="display:block; width:100%; font-size:14px; line-height:1.82; letter-spacing:0.08px; color:#0b1220; font-weight:500; font-family:Garamond, \"Times New Roman\", serif; text-wrap:pretty; text-align:justify; text-align-last:left;">' +
                                    articleSummaryHtml +
                                    "</span></div>" +
                                    '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#5b3a05; margin-bottom:10px; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf4,#fff6d9); border:1px solid #f2d084; border-left:3px solid #d4a237; border-radius:0; padding:13px 14px; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.88);"><div style="display:inline-block; font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#7c4a03; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.45px; margin-bottom:8px; padding:2px 6px; border:1px solid #f5d78e; background:#fff7db;">Net Impact</div><span data-track-port-article-impact="' +
                                    articleDomKey +
                                    '" style="display:block; width:100%; font-size:14px; line-height:1.7; letter-spacing:0.06px; color:#5b3a05; font-weight:600; font-family:Garamond, \"Times New Roman\", serif; text-wrap:pretty; text-align:justify; text-align-last:left;">' +
                                    articleImpactHtml +
                                    "</span></div>" +
                                    (articleGuidance
                                        ? '<details style="margin-top:8px; border:1px dashed #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; padding:8px; background:#fcfdff;" onclick="event.stopPropagation();">' +
                                        '<summary style="font-size:10px; font-weight:800; color:#1e3a8a; cursor:pointer; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px;">Article Guidance</summary>' +
                                        '<div style="font-size:10px; color:#334155; margin-top:8px; line-height:1.5;">' +
                                        escapePortHtml(articleGuidance) +
                                        "</div>" +
                                        "</details>"
                                        : "") +
                                    "</div>" +
                                    "</details>"
                                );
                            })
                            .join("");
                    }
                }
            }
            var overviewText = normalizePortWhitespace((analysis && analysis.overallSummary) || "");
            var overviewRisk = normalizePortWhitespace((analysis && analysis.riskLevel) || "").toLowerCase();
            var overviewChipTone = { text: "#1e3a8a", bg: "#e8f0ff", border: "#bfdbfe" };
            var overviewBodyTone = { bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff,#f8fbff)", border: "#dbe7f8" };
            if (/(high|red|needs review|severe|critical)/.test(overviewRisk)) {
                overviewChipTone = { text: "#9f1239", bg: "#fff1f2", border: "#fbcfe8" };
                overviewBodyTone = { bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#fffafb,#fff1f2)", border: "#fecdd3" };
            } else if (/(medium|amber|yellow|caution)/.test(overviewRisk)) {
                overviewChipTone = { text: "#92400e", bg: "#fffbeb", border: "#fde68a" };
                overviewBodyTone = { bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#fffdf7,#fffbeb)", border: "#fde68a" };
            } else if (/(low|green|aligned|favorable)/.test(overviewRisk)) {
                overviewChipTone = { text: "#166534", bg: "#f0fdf4", border: "#bbf7d0" };
                overviewBodyTone = { bg: "linear-gradient(180deg,#fafffc,#f0fdf4)", border: "#bbf7d0" };
            }
            var emphasizeOverviewHtml = function (textValue) {
                return escapePortHtml(textValue).replace(
                    /\b(risk|watchout|caution|exposure|favorable|aligned|priority|concern|material|critical)\b/gi,
                    '<span style="font-weight:700; color:#0b1220;">$1</span>',
                );
            };
            var overviewDisplayText =
                overviewText || "AI overview of the full change-set will appear here once article analysis is complete.";
            var overviewBodyHtml =
                '<div style="margin-top:8px; border:1px solid ' +
                overviewBodyTone.border +
                "; background:" +
                overviewBodyTone.bg +
                '; padding:10px 12px; box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);">' +
                '<div data-track-port-overview-text="1" style="font-size:14px; color:#0b1220; line-height:1.82; letter-spacing:0.08px; font-weight:500; font-family:Garamond, \"Times New Roman\", serif; text-align:justify; text-align-last:left;">' +
                emphasizeOverviewHtml(overviewDisplayText) +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>";
            var totalSectionCount = articleBuckets.reduce(function (sum, articleKey) {
                var articleGroup = groupedAi[articleKey] || {};
                var sectionKeys = Object.keys((articleGroup && articleGroup.sections) || {});
                return sum + sectionKeys.length;
            }, 0);
            var comparisonTitleText = trackPortViewMode === "sections" ? "COMPARISON (SECTIONS)" : "COMPARISON (ARTICLES)";
            var comparisonTitleHtml =
                '<div style="margin-top:8px; padding:0 2px;">' +
                '<div style="position:relative; background:linear-gradient(100deg,#3f4f67,#536780 58%,#0d9488); border:1px solid #64748b; box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(15,23,42,0.13), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(204,251,241,0.3); padding:5px 10px;">' +
                '<span style="position:absolute; left:0; right:0; top:0; height:1px; background:rgba(204,251,241,0.7);"></span>' +
                '<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr; align-items:center; gap:10px;">' +
                '<div style="justify-self:start;">' +
                comparisonLeftControlsHtml +
                "</div>" +
                '<div style="text-align:center;">' +
                '<span style="display:inline-block; width:26px; height:1px; background:#99f6e4; vertical-align:middle; margin-right:8px; opacity:0.95;"></span>' +
                '<span style="font-size:10px; font-weight:900; color:#f8fafc; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; vertical-align:middle;">' +
                escapePortHtml(comparisonTitleText) +
                "</span>" +
                '<span style="display:inline-block; width:26px; height:1px; background:#99f6e4; vertical-align:middle; margin-left:8px; opacity:0.95;"></span>' +
                "</div>" +
                '<div style="justify-self:end;">' +
                comparisonRightControlsHtml +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>";
            var redlinePreviewCheckboxHtml =
                '<label style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; cursor:pointer; user-select:none; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid ' +
                (EliState.get("tp.showRedlinePreviews") ? "#3b82f6" : "rgba(148,163,184,0.4)") +
                "; background:" +
                (EliState.get("tp.showRedlinePreviews") ? "linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#dbeafe)" : "transparent") +
                ';">' +
                '<input type="checkbox" id="redlinePreviewToggle" ' +
                (EliState.get("tp.showRedlinePreviews") ? "checked" : "") +
                ' style="accent-color:#3b82f6; width:13px; height:13px; cursor:pointer;" />' +
                '<span style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.4px; color:' +
                (EliState.get("tp.showRedlinePreviews") ? "#1e40af" : "#94a3b8") +
                ';">Redline Preview</span></label>';
            var summaryBoxHtml =
                '<div style="margin-top:10px; border:1px solid #cbdcf6; border-left:5px solid #1d4ed8; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fafdff,#eef5ff); padding:12px 13px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(15,23,42,0.06), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.95); text-align:left;">' +
                '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:' +
                (trackPortViewMode === "sections" ? "space-between" : "center") +
                '; gap:8px;">' +
                (trackPortViewMode === "sections"
                    ? '<div style="flex:1; display:flex; justify-content:flex-start;">' + redlinePreviewCheckboxHtml + "</div>"
                    : "") +
                '<div style="display:inline-block; font-size:10px; font-weight:900; color:' +
                overviewChipTone.text +

                overviewChipTone.bg +
                "; border:1px solid " +
                overviewChipTone.border +
                '; padding:2px 6px;">Overall Summary</div>' +
                (trackPortViewMode === "sections"
                    ? '<div style="flex:1; display:flex; justify-content:flex-end;">' + hideResolvedCheckboxHtml + "</div>"
                    : "") +
                "</div>" +
                overviewBodyHtml +
                "</div>" +
                "</div>";
            var activePlaybookName = (session && session._autoSelectedPlaybook) || "";
            var playbookBadgeHtml = activePlaybookName
                ? '<div id="trackPortPlaybookBadge" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; padding:3px 10px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border:1px solid rgba(219,234,254,0.3); cursor:pointer;" onclick="window._showPlaybookSwitcher()" title="Click to change playbook">' +
                '<span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:800; color:#bfdbfe; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.4px;">PLAYBOOK</span>' +

                "</div>"
                : '<div id="trackPortPlaybookBadge" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; padding:3px 10px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border:1px dashed rgba(219,234,254,0.25); cursor:pointer; opacity:0.75;" onclick="window._showPlaybookSwitcher()" title="No playbook detected — click to assign">' +
                '<span style="font-size:8px; font-weight:700; color:#93c5fd; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.3px;">AI Inferred</span>' +
                "</div>";
            card.innerHTML =
                '<div style="margin:-12px -12px 10px -12px; padding:12px 14px; background:linear-gradient(120deg,#12346f,#1d4a94 44%,#3b82f6); color:#fff; border-bottom:1px solid #1e3a8a; box-shadow:inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(219,234,254,0.28); position:relative;">' +
                '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:10px;">' +
                '<div><div style="font-size:11px; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.7px; opacity:0.98;">Smart Compare</div>' +

                '<div style="display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:stretch;">' +
                '<div id="headerClauseDisplay" style="font-size:14px; font-weight:700; background:rgba(15,23,42,0.16); padding:4px 8px; border-radius:0; border:1px solid rgba(219,234,254,0.34); min-width:0; width:auto; text-align:center;">' +
                '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:800; color:#dbeafe; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.8px;">Sections</div>' +

                "</div>" +
                comparisonTitleHtml +
                summaryBoxHtml +
                controlsHtml +

                (hierarchicalListHtml || listHtml) +
                "</div>";
            out.appendChild(card);
            var groupDetails = out.querySelectorAll("details[data-track-port-group='1']");
            groupDetails.forEach(function (detailNode) {
                var syncArrow = function () {
                    var arrowEl = detailNode.querySelector("summary .track-port-arrow");
                    if (arrowEl) arrowEl.innerText = detailNode.open ? "▼" : "▶";
                };
                syncArrow();
                detailNode.ontoggle = syncArrow;
            });
            var commentToggles = out.querySelectorAll("[data-track-port-comments-toggle='1']");
            commentToggles.forEach(function (btn) {
                btn.onclick = function (evt) {
                    var panelId = btn.getAttribute("data-track-port-comments-panel") || "";
                    return window.toggleTrackPortSectionComments(panelId, evt);
                };
            });
            var redlineToggle = card.querySelector("#redlinePreviewToggle");
            if (redlineToggle) {
                redlineToggle.addEventListener("change", function () {
                    var checked = redlineToggle.checked;
                    EliState.set("tp.showRedlinePreviews", checked);
                    userSettings.showRedlinePreviews = checked;
                    saveCurrentSettings(true);
                    var scrollArea = document.getElementById("track-port-scroll-area");
                    var scope = scrollArea || out;
                    var ds = scope.querySelectorAll("details[data-redline-preview]");
                    for (var i = 0; i < ds.length; i++) {
                        if (checked) {
                            var ancestors = [];
                            var el = ds[i].parentElement;
                            while (el) {
                                if (el.tagName === "DETAILS" && !el.hasAttribute("open")) ancestors.push(el);
                                el = el.parentElement;
                            }
                            for (var j = ancestors.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) ancestors[j].setAttribute("open", "");
                            ds[i].setAttribute("open", "");
                        } else {
                            ds[i].removeAttribute("open");
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
            if (EliState.get("tp.showRedlinePreviews")) {
                var scrollArea = document.getElementById("track-port-scroll-area");
                var scope = scrollArea || out;
                var ds = scope.querySelectorAll("details[data-redline-preview]");
                for (var ri = 0; ri < ds.length; ri++) {
                    var el = ds[ri].parentElement;
                    while (el) {
                        if (el.tagName === "DETAILS" && !el.open) el.open = true;
                        el = el.parentElement;
                    }
                }
            }
            var actions = document.createElement("div");
            actions.style.cssText = "display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; margin-top:12px;";
            var makeActionRow = function () {
                var row = document.createElement("div");
                row.style.cssText = "display:block; width:100%;";
                return row;
            };
            var makePremiumButton = function (html, styleText, onClick) {
                var btn = document.createElement("button");
                btn.className = "btn-action";
                btn.innerHTML = html;
                btn.style.cssText =
                    "width:100%; padding:10px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.25px; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; box-shadow:0 6px 14px rgba(15,23,42,0.12), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.72); " +
                    styleText;
                btn.onclick = onClick;
                return btn;
            };
            var isSectionsView = String(trackPortViewMode || "").toLowerCase() === "sections";
            if (isSectionsView) {
                var colleagueFlags = getAllTrackPortColleagueFlags();
                var colleagueRow = makeActionRow();
                var btnColleagueEmail = document.createElement("button");
                btnColleagueEmail.id = "trackPortColleagueEmailBtn";
                btnColleagueEmail.className = "btn-action";
                btnColleagueEmail.innerHTML =
                    "<span style='display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px;'>" +
                    "<svg width='14' height='14' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z'/><polyline points='22,6 12,13 2,6'/></svg>" +
                    "Send Email to Colleague About Flagged Issues " +
                    "<span data-colleague-count style='background:#fff; color:#92400e; font-size:10px; font-weight:800; padding:1px 6px; border-radius:0; border:1px solid #f59e0b;'>" +
                    String(colleagueFlags.length) +
                    "</span></span>";
                btnColleagueEmail.style.cssText =
                    "width:100%; padding:10px 12px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.25px; text-transform:uppercase; border-radius:0; " +
                    "box-shadow:0 6px 14px rgba(245,158,11,0.18), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.85); " +
                    "border:1px solid #f59e0b; color:#92400e; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fffbeb 0%,#fef3c7 100%); " +
                    "display:" +
                    (colleagueFlags.length > 0 ? "flex" : "none") +
                    ";";
                btnColleagueEmail.onclick = function () {
                    showTrackPortColleagueEmailDialog();
                };
                colleagueRow.appendChild(btnColleagueEmail);
                actions.appendChild(colleagueRow);
                var reviewRow = makeActionRow();
                var btnCompleteReview = makePremiumButton(
                    "<span style='margin-right:6px;'>🏁</span> Completed Review",
                    "border-color:#1d4ed8; color:#ffffff; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb 0%,#1e40af 100%);",
                    function () {
                        if (typeof window.showTrackPortCompletedReviewDialog === "function") {
                            window.showTrackPortCompletedReviewDialog();
                        }
                    },
                );
                reviewRow.appendChild(btnCompleteReview);
                actions.appendChild(reviewRow);
            }
            var homeRow = makeActionRow();
            var btnHome = makePremiumButton(
                "<span style='margin-right:6px;'>🏠</span> Home",
                "border-color:#c7d2fe; color:#1e3a8a; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fafc 0%,#e2e8f0 100%);",
                function () {
                    showHome();
                },
            );
            homeRow.appendChild(btnHome);
            actions.appendChild(homeRow);
            out.appendChild(actions);
            var newScrollArea = out.querySelector("#track-port-scroll-area");
            if (newScrollArea && previousScrollTop > 0) {
                newScrollArea.scrollTop = previousScrollTop;
            }
            refreshTrackPortDecisionVisuals(session || window.TrackChangesPort.getSession() || null);
            restoreTrackPortPreviewStyles(session || window.TrackChangesPort.getSession() || null);
        }
        window.renderTrackPortWorkbench = renderTrackPortWorkbench;
        function restoreTrackPortPreviewStyles(session) {
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) return;
            var out = document.getElementById("output");
            if (!out) return;
            var stateSnapshot = EliState.dump();
            var segKeysByIdx = {};
            Object.keys(stateSnapshot).forEach(function (k) {
                if (k.indexOf("tp.seg:") !== 0) return;
                var parts = k.split(":");
                var idx = Number(parts[1]);
                var segType = parts[2] || "";
                if (!segKeysByIdx[idx]) segKeysByIdx[idx] = [];
                segKeysByIdx[idx].push({ segType: segType, decision: stateSnapshot[k] });
            });
            for (var i = 0; i < session.rawChanges.length; i++) {
                var row = session.rawChanges[i];
                if (!row) continue;
                var segs = out.querySelectorAll('[data-track-port-seg-idx="' + i + '"]');
                if (!segs.length) continue;
                var segEntries = segKeysByIdx[i];
                if (segEntries && segEntries.length) {
                    var decisionByType = {};
                    segEntries.forEach(function (e) {
                        if (e.decision) decisionByType[e.segType] = e.decision;
                    });
                    segs.forEach(function (seg) {
                        var segType = (seg.getAttribute("data-track-port-seg-type") || "").toLowerCase();
                        var d = decisionByType[segType];
                        if (d) applyPreviewSegStyle(seg, d, segType);
                    });
                } else {
                    var effective = normalizePortWhitespace(row.atomicReviewDecision || row.reviewDecision || "").toLowerCase();
                    if (!effective || effective === "various") continue;
                    segs.forEach(function (seg) {
                        var segType = (seg.getAttribute("data-track-port-seg-type") || "").toLowerCase();
                        applyPreviewSegStyle(seg, effective, segType);
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        function updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, statusText) {
            if (session && session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi) return true;
            var out = document.getElementById("output");
            if (!out) return false;
            var escapeInlineHtml = function (value) {
                return String(value === null || value === undefined ? "" : value)
                    .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
                    .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
                    .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
                    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
                    .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
            };
            var scroller = out.querySelector("#track-port-scroll-area");
            if (!scroller) return false;
            var statusEl = out.querySelector("#track-port-status-message");
            if (statusEl) {
                var message = normalizePortWhitespace(statusText || "");
                if (isTrackPortTransientAiStatus(message)) message = "";
                if (message) {
                    statusEl.style.cssText =
                        "margin-top:6px; font-size:11px; color:#0f766e; background:#ecfeff; border:1px solid #99f6e4; padding:6px;";
                    statusEl.textContent = message;
                } else {
                    statusEl.style.display = "none";
                    statusEl.textContent = "";
                }
            }
            var analysis = session && session.analysis ? session.analysis : {};
            var overviewEl = out.querySelector("[data-track-port-overview-text='1']");
            if (overviewEl) {
                var nextOverview = normalizePortWhitespace((analysis && analysis.overallSummary) || "");
                overviewEl.textContent =
                    nextOverview || "AI overview of the full change-set will appear here once article analysis is complete.";
            }
            var articleAnalyses = Array.isArray(analysis.articleAnalyses) ? analysis.articleAnalyses : [];
            var sectionAnalyses = Array.isArray(analysis.sectionAnalyses) ? analysis.sectionAnalyses : [];
            var articleMap = {};
            articleAnalyses.forEach(function (a) {
                var k = encodeURIComponent(normalizePortWhitespace((a && a.article) || "").toLowerCase());
                if (!k) return;
                articleMap[k] = a;
            });
            var sectionMap = {};
            sectionAnalyses.forEach(function (s) {
                var directDomKey = normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.sectionDomKey) || "");
                if (directDomKey) {
                    sectionMap[directDomKey] = s;
                }
                var articleNorm = normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.article) || "").toLowerCase();
                var sectionNorm = normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.section) || "").toLowerCase();
                if (!articleNorm || !sectionNorm) return;
                var domKey = encodeURIComponent(articleNorm + "::" + sectionNorm);
                sectionMap[domKey] = s;
                if (sectionNorm === "(no section)") {
                    var aliasKey = encodeURIComponent(articleNorm + "::" + articleNorm);
                    sectionMap[aliasKey] = s;
                }
            });
            var articleSectionFallbackMap = {};
            sectionAnalyses.forEach(function (s) {
                var ak = encodeURIComponent(normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.article) || "").toLowerCase());
                if (!ak) return;
                var part = normalizePortWhitespace((s && (s.netImpactToColgate || s.impactScore)) || "");
                if (!part) return;
                if (!articleSectionFallbackMap[ak]) articleSectionFallbackMap[ak] = [];
                articleSectionFallbackMap[ak].push(part);
            });
            Object.keys(articleSectionFallbackMap).forEach(function (ak) {
                var seen = {};
                var merged = [];
                (articleSectionFallbackMap[ak] || []).forEach(function (part) {
                    var canon = normalizePortWhitespace(part).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
                    if (!canon || seen[canon]) return;
                    seen[canon] = true;
                    merged.push(part);
                });
                articleSectionFallbackMap[ak] = merged.slice(0, 3).join(" ");
            });
            var hasMeaningfulText = function (el) {
                if (!el) return false;
                var text = normalizePortWhitespace(el.textContent || "");
                return !!text;
            };
            var applyBadgeStyle = function (badgeEl, badgeValue) {
                var badgeMeta = getPortBadgePresentation(badgeValue);
                badgeEl.style.color = badgeMeta.color;
                badgeEl.style.background = badgeMeta.bg;
                badgeEl.style.border = "1px solid " + badgeMeta.border;
                badgeEl.style.boxShadow = badgeMeta.shadow;
                badgeEl.style.padding = "4px 10px";
                badgeEl.style.letterSpacing = "0.35px";
                badgeEl.style.textTransform = "uppercase";
                badgeEl.style.fontSize = "10px";
                badgeEl.style.fontWeight = "900";
                badgeEl.style.lineHeight = "1";
            };
            var articleCards = scroller.querySelectorAll("[data-track-port-article-key]");
            articleCards.forEach(function (card) {
                var key = card.getAttribute("data-track-port-article-key") || "";
                if (!key) return;
                var hit = articleMap[key];
                var fallbackImpact = articleSectionFallbackMap[key] || "";
                var impactEl = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-article-impact='" + key.replace(/'/g, "\\'") + "']");
                if (impactEl) {
                    if (hit && hit.impactToColgate) {
                        impactEl.textContent = hit.impactToColgate;
                        impactEl.setAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded", "1");
                    } else if (fallbackImpact) {
                        impactEl.textContent = fallbackImpact;
                        impactEl.setAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded", "1");
                    } else {
                        var wasLoaded = impactEl.getAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded") === "1" || hasMeaningfulText(impactEl);
                        if (!wasLoaded) {
                            impactEl.innerHTML =
                                '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:250px; height:10px;"></span>' +
                                '<span style="display:inline-block; width:8px;"></span>' +
                                '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:120px; height:10px;"></span>';
                        }
                    }
                }
                var summaryEl = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-article-summary='" + key.replace(/'/g, "\\'") + "']");
                if (summaryEl) {
                    if (hit && hit.summaryOfChanges) {
                        summaryEl.textContent = hit.summaryOfChanges;
                        summaryEl.setAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded", "1");
                    } else {
                        var summaryLoaded =
                            summaryEl.getAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded") === "1" || hasMeaningfulText(summaryEl);
                        if (!summaryLoaded) {
                            summaryEl.innerHTML =
                                '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:240px; height:10px;"></span>' +
                                '<span style="display:inline-block; width:8px;"></span>' +
                                '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:150px; height:10px;"></span>';
                        }
                    }
                }
                var badgeEl = card.querySelector("[data-track-port-article-badge='" + key.replace(/'/g, "\\'") + "']");
                if (badgeEl) {
                    var decodedKey = "";
                    try {
                        decodedKey = decodeURIComponent(key || "");
                    } catch (_decodeErr) {
                        decodedKey = key || "";
                    }
                    var articleLabelForBadge = normalizePortWhitespace((hit && hit.article) || decodedKey || "");
                    var forceReviewedBadge = shouldForceReviewedArticleBadge(articleLabelForBadge);
                    var badgeValueForDisplay = forceReviewedBadge ? "needs review" : hit && hit.badgeRecommendation;
                    if (badgeValueForDisplay) {
                        var badgeMeta = getPortBadgePresentation(badgeValueForDisplay);
                        badgeEl.innerHTML =
                            '<span style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:5px; text-align:center;"><span style="display:inline-block; width:11px; text-align:center; font-size:10px; line-height:1;">' +
                            badgeMeta.iconHtml +
                            "</span><span>" +
                            escapeInlineHtml(badgeMeta.label) +
                            "</span></span>";
                        applyBadgeStyle(badgeEl.parentElement || badgeEl, badgeValueForDisplay);
                    } else {
                        badgeEl.innerHTML = '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:78px; height:12px;"></span>';
                    }
                }
            });
            var sectionImpacts = scroller.querySelectorAll("[data-track-port-section-impact]");
            sectionImpacts.forEach(function (el) {
                var key = el.getAttribute("data-track-port-section-impact") || "";
                var hit = sectionMap[key];
                if (!hit && key) {
                    try {
                        var decodedKey = decodeURIComponent(key);
                        var parts = decodedKey.split("::");
                        var articleNorm = normalizePortWhitespace(parts[0] || "").toLowerCase();
                        var sectionNorm = normalizePortWhitespace(parts.slice(1).join("::") || "").toLowerCase();
                        if (articleNorm && sectionNorm && sectionNorm === articleNorm) {
                            hit =
                                sectionMap[encodeURIComponent(articleNorm + "::(no section)")] ||
                                sectionMap[encodeURIComponent(articleNorm + "::")] ||
                                null;
                            if (!hit) {
                                hit = sectionAnalyses.find(function (s) {
                                    if (normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.article) || "").toLowerCase() !== articleNorm) return false;
                                    var srcSectionNorm = normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.section) || "").toLowerCase();
                                    return !srcSectionNorm || srcSectionNorm === "(no section)" || srcSectionNorm === articleNorm;
                                });
                            }
                        }
                        if (!hit) {
                            var targetArticleCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken(parts[0] || "");
                            var targetSectionCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken(parts.slice(1).join("::") || "");
                            if (targetArticleCanon && targetSectionCanon) {
                                hit = sectionAnalyses.find(function (s) {
                                    var sourceArticleCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken((s && s.article) || "");
                                    var sourceSectionRaw = normalizePortWhitespace((s && s.section) || "");
                                    var sourceSectionUi =
                                        !sourceSectionRaw || sourceSectionRaw === "(No Section)" ? (s && s.article) || "" : sourceSectionRaw;
                                    var sourceSectionCanon = toPortCanonicalSectionToken(sourceSectionUi);
                                    return sourceArticleCanon === targetArticleCanon && sourceSectionCanon === targetSectionCanon;
                                });
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                    }
                }
                if (hit) {
                    var sectionImpactText = normalizePortWhitespace(hit.netImpactToColgate || hit.impactScore || "");
                    el.textContent =
                        sectionImpactText || "No section-specific net impact was returned. Review this section manually.";
                    el.setAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded", "1");
                } else {
                    var loaded = el.getAttribute("data-track-port-ai-loaded") === "1" || hasMeaningfulText(el);
                    if (!loaded) {
                        el.innerHTML =
                            '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:220px; height:10px;"></span>' +
                            '<span style="display:inline-block; width:8px;"></span>' +
                            '<span class="track-port-skeleton" style="width:140px; height:10px;"></span>';
                    }
                }
            });
            return true;
        }
        function backfillMissingPortSectionImpacts(session) {
            if (!session || !session.groupedAi) return;
            session.analysis = session.analysis || {};
            var analyses = Array.isArray(session.analysis.sectionAnalyses) ? session.analysis.sectionAnalyses.slice() : [];
            var existing = {};
            analyses.forEach(function (item) {
                var key = normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.sectionDomKey) || "");
                if (key) existing[key] = true;
            });
            var fallbackText = "No section-specific net impact was returned. Review this section manually.";
            var grouped = session.groupedAi || {};
            Object.keys(grouped).forEach(function (articleKey) {
                var articleGroup = grouped[articleKey] || { article: "Unassigned Article", sections: {} };
                var articleName = normalizePortWhitespace(articleGroup.article || "Unassigned Article") || "Unassigned Article";
                var articleNorm = normalizePortWhitespace(articleName).toLowerCase();
                Object.keys(articleGroup.sections || {}).forEach(function (sectionKey) {
                    var sectionGroup = articleGroup.sections[sectionKey] || { section: "(No Section)", clauses: [] };
                    var rawSectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(sectionGroup.section || "");
                    var uiSectionName = !rawSectionName || rawSectionName === "(No Section)" ? articleName : rawSectionName;
                    var sectionDomKey = encodeURIComponent(
                        articleNorm + "::" + normalizePortWhitespace(uiSectionName).toLowerCase(),
                    );
                    if (existing[sectionDomKey]) return;
                    analyses.push({
                        article: articleName,
                        section: rawSectionName || "(No Section)",
                        sectionDomKey: sectionDomKey,
                        netImpactToColgate: fallbackText,
                        impactScore: "",
                    });
                    existing[sectionDomKey] = true;
                });
            });
            session.analysis.sectionAnalyses = analyses;
        }
        function buildPortAiClauseInput(clause) {
            var cleanClauseText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                (clause && (clause.currentClauseText || clause.plainText || clause.locateText || clause.text)) || "",
            );
            var additionsText = normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.additionsText) || "");
            var deletionsText = normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.deletionsText) || "");
            var originalClauseText = normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.originalClauseText) || "");
            var counterpartyComments = Array.isArray(clause && clause.counterpartyComments)
                ? clause.counterpartyComments
                    .map(function (comment) {
                        return {
                            author: normalizePortWhitespace((comment && comment.author) || ""),
                            date: normalizePortWhitespace((comment && comment.date) || ""),
                            text: normalizePortWhitespace((comment && comment.text) || ""),
                        };
                    })
                    .filter(function (comment) {
                        return !!comment.text;
                    })
                : [];
            var compactSegments = Array.isArray(clause && clause.changeSegments)
                ? clause.changeSegments
                    .map(function (seg) {
                        return {
                            type: normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.type) || "").toLowerCase(),
                            text: normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.text) || ""),
                            author: normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.author) || ""),
                        };
                    })
                    .filter(function (seg) {
                        return !!seg.text;
                    })
                : [];
            return {
                revisionIndex: Number(clause && clause.revisionIndex) || 0,
                clauseId: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.clauseId) || ""),
                article: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.article) || ""),
                section: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.section) || ""),
                subSection: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.subSection) || ""),
                cleanClauseText: cleanClauseText,
                originalClauseText: originalClauseText,
                additionsText: additionsText,
                deletionsText: deletionsText,
                counterpartyComments: counterpartyComments,
                counterpartyCommentCount: counterpartyComments.length,
                clauseGuidance: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.clauseGuidance) || ""),
                articleGuidanceComment: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.articleGuidanceComment) || ""),
                changeSegments: compactSegments,
            };
        }
        function buildPortAiClauseInputs(clauses) {
            return (Array.isArray(clauses) ? clauses : []).map(buildPortAiClauseInput);
        }
        async function _collectAndClassifyRedlineAuthors(session) {
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) return null;
            var set = Object.create(null);
            var dates = {};
            session.rawChanges.forEach(function (rc) {
                var single = rc && rc.author ? String(rc.author).trim() : "";
                if (single) {
                    set[single] = true;
                    if (rc.date && !dates[single]) dates[single] = String(rc.date).split("T")[0];
                }
                if (Array.isArray(rc && rc.revisionAuthors)) {
                    rc.revisionAuthors.forEach(function (ra) {
                        var n = ra && ra.author ? String(ra.author).trim() : "";
                        if (n) {
                            set[n] = true;
                            if (ra.date && !dates[n]) dates[n] = String(ra.date).split("T")[0];
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
            var authors = Object.keys(set).filter(function (n) {
                return n && n.toLowerCase() !== "unknown";
            });
            if (!authors.length) return null;
            if (typeof window.ensureAuthorsClassified === "function") {
                try {
                    return await window.ensureAuthorsClassified(authors, { source: "the redlined document", authorDates: dates });
                } catch (e) {
                    if (e && e.message === "Request cancelled.") throw e;
                    // other errors: fall through to heuristic classification
                }
            }
            return typeof window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt === "function"
                ? window.classifyAuthorsForPrompt(authors)
                : null;
        }
        function _buildAuthorRosterPromptBlock(roster) {
            if (!roster) return "";
            var internal = [];
            var external = [];
            var unknown = [];
            Object.keys(roster).forEach(function (name) {
                if (roster[name] === "internal") internal.push(name);
                else if (roster[name] === "unknown") unknown.push(name);
                else external.push(name);
            });
            if (!internal.length && !external.length && !unknown.length) return "";
            var lines = ["AUTHOR ROSTER (user-confirmed ground truth):"];
            if (internal.length) lines.push("- INTERNAL (Colgate side): " + internal.join(", "));
            if (external.length) lines.push("- COUNTERPARTY: " + external.join(", "));
            if (unknown.length) lines.push("- UNKNOWN (user marked as unattributed — do NOT guess Colgate vs counterparty): " + unknown.join(", "));
            lines.push(
                "ATTRIBUTION RULE: Each segment in changeSegments has an 'author' field. Use the roster above to determine whether each edit came from Colgate or the counterparty. For authors in the UNKNOWN bucket, name them but do not assign them to either side. Do NOT assume all changes are from the counterparty — check each segment's author.",
            );
            return lines.join("\n") + "\n\n";
        }
        var defaultTrackChangesPortAdapter = {
            run: async function (session) {
                if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) {
                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "No captured session. Click Review Redline first." });
                    return;
                }
                var apiKey = API_KEY || (typeof loadApiKey === "function" ? (loadApiKey(), API_KEY) : "");
                if (!apiKey || apiKey.length < 10) {
                    session.analysis = null;
                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "Missing Gemini API key. Set it in ELI settings first." });
                    return;
                }
                if (
                    window.TrackChangesPort &&
                    typeof window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive === "function" &&
                    window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive()
                ) {
                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI is already running. Cancel current run first." });
                    return;
                }
                var runToken =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.beginAiRun === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.beginAiRun()
                        : 0;
                var shouldStop = function () {
                    return !!(
                        window.TrackChangesPort &&
                        typeof window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunCancelled === "function" &&
                        window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunCancelled(runToken)
                    );
                };
                try {
                    var mapping =
                        session && session.clauseMapping
                            ? session.clauseMapping
                            : { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
                    var groupedAi =
                        session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : buildPortSectionsForAi(session.rawChanges || [], mapping);
                    var redlineRoster = await _collectAndClassifyRedlineAuthors(session);
                    var authorRosterPromptBlock = _buildAuthorRosterPromptBlock(redlineRoster);
                    var articleKeys = getOrderedPortArticleKeys(groupedAi);
                    var aiInputArticles = articleKeys.map(function (articleKey) {
                        var articleGroup = groupedAi[articleKey] || { article: "Unassigned Article", sections: {} };
                        var sectionKeys = Object.keys(articleGroup.sections || {});
                        var clauses = [];
                        var sections = [];
                        sectionKeys.forEach(function (sectionKey) {
                            var sectionGroup = articleGroup.sections[sectionKey] || { section: "(No Section)", clauses: [] };
                            var sectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(sectionGroup.section || "(No Section)") || "(No Section)";
                            var normalizedSectionClauses = (sectionGroup.clauses || []).slice(0, 40).map(function (clause) {
                                return {
                                    revisionIndex: clause.revisionIndex,
                                    clauseId: clause.clauseId || "",
                                    article: clause.article || articleGroup.article || "",
                                    section: sectionName,
                                    subSection: clause.subSection || "",
                                    clauseGuidance: clause.clauseGuidance || "",
                                    articleGuidanceComment: clause.articleGuidanceComment || "",
                                    currentClauseText: clause.currentClauseText || "",
                                    additionsText: clause.additionsText || "",
                                    deletionsText: clause.deletionsText || "",
                                    counterpartyComments: Array.isArray(clause.counterpartyComments) ? clause.counterpartyComments : [],
                                    counterpartyCommentCount: Number(clause.counterpartyCommentCount || 0),
                                    mappingConfidence: clause.mappingConfidence || 0,
                                };
                            });
                            clauses = clauses.concat(normalizedSectionClauses);
                            sections.push({
                                section: sectionName,
                                clauses: normalizedSectionClauses,
                            });
                        });
                        return {
                            article: articleGroup.article || "Unassigned Article",
                            articleGuidance: getPortArticleGuidanceForLabel(articleGroup.article || "", mapping),
                            clauses: clauses,
                            sections: sections,
                        };
                    });
                    var articleSystemPrompt =
                        authorRosterPromptBlock +
                        "You are a reviewer for Colgate-Palmolive. Analyze one full article from Colgate's perspective only using all revised clauses in that article, articleGuidance, and counterparty comments. " +
                        (authorRosterPromptBlock
                            ? "CRITICAL CONTEXT: The originalClauseText represents the prior position. Use the AUTHOR ROSTER above to determine, per segment in changeSegments, whether each edit was made by Colgate (internal) or by the counterparty. Do NOT assume every change is from the counterparty. "
                            : "CRITICAL CONTEXT: The originalClauseText represents Colgate's original position. All tracked changes (additions and deletions) were made BY THE THIRD PARTY / COUNTERPARTY, not by Colgate. ") +
                        "Therefore, any change that weakens, narrows, or removes protections that Colgate originally had is NEGATIVE for Colgate, even if the resulting language seems reasonable in isolation. " +
                        "For example, changing a unilateral obligation (only benefiting Colgate) to a mutual one means Colgate LOSES a one-sided advantage — that is negative, not positive. " +
                        "DELETION RULE: If deletionsText contains text and currentClauseText is empty or missing, the counterparty DELETED Colgate's entire clause. This is always a significant change — Colgate loses whatever protection or right that clause provided. NEVER say 'there is no change' when text has been deleted. " +
                        "For impactToColgate, assess impact ONLY to Colgate. State the impact as a matter of fact — do NOT characterize changes as 'positive' or 'negative'. Simply state what Colgate is now required or permitted to do differently as a result of the change. " +
                        "Do not factor in benefits/harms to the researcher, university, or counterparty unless they directly change Colgate's legal/commercial position. " +
                        "If the change is non-substantive (for example in a preamble or notice clause), treat impact as low/neutral for Colgate. " +
                        "Return strict raw JSON only with keys: summaryOfChanges, impactToColgate, badgeRecommendation, badgeReason. " +
                        "badgeRecommendation must be exactly one of: green, yellow, red.";
                    var overallSystemPrompt =
                        "You are a reviewer for Colgate-Palmolive. Summarize all article analyses for a single deal from Colgate's perspective only. " +
                        "Return strict raw JSON only with keys: overallSummary, overallRiskLevel, topNegotiationPriorities, criticalSections, badgeRecommendation, badgeReason.";
                    var articleAnalyses = [];
                    var sectionAnalyses = [];
                    var toKeyChanges = function (articles) {
                        return (articles || []).map(function (a, idx) {
                            var badge = String((a && a.badgeRecommendation) || "").toLowerCase();
                            return {
                                id: idx + 1,
                                type: "article",
                                summary: (a && (a.impactToColgate || a.summaryOfChanges)) || "",
                                impactLevel: badge === "red" ? "high" : badge === "yellow" ? "medium" : "low",
                                recommendation: (a && a.badgeReason) || "",
                            };
                        });
                    };
                    session.analysis = {
                        overallSummary: "",
                        riskLevel: "",
                        articleAnalyses: [],
                        sectionAnalyses: [],
                        keyChanges: [],
                        generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                    };
                    session.groupedAi = groupedAi;
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                    }
                    var suppressProgressUi = !!(session && session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi);
                    if (!suppressProgressUi) {
                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, {
                            statusText:
                                aiInputArticles.length > 0
                                    ? "Running AI article analysis (0/" + aiInputArticles.length + ")..."
                                    : "No mapped articles found for AI analysis.",
                        });
                    }
                    for (var i = 0; i < aiInputArticles.length; i++) {
                        if (shouldStop()) {
                            if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                                renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                            return;
                        }
                        var articleInput = aiInputArticles[i];
                        var articlePrompt =
                            articleSystemPrompt +
                            "\n\nInput:\n" +
                            JSON.stringify({
                                reviewParty: "Colgate",
                                article: articleInput.article,
                                articleGuidance: articleInput.articleGuidance,
                                clauses: buildPortAiClauseInputs(articleInput.clauses),
                            });
                        var articleRaw = await callGemini(apiKey, articlePrompt);
                        if (shouldStop()) {
                            if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                                renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                            return;
                        }
                        var articleParsed = tryParseGeminiJSON(articleRaw) || {};
                        articleAnalyses.push({
                            article: articleInput.article,
                            summaryOfChanges: normalizePortWhitespace(articleParsed.summaryOfChanges || ""),
                            impactToColgate: normalizePortWhitespace(articleParsed.impactToColgate || ""),
                            badgeRecommendation: normalizePortWhitespace(articleParsed.badgeRecommendation || ""),
                            badgeReason: normalizePortWhitespace(articleParsed.badgeReason || ""),
                        });
                        session.analysis.articleAnalyses = articleAnalyses.slice();
                        session.analysis.keyChanges = toKeyChanges(articleAnalyses);
                        session.analysis.generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
                        if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                            window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                        }
                        if (
                            !updateTrackPortAiInPlace(
                                session,
                                "Running AI article analysis (" + (i + 1) + "/" + aiInputArticles.length + ")...",
                            )
                        ) {
                            renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, {
                                statusText: "Running AI article analysis (" + (i + 1) + "/" + aiInputArticles.length + ")...",
                            });
                        }
                    }
                    var overallPrompt =
                        overallSystemPrompt +
                        "\n\nInput:\n" +
                        JSON.stringify({
                            reviewParty: "Colgate",
                            articleSummaries: articleAnalyses,
                        });
                    var overallRaw = await callGemini(apiKey, overallPrompt);
                    if (shouldStop()) {
                        if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                            renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                        return;
                    }
                    var overallParsed = tryParseGeminiJSON(overallRaw) || {};
                    session.analysis.overallSummary = String((overallParsed && overallParsed.overallSummary) || "").trim();
                    session.analysis.riskLevel = String(
                        (overallParsed && (overallParsed.overallRiskLevel || overallParsed.riskLevel)) || "",
                    ).trim();
                    session.analysis.generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
                    if (session && session._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles) {
                        session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = false;
                        session._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = false;
                        setLoading(!1);
                    }
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                    }
                    if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "Article analysis complete. Running section analysis...")) {
                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "Article analysis complete. Running section analysis..." });
                    }
                    var sectionSystemPrompt =
                        authorRosterPromptBlock +
                        "You are a reviewer for Colgate-Palmolive. Evaluate this section from Colgate's perspective only. Use parentArticleSummary as context, plus counterpartyComments and articleGuidanceComment. " +
                        (authorRosterPromptBlock
                            ? "CRITICAL CONTEXT: Use the AUTHOR ROSTER above. Each segment in changeSegments has an 'author' field — use the roster to determine whether each edit was made by Colgate (internal) or by the counterparty. Do NOT assume every change is from the counterparty. "
                            : "CRITICAL CONTEXT: The originalClauseText represents Colgate's original position. All tracked changes (additions and deletions) were made BY THE THIRD PARTY / COUNTERPARTY, not by Colgate. ") +
                        "Therefore, any change made by the counterparty that weakens, narrows, or removes protections that Colgate originally had is negative for Colgate, even if the resulting language seems reasonable in isolation. " +
                        "For example, changing a unilateral obligation (only benefiting Colgate) to a mutual one means Colgate LOSES a one-sided advantage. " +
                        "DELETION RULE: If deletionsText contains text and currentClauseText is empty or missing, an editor DELETED an entire clause. Check the author of that deletion segment — counterparty deletions are significant losses for Colgate; Colgate-internal deletions are intentional self-revisions. NEVER say 'there is no change' when text has been deleted. " +
                        "For netImpactToColgate, assess impact ONLY to Colgate. State the impact as a matter of fact — do NOT use words like 'positive' or 'negative'. Simply state what Colgate is now required or permitted to do differently as a result of the change. " +
                        "Do not factor in benefits/harms to the researcher, university, or counterparty unless they directly change Colgate's legal/commercial position. " +
                        "If the change is non-substantive (for example in a preamble or notice clause), treat impact as low/neutral for Colgate. " +
                        "Return strict raw JSON only with keys: netImpactToColgate, impactScore.";
                    var totalSectionRuns = 0;
                    aiInputArticles.forEach(function (articleInputCount) {
                        var sectionList = Array.isArray(articleInputCount && articleInputCount.sections)
                            ? articleInputCount.sections
                            : [];
                        if (sectionList.length) totalSectionRuns += sectionList.length;
                        else {
                            var sectionsCountMap = {};
                            (articleInputCount && articleInputCount.clauses ? articleInputCount.clauses : []).forEach(
                                function (clause) {
                                    var sn =
                                        normalizePortWhitespace(clause && clause.section ? clause.section : "(No Section)") || "(No Section)";
                                    sectionsCountMap[sn] = !0;
                                },
                            );
                            totalSectionRuns += Object.keys(sectionsCountMap).length;
                        }
                    });
                    var sectionRunIndex = 0;
                    for (var aiIdx = 0; aiIdx < aiInputArticles.length; aiIdx++) {
                        var articleInput = aiInputArticles[aiIdx];
                        var parentArticleSummary = articleAnalyses.find(function (a) {
                            return (
                                normalizePortWhitespace(a.article || "").toLowerCase() ===
                                normalizePortWhitespace(articleInput.article || "").toLowerCase()
                            );
                        }) || { summaryOfChanges: "", impactToColgate: "", badgeRecommendation: "", badgeReason: "" };
                        var sectionEntries = Array.isArray(articleInput.sections) ? articleInput.sections.slice() : [];
                        if (!sectionEntries.length) {
                            var sectionsMap = {};
                            (articleInput.clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                                var sectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(clause.section || "(No Section)") || "(No Section)";
                                if (!sectionsMap[sectionName]) sectionsMap[sectionName] = [];
                                sectionsMap[sectionName].push(clause);
                            });
                            sectionEntries = Object.keys(sectionsMap).map(function (name) {
                                return { section: name, clauses: sectionsMap[name] || [] };
                            });
                        }
                        for (var s = 0; s < sectionEntries.length; s++) {
                            if (shouldStop()) {
                                if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                                return;
                            }
                            var sectionName =
                                normalizePortWhitespace((sectionEntries[s] && sectionEntries[s].section) || "(No Section)") ||
                                "(No Section)";
                            var sectionClauses = Array.isArray(sectionEntries[s] && sectionEntries[s].clauses)
                                ? sectionEntries[s].clauses
                                : [];
                            var sectionClausesForAi = buildPortAiClauseInputs(sectionClauses);
                            var sectionPrompt =
                                sectionSystemPrompt +
                                "\n\nInput:\n" +
                                JSON.stringify({
                                    reviewParty: "Colgate",
                                    article: articleInput.article,
                                    section: sectionName,
                                    articleGuidance: articleInput.articleGuidance,
                                    parentArticleSummary: parentArticleSummary,
                                    clauses: sectionClausesForAi,
                                });
                            var sectionParsed = {};
                            try {
                                var sectionRaw = await callGemini(apiKey, sectionPrompt);
                                if (shouldStop()) {
                                    if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                                    return;
                                }
                                sectionParsed = tryParseGeminiJSON(sectionRaw) || {};
                            } catch (sectionErr) {
                                if (ELI_DEBUG) console.warn("Section AI call failed for", articleInput.article, sectionName, sectionErr);
                                sectionParsed = {};
                            }
                            var sectionNetImpact = normalizePortWhitespace(
                                sectionParsed.netImpactToColgate || sectionParsed.impactScore || "",
                            );
                            if (!sectionNetImpact) {
                                sectionNetImpact = "No section-specific net impact was returned. Review this section manually.";
                            }
                            var articleNormForDomKey = normalizePortWhitespace(articleInput.article || "").toLowerCase();
                            var sectionUiNameForDomKey = sectionName === "(No Section)" ? articleInput.article || "" : sectionName;
                            var sectionDomKeyForAnalysis = encodeURIComponent(
                                articleNormForDomKey + "::" + normalizePortWhitespace(sectionUiNameForDomKey || "").toLowerCase(),
                            );
                            sectionAnalyses.push({
                                article: articleInput.article,
                                section: sectionName,
                                sectionDomKey: sectionDomKeyForAnalysis,
                                netImpactToColgate: sectionNetImpact,
                                impactScore: normalizePortWhitespace(sectionParsed.impactScore || ""),
                            });
                            sectionRunIndex += 1;
                            session.analysis.sectionAnalyses = sectionAnalyses.slice();
                            session.analysis.generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                            }
                            var sectionStatus =
                                "Running section analysis (" + sectionRunIndex + "/" + Math.max(totalSectionRuns, 1) + ")...";
                            if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, sectionStatus)) {
