                                renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: sectionStatus });
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    var keyChanges = toKeyChanges(articleAnalyses);
                    session.analysis = {
                        overallSummary: session.analysis.overallSummary,
                        riskLevel: session.analysis.riskLevel,
                        articleAnalyses: articleAnalyses,
                        sectionAnalyses: sectionAnalyses,
                        keyChanges: keyChanges.map(function (k) {
                            return {
                                id: k && k.id != null ? k.id : "",
                                type: String((k && k.type) || "").trim(),
                                summary: String((k && k.summary) || "").trim(),
                                impactLevel: String((k && k.impactLevel) || "").trim(),
                                recommendation: String((k && k.recommendation) || "").trim(),
                            };
                        }),
                        generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                    };
                    backfillMissingPortSectionImpacts(session);
                    session.groupedAi = groupedAi;
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                    }
                    if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI analysis completed (manual test mode).")) {
                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI analysis completed (manual test mode)." });
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    if (e && e.message === "Request cancelled.") return;
                } finally {
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.endAiRun === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.endAiRun(runToken);
                    }
                }
            },
            runSectionsOnly: async function (session) {
                if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) {
                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "No captured session. Click Review Redline first." });
                    return;
                }
                var apiKey = API_KEY || (typeof loadApiKey === "function" ? (loadApiKey(), API_KEY) : "");
                if (!apiKey || apiKey.length < 10) {
                    session.analysis = null;
                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "Missing Gemini API key. Set it in ELI settings first." });
                    return;
                }
                if (
                    window.TrackChangesPort &&
                    typeof window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive === "function" &&
                    window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive()
                ) {
                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI is already running. Cancel current run first." });
                    return;
                }
                var runToken =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.beginAiRun === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.beginAiRun()
                        : 0;
                var shouldStop = function () {
                    return !!(
                        window.TrackChangesPort &&
                        typeof window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunCancelled === "function" &&
                        window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunCancelled(runToken)
                    );
                };
                try {
                    var mapping =
                        session && session.clauseMapping
                            ? session.clauseMapping
                            : { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
                    var groupedAi =
                        session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : buildPortSectionsForAi(session.rawChanges || [], mapping);
                    var redlineRoster = await _collectAndClassifyRedlineAuthors(session);
                    var authorRosterPromptBlock = _buildAuthorRosterPromptBlock(redlineRoster);
                    var articleKeys = getOrderedPortArticleKeys(groupedAi);
                    var aiInputArticles = articleKeys.map(function (articleKey) {
                        var articleGroup = groupedAi[articleKey] || { article: "Unassigned Article", sections: {} };
                        var sectionKeys = Object.keys(articleGroup.sections || {});
                        var clauses = [];
                        var sections = [];
                        sectionKeys.forEach(function (sectionKey) {
                            var sectionGroup = articleGroup.sections[sectionKey] || { section: "(No Section)", clauses: [] };
                            var sectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(sectionGroup.section || "(No Section)") || "(No Section)";
                            var normalizedSectionClauses = (sectionGroup.clauses || []).slice(0, 40).map(function (clause) {
                                return {
                                    revisionIndex: clause.revisionIndex,
                                    clauseId: clause.clauseId || "",
                                    article: clause.article || articleGroup.article || "",
                                    section: sectionName,
                                    subSection: clause.subSection || "",
                                    clauseGuidance: clause.clauseGuidance || "",
                                    articleGuidanceComment: clause.articleGuidanceComment || "",
                                    currentClauseText: clause.currentClauseText || "",
                                    additionsText: clause.additionsText || "",
                                    deletionsText: clause.deletionsText || "",
                                    counterpartyComments: Array.isArray(clause.counterpartyComments) ? clause.counterpartyComments : [],
                                    counterpartyCommentCount: Number(clause.counterpartyCommentCount || 0),
                                    mappingConfidence: clause.mappingConfidence || 0,
                                };
                            });
                            clauses = clauses.concat(normalizedSectionClauses);
                            sections.push({
                                section: sectionName,
                                clauses: normalizedSectionClauses,
                            });
                        });
                        return {
                            article: articleGroup.article || "Unassigned Article",
                            articleGuidance: getPortArticleGuidanceForLabel(articleGroup.article || "", mapping),
                            clauses: clauses,
                            sections: sections,
                        };
                    });
                    var existingArticleAnalyses =
                        session && session.analysis && Array.isArray(session.analysis.articleAnalyses)
                            ? session.analysis.articleAnalyses.slice()
                            : [];
                    var toKeyChanges = function (articles) {
                        return (articles || []).map(function (a, idx) {
                            var badge = String((a && a.badgeRecommendation) || "").toLowerCase();
                            return {
                                id: idx + 1,
                                type: "article",
                                summary: (a && (a.impactToColgate || a.summaryOfChanges)) || "",
                                impactLevel: badge === "red" ? "high" : badge === "yellow" ? "medium" : "low",
                                recommendation: (a && a.badgeReason) || "",
                            };
                        });
                    };
                    var sectionAnalyses = [];
                    session.analysis = session.analysis || {};
                    session.analysis.articleAnalyses = existingArticleAnalyses;
                    session.analysis.sectionAnalyses = [];
                    session.analysis.keyChanges = toKeyChanges(existingArticleAnalyses);
                    session.analysis.generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
                    session.groupedAi = groupedAi;
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                    }
                    if (
                        !updateTrackPortAiInPlace(
                            session,
                            "Running section analysis (0/" + Math.max(aiInputArticles.length, 1) + ")...",
                        )
                    ) {
                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "Running section analysis..." });
                    }
                    var sectionSystemPrompt =
                        authorRosterPromptBlock +
                        "You are a reviewer for Colgate-Palmolive. Evaluate this section from Colgate's perspective only. Use parentArticleSummary as context, plus counterpartyComments and articleGuidanceComment. " +
                        (authorRosterPromptBlock
                            ? "CRITICAL CONTEXT: Use the AUTHOR ROSTER above. Each segment in changeSegments has an 'author' field — use the roster to determine whether each edit was made by Colgate (internal) or by the counterparty. Do NOT assume every change is from the counterparty. "
                            : "CRITICAL CONTEXT: The originalClauseText represents Colgate's original position. All tracked changes (additions and deletions) were made BY THE THIRD PARTY / COUNTERPARTY, not by Colgate. ") +
                        "Therefore, any change made by the counterparty that weakens, narrows, or removes protections that Colgate originally had is negative for Colgate, even if the resulting language seems reasonable in isolation. " +
                        "For example, changing a unilateral obligation (only benefiting Colgate) to a mutual one means Colgate LOSES a one-sided advantage. " +
                        "DELETION RULE: If deletionsText contains text and currentClauseText is empty or missing, an editor DELETED an entire clause. Check the author of that deletion segment — counterparty deletions are significant losses for Colgate; Colgate-internal deletions are intentional self-revisions. NEVER say 'there is no change' when text has been deleted. " +
                        "For netImpactToColgate, assess impact ONLY to Colgate. State the impact as a matter of fact — do NOT use words like 'positive' or 'negative'. Simply state what Colgate is now required or permitted to do differently as a result of the change. " +
                        "Do not factor in benefits/harms to the researcher, university, or counterparty unless they directly change Colgate's legal/commercial position. " +
                        "If the change is non-substantive (for example in a preamble or notice clause), treat impact as low/neutral for Colgate. " +
                        "Return strict raw JSON only with keys: netImpactToColgate, impactScore.";
                    var totalSectionRuns = 0;
                    aiInputArticles.forEach(function (articleInputCount) {
                        var sectionList = Array.isArray(articleInputCount && articleInputCount.sections)
                            ? articleInputCount.sections
                            : [];
                        if (sectionList.length) totalSectionRuns += sectionList.length;
                        else {
                            var sectionsCountMap = {};
                            (articleInputCount && articleInputCount.clauses ? articleInputCount.clauses : []).forEach(
                                function (clause) {
                                    var sn =
                                        normalizePortWhitespace(clause && clause.section ? clause.section : "(No Section)") || "(No Section)";
                                    sectionsCountMap[sn] = !0;
                                },
                            );
                            totalSectionRuns += Object.keys(sectionsCountMap).length;
                        }
                    });
                    var sectionRunIndex = 0;
                    for (var aiIdx = 0; aiIdx < aiInputArticles.length; aiIdx++) {
                        var articleInput = aiInputArticles[aiIdx];
                        var parentArticleSummary = existingArticleAnalyses.find(function (a) {
                            return (
                                normalizePortWhitespace(a.article || "").toLowerCase() ===
                                normalizePortWhitespace(articleInput.article || "").toLowerCase()
                            );
                        }) || { summaryOfChanges: "", impactToColgate: "", badgeRecommendation: "", badgeReason: "" };
                        var sectionEntries = Array.isArray(articleInput.sections) ? articleInput.sections.slice() : [];
                        if (!sectionEntries.length) {
                            var sectionsMap = {};
                            (articleInput.clauses || []).forEach(function (clause) {
                                var sectionName = normalizePortWhitespace(clause.section || "(No Section)") || "(No Section)";
                                if (!sectionsMap[sectionName]) sectionsMap[sectionName] = [];
                                sectionsMap[sectionName].push(clause);
                            });
                            sectionEntries = Object.keys(sectionsMap).map(function (name) {
                                return { section: name, clauses: sectionsMap[name] || [] };
                            });
                        }
                        for (var s = 0; s < sectionEntries.length; s++) {
                            if (shouldStop()) {
                                if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                                    renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                                return;
                            }
                            var sectionName =
                                normalizePortWhitespace((sectionEntries[s] && sectionEntries[s].section) || "(No Section)") ||
                                "(No Section)";
                            var sectionClauses = Array.isArray(sectionEntries[s] && sectionEntries[s].clauses)
                                ? sectionEntries[s].clauses
                                : [];
                            var sectionClausesForAi = buildPortAiClauseInputs(sectionClauses);
                            var sectionPrompt =
                                sectionSystemPrompt +
                                "\n\nInput:\n" +
                                JSON.stringify({
                                    reviewParty: "Colgate",
                                    article: articleInput.article,
                                    section: sectionName,
                                    articleGuidance: articleInput.articleGuidance,
                                    parentArticleSummary: parentArticleSummary,
                                    clauses: sectionClausesForAi,
                                });
                            var sectionParsed = {};
                            try {
                                var sectionRaw = await callGemini(apiKey, sectionPrompt);
                                if (shouldStop()) {
                                    if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "AI run cancelled."))
                                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "AI run cancelled." });
                                    return;
                                }
                                sectionParsed = tryParseGeminiJSON(sectionRaw) || {};
                            } catch (sectionErr) {
                                if (ELI_DEBUG)
                                    console.warn("Section-only AI call failed for", articleInput.article, sectionName, sectionErr);
                                sectionParsed = {};
                            }
                            var sectionNetImpact = normalizePortWhitespace(
                                sectionParsed.netImpactToColgate || sectionParsed.impactScore || "",
                            );
                            if (!sectionNetImpact) {
                                sectionNetImpact = "No section-specific net impact was returned. Review this section manually.";
                            }
                            var articleNormForDomKey = normalizePortWhitespace(articleInput.article || "").toLowerCase();
                            var sectionUiNameForDomKey = sectionName === "(No Section)" ? articleInput.article || "" : sectionName;
                            var sectionDomKeyForAnalysis = encodeURIComponent(
                                articleNormForDomKey + "::" + normalizePortWhitespace(sectionUiNameForDomKey || "").toLowerCase(),
                            );
                            sectionAnalyses.push({
                                article: articleInput.article,
                                section: sectionName,
                                sectionDomKey: sectionDomKeyForAnalysis,
                                netImpactToColgate: sectionNetImpact,
                                impactScore: normalizePortWhitespace(sectionParsed.impactScore || ""),
                            });
                            sectionRunIndex += 1;
                            session.analysis.sectionAnalyses = sectionAnalyses.slice();
                            session.analysis.generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                            }
                            var sectionStatus =
                                "Running section analysis (" + sectionRunIndex + "/" + Math.max(totalSectionRuns, 1) + ")...";
                            if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, sectionStatus)) {
                                renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: sectionStatus });
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    var sectionsOverallPrompt =
                        "You are a reviewer for Colgate-Palmolive. Summarize section-level impacts for the full agreement from Colgate's perspective only. " +
                        "Return strict raw JSON only with keys: overallSummary, overallRiskLevel, topNegotiationPriorities, criticalSections.";
                    try {
                        var overallSectionsRaw = await callGemini(
                            apiKey,
                            sectionsOverallPrompt +
                            "\n\nInput:\n" +
                            JSON.stringify({
                                reviewParty: "Colgate",
                                sectionAnalyses: sectionAnalyses.map(function (s) {
                                    return {
                                        article: s.article,
                                        section: s.section,
                                        netImpactToColgate: s.netImpactToColgate,
                                        impactScore: s.impactScore,
                                    };
                                }),
                                clauseCount: Array.isArray(session.rawChanges) ? session.rawChanges.length : 0,
                            }),
                        );
                        var overallSectionsParsed = tryParseGeminiJSON(overallSectionsRaw) || {};
                        session.analysis.overallSummary = normalizePortWhitespace(
                            (overallSectionsParsed && overallSectionsParsed.overallSummary) || "",
                        );
                        session.analysis.riskLevel = normalizePortWhitespace(
                            (overallSectionsParsed && (overallSectionsParsed.overallRiskLevel || overallSectionsParsed.riskLevel)) ||
                            "",
                        );
                    } catch (_overallErr) {
                    }
                    backfillMissingPortSectionImpacts(session);
                    session.analysis.keyChanges = toKeyChanges(existingArticleAnalyses);
                    session.analysis.generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                    }
                    if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(session, "Section AI analysis completed (manual test mode).")) {
                        renderTrackPortWorkbench(session, { statusText: "Section AI analysis completed (manual test mode)." });
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    if (e && e.message === "Request cancelled.") return;
                } finally {
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.endAiRun === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.endAiRun(runToken);
                    }
                }
            },
            render: function (_viewMode, session) {
                renderTrackPortWorkbench(session || window.TrackChangesPort.getSession() || { rawChanges: [] });
            },
            locate: function (index) {
                return locatePortRowByIndex(index, window.TrackChangesPort.getSession());
            },
        };
        if (!window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter()) {
            window.TrackChangesPort.setAdapter(defaultTrackChangesPortAdapter);
        }
        function getPortLocalName(node) {
            if (!node) return "";
            var local = node.localName || node.baseName || "";
            if (!local && node.nodeName) {
                var raw = String(node.nodeName);
                local = raw.indexOf(":") >= 0 ? raw.split(":").pop() : raw;
            }
            return String(local || "").toLowerCase();
        }
        function normalizePortWhitespace(text) {
            return String(text || "")
                .replace(/\u00a0/g, " ")
                .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                .trim();
        }
        function normalizePortRevisionDate(rawDate) {
            var value = normalizePortWhitespace(rawDate);
            if (!value) return "";
            var isoMatch = value.match(/^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/);
            if (isoMatch) return isoMatch[1];
            var parsed = new Date(value);
            if (!Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return parsed.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
            return value;
        }
        function getPortAttrByLocalName(node, localName) {
            if (!node || !node.attributes) return "";
            var target = String(localName || "").toLowerCase();
            for (var i = 0; i < node.attributes.length; i++) {
                var attr = node.attributes[i];
                var attrName = (attr && attr.name) || "";
                var attrLocal = attrName.indexOf(":") >= 0 ? attrName.split(":").pop() : attrName;
                if (String(attrLocal || "").toLowerCase() === target) return attr.value || "";
            }
            return "";
        }
        function uniquePortNonEmpty(items) {
            var seen = {};
            var out = [];
            (items || []).forEach(function (item) {
                var v = normalizePortWhitespace(item);
                if (!v) return;
                if (seen[v]) return;
                seen[v] = true;
                out.push(v);
            });
            return out;
        }
        function normalizePortArticleLookupKey(text) {
            return normalizePortWhitespace(text)
                .toLowerCase()
                .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, " ")
                .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
                .trim();
        }
        function romanToArabicForPort(romanText) {
            var value = normalizePortWhitespace(romanText).toUpperCase();
            if (!/^[IVXLCDM]+$/.test(value)) return "";
            var romanMap = { I: 1, V: 5, X: 10, L: 50, C: 100, D: 500, M: 1000 };
            var total = 0;
            var prev = 0;
            for (var i = value.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                var current = romanMap[value[i]] || 0;
                if (!current) return "";
                if (current < prev) total -= current;
                else {
                    total += current;
                    prev = current;
                }
            }
            return total > 0 ? String(total) : "";
        }
        function normalizePortArticleToken(rawToken) {
            var token = normalizePortWhitespace(rawToken).toLowerCase();
            if (!token) return "";
            if (/^\d+(\.\d+)*$/.test(token)) return token;
            if (/^[ivxlcdm]+$/.test(token)) {
                var arabic = romanToArabicForPort(token);
                return arabic || token;
            }
            return token;
        }
        function extractPortArticleToken(label) {
            var canonical = normalizePortArticleLookupKey(label);
            if (!canonical) return "";
            var articleMatch = canonical.match(/\barticle\s+([a-z0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)*)\b/);
            if (articleMatch && articleMatch[1]) return normalizePortArticleToken(articleMatch[1]);
            var leadingMatch = canonical.match(/^([a-z0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)*)\b/);
            if (leadingMatch && leadingMatch[1]) return normalizePortArticleToken(leadingMatch[1]);
            return "";
        }
        function calculatePortMatchScore(s1, s2) {
            if (!s1 || !s2) return 0;
            var clean = function (str) {
                return String(str || "")
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, "")
                    .split(/\s+/)
                    .filter(function (w) {
                        return w.length > 2;
                    });
            };
            var arr1 = clean(s1);
            var arr2 = clean(s2);
            if (!arr1.length || !arr2.length) return 0;
            var set1 = {};
            var set2 = {};
            arr1.forEach(function (t) {
                set1[t] = true;
            });
            arr2.forEach(function (t) {
                set2[t] = true;
            });
            var size1 = Object.keys(set1).length;
            var size2 = Object.keys(set2).length;
            if (!size1 || !size2) return 0;
            var intersection = 0;
            Object.keys(set1).forEach(function (token) {
                if (set2[token]) intersection++;
            });
            return (2 * intersection) / (size1 + size2);
        }
        function calculatePortMappingScore(changeText, clauseText) {
            var normalizedChange = normalizePortWhitespace(changeText);
            var normalizedClause = normalizePortWhitespace(clauseText);
            if (!normalizedChange || !normalizedClause) return 0;
            var baseScore = calculatePortMatchScore(normalizedChange, normalizedClause);
            var changePrefix = normalizedChange.split(" ").slice(0, 20).join(" ");
            var clausePrefix = normalizedClause.split(" ").slice(0, 20).join(" ");
            var prefixScore = calculatePortMatchScore(changePrefix, clausePrefix);
            var score = Math.max(baseScore, prefixScore);
            var longEnough = normalizedChange.length > 25 && normalizedClause.length > 25;
            if (
                longEnough &&
                (normalizedChange.indexOf(normalizedClause) >= 0 || normalizedClause.indexOf(normalizedChange) >= 0)
            ) {
                score = Math.max(score, 0.4);
            }
            return Math.min(score, 1);
        }
        function parseClauseMappingJsonForPort(rawData) {
            var data = rawData || {};
            var libraryName = data.clauseLibraryName || data.libraryName || "";
            var clauses = Array.isArray(data.clauses) ? data.clauses : [];
            var articleGuidance = {};
            var toGuidanceText = function (value) {
                if (value === null || value === undefined) return "";
                if (typeof value === "string") return normalizePortWhitespace(value);
                if (Array.isArray(value)) {
                    return normalizePortWhitespace(
                        value
                            .map(function (item) {
                                return toGuidanceText(item);
                            })
                            .filter(Boolean)
                            .join(" "),
                    );
                }
                if (typeof value === "object") {
                    var preferred = [
                        "guidanceComment",
                        "guidance",
                        "articleGuidance",
                        "highLevelGuidance",
                        "text",
                        "value",
                        "content",
                        "description",
                    ];
                    for (var i = 0; i < preferred.length; i++) {
                        var key = preferred[i];
                        if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(value, key)) {
                            var hit = toGuidanceText(value[key]);
                            if (hit) return hit;
                        }
                    }
                    var dynamicKey = Object.keys(value).find(function (k) {
                        return /guidance|comment|description|content|text|value/i.test(String(k || ""));
                    });
                    if (dynamicKey) {
                        var dynamicHit = toGuidanceText(value[dynamicKey]);
                        if (dynamicHit) return dynamicHit;
                    }
                }
                return normalizePortWhitespace(String(value));
            };
            var pickGuidanceFromObject = function (obj, candidateKeys) {
                if (!obj || typeof obj !== "object") return "";
                for (var i = 0; i < candidateKeys.length; i++) {
                    var key = candidateKeys[i];
                    var exact = toGuidanceText(obj[key]);
                    if (exact) return exact;
                    var ciKey = Object.keys(obj).find(function (k) {
                        return String(k || "").toLowerCase() === String(key || "").toLowerCase();
                    });
                    if (ciKey) {
                        var ciValue = toGuidanceText(obj[ciKey]);
                        if (ciValue) return ciValue;
                    }
                }
                var looseKey = Object.keys(obj).find(function (k) {
                    return /guidance|comment/i.test(String(k || ""));
                });
                if (looseKey) return toGuidanceText(obj[looseKey]);
                return "";
            };
            var addArticleGuidanceAliases = function (labelA, labelB, guidanceText) {
                var guidance = toGuidanceText(guidanceText);
                if (!guidance) return;
                var primary = normalizePortWhitespace(labelA || "") || normalizePortWhitespace(labelB || "");
                if (primary) articleGuidance[primary] = guidance;
            };
            if (Array.isArray(data.articles)) {
                data.articles.forEach(function (article) {
                    var articleGuidanceValue = pickGuidanceFromObject(article, [
                        "guidanceComment",
                        "articleGuidance",
                        "highLevelGuidance",
                        "highLevelGuidanceComment",
                    ]);
                    addArticleGuidanceAliases(
                        article && (article.id || ""),
                        article && (article.title || ""),
                        articleGuidanceValue,
                    );
                });
            }
            var rawTopLevelGuidance =
                data.articleGuidance !== undefined
                    ? data.articleGuidance
                    : data.guidance && data.guidance.articleGuidance !== undefined
                        ? data.guidance.articleGuidance
                        : null;
            if (rawTopLevelGuidance && typeof rawTopLevelGuidance === "object" && !Array.isArray(rawTopLevelGuidance)) {
                Object.keys(rawTopLevelGuidance).forEach(function (key) {
                    addArticleGuidanceAliases(key, "", rawTopLevelGuidance[key]);
                });
            } else if (Array.isArray(rawTopLevelGuidance)) {
                rawTopLevelGuidance.forEach(function (entry) {
                    if (typeof entry === "string") return;
                    var value = entry || {};
                    var labelA = value.article || value.articleId || value.id || value.key || value.label || "";
                    var labelB = value.title || value.articleTitle || value.name || "";
                    var guidanceValue = pickGuidanceFromObject(value, [
                        "guidance",
                        "guidanceComment",
                        "articleGuidance",
                        "highLevelGuidance",
                        "text",
                        "value",
                    ]);
                    addArticleGuidanceAliases(labelA, labelB, guidanceValue);
                });
            }
            var clauseArticleGuidance = {};
            clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                var articleLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(clause && (clause.articleId || clause.article || ""));
                if (!articleLabel) return;
                var guidanceValue = toGuidanceText(
                    clause &&
                    (clause.articleGuidanceComment ||
                        clause.articleGuidance ||
                        clause.highLevelGuidance ||
                        clause.highLevelGuidanceComment ||
                        clause.guidanceComment ||
                        clause.clauseGuidance ||
                        ""),
                );
                if (!guidanceValue) return;
                if (!clauseArticleGuidance[articleLabel] || guidanceValue.length > clauseArticleGuidance[articleLabel].length) {
                    clauseArticleGuidance[articleLabel] = guidanceValue;
                }
            });
            Object.keys(clauseArticleGuidance).forEach(function (articleLabel) {
                addArticleGuidanceAliases(articleLabel, "", clauseArticleGuidance[articleLabel]);
            });
            var normalizedClauses = clauses
                .map(function (clause, idx) {
                    var normalizedFallbacks = Array.isArray(clause && clause.fallbacks)
                        ? clause.fallbacks
                            .map(function (fallback) {
                                if (typeof fallback === "string") {
                                    var asText = normalizePortWhitespace(fallback);
                                    return asText ? { text: asText } : null;
                                }
                                var fallbackText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                                    (fallback && (fallback.text || fallback.replacementText || fallback.value || fallback.clause)) || "",
                                );
                                if (!fallbackText) return null;
                                return {
                                    text: fallbackText,
                                    level: normalizePortWhitespace(
                                        (fallback && (fallback.level || fallback.label || fallback.title)) || "",
                                    ),
                                    color: normalizePortWhitespace((fallback && fallback.color) || ""),
                                };
                            })
                            .filter(Boolean)
                        : [];
                    return {
                        id: (clause && clause.id) || "mapped-" + (idx + 1),
                        title: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.title) || ""),
                        text: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && (clause.text || clause.clauseText)) || ""),
                        articleId: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && (clause.articleId || clause.article)) || ""),
                        sectionId: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && (clause.sectionId || clause.section)) || ""),
                        sectionSubClause: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && (clause.sectionSubClause || clause.subClause)) || ""),
                        guidanceComment: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && (clause.guidanceComment || clause.clauseGuidance)) || ""),
                        fallbacks: normalizedFallbacks,
                        lockClause: !!(clause && (clause.lockClause || clause.approvalRequired)),
                        lockComment: normalizePortWhitespace((clause && clause.lockComment) || ""),
                    };
                })
                .filter(function (clause) {
                    return clause.text.length > 0;
                });
            if (articleGuidance && typeof articleGuidance === "object") {
                var _parseUsedIds = {};
                normalizedClauses.forEach(function (c) {
                    if (c.articleId) _parseUsedIds[c.articleId] = true;
                });
                Object.keys(articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                    if (!_parseUsedIds[k]) delete articleGuidance[k];
                });
            }
            return {
                libraryName: libraryName,
                clauses: normalizedClauses,
                articleGuidance: articleGuidance,
            };
        }
        window.parseClauseMappingJsonForPort = parseClauseMappingJsonForPort;
        function getPortArticleGuidanceForLabel(articleLabel, clauseMapping) {
            var guidanceMap =
                clauseMapping && clauseMapping.articleGuidance && typeof clauseMapping.articleGuidance === "object"
                    ? clauseMapping.articleGuidance
                    : null;
            if (!guidanceMap) return "";
            var normalizedLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(articleLabel);
            if (!normalizedLabel) return "";
            var canonicalLabel = normalizePortArticleLookupKey(normalizedLabel);
            var targetToken = extractPortArticleToken(normalizedLabel);
            var exact = normalizePortWhitespace(guidanceMap[normalizedLabel] || guidanceMap[canonicalLabel] || "");
            if (exact) return exact;
            var target = normalizedLabel.toLowerCase();
            var best = "";
            Object.keys(guidanceMap).forEach(function (key) {
                var normalizedKey = normalizePortWhitespace(key);
                if (!normalizedKey) return;
                var canonicalKey = normalizePortArticleLookupKey(normalizedKey);
                if (normalizedKey.toLowerCase() === target || canonicalKey === canonicalLabel) {
                    var value = normalizePortWhitespace(guidanceMap[key] || "");
                    if (value) best = value;
                }
            });
            if (best) return best;
            if (targetToken) {
                Object.keys(guidanceMap).forEach(function (key) {
                    var normalizedKey = normalizePortWhitespace(key);
                    if (!normalizedKey) return;
                    var keyToken = extractPortArticleToken(normalizedKey);
                    if (keyToken && keyToken === targetToken) {
                        var value = normalizePortWhitespace(guidanceMap[key] || "");
                        if (value && value.length > best.length) best = value;
                    }
                });
                if (best) return best;
            }
            Object.keys(guidanceMap).forEach(function (key) {
                var normalizedKey = normalizePortWhitespace(key);
                if (!normalizedKey) return;
                var keyLower = normalizedKey.toLowerCase();
                var canonicalKey = normalizePortArticleLookupKey(normalizedKey);
                if (
                    target.indexOf(keyLower) >= 0 ||
                    keyLower.indexOf(target) >= 0 ||
                    canonicalLabel.indexOf(canonicalKey) >= 0 ||
                    canonicalKey.indexOf(canonicalLabel) >= 0
                ) {
                    var value = normalizePortWhitespace(guidanceMap[key] || "");
                    if (value && value.length > best.length) best = value;
                }
            });
            return best;
        }
        function buildPortAiPayloadFromChange(item, clauseMapping) {
            var mapped = item && item.mappedClause ? item.mappedClause : {};
            var isInsertion =
                String((item && item.type) || "")
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .indexOf("ins") !== -1;
            var isDeletion =
                String((item && item.type) || "")
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .indexOf("del") !== -1;
            var additions =
                normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.additionsText) || "") ||
                (isInsertion ? normalizePortWhitespace(item && item.text) : "");
            var deletions =
                normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.deletionsText) || "") ||
                normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.deletedText) || "") ||
                (isDeletion ? normalizePortWhitespace(item && item.text) : "");
            var articleLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.articleId || "");
            var articleGuidanceComment = getPortArticleGuidanceForLabel(articleLabel, clauseMapping);
            var authorLabel = normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.author) || "");
            var commentList = Array.isArray(item && item.counterpartyComments) ? item.counterpartyComments : [];
            var revisionAuthors =
                item && Array.isArray(item.revisionAuthors) && item.revisionAuthors.length
                    ? item.revisionAuthors
                    : authorLabel
                        ? [{ author: authorLabel, date: normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.date) || "") }]
                        : [];
            var changeSegments =
                item && Array.isArray(item.changeSegments) && item.changeSegments.length
                    ? item.changeSegments
                    : item && item.text
                        ? [
                            {
                                type: isInsertion ? "ins" : isDeletion ? "del" : "change",
                                text: item.text,
                                author: authorLabel,
                                date: normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.date) || ""),
                            },
                        ]
                        : [];
            return {
                clauseId: mapped.id || "",
                article: articleLabel,
                section: normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.sectionId || ""),
                subSection: normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.sectionSubClause || ""),
                originalClauseText: normalizePortWhitespace((item && item.originalClauseText) || (item && item.locateText) || ""),
                currentClauseText: normalizePortWhitespace(
                    (item && item.currentClauseText) || (item && item.plainText) || (item && item.locateText) || "",
                ),
                additionsText: additions,
                deletionsText: deletions,
                revisionAuthors: revisionAuthors,
                changeSegments: changeSegments,
                counterpartyComments: commentList,
                counterpartyCommentCount: Number(item && item.counterpartyCommentCount) || commentList.length || 0,
                articleGuidanceComment: articleGuidanceComment,
                clauseGuidance: normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.guidanceComment || ""),
                lockClause: !!mapped.lockClause,
                lockComment: normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.lockComment || ""),
                fallbacks: Array.isArray(mapped.fallbacks) ? mapped.fallbacks : [],
                mappingConfidence: item && item.mappingScore ? item.mappingScore : 0,
            };
        }
        function buildPortSectionsForAi(rawChanges, clauseMapping) {
            var grouped = {};
            (rawChanges || []).forEach(function (item, index) {
                var payload = item && item.aiPayload ? item.aiPayload : buildPortAiPayloadFromChange(item, clauseMapping);
                var article = payload.article || "Unassigned Article";
                var section = normalizePortWhitespace(payload.subSection || payload.section || "") || "(No Section)";
                var articleKey = normalizePortWhitespace(article).toLowerCase() || "unassigned-article";
                var isUnassignedRow = !item || !item.mappedClause;
                var sectionKey;
                if (isUnassignedRow) {
                    var paraIdx = Number(item && item.sourceParagraphIndex);
                    var unassignedLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(
                        (item && (item.locateText || item.plainText || item.text || item.deletedText || "")) || "",
                    );
                    unassignedLabel = unassignedLabel ? unassignedLabel.slice(0, 80) : "(No Section)";
                    if (Number.isFinite(paraIdx) && paraIdx >= 0) {
                        sectionKey = "unassigned::p" + paraIdx;
                    } else {
                        sectionKey = "unassigned::idx" + index;
                    }
                    section = unassignedLabel;
                } else {
                    sectionKey = (normalizePortWhitespace(article) + "::" + normalizePortWhitespace(section)).toLowerCase();
                }
                if (!grouped[articleKey]) grouped[articleKey] = { article: article, articleKey: articleKey, sections: {} };
                if (!grouped[articleKey].sections[sectionKey]) {
                    grouped[articleKey].sections[sectionKey] = {
                        article: article,
                        section: section,
                        sectionKey: sectionKey,
                        clauses: [],
                    };
                }
                grouped[articleKey].sections[sectionKey].clauses.push(
                    Object.assign(
                        {
                            revisionIndex: index + 1,
                        },
                        payload,
                    ),
                );
            });
            return grouped;
        }
        function isPortRecitalText(text) {
            var value = normalizePortWhitespace(text).toLowerCase();
            if (!value) return false;
            if (/^\[.*\]$/.test(value)) return false;
            if (/\b(see\s+(address|section|article|exhibit|schedule|attachment|clause))\b/i.test(value)) return false;
            if (/^whereas\b/.test(value)) return true;
            if (/\bnow,\s*therefore\b/.test(value)) return true;
            if (/\brecital(s)?\b/.test(value)) return true;
            if (/\bpreamble\b/.test(value)) return true;
            return false;
        }
        function isPortRecitalClause(mappedClause) {
            if (!mappedClause || typeof mappedClause !== "object") return false;
            var articleLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(mappedClause.articleId || "").toLowerCase();
            var sectionLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(mappedClause.sectionId || "").toLowerCase();
            var subLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(mappedClause.sectionSubClause || "").toLowerCase();
            var textLabel = normalizePortWhitespace(mappedClause.text || "").toLowerCase();
            var joined = [articleLabel, sectionLabel, subLabel, textLabel].join(" ");
            return /\brecital(s)?\b/.test(joined) || /\bpreamble\b/.test(joined) || /^whereas\b/.test(textLabel);
        }
        function isPortLikelySingleSentenceAddressChange(row) {
            if (!row || typeof row !== "object") return false;
            var sourceType = normalizePortWhitespace(row.type || "").toLowerCase();
            var isDeletion =
                sourceType.indexOf("del") >= 0 || sourceType.indexOf("delete") >= 0 || sourceType.indexOf("remove") >= 0;
            var primaryText = isDeletion
                ? normalizePortWhitespace(row.originalClauseText || row.deletedText || "")
                : normalizePortWhitespace(row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text || "");
            var fallbackText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                row.locateText ||
                row.plainText ||
                row.text ||
                row.currentClauseText ||
                row.originalClauseText ||
                row.deletedText ||
                "",
            );
            var text = primaryText || fallbackText;
            if (!text) return false;
            var words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
            if (words.length < 5 || words.length > 42) return false;
            var sentenceCount = text
                .split(/[.!?]+/)
                .map(function (part) {
                    return normalizePortWhitespace(part || "");
                })
                .filter(Boolean).length;
            if (sentenceCount > 1) return false;
            var legalSubstantive =
                /\b(means|shall|must|may|will|agrees|represents|warrants|including|pursuant|herein|hereby|provided\s+that|notwithstanding)\b/i.test(
                    text,
                );
            if (legalSubstantive) return false;
            var addressLike =
                /\b(street|st\.|avenue|ave\.|road|rd\.|boulevard|blvd|drive|dr\.|lane|ln\.|suite|ste\.|floor|fl\.|building|city|zip|postal|attention|attn|facsimile|fax|email|notice)\b/i.test(
                    text,
                ) ||
                /\b\d{2,}\b/.test(text) ||
                /@/.test(text);
            return addressLike;
        }
        function isPortLikelySignatureOrEntityNameChange(row) {
            if (!row || typeof row !== "object") return false;
            var changeText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                (row.deletionsText || row.deletedText || "") + " " + (row.additionsText || "") + " " + (row.text || ""),
            );
            if (!changeText) return false;
            var contextText = normalizePortWhitespace((row.locateText || "") + " " + (row.plainText || "") + " " + changeText);
            var longestPara = normalizePortWhitespace(row.plainText || row.locateText || "");
            var paraWords = longestPara.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
            if (paraWords.length > 20) return false;
            var legalSubstantivePattern =
                /(represents|warrants|covenants|shall\s*comply|agrees\s*to|obligations|pursuant|herein|hereby|notwithstanding|indemnif|terminat|confidential|license|grant)/i;
            if (legalSubstantivePattern.test(contextText)) return false;
            var paraText = normalizePortWhitespace((row.locateText || "") + " " + (row.plainText || ""));
            var capsSource = paraText.length >= 3 ? paraText : changeText;
            var letters = capsSource.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g, "");
            var upperLetters = capsSource.replace(/[^A-Z]/g, "");
            var isAllCaps = letters.length > 0 && upperLetters.length / letters.length >= 0.85;
            var checkText = longestPara.replace(/([a-z])([A-Z])/g, "$1 $2").replace(/([A-Z]{2,})([A-Z][a-z])/g, "$1 $2");
            var entityNamePattern =
                /(board\s*of\s*trustees|trustees|inc\b|corp\b|corporation|company|llc|l\.?l\.?c|ltd|limited|gmbh|s\.a\b|plc|co\.|attn|attention|vice\s*chancellor|dean|president|director|chair|professor|dr\.|ph\.?d)/i;
            var sigPattern = /(signature|witness|executed|agreed\s*and\s*accepted|authorized|by:)/i;
            var entityOnlyPattern = /^[\s\w.,\-–—'"()&:\/]+$/i;
            var isShortEntityName =
                isAllCaps && paraWords.length <= 15 && entityOnlyPattern.test(checkText) && entityNamePattern.test(checkText);
            var isSignatureBlock = isAllCaps && sigPattern.test(checkText);
            var isUniversityOrCollegeOnly =
                isAllCaps &&
                paraWords.length <= 15 &&
                /university|college/i.test(checkText) &&
                !/(shall|must|may|will|agrees|represents|warrants|means|including)/i.test(checkText);
            return isShortEntityName || isSignatureBlock || isUniversityOrCollegeOnly;
        }
        function isPortUnassignedArticleKey(key, groupedAi) {
            var norm = normalizePortWhitespace(key || "").toLowerCase();
            if (
                !norm ||
                norm === "unassigned article" ||
                norm === "unassigned-article" ||
                norm === "(no article)" ||
                norm === "no article"
            )
                return true;
            var group = groupedAi && groupedAi[key];
            var artNorm = normalizePortWhitespace((group && group.article) || "").toLowerCase();
            return artNorm === "unassigned article" || artNorm === "";
        }
        function getOrderedPortArticleKeys(groupedAi) {
            var keys = Object.keys(groupedAi || {});
            return keys.sort(function (a, b) {
                var aUnassigned = isPortUnassignedArticleKey(a, groupedAi);
                var bUnassigned = isPortUnassignedArticleKey(b, groupedAi);
                if (aUnassigned && !bUnassigned) return 1;
                if (!aUnassigned && bUnassigned) return -1;
                var aGroup = groupedAi[a] || { sections: {} };
                var bGroup = groupedAi[b] || { sections: {} };
                var minIndex = function (group) {
                    var min = Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;
                    Object.keys(group.sections || {}).forEach(function (sectionKey) {
                        var clauses = (group.sections[sectionKey] && group.sections[sectionKey].clauses) || [];
                        clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                            var idx = Number(clause && clause.revisionIndex);
                            if (Number.isFinite(idx) && idx > 0 && idx < min) min = idx;
                        });
                    });
                    return min;
                };
                var aMin = minIndex(aGroup);
                var bMin = minIndex(bGroup);
                if (aMin !== bMin) return aMin - bMin;
                return String((aGroup && aGroup.article) || a).localeCompare(String((bGroup && bGroup.article) || b));
            });
        }
        function isPortLikelyHeadingOnly(row) {
            if (!row || typeof row !== "object") return false;
            var text = normalizePortWhitespace(row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text || row.deletedText || "");
            if (!text) return false;
            var words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
            if (words.length > 8) return false;
            if (
                /\b(shall|must|may|will|agrees|represents|warrants|means|including|provided|pursuant|herein|hereby)\b/i.test(text)
            )
                return false;
            var isAllCaps = text === text.toUpperCase() && /[A-Z]/.test(text);
            var isTitleCase = /^[A-Z][a-z]/.test(text) && !/[.;,:]/.test(text.replace(/\.$/, ""));
            var isNumberedHeading = /^\d+(\.\d+)*\.?\s+[A-Z]/.test(text);
            return isAllCaps || isTitleCase || isNumberedHeading;
        }
        function tryDirectArticleNameMatch(headingText, clauseMapping) {
            if (!headingText || !clauseMapping || !Array.isArray(clauseMapping.clauses)) return null;
            var norm = normalizePortWhitespace(headingText)
                .toLowerCase()
                .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, "")
                .trim();
            if (!norm) return null;
            var bestClause = null;
            var bestScore = 0;
            var seenArticles = {};
            clauseMapping.clauses.forEach(function (clause) {
                var artId = normalizePortWhitespace(clause.articleId || "")
                    .toLowerCase()
                    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, "")
                    .trim();
                if (!artId || seenArticles[artId]) return;
                seenArticles[artId] = true;
                var score = 0;
                if (artId === norm) {
                    score = 1;
                } else if (artId.indexOf(norm) >= 0 || norm.indexOf(artId) >= 0) {
                    var shorter = norm.length < artId.length ? norm : artId;
                    var longer = norm.length < artId.length ? artId : norm;
                    score = shorter.length / longer.length;
                } else {
                    var normWords = norm.split(/\s+/);
                    var artWords = artId.split(/\s+/);
                    var overlap = normWords.filter(function (w) {
                        return artWords.indexOf(w) >= 0;
                    }).length;
                    if (overlap > 0) {
                        score = overlap / Math.max(normWords.length, artWords.length);
                    }
                }
                if (score > bestScore) {
                    bestScore = score;
                    bestClause = clause;
                }
            });
            return bestScore >= 0.5 ? { clause: bestClause, score: bestScore } : null;
        }
        function applyClauseMappingToPortChanges(rawChanges, clauseMapping) {
            var rows = Array.isArray(rawChanges) ? rawChanges : [];
            var mapping =
                clauseMapping && Array.isArray(clauseMapping.clauses) ? clauseMapping : { clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
            rows.forEach(function (row) {
                row.mappedClause = null;
                row.mappingScore = 0;
                row._mappingDebug = null;
                var addressFiltered = isPortLikelySingleSentenceAddressChange(row);
                if (addressFiltered) {
                    row.mappedClause = null;
                    row.mappingScore = 0;
                    row._mappingDebug = { route: "address-filtered" };
                    return;
                }
                var sigEntityFiltered = isPortLikelySignatureOrEntityNameChange(row);
                if (sigEntityFiltered) {
                    row.mappedClause = null;
                    row.mappingScore = 0;
                    row._mappingDebug = { route: "signature-entity-filtered" };
                    return;
                }
                if (!mapping.clauses.length) return;
                var targetText = normalizePortWhitespace(row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text || "");
                var deletedText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                    row.deletedText || (Array.isArray(row.deleted) ? row.deleted.join(" ") : ""),
                );
                var clauseCandidates = [targetText, normalizePortWhitespace(row.plainText || ""), deletedText].filter(Boolean);
                var recitalSignalText = clauseCandidates.join(" ");
                var isRecitalChange = isPortRecitalText(recitalSignalText);
                var headingRow = isPortLikelyHeadingOnly(row);
                if (headingRow) {
                    var headingText = normalizePortWhitespace(row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text || row.deletedText || "");
                    var directMatch = tryDirectArticleNameMatch(headingText, mapping);
                    if (directMatch) {
                        row.mappedClause = directMatch.clause;
                        row.mappingScore = directMatch.score;
                        row._mappingDebug = {
                            route: "heading-direct-article-match",
                            headingText: headingText,
                            matchScore: Number(directMatch.score.toFixed(4)),
                            articleId: normalizePortWhitespace(directMatch.clause.articleId || ""),
                        };
                        return;
                    } else {
                        row.mappedClause = null;
                        row.mappingScore = 0;
                        row._mappingDebug = {
                            route: "heading-unassigned",
                            headingText: headingText,
                            reason: "no strong article-name match",
                        };
                        return;
                    }
                }
                var minAcceptScore = sigEntityFiltered ? 0.35 : 0.18;
                var bestClause = null;
                var bestScore = 0;
                var candidateClauses = mapping.clauses;
                if (isRecitalChange) {
                    var recitalClauses = mapping.clauses.filter(function (mappedClause) {
                        return isPortRecitalClause(mappedClause);
                    });
                    if (recitalClauses.length > 0) {
                        candidateClauses = recitalClauses;
                    } else {
                        row.mappedClause = null;
                        row.mappingScore = 0;
                        row._mappingDebug = { route: "recital-no-target" };
                        return;
                    }
                }
                var topCandidates = [];
                candidateClauses.forEach(function (mappedClause) {
                    var score = clauseCandidates.reduce(function (maxScore, candidateText) {
                        var candidateScore = calculatePortMappingScore(candidateText, mappedClause.text || "");
                        return candidateScore > maxScore ? candidateScore : maxScore;
                    }, 0);
                    topCandidates.push({ score: score, clause: mappedClause });
                    if (score > bestScore) {
                        bestScore = score;
                        bestClause = mappedClause;
                    }
                });
                topCandidates.sort(function (a, b) {
                    return b.score - a.score;
                });
                row._mappingDebug = {
                    route: isRecitalChange ? "recital" : sigEntityFiltered ? "standard+sigEntity" : "standard",
                    minAcceptScore: minAcceptScore,
                    bestScore: Number(bestScore.toFixed(4)),
                    accepted: bestClause && bestScore >= minAcceptScore,
                    sigEntityDetected: sigEntityFiltered,
                    inputTextPreview: (clauseCandidates[0] || "").slice(0, 150),
                    top3: topCandidates.slice(0, 3).map(function (c) {
                        return {
                            score: Number(c.score.toFixed(4)),
                            articleId: normalizePortWhitespace(c.clause.articleId || ""),
                            sectionId: normalizePortWhitespace(c.clause.sectionId || ""),
                            clausePreview: normalizePortWhitespace(c.clause.text || "").slice(0, 100),
                        };
                    }),
                };
                if (bestClause && bestScore >= minAcceptScore) {
                    row.mappedClause = bestClause;
                    row.mappingScore = bestScore;
                } else {
                    row.mappedClause = null;
                    row.mappingScore = bestScore;
                }
            });
            return rows;
        }
        async function inferPortStructureWithoutPlaybook(rawChanges) {
            var rows = Array.isArray(rawChanges) ? rawChanges : [];
            if (!rows.length) return rows;
            var apiKey =
                API_KEY ||
                window.API_KEY ||
                (typeof localStorage !== "undefined" ? localStorage.getItem("eli_gemini_api_key") : "");
            if (!apiKey || apiKey.length < 10) return rows;
            var docText = await Word.run(async function (context) {
                var bodyHtml = context.document.body.getHtml();
                await context.sync();
                var cleanDoc = getCleanTextAndContext(bodyHtml.value);
                return String((cleanDoc && cleanDoc.text) || "");
            }).catch(function () {
                return "";
            });
            var docExcerpt = String(docText || "").slice(0, 12000);
            if (!normalizePortWhitespace(docExcerpt)) return rows;
            var extractHeadingHint = function (value) {
                var text = normalizePortWhitespace(value || "");
                if (!text) return "";
                var headingMatch = text.match(
                    /\b((article|section|clause)\s+[a-z0-9.\-()]+(?:\s*[:.-])?\s*[a-z0-9 ,\-()]{0,120})/i,
                );
                if (headingMatch && headingMatch[1]) return normalizePortWhitespace(headingMatch[1]);
                var firstSentence = text.split(/[.;!?]/)[0] || "";
                return normalizePortWhitespace(firstSentence).slice(0, 160);
            };
            var compactRows = rows.slice(0, 350).map(function (row, idx) {
                var deletedFromSegments = Array.isArray(row && row.changeSegments)
                    ? row.changeSegments
                        .filter(function (seg) {
                            var t = normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.type) || "").toLowerCase();
                            return t === "del" || t.indexOf("delete") >= 0 || t.indexOf("remove") >= 0;
                        })
                        .map(function (seg) {
                            return normalizePortWhitespace((seg && seg.text) || "");
                        })
                        .filter(Boolean)
                        .join(" ")
                    : "";
                var deletedBlock = normalizePortWhitespace(
                    (row && (row.deletionsText || row.deletedText || (Array.isArray(row.deleted) ? row.deleted.join(" ") : ""))) ||
                    "",
                );
                var fullDeletedText = normalizePortWhitespace(deletedBlock || deletedFromSegments || "");
                var typeNorm = normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.type) || "").toLowerCase();
                var deletionOnly = !!(
                    fullDeletedText &&
                    (!normalizePortWhitespace((row && (row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text)) || "") ||
                        typeNorm.indexOf("del") >= 0 ||
                        typeNorm.indexOf("delete") >= 0 ||
                        typeNorm.indexOf("remove") >= 0)
                );
                return {
                    revisionIndex: idx + 1,
                    sourceParagraphIndex: Number(row && row.sourceParagraphIndex),
                    type: typeNorm,
                    text: normalizePortWhitespace((row && (row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text)) || "").slice(0, 260),
                    deletedText: fullDeletedText.slice(0, 1200),
                    deletedHeadingHint: extractHeadingHint(fullDeletedText),
                    deletionOnly: deletionOnly,
                    additionsText: normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.additionsText) || "").slice(0, 300),
                };
            });
            var prompt =
                "You are helping structure tracked changes for a contract review tool. Infer article and section labels for each tracked change using the draft text context. " +
                "Return strict raw JSON only with key: assignments. Each assignment object must have keys: revisionIndex, article, section, subSection, confidence.\n\n" +
                "Rules:\n" +
                "- Provide one assignment for EACH revisionIndex provided.\n" +
                "- Keep article/section labels EXTREMELY short (e.g., 'Section 1. Indemnity'). DO NOT include the body of the clause or definition.\n" +
                "- NEVER include full sentences. If it's a definition, only return the quoted term (e.g., '\"Confidential Information\"').\n" +
                "- Use both current text and deleted text context when classifying clause location.\n" +
                "- For deletionOnly rows, prioritize deletedHeadingHint and deletedText to infer the original section/article accurately.\n" +
                "- If no formal article/section heading exists, use article='Unassigned Article' and section='(No Section)'.\n" +
                "- confidence is a number 0-1.\n\n" +
                "TrackedChanges:\n" +
                JSON.stringify(compactRows) +
                "\n\nDraftExcerpt:\n" +
                docExcerpt;
            var raw = await callGemini(apiKey, prompt).catch(function () {
                return "";
            });
            var parsed = tryParseGeminiJSON(raw) || {};
            var assignments = Array.isArray(parsed.assignments) ? parsed.assignments : [];
            if (!assignments.length) return rows;

            var cleanSectionHeader = function (val) {
                var text = normalizePortWhitespace(val || "");
                if (!text || text === "Unassigned Article" || text === "(No Section)") return text;
                var fQ = text.indexOf('"');
                if (fQ !== -1) {
                    var sQ = text.indexOf('"', fQ + 1);
                    if (sQ !== -1 && sQ < text.length - 1) text = text.substring(0, sQ + 1);
                }
                var cIdx = text.indexOf(":");
                if (cIdx !== -1) text = text.substring(0, cIdx);
                if (text.length > 70) text = text.substring(0, 70).trim() + "...";
                return text.trim();
            };

            var assignmentByRevision = {};
            assignments.forEach(function (item) {
                var revisionIndex = Number(item && item.revisionIndex);
                if (!Number.isFinite(revisionIndex) || revisionIndex <= 0) return;
                assignmentByRevision[revisionIndex] = {
                    article: cleanSectionHeader(item && item.article) || "Unassigned Article",
                    section: cleanSectionHeader(item && item.section) || "(No Section)",
                    subSection: cleanSectionHeader(item && item.subSection),
                };
            });
            rows.forEach(function (row, idx) {
                var revisionIndex = idx + 1;
                var aiHit = assignmentByRevision[revisionIndex];
                if (!aiHit) return;
                var debugRoute = row && row._mappingDebug && row._mappingDebug.route ? row._mappingDebug.route : "";
                if (
                    debugRoute === "signature-entity-filtered" ||
                    debugRoute === "address-filtered" ||
                    debugRoute === "heading-unassigned"
                )
                    return;
                row.mappedClause = {
                    id: "ai-pre-read-" + String(revisionIndex),
                    articleId: aiHit.article,
                    sectionId: aiHit.section,
                    sectionSubClause: aiHit.subSection,
                    text: normalizePortWhitespace((row && (row.locateText || row.plainText || row.text)) || ""),
                    guidanceComment: "",
                    fallbacks: [],
                };
                row.mappingScore = 0.5;
            });
            return rows;
        }
        function buildPortArticleSectionGroups(rawChanges) {
            var grouped = {};
            (rawChanges || []).forEach(function (row) {
                var mapped = row && row.mappedClause ? row.mappedClause : {};
                var article = normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.articleId || "") || "Unassigned Article";
                var section = normalizePortWhitespace(mapped.sectionId || "") || "(No Section)";
                if (!grouped[article]) grouped[article] = {};
                if (!grouped[article][section]) grouped[article][section] = [];
                grouped[article][section].push(row);
            });
            return grouped;
        }
        function getPortRevisionMetaForTextNode(textNode, paragraphNode) {
            var parent = textNode ? textNode.parentNode : null;
            while (parent && parent !== paragraphNode) {
                var local = getPortLocalName(parent);
                if (local === "ins" || local === "del") {
                    return {
                        type: local,
                        author: getPortAttrByLocalName(parent, "author") || "",
                        date: normalizePortRevisionDate(getPortAttrByLocalName(parent, "date") || ""),
                    };
                }
                parent = parent.parentNode;
            }
            return { type: null, author: "", date: "" };
        }
        function pushPortChangeSegment(segments, type, text, meta) {
            if (!text) return;
            var author = meta && meta.author ? meta.author : "";
            var date = meta && meta.date ? meta.date : "";
            var last = segments.length > 0 ? segments[segments.length - 1] : null;
            if (last && last.type === type && (last.author || "") === author && (last.date || "") === date) {
                last.text += text;
                return;
            }
            segments.push({ type: type, text: text, author: author, date: date });
        }
        function countPortRevisionElements(paragraphNode) {
            var elements = Array.from(paragraphNode.getElementsByTagName("*"));
            var insertionCount = 0;
            var deletionCount = 0;
            elements.forEach(function (element) {
                var local = getPortLocalName(element);
                if (local === "ins") insertionCount++;
                if (local === "del") deletionCount++;
            });
            return { insertionCount: insertionCount, deletionCount: deletionCount };
        }
        function buildPortCommentLookup(xmlDoc) {
            var lookup = {};
            var commentNodes = Array.from(xmlDoc.getElementsByTagName("w:comment"));
            if (commentNodes.length === 0) commentNodes = Array.from(xmlDoc.getElementsByTagName("comment"));
            commentNodes.forEach(function (commentNode) {
                var commentId = getPortAttrByLocalName(commentNode, "id");
                if (!commentId) return;
                var author = getPortAttrByLocalName(commentNode, "author") || "Counterparty";
                var date = getPortAttrByLocalName(commentNode, "date") || "";
                var text = normalizePortWhitespace(commentNode.textContent || "");
                if (!text) return;
                lookup[commentId] = { id: commentId, author: author, date: date, text: text };
            });
            return lookup;
        }
        function getPortCommentIdsFromParagraph(paragraphNode) {
            var commentIds = [];
            var allNodes = Array.from(paragraphNode.getElementsByTagName("*"));
            allNodes.forEach(function (node) {
                var local = getPortLocalName(node);
                if (local === "commentrangestart" || local === "commentreference") {
                    var id = getPortAttrByLocalName(node, "id");
                    if (id) commentIds.push(id);
                }
            });
            return uniquePortNonEmpty(commentIds);
        }
        function normalizePortCommentId(id) {
            return normalizePortWhitespace(String(id || ""));
        }
        function appendPortCommentToRevision(revisionItem, comment) {
            if (!revisionItem) return;
            if (!Array.isArray(revisionItem.comments)) revisionItem.comments = [];
            var normalizedText = normalizePortWhitespace(comment && comment.text ? comment.text : "");
            if (!normalizedText) return;
            var exists = revisionItem.comments.some(function (existing) {
                return normalizePortWhitespace(existing && existing.text ? existing.text : "") === normalizedText;
            });
            if (!exists) {
                revisionItem.comments.push({
                    author: normalizePortWhitespace(comment && comment.author ? comment.author : "Counterparty") || "Counterparty",
                    date: normalizePortRevisionDate(comment && comment.date ? comment.date : ""),
                    text: normalizedText,
                });
            }
        }
        function findBestPortParagraphIndex(text, paragraphTexts) {
            var normalizedText = normalizePortWhitespace(text || "");
            if (!normalizedText || !Array.isArray(paragraphTexts) || paragraphTexts.length === 0)
                return { index: -1, score: 0 };
            var bestIndex = -1;
            var bestScore = 0;
            for (var i = 0; i < paragraphTexts.length; i++) {
                var score = calculatePortMatchScore(normalizedText, paragraphTexts[i] || "");
                if (score > bestScore) {
                    bestScore = score;
                    bestIndex = i;
                }
            }
            return { index: bestIndex, score: bestScore };
        }
        function attachPortWordApiCommentsToRevisions(revisionItems, commentsFromWord, liveParagraphTexts) {
            if (
                !Array.isArray(revisionItems) ||
                !Array.isArray(commentsFromWord) ||
                commentsFromWord.length === 0 ||
                !Array.isArray(liveParagraphTexts) ||
                liveParagraphTexts.length === 0
            ) {
                return;
            }
            var revisionByCommentId = {};
            revisionItems.forEach(function (revisionItem, revisionIndex) {
