                var ids = Array.isArray(revisionItem && revisionItem.commentIds) ? revisionItem.commentIds : [];
                ids.forEach(function (id) {
                    var normalizedId = normalizePortCommentId(id);
                    if (!normalizedId) return;
                    if (revisionByCommentId[normalizedId] === undefined) revisionByCommentId[normalizedId] = revisionIndex;
                });
            });
            var unmatchedComments = [];
            commentsFromWord.forEach(function (comment) {
                var normalizedId = normalizePortCommentId(comment && comment.id);
                var matchedRevisionIndex = normalizedId ? revisionByCommentId[normalizedId] : undefined;
                if (matchedRevisionIndex !== undefined) appendPortCommentToRevision(revisionItems[matchedRevisionIndex], comment);
                else unmatchedComments.push(comment);
            });
            unmatchedComments.forEach(function (comment) {
                var anchorParagraphText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                    comment && comment.anchorParagraphText ? comment.anchorParagraphText : "",
                );
                var anchorText = normalizePortWhitespace(comment && comment.anchorText ? comment.anchorText : "");
                var commentBody = normalizePortWhitespace(comment && comment.text ? comment.text : "");
                var anchorParagraphBest = anchorParagraphText
                    ? findBestPortParagraphIndex(anchorParagraphText, liveParagraphTexts)
                    : { index: -1, score: 0 };
                var anchorBest = anchorText
                    ? findBestPortParagraphIndex(anchorText, liveParagraphTexts)
                    : { index: -1, score: 0 };
                var bodyBest = commentBody
                    ? findBestPortParagraphIndex(commentBody, liveParagraphTexts)
                    : { index: -1, score: 0 };
                var commentLiveIndex = -1;
                if (anchorParagraphBest.index >= 0 && anchorParagraphBest.score >= 0.2)
                    commentLiveIndex = anchorParagraphBest.index;
                else if (anchorBest.score >= bodyBest.score) commentLiveIndex = anchorBest.index;
                else commentLiveIndex = bodyBest.index;
                var bestRevisionIndex = -1;
                var bestCompositeScore = -Infinity;
                revisionItems.forEach(function (revisionItem, revisionIndex) {
                    var clauseText =
                        revisionItem && (revisionItem.locateText || revisionItem.plainText)
                            ? revisionItem.locateText || revisionItem.plainText
                            : "";
                    var anchorScore = anchorText ? calculatePortMatchScore(anchorText, clauseText) : 0;
                    var bodyScore = commentBody ? calculatePortMatchScore(commentBody, clauseText) : 0;
                    var textScore = Math.max(anchorScore, bodyScore);
                    var clauseLiveIndex =
                        typeof revisionItem.liveParagraphIndex === "number" ? revisionItem.liveParagraphIndex : -1;
                    var compositeScore = textScore;
                    if (commentLiveIndex >= 0 && clauseLiveIndex >= 0) {
                        var distance = Math.abs(commentLiveIndex - clauseLiveIndex);
                        compositeScore = 1 / (1 + distance) + textScore * 0.1;
                    }
                    if (compositeScore > bestCompositeScore) {
                        bestCompositeScore = compositeScore;
                        bestRevisionIndex = revisionIndex;
                    }
                });
                if (bestRevisionIndex >= 0) appendPortCommentToRevision(revisionItems[bestRevisionIndex], comment);
            });
        }
        function extractPortRevisedParagraphsFromOoxml(xml) {
            if (!xml || typeof xml !== "string") return [];
            var parser = new DOMParser();
            var xmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(xml, "text/xml");
            var commentsById = buildPortCommentLookup(xmlDoc);
            var paragraphNodes = Array.from(xmlDoc.getElementsByTagName("w:p"));
            if (paragraphNodes.length === 0) paragraphNodes = Array.from(xmlDoc.getElementsByTagName("p"));
            var output = [];
            var __portXmlOccurrenceTracker = {};
            paragraphNodes.forEach(function (paragraphNode, paragraphIndex) {
                var revisionCounts = countPortRevisionElements(paragraphNode);
                var commentIds = getPortCommentIdsFromParagraph(paragraphNode);
                var comments = commentIds
                    .map(function (id) {
                        return commentsById[id];
                    })
                    .filter(Boolean);
                var walker = xmlDoc.createTreeWalker(paragraphNode, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT);
                var node = walker.nextNode();
                var plainText = "";
                var locateBaseText = "";
                var deletedRawText = "";
                var currentClauseRawText = "";
                var originalClauseRawText = "";
                var additionsRawText = "";
                var deletionsRawText = "";
                var changeSegments = [];
                var revisionAuthorMap = {};
                var hasRevision = false;
                while (node) {
                    var text = node.nodeValue || "";
                    var revisionMeta = getPortRevisionMetaForTextNode(node, paragraphNode);
                    var revisionType = revisionMeta.type;
                    plainText += text;
                    if (revisionType === "ins") {
                        locateBaseText += text;
                        currentClauseRawText += text;
                        additionsRawText += text;
                        pushPortChangeSegment(changeSegments, "ins", text, revisionMeta);
                        if (normalizePortWhitespace(revisionMeta.author || "")) {
                            var authorKeyIns = normalizePortWhitespace(revisionMeta.author);
                            if (!revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyIns]) {
                                revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyIns] = {
                                    author: authorKeyIns,
                                    date: normalizePortRevisionDate(revisionMeta.date),
                                    operations: 0,
                                };
                            } else if (!revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyIns].date && normalizePortRevisionDate(revisionMeta.date)) {
                                revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyIns].date = normalizePortRevisionDate(revisionMeta.date);
                            }
                            revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyIns].operations += 1;
                        }
                        hasRevision = true;
                    } else if (revisionType === "del") {
                        deletedRawText += text;
                        originalClauseRawText += text;
                        deletionsRawText += text;
                        pushPortChangeSegment(changeSegments, "del", text, revisionMeta);
                        if (normalizePortWhitespace(revisionMeta.author || "")) {
                            var authorKeyDel = normalizePortWhitespace(revisionMeta.author);
                            if (!revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyDel]) {
                                revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyDel] = {
                                    author: authorKeyDel,
                                    date: normalizePortRevisionDate(revisionMeta.date),
                                    operations: 0,
                                };
                            } else if (!revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyDel].date && normalizePortRevisionDate(revisionMeta.date)) {
                                revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyDel].date = normalizePortRevisionDate(revisionMeta.date);
                            }
                            revisionAuthorMap[authorKeyDel].operations += 1;
                        }
                        hasRevision = true;
                    } else {
                        locateBaseText += text;
                        currentClauseRawText += text;
                        originalClauseRawText += text;
                        pushPortChangeSegment(changeSegments, "unchanged", text, revisionMeta);
                    }
                    node = walker.nextNode();
                }
                var normalizedPlainText = normalizePortWhitespace(plainText);
                var normalizedLocateText = normalizePortWhitespace(locateBaseText) || normalizedPlainText;
                var normalizedDeletedText = normalizePortWhitespace(deletedRawText);
                var normalizedCurrentClauseText = normalizePortWhitespace(currentClauseRawText);
                var normalizedOriginalClauseText = normalizePortWhitespace(originalClauseRawText);
                var normalizedAdditionsText = normalizePortWhitespace(additionsRawText);
                var normalizedDeletionsText = normalizePortWhitespace(deletionsRawText);
                var normalizedChangeSegments = [];
                changeSegments.forEach(function (segment) {
                    var raw = String(segment.text || "")
                        .replace(/\u00a0/g, " ")
                        .replace(/\s+/g, " ");
                    if (raw.trim().length === 0) {
                        if (normalizedChangeSegments.length > 0) {
                            normalizedChangeSegments[normalizedChangeSegments.length - 1].text += raw;
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    var segEntry = {
                        type: segment.type,
                        text: raw,
                        author: normalizePortWhitespace(segment.author || ""),
                        date: normalizePortRevisionDate(segment.date || ""),
                    };
                    // Compute matchOcc for atomic disambiguation (best-script-7 pattern)
                    if (segment.type === "ins" || segment.type === "del") {
                        var occKey = raw.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/[\s\W]+/g, "");
                        if (occKey.length > 0) {
                            __portXmlOccurrenceTracker[occKey] = (__portXmlOccurrenceTracker[occKey] || 0) + 1;
                            segEntry.matchOcc = __portXmlOccurrenceTracker[occKey] - 1;
                        }
                    }
                    normalizedChangeSegments.push(segEntry);
                });
                var revisionAuthors = Object.keys(revisionAuthorMap).map(function (key) {
                    return revisionAuthorMap[key];
                });
                if (hasRevision && normalizedPlainText.length > 0) {
                    output.push({
                        sourceParagraphIndex: paragraphIndex,
                        liveParagraphIndex: paragraphIndex,
                        plainText: normalizedPlainText,
                        currentClauseText: normalizedCurrentClauseText,
                        originalClauseText: normalizedOriginalClauseText,
                        additionsText: normalizedAdditionsText,
                        deletionsText: normalizedDeletionsText,
                        deletedText: normalizedDeletedText,
                        locateText: normalizedLocateText,
                        locateTerms: buildPortLocateTerms(normalizedLocateText),
                        revisionAuthors: revisionAuthors,
                        changeSegments: normalizedChangeSegments,
                        insertionCount: revisionCounts.insertionCount,
                        deletionCount: revisionCounts.deletionCount,
                        commentIds: commentIds,
                        comments: comments,
                    });
                }
            });
            return output;
        }
        async function collectTrackedChangesForPort(options) {
            var opts = options || {};
            var includeComments = opts.includeComments !== false;
            return Word.run(async function (context) {
                var ooxmlRef = context.document.body.getOoxml();
                await context.sync();
                var revisedParagraphs = extractPortRevisedParagraphsFromOoxml((ooxmlRef && ooxmlRef.value) || "");
                if (includeComments) {
                    var comments = context.document.comments;
                    var liveParagraphs = context.document.body.paragraphs;
                    comments.load("items");
                    liveParagraphs.load("items");
                    await context.sync();
                    if (liveParagraphs.items && liveParagraphs.items.length) {
                        liveParagraphs.items.forEach(function (paragraph) {
                            paragraph.load("text");
                        });
                    }
                    var commentBindings = [];
                    if (comments.items && comments.items.length) {
                        comments.items.forEach(function (comment) {
                            comment.load("content,author,name,creationDate");
                            var commentRange = comment.getRange();
                            commentRange.load("text");
                            var anchorParagraph = commentRange.paragraphs.getFirstOrNullObject();
                            anchorParagraph.load("text,isNullObject");
                            commentBindings.push({ comment: comment, commentRange: commentRange, anchorParagraph: anchorParagraph });
                        });
                    }
                    if ((liveParagraphs.items && liveParagraphs.items.length) || commentBindings.length > 0) {
                        await context.sync();
                    }
                    var liveParagraphTexts = (liveParagraphs.items || []).map(function (paragraph) {
                        return normalizePortWhitespace((paragraph && paragraph.text) || "");
                    });
                    var commentRows = [];
                    commentBindings.forEach(function (binding) {
                        var comment = binding.comment;
                        var commentRange = binding.commentRange;
                        var anchorParagraph = binding.anchorParagraph;
                        var isoDate = "";
                        if (comment && comment.creationDate) {
                            try {
                                isoDate = new Date(comment.creationDate).toISOString().split("T")[0];
                            } catch (e) {
                                isoDate = "";
                            }
                        }
                        commentRows.push({
                            id: normalizePortCommentId(comment && comment.id),
                            author: normalizePortWhitespace((comment && (comment.author || comment.name)) || "") || "Counterparty",
                            date: isoDate,
                            text: normalizePortWhitespace((comment && comment.content) || ""),
                            anchorText: normalizePortWhitespace((commentRange && commentRange.text) || ""),
                            anchorParagraphText:
                                anchorParagraph && !anchorParagraph.isNullObject
                                    ? normalizePortWhitespace(anchorParagraph.text || "")
                                    : "",
                        });
                    });
                    attachPortWordApiCommentsToRevisions(revisedParagraphs, commentRows, liveParagraphTexts);
                }
                if (revisedParagraphs.length > 0) {
                    var idCounter = 0;
                    var rowsFromSegments = [];
                    var insertionTotal = 0;
                    var deletionTotal = 0;
                    revisedParagraphs.forEach(function (p) {
                        insertionTotal += Number(p.insertionCount || 0);
                        deletionTotal += Number(p.deletionCount || 0);
                        var insOrdinal = 0;
                        var delOrdinal = 0;
                        var paragraphDeletedText = normalizePortWhitespace(
                            (p.changeSegments || [])
                                .filter(function (s) {
                                    return s.type === "del";
                                })
                                .map(function (s) {
                                    return s.text || "";
                                })
                                .join(" "),
                        );
                        var paragraphHasInsertions = (p.changeSegments || []).some(function (s) {
                            return s.type === "ins";
                        });
                        var paragraphDeletionOnly = !!paragraphDeletedText && !paragraphHasInsertions;
                        (p.changeSegments || []).forEach(function (segment) {
                            if (segment.type !== "ins" && segment.type !== "del") return;
                            var typeOrdinal = segment.type === "ins" ? insOrdinal++ : delOrdinal++;
                            rowsFromSegments.push({
                                id: idCounter++,
                                type: segment.type,
                                text: segment.text,
                                locateText: p.locateText || p.currentClauseText || p.plainText || "",
                                locateTerms: buildPortLocateTerms(
                                    p.locateText || p.currentClauseText || p.plainText || segment.text || "",
                                ),
                                plainText: p.plainText || "",
                                currentClauseText: p.currentClauseText || "",
                                originalClauseText: p.originalClauseText || "",
                                additionsText: p.additionsText || "",
                                deletionsText: p.deletionsText || paragraphDeletedText,
                                deletedText: p.deletedText || paragraphDeletedText,
                                revisionAuthors: Array.isArray(p.revisionAuthors) ? p.revisionAuthors.slice() : [],
                                changeSegments: Array.isArray(p.changeSegments) ? p.changeSegments.slice() : [],
                                deletionOnly: paragraphDeletionOnly,
                                author: segment.author || "",
                                date: segment.date || null,
                                sourceParagraphIndex: p.sourceParagraphIndex,
                                sourceTypeOrdinal: typeOrdinal,
                                counterpartyComments: Array.isArray(p.comments) ? p.comments.slice() : [],
                                counterpartyCommentCount: Array.isArray(p.comments) ? p.comments.length : 0,
                            });
                        });
                    });
                    if (rowsFromSegments.length > 0) {
                        return {
                            rows: rowsFromSegments,
                            metrics: {
                                insertionCount: insertionTotal,
                                deletionCount: deletionTotal,
                                revisedParagraphCount: revisedParagraphs.length,
                            },
                        };
                    }
                }
                var changes = context.document.body.getTrackedChanges();
                changes.load("items");
                await context.sync();
                if (!changes.items || !changes.items.length) return [];
                var rows = [];
                for (var i = 0; i < changes.items.length; i++) {
                    var ch = changes.items[i];
                    ch.load("type,author,date");
                    var range = ch.getRange();
                    range.load("text");
                    rows.push({ ch: ch, range: range, index: i });
                }
                await context.sync();
                var fallbackRows = rows.map(function (row) {
                    var fallbackText = String((row.range && row.range.text) || "").trim();
                    return {
                        id: row.index,
                        type: String((row.ch && row.ch.type) || ""),
                        text: fallbackText,
                        locateText: fallbackText,
                        locateTerms: buildPortLocateTerms(fallbackText),
                        plainText: fallbackText,
                        counterpartyComments: [],
                        counterpartyCommentCount: 0,
                        author: String((row.ch && row.ch.author) || "").trim(),
                        date: row.ch && row.ch.date ? row.ch.date : null,
                    };
                });
                var fallbackIns = 0;
                var fallbackDel = 0;
                fallbackRows.forEach(function (r) {
                    var t = String(r.type || "").toLowerCase();
                    if (t.indexOf("insert") !== -1 || t.indexOf("ins") !== -1) fallbackIns++;
                    if (t.indexOf("delete") !== -1 || t.indexOf("del") !== -1 || t.indexOf("remove") !== -1) fallbackDel++;
                });
                return {
                    rows: fallbackRows,
                    metrics: {
                        insertionCount: fallbackIns,
                        deletionCount: fallbackDel,
                        revisedParagraphCount: 0,
                    },
                };
            });
        }
        async function runPortAdapterAi(session, triggerBtn, options) {
            var adapter = window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter();
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder("No captured track changes session found. Click Review Redline first.");
                return;
            }
            if (!adapter || typeof adapter.run !== "function") {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder("No AI adapter registered yet. Attach TrackChangesPort adapter first.", session);
                return;
            }
            var localBtn = triggerBtn || null;
            var opts = options || {};
            var keepLoadingUntilArticles = !!opts.keepLoadingUntilArticles;
            if (localBtn) localBtn.disabled = !0;
            var priorSuppress = !!session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi;
            if (keepLoadingUntilArticles) {
                session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = true;
                session._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = true;
            }
            try {
                await adapter.run(session);
                if (keepLoadingUntilArticles && session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi) {
                    session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = false;
                    session._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = false;
                    var latest =
                        window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                            ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                            : session;
                    if (latest) {
                        latest._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = false;
                        latest._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = false;
                        if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                            window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(latest);
                        }
                        if (adapter && typeof adapter.render === "function") {
                            adapter.render("captured", latest);
                        } else {
                            renderTrackPortWorkbench(latest, { statusText: "AI analysis completed." });
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (err) {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder("Run AI failed: " + (err && err.message ? err.message : String(err)), session);
            } finally {
                if (keepLoadingUntilArticles) {
                    session._releaseWorkbenchAfterArticles = false;
                    if (session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi) session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = false;
                } else {
                    session._suppressWorkbenchDuringAi = priorSuppress;
                }
                if (localBtn) localBtn.disabled = !1;
            }
        }
        async function runPortAdapterSectionsAi(session, triggerBtn) {
            var adapter = window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter();
            if (!session || !Array.isArray(session.rawChanges)) {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder("No captured track changes session found. Click Review Redline first.");
                return;
            }
            if (!adapter || typeof adapter.runSectionsOnly !== "function") {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder("Section-only AI runner unavailable on this adapter.", session);
                return;
            }
            var localBtn = triggerBtn || null;
            if (localBtn) localBtn.disabled = !0;
            try {
                await adapter.runSectionsOnly(session);
            } catch (err) {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder(
                    "Run AI (Sections) failed: " + (err && err.message ? err.message : String(err)),
                    session,
                );
            } finally {
                if (localBtn) localBtn.disabled = !1;
            }
        }
        async function enrichTrackPortCommentsInBackground(captureId) {
            try {
                var liveSession =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                        : null;
                if (!liveSession || liveSession.captureId !== captureId) return;
                var enrichedCapture = await collectTrackedChangesForPort({ includeComments: true });
                var enrichedRows = Array.isArray(enrichedCapture)
                    ? enrichedCapture
                    : Array.isArray(enrichedCapture && enrichedCapture.rows)
                        ? enrichedCapture.rows
                        : [];
                liveSession =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                        : liveSession;
                if (!liveSession || liveSession.captureId !== captureId || !Array.isArray(liveSession.rawChanges)) return;
                var keyOf = function (row) {
                    return (
                        String(row && row.sourceParagraphIndex != null ? row.sourceParagraphIndex : "") +
                        "|" +
                        normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.type) || "").toLowerCase() +
                        "|" +
                        normalizePortWhitespace((row && row.text) || "")
                    );
                };
                var commentMap = {};
                enrichedRows.forEach(function (row) {
                    var key = keyOf(row);
                    if (!key) return;
                    commentMap[key] = {
                        counterpartyComments: Array.isArray(row && row.counterpartyComments) ? row.counterpartyComments.slice() : [],
                        counterpartyCommentCount: Number(row && row.counterpartyCommentCount) || 0,
                    };
                });
                var changed = 0;
                liveSession.rawChanges.forEach(function (row) {
                    var hit = commentMap[keyOf(row)];
                    if (!hit) return;
                    var nextCount = Number(hit.counterpartyCommentCount || 0);
                    var prevCount = Number(row && row.counterpartyCommentCount) || 0;
                    if (nextCount !== prevCount) changed += 1;
                    row.counterpartyComments = Array.isArray(hit.counterpartyComments) ? hit.counterpartyComments.slice() : [];
                    row.counterpartyCommentCount = nextCount;
                });
                if (changed > 0) {
                    var mapping =
                        liveSession && liveSession.clauseMapping
                            ? liveSession.clauseMapping
                            : { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
                    liveSession.rawChanges.forEach(function (row) {
                        row.aiPayload = buildPortAiPayloadFromChange(row, mapping);
                    });
                    liveSession.grouped = buildPortArticleSectionGroups(liveSession.rawChanges || []);
                    liveSession.groupedAi = buildPortSectionsForAi(liveSession.rawChanges || [], mapping);
                    liveSession.commentsEnriched = true;
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(liveSession);
                    }
                }
            } catch (e) {
            }
        }
        window.runRedlineSummary = async function (btn) {
            var localBtn = btn || null;
            if (localBtn) localBtn.disabled = !0;
            setLoading(!0, "default");
            EliState.reset("tp.");
            EliState.set("tp.wordApiStalled", false);
            EliState.set("tp.flags", {});
            EliState.set("tp.hideResolved", false);
            EliState.set("tp.locateCandidates", {});
            EliState.set("tp.locateIndex", {});
            EliState.set("tp.showRedlinePreviews", !!userSettings.showRedlinePreviews);
            try {
                var restoredSession = await loadPersistedTrackPortSession();
                if (restoredSession && Array.isArray(restoredSession.rawChanges) && restoredSession.rawChanges.length > 0) {
                    var restoreChoice = await promptTrackPortRestoreDecision();
                    if (restoreChoice === "cancel") {
                        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Review Redline cancelled.");
                        return;
                    }
                    if (restoreChoice === "fresh") {
                        await clearTrackPortSessionPointer();
                        if (restoredSession.persistedSessionId) {
                            await deletePersistedTrackPortSessionById(restoredSession.persistedSessionId);
                        }
                    } else {
                        trackPortViewMode = restoredSession.trackPortViewMode === "sections" ? "sections" : "articles";
                        EliState.set("tp.viewModeUserSet", true);
                        if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                            window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(restoredSession);
                        }
                        var restoreAdapter =
                            window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter === "function"
                                ? window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter()
                                : null;
                        if (restoreAdapter && typeof restoreAdapter.render === "function") {
                            restoreAdapter.render("captured", restoredSession);
                        } else {
                            showTrackPortPlaceholder("Restored prior Review Redline session.", restoredSession);
                        }
                        if (typeof window.addActivity === "function") {
                            var restoredInsCount = Number(
                                (restoredSession && restoredSession.metrics && restoredSession.metrics.insertionCount) || 0,
                            );
                            var restoredDelCount = Number(
                                (restoredSession && restoredSession.metrics && restoredSession.metrics.deletionCount) || 0,
                            );
                            window.addActivity({
                                type: "track-changes",
                                icon: "🕘",
                                label: "PAST SESSION",
                                summary:
                                    "Restored Review Redline session (" +
                                    String(restoredSession.rawChanges.length) +
                                    " tracked changes, " +
                                    String(restoredInsCount) +
                                    " insertions, " +
                                    String(restoredDelCount) +
                                    " deletions).",
                                payload: {
                                    restored: true,
                                    captureId: restoredSession.captureId || "",
                                    capturedAt: restoredSession.capturedAt || "",
                                    rowCount: restoredSession.rawChanges.length,
                                    insertionCount: restoredInsCount,
                                    deletionCount: restoredDelCount,
                                },
                                restoreFn: function () {
                                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                                        window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(restoredSession);
                                    }
                                    trackPortViewMode = restoredSession.trackPortViewMode === "sections" ? "sections" : "articles";
                                    EliState.set("tp.viewModeUserSet", true);
                                    var adapterRestored =
                                        window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter === "function"
                                            ? window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter()
                                            : null;
                                    if (adapterRestored && typeof adapterRestored.render === "function") {
                                        adapterRestored.render("captured", restoredSession);
                                    } else {
                                        showTrackPortPlaceholder("Restored prior Review Redline session.", restoredSession);
                                    }
                                },
                            });
                        }
                        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Restored prior Review Redline session.");
                        return;
                    }
                }
                var capture = await collectTrackedChangesForPort({ includeComments: false });
                var rawChanges = Array.isArray(capture) ? capture : Array.isArray(capture && capture.rows) ? capture.rows : [];
                var metrics = capture && capture.metrics ? capture.metrics : null;
                if (rawChanges.length === 0) {
                    var noRedlineOut = document.getElementById("output");
                    if (noRedlineOut) {
                        noRedlineOut.innerHTML = "";
                        noRedlineOut.classList.remove("hidden");
                        var noRedlineOverlay = document.createElement("div");
                        noRedlineOverlay.style.cssText =
                            "display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:70vh; padding:24px;";
                        var noRedlineCard = document.createElement("div");
                        noRedlineCard.className = "eli-cancel-card";
                        noRedlineCard.style.cssText = "max-width:380px; width:100%; overflow:hidden;";
                        noRedlineCard.innerHTML =
                            '<div class="eli-empty-state">' +
                            '<div class="eli-empty-state-icon warning">' +
                            '<svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#b45309" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v16a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/><line x1="9" y1="15" x2="15" y2="15" opacity="0.4"/></svg>' +
                            "</div>" +
                            '<div class="eli-empty-state-title">No Redlines Detected</div>' +
                            '<div class="eli-empty-state-desc">This document doesn\u2019t appear to have any tracked changes or redlines.</div>' +
                            "</div>" +
                            '<div class="eli-empty-state-actions">' +
                            '<div class="eli-empty-state-hint">If you\u2019d like to compare this draft against an <strong>EI template</strong>, an <strong>uploaded document</strong>, or a <strong>past version</strong>, use <strong>Compare Draft</strong>. For a general analysis of risks in the document, run <strong>Legal Risks</strong>.</div>' +
                            '<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">' +
                            '<button id="noRedline-goCompare" class="btn-platinum-config primary" style="width:100%; padding:12px; font-size:12px; font-weight:800;">Take Me to Compare Draft</button>' +
                            '<button id="noRedline-goRisks" class="btn-platinum-config primary" style="width:100%; padding:12px; font-size:12px; font-weight:800;">Run Legal Risks</button>' +
                            '<button id="noRedline-goHome" class="btn-secondary">Go Home</button>' +
                            "</div>" +
                            "</div>";
                        noRedlineOverlay.appendChild(noRedlineCard);
                        noRedlineOut.appendChild(noRedlineOverlay);
                        var nrBtnCompare = document.getElementById("noRedline-goCompare");
                        var nrBtnRisks = document.getElementById("noRedline-goRisks");
                        var nrBtnHome = document.getElementById("noRedline-goHome");
                        if (nrBtnCompare)
                            nrBtnCompare.onclick = function () {
                                if (typeof showCompareToTemplateApp === "function") showCompareToTemplateApp();
                            };
                        if (nrBtnRisks)
                            nrBtnRisks.onclick = function () {
                                if (typeof runDeal360Analysis === "function") runDeal360Analysis();
                            };
                        if (nrBtnHome)
                            nrBtnHome.onclick = function () {
                                if (typeof showHome === "function") showHome();
                            };
                    }
                    return;
                }
                var session = {
                    mode: "port-shell",
                    capturedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                    captureId: String(Date.now()) + "-" + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2),
                    rawChanges: rawChanges,
                    metrics: metrics,
                    analysis: null,
                };

                if (typeof window.ensureAuthorsClassified === "function") {
                    var _tempAuthorSet = {};
                    var _tempAuthorDates = {};
                    session.rawChanges.forEach(function (rc) {
                        var single = rc && rc.author ? String(rc.author).trim() : "";
                        if (single) {
                            _tempAuthorSet[single] = true;
                            if (rc.date && !_tempAuthorDates[single]) _tempAuthorDates[single] = String(rc.date).split("T")[0];
                        }
                        if (Array.isArray(rc && rc.revisionAuthors)) {
                            rc.revisionAuthors.forEach(function (ra) {
                                var n = ra && ra.author ? String(ra.author).trim() : "";
                                if (n) {
                                    _tempAuthorSet[n] = true;
                                    if (ra.date && !_tempAuthorDates[n]) _tempAuthorDates[n] = String(ra.date).split("T")[0];
                                }
                            });
                        }
                    });
                    var _foundAuthors = Object.keys(_tempAuthorSet).filter(function (n) { return n && n.toLowerCase() !== "unknown"; });
                    if (_foundAuthors.length > 0) {
                        try {
                            await window.ensureAuthorsClassified(_foundAuthors, { source: "the redlined document", standalone: false, authorDates: _tempAuthorDates });
                        } catch (e) {
                            if (e && e.message === "Request cancelled.") return;
                        }
                    }
                }

                var detectedDocType = window._eliDisablePlaybookForReview ? "" : (window._eliDocType || "");
                var autoPlaybook = detectedDocType ? await window._getPlaybookForType(detectedDocType) : null;
                if (
                    autoPlaybook &&
                    autoPlaybook.clauseMapping &&
                    Array.isArray(autoPlaybook.clauseMapping.clauses) &&
                    autoPlaybook.clauseMapping.clauses.length > 0
                ) {
                    var _pbMapping = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(autoPlaybook.clauseMapping));
                    if (_pbMapping.articleGuidance) {
                        var _pbUsedIds = {};
                        (_pbMapping.clauses || []).forEach(function (c) {
                            if (c.articleId) _pbUsedIds[c.articleId] = true;
                        });
                        Object.keys(_pbMapping.articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                            if (!_pbUsedIds[k]) delete _pbMapping.articleGuidance[k];
                        });
                    }
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses(autoPlaybook.playbookClauses || []);
                    if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function")
                        window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping(_pbMapping);
                    session._autoSelectedPlaybook = detectedDocType;
                } else {
                    var _allPlaybooks = await window._loadTrackPortPlaybooks();
                    var _pbKeys = Object.keys(_allPlaybooks).filter(function (k) {
                        return k !== "id";
                    });
                    var _noPbChoice = { action: "ai" };
                    var _isFromHub = (document.getElementById("hubDocTypeSelect") !== null || document.getElementById("redlineDocTypeSelect") !== null || window._isFromReviewDraftConfig === true);
                    window._isFromReviewDraftConfig = false;
                    if (!_isFromHub) {
                        _noPbChoice = await new Promise(function (resolve) {
                            var overlay = document.createElement("div");
                            overlay.style.cssText =
                                "position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index:2147483000; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;";
                            var modal = document.createElement("div");
                            modal.style.cssText =
                                "background:#fff; width:min(400px,92vw); border:1px solid #d1d5db; box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); border-radius:0; overflow:hidden; font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;";
                            var headerDiv = document.createElement("div");
                            headerDiv.style.cssText =
                                "padding:14px 18px; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b2a,#1b263b); border-bottom:3px solid #c9a227;";
                            headerDiv.innerHTML =
                                '<div style="font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#c9a227; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px; margin-bottom:2px;">REVIEW REDLINE</div>' +
                                '<div style="font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; letter-spacing:-0.2px;">No Playbook Detected</div>';
                            modal.appendChild(headerDiv);
                            var bodyDiv = document.createElement("div");
                            bodyDiv.style.cssText = "padding:18px 20px;";
                            var typeLabel = detectedDocType || "this document";
                            bodyDiv.innerHTML =
                                '<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:16px; padding:12px 14px; background:#fffbeb; border:1px solid #fde68a;">' +
                                '<svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#b45309" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10.29 3.86L1.82 18a2 2 0 001.71 3h16.94a2 2 0 001.71-3L13.71 3.86a2 2 0 00-3.42 0z"/><line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="13"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12.01" y2="17"/></svg>' +
                                '<div style="font-size:12px; color:#92400e; line-height:1.5;">No matching playbook found for <strong>' +
                                typeLabel +
                                "</strong>. You can proceed with AI-only review or select a loaded playbook.</div>" +
                                "</div>";
                            modal.appendChild(bodyDiv);
                            var actionsDiv = document.createElement("div");
                            actionsDiv.style.cssText = "padding:0 20px 18px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px;";
                            var btnAI = document.createElement("button");
                            btnAI.textContent = "PROCEED WITH AI REVIEW";
                            btnAI.style.cssText =
                                "width:100%; padding:12px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; " +
                                "background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#1d4ed8); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #1d4ed8; border-radius:0; " +
                                "font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.25); transition:all 0.15s;";
                            btnAI.onmouseover = function () {
                                this.style.boxShadow = "0 4px 14px rgba(37,99,235,0.4)";
                                this.style.transform = "translateY(-1px)";
                            };
                            btnAI.onmouseout = function () {
                                this.style.boxShadow = "0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.25)";
                                this.style.transform = "none";
                            };
                            btnAI.onclick = function () {
                                overlay.remove();
                                resolve({ action: "ai" });
                            };
                            actionsDiv.appendChild(btnAI);
                            if (_pbKeys.length > 0) {
                                var pbLabel = document.createElement("div");
                                pbLabel.style.cssText =
                                    "font-size:9px; font-weight:700; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:2px;";
                                pbLabel.textContent = "OR USE A LOADED PLAYBOOK";
                                actionsDiv.appendChild(pbLabel);
                                _pbKeys.forEach(function (pbName) {
                                    var btnPb = document.createElement("button");
                                    btnPb.innerHTML = '<span style="margin-right:6px;">📋</span>' + pbName;
                                    btnPb.style.cssText =
                                        "width:100%; padding:10px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.2px; cursor:pointer; text-align:left; " +
                                        "background:#fff; color:#1e3a8a; border:1.5px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; " +
                                        "font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif; transition:all 0.15s;";
                                    btnPb.onmouseover = function () {
                                        this.style.background = "#f0f5ff";
                                        this.style.borderColor = "#93c5fd";
                                    };
                                    btnPb.onmouseout = function () {
                                        this.style.background = "#fff";
                                        this.style.borderColor = "#cbd5e1";
                                    };
                                    btnPb.onclick = function () {
                                        overlay.remove();
                                        resolve({ action: "playbook", key: pbName });
                                    };
                                    actionsDiv.appendChild(btnPb);
                                });
                            }
                            var btnCancel = document.createElement("button");
                            btnCancel.textContent = "CANCEL";
                            btnCancel.style.cssText =
                                "width:100%; padding:10px 16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; margin-top:4px; " +
                                "background:linear-gradient(to bottom,#f7f9fa 0%,#e2e8f0 100%); color:#475569; border:1.5px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius:0; " +
                                "font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif; transition:all 0.15s;";
                            btnCancel.onmouseover = function () {
                                this.style.background = "#f1f5f9";
                                this.style.color = "#1e293b";
                            };
                            btnCancel.onmouseout = function () {
                                this.style.background = "linear-gradient(to bottom,#f7f9fa 0%,#e2e8f0 100%)";
                                this.style.color = "#475569";
                            };
                            btnCancel.onclick = function () {
                                overlay.remove();
                                resolve({ action: "cancel" });
                            };
                            actionsDiv.appendChild(btnCancel);
                            modal.appendChild(actionsDiv);
                            overlay.appendChild(modal);
                            overlay.onclick = function (e) {
                                if (e.target === overlay) {
                                    overlay.remove();
                                    resolve({ action: "cancel" });
                                }
                            };
                            document.body.appendChild(overlay);
                        });
                    }
                    if (_noPbChoice.action === "cancel") {
                        if (typeof showHome === "function") showHome();
                        else if (typeof showHome === "function") showHome();
                        return;
                    }
                    if (_noPbChoice.action === "playbook" && _noPbChoice.key) {
                        var _chosenPb = _allPlaybooks[_noPbChoice.key];
                        if (
                            _chosenPb &&
                            _chosenPb.clauseMapping &&
                            Array.isArray(_chosenPb.clauseMapping.clauses) &&
                            _chosenPb.clauseMapping.clauses.length > 0
                        ) {
                            var _chosenMapping = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(_chosenPb.clauseMapping));
                            if (_chosenMapping.articleGuidance) {
                                var _chosenUsedIds = {};
                                (_chosenMapping.clauses || []).forEach(function (c) {
                                    if (c.articleId) _chosenUsedIds[c.articleId] = true;
                                });
                                Object.keys(_chosenMapping.articleGuidance).forEach(function (k) {
                                    if (!_chosenUsedIds[k]) delete _chosenMapping.articleGuidance[k];
                                });
                            }
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses === "function")
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setPlaybookClauses(_chosenPb.playbookClauses || []);
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping === "function")
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setClauseMapping(_chosenMapping);
                            session._autoSelectedPlaybook = _noPbChoice.key;
                        }
                    }
                }

                // Yield to the UI thread so modals visually clear and the loader paints before heavy looping locks the thread
                await new Promise(function (resolve) { setTimeout(resolve, 60); });

                var mapping =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getClauseMapping === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getClauseMapping()
                        : { libraryName: "", clauses: [], articleGuidance: {} };
                session.clauseMapping = mapping;
                session.rawChanges = applyClauseMappingToPortChanges(session.rawChanges || [], mapping);
                session.aiPreReadUsed = false;
                if (!Array.isArray(mapping && mapping.clauses) || mapping.clauses.length === 0) {
                    session.rawChanges = await inferPortStructureWithoutPlaybook(session.rawChanges || []);
                    session.aiPreReadUsed = true;
                }
                session.rawChanges.forEach(function (row) {
                    row.aiPayload = buildPortAiPayloadFromChange(row, mapping);
                });
                session.grouped = buildPortArticleSectionGroups(session.rawChanges || []);
                session.groupedAi = buildPortSectionsForAi(session.rawChanges || [], mapping);
                EliState.set("tp.viewModeUserSet", false);
                trackPortViewMode = session.aiPreReadUsed
                    ? "sections"
                    : shouldDefaultPortToSectionsView(session.groupedAi)
                        ? "sections"
                        : "articles";
                window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                var groupedForAuto = session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : {};
                var autoArticleKeys = getOrderedPortArticleKeys(groupedForAuto);
                var hasNamedArticles = autoArticleKeys.some(function (articleKey) {
                    var articleGroup = groupedForAuto[articleKey] || {};
                    var articleName = normalizePortWhitespace((articleGroup && articleGroup.article) || "");
                    return !!articleName && articleName.toLowerCase() !== "unassigned article";
                });
                var autoRunSectionsOnly = !!session.aiPreReadUsed || !hasNamedArticles;
                session.autoAiMode = autoRunSectionsOnly ? "sections_overview" : "articles_overview";
                var disableAiOnAnalyze =
                    window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getDisableAiOnAnalyze === "function"
                        ? window.TrackChangesPort.getDisableAiOnAnalyze()
                        : false;
                var adapter = window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter();
                if (autoRunSectionsOnly) {
                    if (adapter && typeof adapter.render === "function") {
                        adapter.render("captured", session);
                    } else {
                        showTrackPortPlaceholder(
                            rawChanges.length
                                ? "Captured changes only (test mode). Click Run AI to execute analysis."
                                : "No tracked changes found. Turn on Track Changes and make edits first.",
                            session,
                        );
                    }
                    if (!disableAiOnAnalyze) {
                        setTimeout(function () {
                            var liveSession =
                                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getSession === "function"
                                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getSession()
                                    : null;
                            if (!liveSession || liveSession.captureId !== session.captureId) return;
                            var apiKey = API_KEY || (typeof loadApiKey === "function" ? (loadApiKey(), API_KEY) : "");
                            if (!apiKey || apiKey.length < 10) return;
                            if (
                                window.TrackChangesPort &&
                                typeof window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive === "function" &&
                                window.TrackChangesPort.isAiRunActive()
                            )
                                return;
                            if (!updateTrackPortAiInPlace(liveSession, "Structure ready. Auto-running section AI...")) {
                                renderTrackPortWorkbench(liveSession, { statusText: "Structure ready. Auto-running section AI..." });
                            }
                            runPortAdapterSectionsAi(liveSession);
                        }, 0);
                    }
                } else {
                    if (!disableAiOnAnalyze) {
                        await runPortAdapterAi(session, null, { keepLoadingUntilArticles: true });
                    } else {
                        if (adapter && typeof adapter.render === "function") {
                            adapter.render("captured", session);
                        } else {
                            showTrackPortPlaceholder(
                                rawChanges.length
                                    ? "Captured changes only (AI disabled in settings). Click Run AI to execute analysis."
                                    : "No tracked changes found. Turn on Track Changes and make edits first.",
                                session,
                            );
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (typeof window.addActivity === "function") {
                    var insCount = Number((session && session.metrics && session.metrics.insertionCount) || 0);
                    var delCount = Number((session && session.metrics && session.metrics.deletionCount) || 0);
                    var summaryText =
                        rawChanges.length > 0
                            ? rawChanges.length + " tracked changes captured (" + insCount + " insertions, " + delCount + " deletions)."
                            : "No tracked changes captured.";
                    window.addActivity({
                        type: "track-changes",
                        icon: "🧾",
                        label: "Review Redline",
                        summary: summaryText,
                        payload: {
                            captureId: session.captureId,
                            capturedAt: session.capturedAt,
                            rowCount: rawChanges.length,
                            insertionCount: insCount,
                            deletionCount: delCount,
                        },
                        restoreFn: function () {
                            if (window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.setSession === "function") {
                                window.TrackChangesPort.setSession(session);
                            }
                            trackPortViewMode =
                                session.trackPortViewMode === "sections" || session.trackPortViewMode === "articles"
                                    ? session.trackPortViewMode
                                    : session && session.aiPreReadUsed
                                        ? "sections"
                                        : shouldDefaultPortToSectionsView(session && session.groupedAi ? session.groupedAi : {})
                                            ? "sections"
                                            : "articles";
                            var restoreAdapter =
                                window.TrackChangesPort && typeof window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter === "function"
                                    ? window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter()
                                    : null;
                            if (restoreAdapter && typeof restoreAdapter.render === "function") {
                                restoreAdapter.render("captured", session);
                            } else {
                                showTrackPortPlaceholder(
                                    rawChanges.length
                                        ? "Restored captured changes. Click Run AI to execute analysis."
                                        : "No tracked changes found. Turn on Track Changes and make edits first.",
                                    session,
                                );
                            }
                        },
                    });
                }
                if (typeof recordEliStat === "function" && rawChanges.length > 0)
                    recordEliStat("trackChangesAnalyzed", rawChanges.length);
                setTimeout(function () {
                    enrichTrackPortCommentsInBackground(session.captureId);
                }, 0);
            } catch (err) {
                showTrackPortPlaceholder("Port scaffold failed: " + (err && err.message ? err.message : String(err)));
            } finally {
                if (localBtn) localBtn.disabled = !1;
                setLoading(!1);
            }
        };
        window.runTrackChangesAiFromSession = function (btn) {
            return runPortAdapterAi(window.TrackChangesPort.getSession(), btn);
        };

        window.locateTrackedChange = function (index) {
            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Locate triggered! " + index, "info");
            var adapter = window.TrackChangesPort.getAdapter();
            if (adapter && typeof adapter.locate === "function") {
                return adapter.locate(index, window.TrackChangesPort.getSession());
            }
            return locatePortRowByIndex(index, window.TrackChangesPort.getSession());
        };
    })();


    window.toggleAiSpeechBubbles = function (enabled) {
        window.userSettings.enableSpeechBubbles = enabled;
        saveCurrentSettings(!0);
        var body = document.body;
        if (enabled) body.classList.remove("disable-speech-bubbles");
        else body.classList.add("disable-speech-bubbles");
    };

    window.toggleMinimizeFeedOnStart = function (enabled) {
        window.userSettings.minimizeFeedOnStart = enabled;
        saveCurrentSettings(!0);
    };

    window.toggleAutoHideSidebar = function (enabled) {
        window.userSettings.autoHideSidebar = enabled;
        saveCurrentSettings(!0);
        var body = document.body;
        if (enabled) body.classList.add("auto-hide-sidebar");
        else body.classList.remove("auto-hide-sidebar");
    }



    window.showRemainingRedlinesJumper = async function (onComplete) {
        if (!window.Word) {
            if (onComplete) onComplete();
            return;
        }

        var pendingCount = 0;
        try {
            await Word.run(async (context) => {
                var trackedChanges = context.document.body.getTrackedChanges();
                trackedChanges.load("items");
                await context.sync();
                pendingCount = trackedChanges.items.length;
            });
        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Failed to check remaining redlines", e);
            if (onComplete) onComplete();
            return;
        }

        if (pendingCount === 0) {
            if (onComplete) onComplete();
            return;
        }

        var overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.style.cssText = "position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(15,23,42,0.85); z-index:10000; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; backdrop-filter:blur(3px);";

        var modal = document.createElement("div");
        modal.style.cssText = "background:white; width:90%; max-width:400px; padding:24px; border-radius:0; box-shadow:0 15px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); display:flex; flex-direction:column; text-align:center;";
        overlay.appendChild(modal);

        var renderPrompt = function () {
            modal.innerHTML =
                "<div style='font-size:36px; margin-bottom:12px;'>🔍</div>" +
                "<h3 style='margin:0 0 10px 0; color:#0f172a; font-size:18px;'>Remaining Redlines Found</h3>" +
                "<p style='color:#475569; font-size:13px; line-height:1.5; margin-bottom:20px;'>There are still <strong>" + pendingCount + "</strong> unresolved tracked changes (e.g. formatting or minor edits) in the document.<br><br>Would you like to quickly review them now?</p>";
            
            var btnWrap = document.createElement("div");
            btnWrap.style.cssText = "display:flex; gap:10px; justify-content:center;";

            var btnSkip = document.createElement("button");
            btnSkip.innerText = "No, Proceed to Summary";
            btnSkip.style.cssText = "padding:10px 14px; background:#f1f5f9; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#475569; cursor:pointer; flex:1;";
            btnSkip.onclick = function () {
                if (overlay.parentNode) document.body.removeChild(overlay);
                if (onComplete && !overlay.dataset.completed) {
                    overlay.dataset.completed = "true";
                    onComplete();
                }
            };

            var btnYes = document.createElement("button");
            btnYes.innerText = "Yes, Review Remaining";
            btnYes.style.cssText = "padding:10px 14px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a8a 0%, #1e40af 100%); border:none; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:white; cursor:pointer; flex:1;";
            btnYes.onclick = function () {
                renderJumper();
                doJump(true); // Jump to first immediately
            };

            btnWrap.appendChild(btnSkip);
            btnWrap.appendChild(btnYes);
            modal.appendChild(btnWrap);
        };

        var renderJumper = function () {
            modal.innerHTML =
                "<div style='font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:#3b82f6; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:8px;'>Manual Review Mode</div>" +
                "<p id='jumper-status' style='color:#0f172a; font-size:14px; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:20px;'>Locating next change...</p>";

            var btnWrap = document.createElement("div");
            btnWrap.style.cssText = "display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;";

            var btnAccept = document.createElement("button");
            btnAccept.innerText = "Accept";
            btnAccept.style.cssText = "padding:10px 16px; background:#22c55e; border:none; color:white; font-weight:800; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; flex:1; min-width:80px;";
            btnAccept.onclick = function () { handleDecision("accept"); };

            var btnReject = document.createElement("button");
            btnReject.innerText = "Reject";
            btnReject.style.cssText = "padding:10px 16px; background:#ef4444; border:none; color:white; font-weight:800; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; flex:1; min-width:80px;";
            btnReject.onclick = function () { handleDecision("reject"); };

            var btnSkip = document.createElement("button");
            btnSkip.innerText = "Skip ⏭️";
            btnSkip.style.cssText = "padding:10px 16px; background:#f1f5f9; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; color:#475569; font-weight:800; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; flex:1; min-width:80px;";
            btnSkip.onclick = function () { handleDecision("jump"); };

            var btnFinish = document.createElement("button");
            btnFinish.innerText = "Finish";
            btnFinish.style.cssText = "padding:10px 16px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, #334155 0%, #1e293b 100%); border:none; color:white; font-weight:800; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; flex:1 1 100%; margin-top:4px;";
            btnFinish.onclick = function () {
                if (overlay.parentNode) document.body.removeChild(overlay);
                if (onComplete && !overlay.dataset.completed) {
                    overlay.dataset.completed = "true";
                    onComplete();
                }
            };

            btnWrap.appendChild(btnAccept);
            btnWrap.appendChild(btnReject);
            btnWrap.appendChild(btnSkip);
            btnWrap.appendChild(btnFinish);
            modal.appendChild(btnWrap);
        };

        var setStatus = function(text) {
            var el = document.getElementById("jumper-status");
            if (el) el.innerText = text;
        };

        var handleDecision = async function (action) {
            try {
                await Word.run(async (context) => {
                    var trackedChanges = context.document.body.getTrackedChanges();
                    var currentSelection = context.document.getSelection();
                    trackedChanges.load("items");
                    await context.sync();

                    if (trackedChanges.items.length === 0) {
                        if (overlay.parentNode) document.body.removeChild(overlay);
                        if (onComplete && !overlay.dataset.completed) {
                            overlay.dataset.completed = "true";
                            onComplete();
                        }
                        return;
                    }

                    var targetChange = null;
                    for (var i = 0; i < trackedChanges.items.length; i++) {
                        var changeRange = trackedChanges.items[i].getRange();
                        var location = changeRange.compareLocationWith(currentSelection);
                        await context.sync();

                        if (location.value === "Inside" || location.value === "Equal" || (action === "jump" && location.value === "After")) {
                            targetChange = trackedChanges.items[i];
                            break;
                        }
                    }

                    if (targetChange && action === "accept") {
                        targetChange.accept();
                        setStatus("Accepted. Jumping...");
                    } else if (targetChange && action === "reject") {
                        targetChange.reject();
                        setStatus("Rejected. Jumping...");
                    } else if (action === "jump" && targetChange) {
                        setStatus("Skipped. Jumping...");
                    }

                    await context.sync();
                });
                await doJump(false);
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("Error in jumper decision", e);
                setStatus("Error processing decision.");
            }
        };

        var doJump = async function(isInitial) {
            try {
                var finished = false;
                await Word.run(async (context) => {
                    var trackedChanges = context.document.body.getTrackedChanges();
                    var currentSelection = context.document.getSelection();
                    trackedChanges.load("items");
                    await context.sync();

                    if (trackedChanges.items.length === 0) {
                        finished = true;
                        return;
                    }

                    for (var i = 0; i < trackedChanges.items.length; i++) {
                        var changeRange = trackedChanges.items[i].getRange();
                        var location = changeRange.compareLocationWith(currentSelection);
                        await context.sync();

                        if (isInitial || location.value === "After") {
                            changeRange.select();
                            changeRange.scrollIntoView();
                            await context.sync();
                            setStatus(trackedChanges.items.length + " changes remaining.");
                            return;
                        }
                    }

                    if (trackedChanges.items.length > 0) {
                        trackedChanges.items[0].getRange().select();
                        trackedChanges.items[0].getRange().scrollIntoView();
                        await context.sync();
                        setStatus(trackedChanges.items.length + " changes remaining (wrapped to top).");
                    }
                });
                if (finished) {
                    if (overlay.parentNode) document.body.removeChild(overlay);
                    if (onComplete && !overlay.dataset.completed) {
                        overlay.dataset.completed = "true";
                        onComplete();
                    }
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("Error in doJump", e);
            }
        };

        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        renderPrompt();
    };



    window.executeListAction = async function(index, action) {
        if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast(action === "accept" ? "Accepting..." : "Rejecting...", "info");
        var p = window.locateTrackedChange(index);
        if (p instanceof Promise) await p;
        
        try {
            await Word.run(async (context) => {
                var trackedChanges = context.document.body.getTrackedChanges();
                var currentSelection = context.document.getSelection();
                trackedChanges.load("items");
                await context.sync();

                var targetChange = null;
                for (var i = 0; i < trackedChanges.items.length; i++) {
                    var changeRange = trackedChanges.items[i].getRange();
                    var location = changeRange.compareLocationWith(currentSelection);
                    await context.sync();

                    if (location.value === "Inside" || location.value === "Equal") {
                        targetChange = trackedChanges.items[i];
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if (targetChange && action === "accept") {
                    targetChange.accept();
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Change Accepted", "success");
                } else if (targetChange && action === "reject") {
                    targetChange.reject();
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Change Rejected", "success");
                } else {
                    if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Could not apply change. It may have already been resolved.", "error");
                }
                await context.sync();
            });
        } catch(e) {
            console.error(e);
            if (typeof showToast === "function") showToast("Error applying change.", "error");
        }
    };
  language: typescript

style:
  content: "/* =========================================\r\n   CSS VARIABLES — THEME LAYER\r\n   ========================================= */\r\n:root {\r\n    /* Typography */\r\n    --font-ui:
